authors_text: Wei Li,Can Gao,Guocheng Niu,Xinyan Xiao,Hao Liu,Jiachen Liu,Hua Wu,Haifeng Wang
title: UNIMO-2: End-to-End Unified Vision-Language Grounded Learning
title_zh: UNIMO-2：端到端统一视觉语言基础学习
abstract: Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) has achieved impressive performance on various cross-modal downstream tasks. However, most existing methods can only learn from aligned image-caption data and rely heavily on expensive regional features, which greatly limits their scalability and performance. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end unified-modal pre-training framework, namely UNIMO-2, for joint learning on both aligned image-caption data and unaligned image-only and text-only corpus. We build a unified Transformer model to jointly learn visual representations, textual representations and semantic alignment between images and texts. In particular, we propose to conduct grounded learning on both images and texts via a sharing grounded space, which helps bridge unaligned images and texts, and align the visual and textual semantic spaces on different types of corpora. The experiments show that our grounded learning method can improve textual and visual semantic alignment for improving performance on various cross-modal tasks. Moreover, benefiting from effective joint modeling of different types of corpora, our model also achieves impressive performance on single-modal visual and textual tasks. Our code and models are public at the UNIMO project page https://unimo-ptm.github.io/.
summary: Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) has achieved impressive performance on various cross-modal downstream tasks. However, most existing methods can only learn from aligned image-caption data and rely heavily on expensive regional features, which greatly limits their scalability and performance. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end unified-modal pre-training framework, namely UNIMO-2, for joint learning on both aligned image-caption data and unaligned image-only and text-only corpus. We build a unified Transformer model to jointly learn visual representations, textual representations and semantic alignment between images and texts. In particular, we propose to conduct grounded learning on both images and texts via a sharing grounded space, which helps bridge unaligned images and texts, and align the visual and textual semantic spaces on different types of corpora. The experiments show that our grounded learning method can improve textual and visual semantic alignment for improving performance on various cross-modal tasks. Moreover, benefiting from effective joint modeling of different types of corpora, our model also achieves impressive performance on single-modal visual and textual tasks. Our code and models are public at the UNIMO project page https://unimo-ptm.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言预训练（VLP）在各种跨模式下游任务上取得了令人印象深刻的表现。然而，大多数现有方法只能从对齐的图像标题数据中学习，并且严重依赖昂贵的区域特征，这极大地限制了它们的可扩展性和性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端统一模态预训练框架，即 UNIMO-2，用于对齐图像标题数据和未对齐的纯图像和纯文本语料库的联合学习。我们构建了一个统一的 Transformer 模型来共同学习图像和文本之间的视觉表示、文本表示以及语义对齐。特别是，我们建议通过共享扎根空间对图像和文本进行扎根学习，这有助于弥合未对齐的图像和文本，并对齐不同类型语料库上的视觉和文本语义空间。实验表明，我们的扎根学习方法可以改善文本和视觉语义对齐，从而提高各种跨模式任务的性能。此外，得益于不同类型语料库的有效联合建模，我们的模型在单模态视觉和文本任务上也取得了令人印象深刻的性能。我们的代码和模型在 UNIMO 项目页面 https://unimo-ptm.github.io/ 上公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UNIMO-2框架，通过端到端统一模态预训练，联合学习对齐图像-字幕数据与非对齐的纯图像/纯文本语料，提升跨模态及单模态任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言预训练方法依赖昂贵的对齐数据和区域特征，限制了模型扩展性与性能，需更高效的统一学习框架。
AI.method: 构建统一Transformer模型，通过共享的grounded空间实现图像与文本的语义对齐，联合学习对齐与非对齐数据。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法提升跨模态任务性能，并在单模态视觉与文本任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: UNIMO-2通过联合建模多类型语料与grounded学习，有效提升模型跨模态与单模态任务的综合表现。

authors_text: Meida Chen,Qingyong Hu,Zifan Yu,Hugues Thomas,Andrew Feng,Yu Hou,Kyle McCullough,Fengbo Ren,Lucio Soibelman
title: STPLS3D: A Large-Scale Synthetic and Real Aerial Photogrammetry 3D Point Cloud Dataset
title_zh: STPLS3D：大规模合成和真实航空摄影测量 3D 点云数据集
abstract: Although various 3D datasets with different functions and scales have been proposed recently, it remains challenging for individuals to complete the whole pipeline of large-scale data collection, sanitization, and annotation. Moreover, the created datasets usually suffer from extremely imbalanced class distribution or partial low-quality data samples. Motivated by this, we explore the procedurally synthetic 3D data generation paradigm to equip individuals with the full capability of creating large-scale annotated photogrammetry point clouds. Specifically, we introduce a synthetic aerial photogrammetry point clouds generation pipeline that takes full advantage of open geospatial data sources and off-the-shelf commercial packages. Unlike generating synthetic data in virtual games, where the simulated data usually have limited gaming environments created by artists, the proposed pipeline simulates the reconstruction process of the real environment by following the same UAV flight pattern on different synthetic terrain shapes and building densities, which ensure similar quality, noise pattern, and diversity with real data. In addition, the precise semantic and instance annotations can be generated fully automatically, avoiding the expensive and time-consuming manual annotation. Based on the proposed pipeline, we present a richly-annotated synthetic 3D aerial photogrammetry point cloud dataset, termed STPLS3D, with more than 16 $km^2$ of landscapes and up to 18 fine-grained semantic categories. For verification purposes, we also provide a parallel dataset collected from four areas in the real environment. Extensive experiments conducted on our datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and quality of the proposed synthetic dataset.

Moreover, the created datasets usually suffer from extremely imbalanced class distribution or partial low-quality data samples. Unlike generating synthetic data in virtual games, where the simulated data usually have limited gaming environments created by artists, the proposed pipeline simulates the reconstruction process of the real environment by following the same UAV flight pattern on different synthetic terrain shapes and building densities, which ensure similar quality, noise pattern, and diversity with real data. In addition, the precise semantic and instance annotations can be generated fully automatically, avoiding the expensive and time-consuming manual annotation. Based on the proposed pipeline, we present a richly-annotated synthetic 3D aerial photogrammetry point cloud dataset, termed STPLS3D, with more than 16 $km^2$ of landscapes and up to 18 fine-grained semantic categories. For verification purposes, we also provide a parallel dataset collected from four areas in the real environment. Extensive experiments conducted on our datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and quality of the proposed synthetic dataset.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近提出了各种具有不同功能和规模的3D数据集，但对于个人来说，完成大规模数据收集、清理和注释的整个流程仍然具有挑战性。此外，创建的数据集通常存在类别分布极其不平衡或部分低质量数据样本的问题。受此启发，我们探索程序合成 3D 数据生成范例，使个人具备创建大规模带注释的摄影测量点云的全部能力。具体来说，我们引入了一种合成航空摄影测量点云生成管道，该管道充分利用开放地理空间数据源和现成的商业包。与在虚拟游戏中生成合成数据不同，模拟数据通常具有艺术家创建的有限游戏环境，所提出的管道通过在不同的合成地形形状和建筑密度上遵循相同的无人机飞行模式来模拟真实环境的重建过程，这确保了与真实数据相似的质量、噪声模式和多样性。此外，精确的语义和实例注释可以完全自动生成，避免了昂贵且耗时的手动注释。基于所提出的流程，我们提出了一个注释丰富的合成 3D 航空摄影测量点云数据集，称为 STPLS3D，包含超过 16 $km^2$ 的景观和多达 18 个细粒度语义类别。出于验证目的，我们还提供了从真实环境中的四个区域收集的并行数据集。对我们的数据集进行的广泛实验证明了所提出的合成数据集的有效性和质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STPLS3D数据集，通过合成与真实航拍数据结合，解决大规模三维点云数据采集与标注难题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集存在类别分布不均、数据质量低及标注成本高的问题，需构建自动化生成大规模高质量标注数据的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于开放地理数据与商业软件构建合成点云生成流水线，模拟真实无人机飞行模式生成多样化数据，并自动完成语义与实例标注。
AI.result: 生成覆盖16km²、包含18类细粒度语义的合成数据集，配套4个真实场景数据，实验验证合成数据有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了高质量合成数据的自动化生成，为三维视觉研究提供可靠数据支持，降低数据获取门槛。

authors_text: Yangji He,Weihan Liang,Dongyang Zhao,Hong-Yu Zhou,Weifeng Ge,Yizhou Yu,Wenqiang Zhang
title: Attribute Surrogates Learning and Spectral Tokens Pooling in Transformers for Few-shot Learning
title_zh: Transformer 中的属性代理学习和频谱标记池用于小样本学习
comment: To appear in CVPR 2022, codes are released at https://github.com/StomachCold/HCTransformers
comments: To appear in CVPR 2022, codes are released at https://github.com/StomachCold/HCTransformers
abstract: This paper presents new hierarchically cascaded transformers that can improve data efficiency through attribute surrogates learning and spectral tokens pooling. Vision transformers have recently been thought of as a promising alternative to convolutional neural networks for visual recognition. But when there is no sufficient data, it gets stuck in overfitting and shows inferior performance. To improve data efficiency, we propose hierarchically cascaded transformers that exploit intrinsic image structures through spectral tokens pooling and optimize the learnable parameters through latent attribute surrogates. The intrinsic image structure is utilized to reduce the ambiguity between foreground content and background noise by spectral tokens pooling. And the attribute surrogate learning scheme is designed to benefit from the rich visual information in image-label pairs instead of simple visual concepts assigned by their labels. Our Hierarchically Cascaded Transformers, called HCTransformers, is built upon a self-supervised learning framework DINO and is tested on several popular few-shot learning benchmarks. In the inductive setting, HCTransformers surpass the DINO baseline by a large margin of 9.7% 5-way 1-shot accuracy and 9.17% 5-way 5-shot accuracy on miniImageNet, which demonstrates HCTransformers are efficient to extract discriminative features. Also, HCTransformers show clear advantages over SOTA few-shot classification methods in both 5-way 1-shot and 5-way 5-shot settings on four popular benchmark datasets, including miniImageNet, tieredImageNet, FC100, and CIFAR-FS. The trained weights and codes are available at https://github.com/StomachCold/HCTransformers.
summary: This paper presents new hierarchically cascaded transformers that can improve data efficiency through attribute surrogates learning and spectral tokens pooling. Vision transformers have recently been thought of as a promising alternative to convolutional neural networks for visual recognition. But when there is no sufficient data, it gets stuck in overfitting and shows inferior performance. To improve data efficiency, we propose hierarchically cascaded transformers that exploit intrinsic image structures through spectral tokens pooling and optimize the learnable parameters through latent attribute surrogates. The intrinsic image structure is utilized to reduce the ambiguity between foreground content and background noise by spectral tokens pooling. And the attribute surrogate learning scheme is designed to benefit from the rich visual information in image-label pairs instead of simple visual concepts assigned by their labels. Our Hierarchically Cascaded Transformers, called HCTransformers, is built upon a self-supervised learning framework DINO and is tested on several popular few-shot learning benchmarks. In the inductive setting, HCTransformers surpass the DINO baseline by a large margin of 9.7% 5-way 1-shot accuracy and 9.17% 5-way 5-shot accuracy on miniImageNet, which demonstrates HCTransformers are efficient to extract discriminative features. Also, HCTransformers show clear advantages over SOTA few-shot classification methods in both 5-way 1-shot and 5-way 5-shot settings on four popular benchmark datasets, including miniImageNet, tieredImageNet, FC100, and CIFAR-FS. The trained weights and codes are available at https://github.com/StomachCold/HCTransformers.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了新的分层级联变压器，可以通过属性代理学习和频谱标记池来提高数据效率。视觉变换器最近被认为是视觉识别中卷积神经网络的一种有前途的替代方案。但当没有足够的数据时，它就会陷入过度拟合并表现出较差的性能。为了提高数据效率，我们提出了分层级联变压器，通过光谱标记池利用内在图像结构，并通过潜在属性代理优化可学习参数。利用固有图像结构通过光谱标记池来减少前景内容和背景噪声之间的模糊性。属性代理学习方案的设计目的是受益于图像标签对中丰富的视觉信息，而不是由标签分配的简单视觉概念。我们的分层级联 Transformer 称为 HCTransformers，基于自监督学习框架 DINO 构建，并在几个流行的小样本学习基准上进行了测试。在归纳设置中，HCTransformers 在 miniImageNet 上以 9.7% 5-way 1-shot 准确率和 9.17% 5-way 5-shot 准确率大幅超越 DINO 基线，这表明 HCTransformers 能够有效地提取判别性特征。此外，在四个流行的基准数据集（包括 miniImageNet、tieredImageNet、FC100 和 CIFAR-FS）上，HCTransformers 在 5 路 1-shot 和 5-way 5-shot 设置中显示出明显优于 SOTA 少样本分类方法的优势。训练后的权重和代码可在 https://github.com/StomachCold/HCTransformers 获取。

AI.conclusion: HCTransformers通过结构化特征提取和属性优化机制，有效提升小样本学习性能，验证了方法在多个基准上的优越性

search_text: Attribute Surrogates Learning and Spectral Tokens Pooling in Transformers for Few-shot Learning Transformer 中的属性代理学习和频谱标记池用于小样本学习 This paper presents new hierarchically cascaded transformers that can improve data efficiency through attribute surrogates learning and spectral tokens pooling. Vision transformers have recently been thought of as a promising alternative to convolutional neural networks for visual recognition. But when there is no sufficient data, it gets stuck in overfitting and shows inferior performance. To improve data efficiency, we propose hierarchically cascaded transformers that exploit intrinsic image structures through spectral tokens pooling and optimize the learnable parameters through latent attribute surrogates. The intrinsic image structure is utilized to reduce the ambiguity between foreground content and background noise by spectral tokens pooling. And the attribute surrogate learning scheme is designed to benefit from the rich visual information in image-label pairs instead of simple visual concepts assigned by their labels. Our Hierarchically Cascaded Transformers, called HCTransformers, is built upon a self-supervised learning framework DINO and is tested on several popular few-shot learning benchmarks. In the inductive setting, HCTransformers surpass the DINO baseline by a large margin of 9.7% 5-way 1-shot accuracy and 9.17% 5-way 5-shot accuracy on miniImageNet, which demonstrates HCTransformers are efficient to extract discriminative features. Also, HCTransformers show clear advantages over SOTA few-shot classification methods in both 5-way 1-shot and 5-way 5-shot settings on four popular benchmark datasets, including miniImageNet, tieredImageNet, FC100, and CIFAR-FS. The trained weights and codes are available at https://github.com/StomachCold/HCTransformers. 本文提出了新的分层级联变压器，可以通过属性代理学习和频谱标记池来提高数据效率。视觉变换器最近被认为是视觉识别中卷积神经网络的一种有前途的替代方案。但当没有足够的数据时，它就会陷入过度拟合并表现出较差的性能。为了提高数据效率，我们提出了分层级联变压器，通过光谱标记池利用内在图像结构，并通过潜在属性代理优化可学习参数。利用固有图像结构通过光谱标记池来减少前景内容和背景噪声之间的模糊性。属性代理学习方案的设计目的是受益于图像标签对中丰富的视觉信息，而不是由标签分配的简单视觉概念。我们的分层级联 Transformer 称为 HCTransformers，基于自监督学习框架 DINO 构建，并在几个流行的小样本学习基准上进行了测试。在归纳设置中，HCTransformers 在 miniImageNet 上以 9.7% 5-way 1-shot 准确率和 9.17% 5-way 5-shot 准确率大幅超越 DINO 基线，这表明 HCTransformers 能够有效地提取判别性特征。此外，在四个流行的基准数据集（包括 miniImageNet、tieredImageNet、FC100 和 CIFAR-FS）上，HCTransformers 在 5 路 1-shot 和 5-way 5-shot 设置中显示出明显优于 SOTA 少样本分类方法的优势。训练后的权重和代码可在 https://github.com/StomachCold/HCTransformers 获取。 提出HCTransformers模型，通过属性替代学习和频谱标记池化提升小样本学习的数据效率 Yangji He,Weihan Liang,Dongyang Zhao,Hong-Yu Zhou,Weifeng Ge,Yizhou Yu,Wenqiang Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhe Huang,Ye-Ji Mun,Xiang Li,Yiqing Xie,Ninghan Zhong,Weihang Liang,Junyi Geng,Tan Chen,Katherine Driggs-Campbell
title: Hierarchical Intention Tracking for Robust Human-Robot Collaboration in Industrial Assembly Tasks
title_zh: 在工业装配任务中实现稳健人机协作的分层意图跟踪
abstract: Collaborative robots require effective human intention estimation to safely and smoothly work with humans in less structured tasks such as industrial assembly, where human intention continuously changes. We propose the concept of intention tracking and introduce a collaborative robot system that concurrently tracks intentions at hierarchical levels. The high-level intention is tracked to estimate human's interaction pattern and enable robot to (1) avoid collision with human to minimize interruption and (2) assist human to correct failure. The low-level intention estimate provides robot with task-related information. We implement the system on a UR5e robot and demonstrate robust, seamless and ergonomic human-robot collaboration in an ablative pilot study of an assembly use case. Our robot demonstrations and videos are available at \url{https://sites.google.com/view/hierarchicalintentiontracking}.
summary: Collaborative robots require effective human intention estimation to safely and smoothly work with humans in less structured tasks such as industrial assembly, where human intention continuously changes. We propose the concept of intention tracking and introduce a collaborative robot system that concurrently tracks intentions at hierarchical levels. The high-level intention is tracked to estimate human's interaction pattern and enable robot to (1) avoid collision with human to minimize interruption and (2) assist human to correct failure. The low-level intention estimate provides robot with task-related information. We implement the system on a UR5e robot and demonstrate robust, seamless and ergonomic human-robot collaboration in an ablative pilot study of an assembly use case. Our robot demonstrations and videos are available at \url{https://sites.google.com/view/hierarchicalintentiontracking}.
abstract_zh: 协作机器人需要有效的人类意图估计，才能安全、顺利地与人类一起完成结构化程度较低的任务，例如工业装配等人类意图不断变化的任务。我们提出了意图跟踪的概念，并引入了一种同时跟踪分层意图的协作机器人系统。跟踪高层意图以估计人类的交互模式，并使机器人能够（1）避免与人类碰撞以最大程度地减少干扰；（2）帮助人类纠正错误。低级意图估计为机器人提供与任务相关的信息。我们在 UR5e 机器人上实施该系统，并在装配用例的烧蚀试点研究中展示了稳健、无缝且符合人体工程学的人机协作。我们的机器人演示和视频位于 \url{https://sites.google.com/view/hierarchicalintentiontracking}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层意图跟踪系统，用于工业装配中的人机协作，通过跟踪人类意图的高低层次实现安全与高效协作。
AI.motivation: 工业装配等非结构化任务中，人类意图持续变化，传统方法难以有效估计意图，导致协作效率与安全性不足。
AI.method: 设计分层意图跟踪框架，高层跟踪交互模式以避免碰撞并辅助纠错，低层获取任务信息，基于UR5e机器人实现系统。
AI.result: 在消融实验中验证系统鲁棒性，实现无缝人机协作，提供演示视频展示效果。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效提升工业装配人机协作的安全性与效率，为复杂场景下的意图跟踪研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Chixiang Ma,Weihong Lin,Lei Sun,Qiang Huo
title: Robust Table Detection and Structure Recognition from Heterogeneous Document Images
title_zh: 异构文档图像的鲁棒表检测和结构识别
comment: Accepted by Pattern Recognition on 27 Aug. 2022
comments: Accepted by Pattern Recognition on 27 Aug. 2022
abstract: We introduce a new table detection and structure recognition approach named RobusTabNet to detect the boundaries of tables and reconstruct the cellular structure of each table from heterogeneous document images. For table detection, we propose to use CornerNet as a new region proposal network to generate higher quality table proposals for Faster R-CNN, which has significantly improved the localization accuracy of Faster R-CNN for table detection. Consequently, our table detection approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on three public table detection benchmarks, namely cTDaR TrackA, PubLayNet and IIIT-AR-13K, by only using a lightweight ResNet-18 backbone network. Furthermore, we propose a new split-and-merge based table structure recognition approach, in which a novel spatial CNN based separation line prediction module is proposed to split each detected table into a grid of cells, and a Grid CNN based cell merging module is applied to recover the spanning cells. As the spatial CNN module can effectively propagate contextual information across the whole table image, our table structure recognizer can robustly recognize tables with large blank spaces and geometrically distorted (even curved) tables. Thanks to these two techniques, our table structure recognition approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on three public benchmarks, including SciTSR, PubTabNet and cTDaR TrackB2-Modern. Moreover, we have further demonstrated the advantages of our approach in recognizing tables with complex structures, large blank spaces, as well as geometrically distorted or even curved shapes on a more challenging in-house dataset.
summary: We introduce a new table detection and structure recognition approach named RobusTabNet to detect the boundaries of tables and reconstruct the cellular structure of each table from heterogeneous document images. For table detection, we propose to use CornerNet as a new region proposal network to generate higher quality table proposals for Faster R-CNN, which has significantly improved the localization accuracy of Faster R-CNN for table detection. Consequently, our table detection approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on three public table detection benchmarks, namely cTDaR TrackA, PubLayNet and IIIT-AR-13K, by only using a lightweight ResNet-18 backbone network. Furthermore, we propose a new split-and-merge based table structure recognition approach, in which a novel spatial CNN based separation line prediction module is proposed to split each detected table into a grid of cells, and a Grid CNN based cell merging module is applied to recover the spanning cells. As the spatial CNN module can effectively propagate contextual information across the whole table image, our table structure recognizer can robustly recognize tables with large blank spaces and geometrically distorted (even curved) tables. Thanks to these two techniques, our table structure recognition approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on three public benchmarks, including SciTSR, PubTabNet and cTDaR TrackB2-Modern. Moreover, we have further demonstrated the advantages of our approach in recognizing tables with complex structures, large blank spaces, as well as geometrically distorted or even curved shapes on a more challenging in-house dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种名为 RobusTabNet 的新表格检测和结构识别方法，用于检测表格的边界并从异构文档图像重建每个表格的细胞结构。对于表格检测，我们建议使用 CornerNet 作为新的区域提议网络，为 Faster R-CNN 生成更高质量的表格提议，这显着提高了 Faster R-CNN 用于表格检测的定位精度。因此，我们的表检测方法仅使用轻量级 ResNet-18 主干网络，就在三个公共表检测基准（即 cTDaR TrackA、PubLayNet 和 IIIT-AR-13K）上实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们提出了一种新的基于拆分和合并的表格结构识别方法，其中提出了一种新颖的基于空间 CNN 的分离线预测模块，将每个检测到的表格拆分为单元格网格，并应用基于网格 CNN 的单元格合并模块来恢复跨越单元格。由于空间 CNN 模块可以有效地在整个表格图像中传播上下文信息，因此我们的表格结构识别器可以稳健地识别具有大空白的表格和几何扭曲（甚至弯曲）的表格。得益于这两种技术，我们的表结构识别方法在三个公共基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，包括 SciTSR、PubTabNet 和 cTDaR TrackB2-Modern。此外，我们还进一步证明了我们的方法在识别更具挑战性的内部数据集上具有复杂结构、大空白空间以及几何扭曲甚至弯曲形状的表格方面的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RobusTabNet的新方法，用于从异构文档图像中检测表格边界并重建表格的单元格结构。
AI.motivation: 现有表格检测与结构识别方法在处理复杂结构、大空白区域及几何畸变表格时表现不足，需提升鲁棒性与适应性。
AI.method: 采用CornerNet作为区域建议网络优化Faster R-CNN的表格定位；设计基于空间CNN的分割线预测模块与基于网格CNN的单元格合并模块，实现复杂表格结构的分割与合并。
AI.result: 在cTDaR TrackA、PubLayNet、IIIT-AR-13K等三个基准测试中取得表格检测SOTA性能，在SciTSR、PubTabNet等基准及自建复杂结构数据集上实现结构识别SOTA。
AI.conclusion: RobusTabNet通过创新的分割-合并框架与轻量级网络设计，有效解决了复杂表格检测与结构识别难题，验证了方法在多场景下的鲁棒性与先进性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RobusTabNet的新方法，用于从异构文档图像中检测表格边界并重建表格的单元格结构。
ai_content.motivation: 现有表格检测与结构识别方法在处理复杂结构、大空白区域及几何畸变表格时表现不足，需提升鲁棒性与适应性。
ai_content.method: 采用CornerNet作为区域建议网络优化Faster R-CNN的表格定位；设计基于空间CNN的分割线预测模块与基于网格CNN的单元格合并模块，实现复杂表格结构的分割与合并。
ai_content.result: 在cTDaR TrackA、PubLayNet、IIIT-AR-13K等三个基准测试中取得表格检测SOTA性能，在SciTSR、PubTabNet等基准及自建复杂结构数据集上实现结构识别SOTA。
ai_content.conclusion: RobusTabNet通过创新的分割-合并框架与轻量级网络设计，有效解决了复杂表格检测与结构识别难题，验证了方法在多场景下的鲁棒性与先进性。

search_text: Robust Table Detection and Structure Recognition from Heterogeneous Document Images 异构文档图像的鲁棒表检测和结构识别 We introduce a new table detection and structure recognition approach named RobusTabNet to detect the boundaries of tables and reconstruct the cellular structure of each table from heterogeneous document images. For table detection, we propose to use CornerNet as a new region proposal network to generate higher quality table proposals for Faster R-CNN, which has significantly improved the localization accuracy of Faster R-CNN for table detection. Consequently, our table detection approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on three public table detection benchmarks, namely cTDaR TrackA, PubLayNet and IIIT-AR-13K, by only using a lightweight ResNet-18 backbone network. Furthermore, we propose a new split-and-merge based table structure recognition approach, in which a novel spatial CNN based separation line prediction module is proposed to split each detected table into a grid of cells, and a Grid CNN based cell merging module is applied to recover the spanning cells. As the spatial CNN module can effectively propagate contextual information across the whole table image, our table structure recognizer can robustly recognize tables with large blank spaces and geometrically distorted (even curved) tables. Thanks to these two techniques, our table structure recognition approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on three public benchmarks, including SciTSR, PubTabNet and cTDaR TrackB2-Modern. Moreover, we have further demonstrated the advantages of our approach in recognizing tables with complex structures, large blank spaces, as well as geometrically distorted or even curved shapes on a more challenging in-house dataset. 我们引入了一种名为 RobusTabNet 的新表格检测和结构识别方法，用于检测表格的边界并从异构文档图像重建每个表格的细胞结构。对于表格检测，我们建议使用 CornerNet 作为新的区域提议网络，为 Faster R-CNN 生成更高质量的表格提议，这显着提高了 Faster R-CNN 用于表格检测的定位精度。因此，我们的表检测方法仅使用轻量级 ResNet-18 主干网络，就在三个公共表检测基准（即 cTDaR TrackA、PubLayNet 和 IIIT-AR-13K）上实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们提出了一种新的基于拆分和合并的表格结构识别方法，其中提出了一种新颖的基于空间 CNN 的分离线预测模块，将每个检测到的表格拆分为单元格网格，并应用基于网格 CNN 的单元格合并模块来恢复跨越单元格。由于空间 CNN 模块可以有效地在整个表格图像中传播上下文信息，因此我们的表格结构识别器可以稳健地识别具有大空白的表格和几何扭曲（甚至弯曲）的表格。得益于这两种技术，我们的表结构识别方法在三个公共基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，包括 SciTSR、PubTabNet 和 cTDaR TrackB2-Modern。此外，我们还进一步证明了我们的方法在识别更具挑战性的内部数据集上具有复杂结构、大空白空间以及几何扭曲甚至弯曲形状的表格方面的优势。 本文提出一种名为RobusTabNet的新方法，用于从异构文档图像中检测表格边界并重建表格的单元格结构。 Chixiang Ma,Weihong Lin,Lei Sun,Qiang Huo cs.CV

authors_text: Shaolei Zhang,Yang Feng
title: Reducing Position Bias in Simultaneous Machine Translation with Length-Aware Framework
title_zh: 使用长度感知框架减少同步机器翻译中的位置偏差
comment: Accept to ACL 2022 main conference. 14 pages, 11 figures
comments: Accept to ACL 2022 main conference. 14 pages, 11 figures
abstract: Simultaneous machine translation (SiMT) starts translating while receiving the streaming source inputs, and hence the source sentence is always incomplete during translating. Different from the full-sentence MT using the conventional seq-to-seq architecture, SiMT often applies prefix-to-prefix architecture, which forces each target word to only align with a partial source prefix to adapt to the incomplete source in streaming inputs. However, the source words in the front positions are always illusoryly considered more important since they appear in more prefixes, resulting in position bias, which makes the model pay more attention on the front source positions in testing. In this paper, we first analyze the phenomenon of position bias in SiMT, and develop a Length-Aware Framework to reduce the position bias by bridging the structural gap between SiMT and full-sentence MT. Specifically, given the streaming inputs, we first predict the full-sentence length and then fill the future source position with positional encoding, thereby turning the streaming inputs into a pseudo full-sentence. The proposed framework can be integrated into most existing SiMT methods to further improve performance. Experiments on two representative SiMT methods, including the state-of-the-art adaptive policy, show that our method successfully reduces the position bias and thereby achieves better SiMT performance.
summary: Simultaneous machine translation (SiMT) starts translating while receiving the streaming source inputs, and hence the source sentence is always incomplete during translating. Different from the full-sentence MT using the conventional seq-to-seq architecture, SiMT often applies prefix-to-prefix architecture, which forces each target word to only align with a partial source prefix to adapt to the incomplete source in streaming inputs. However, the source words in the front positions are always illusoryly considered more important since they appear in more prefixes, resulting in position bias, which makes the model pay more attention on the front source positions in testing. In this paper, we first analyze the phenomenon of position bias in SiMT, and develop a Length-Aware Framework to reduce the position bias by bridging the structural gap between SiMT and full-sentence MT. Specifically, given the streaming inputs, we first predict the full-sentence length and then fill the future source position with positional encoding, thereby turning the streaming inputs into a pseudo full-sentence. The proposed framework can be integrated into most existing SiMT methods to further improve performance. Experiments on two representative SiMT methods, including the state-of-the-art adaptive policy, show that our method successfully reduces the position bias and thereby achieves better SiMT performance.
abstract_zh: 同步机器翻译（SiMT）在接收流式源输入时开始翻译，因此在翻译过程中源句子总是不完整。与使用传统 seq-to-seq 架构的全句 MT 不同，SiMT 通常采用 prefix-to-prefix 架构，强制每个目标单词仅与部分源前缀对齐，以适应流输入中的不完整源。然而，位于前面位置的源词总是被错误地认为更重要，因为它们出现在更多的前缀中，导致位置偏差，这使得模型在测试时更加关注前面的源位置。在本文中，我们首先分析了 SiMT 中的位置偏差现象，并开发了一种长度感知框架，通过弥合 SiMT 和全句 MT 之间的结构差距来减少位置偏差。具体来说，给定流输入，我们首先预测完整句子的长度，然后用位置编码填充未来的源位置，从而将流输入变成伪完整句子。所提出的框架可以集成到大多数现有的 SiMT 方法中，以进一步提高性能。对两种代表性 SiMT 方法（包括最先进的自适应策略）的实验表明，我们的方法成功地减少了位置偏差，从而实现了更好的 SiMT 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种长度感知框架，以减少同步机器翻译中的位置偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 同步机器翻译（SiMT）在处理流式输入时，由于源句不完整，模型容易对前面的位置赋予更高的重要性，从而产生位置偏差，影响翻译性能。
AI.method: 作者首先预测完整句子的长度，然后用位置编码填充未来的源位置，将流式输入转换为伪完整句子，从而减少位置偏差。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法成功减少了位置偏差，并提升了SiMT的性能。
AI.conclusion: 长度感知框架能够有效缓解SiMT中的位置偏差问题，适用于多种现有的SiMT方法，提升整体翻译效果。

authors_text: Luyang Huang,Guocheng Niu,Jiachen Liu,Xinyan Xiao,Hua Wu
title: DU-VLG: Unifying Vision-and-Language Generation via Dual Sequence-to-Sequence Pre-training
title_zh: DU-VLG：通过双序列到序列预训练统一视觉和语言生成
comment: To appear at Findings of ACL 2022
comments: To appear at Findings of ACL 2022
abstract: Due to the limitations of the model structure and pre-training objectives, existing vision-and-language generation models cannot utilize pair-wise images and text through bi-directional generation. In this paper, we propose DU-VLG, a framework which unifies vision-and-language generation as sequence generation problems. DU-VLG is trained with novel dual pre-training tasks: multi-modal denoising autoencoder tasks and modality translation tasks. To bridge the gap between image understanding and generation, we further design a novel commitment loss. We compare pre-training objectives on image captioning and text-to-image generation datasets. Results show that DU-VLG yields better performance than variants trained with uni-directional generation objectives or the variant without the commitment loss. We also obtain higher scores compared to previous state-of-the-art systems on three vision-and-language generation tasks. In addition, human judges further confirm that our model generates real and relevant images as well as faithful and informative captions.
summary: Due to the limitations of the model structure and pre-training objectives, existing vision-and-language generation models cannot utilize pair-wise images and text through bi-directional generation. In this paper, we propose DU-VLG, a framework which unifies vision-and-language generation as sequence generation problems. DU-VLG is trained with novel dual pre-training tasks: multi-modal denoising autoencoder tasks and modality translation tasks. To bridge the gap between image understanding and generation, we further design a novel commitment loss. We compare pre-training objectives on image captioning and text-to-image generation datasets. Results show that DU-VLG yields better performance than variants trained with uni-directional generation objectives or the variant without the commitment loss. We also obtain higher scores compared to previous state-of-the-art systems on three vision-and-language generation tasks. In addition, human judges further confirm that our model generates real and relevant images as well as faithful and informative captions.
abstract_zh: 由于模型结构和预训练目标的限制，现有的视觉和语言生成模型无法通过双向生成来利用成对的图像和文本。在本文中，我们提出了 DU-VLG，一个将视觉和语言生成统一为序列生成问题的框架。 DU-VLG 采用新颖的双重预训练任务进行训练：多模态去噪自动编码器任务和模态翻译任务。为了弥合图像理解和生成之间的差距，我们进一步设计了一种新颖的承诺损失。我们比较图像字幕和文本到图像生成数据集的预训练目标。结果表明，DU-VLG 比使用单向生成目标训练的变体或没有承诺损失的变体产生更好的性能。与之前最先进的系统相比，我们在三个视觉和语言生成任务上也获得了更高的分数。此外，人类评委进一步确认我们的模型生成真实且相关的图像以及忠实且信息丰富的字幕。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DU-VLG框架，通过双序列到序列预训练任务统一视觉和语言生成，解决现有模型双向生成能力不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言生成模型因结构和预训练目标限制，无法有效利用图像与文本的双向生成关系，导致生成效果受限。
AI.method: 设计DU-VLG框架，包含多模态去噪自编码任务和模态翻译任务，并引入新的commitment loss以弥合图像理解与生成间的差距。
AI.result: 在图像描述和文本到图像生成任务中优于单向生成模型及无commitment loss的变体，在三个基准任务上超越现有最优方法，且人类评估确认生成内容的真实性与相关性。
AI.conclusion: DU-VLG通过双预训练任务与commitment loss有效提升双向生成能力，验证了统一视觉-语言生成框架的有效性。

search_text: DU-VLG: Unifying Vision-and-Language Generation via Dual Sequence-to-Sequence Pre-training DU-VLG：通过双序列到序列预训练统一视觉和语言生成 Due to the limitations of the model structure and pre-training objectives, existing vision-and-language generation models cannot utilize pair-wise images and text through bi-directional generation. In this paper, we propose DU-VLG, a framework which unifies vision-and-language generation as sequence generation problems. DU-VLG is trained with novel dual pre-training tasks: multi-modal denoising autoencoder tasks and modality translation tasks. To bridge the gap between image understanding and generation, we further design a novel commitment loss. We compare pre-training objectives on image captioning and text-to-image generation datasets. Results show that DU-VLG yields better performance than variants trained with uni-directional generation objectives or the variant without the commitment loss. We also obtain higher scores compared to previous state-of-the-art systems on three vision-and-language generation tasks. In addition, human judges further confirm that our model generates real and relevant images as well as faithful and informative captions. 由于模型结构和预训练目标的限制，现有的视觉和语言生成模型无法通过双向生成来利用成对的图像和文本。在本文中，我们提出了 DU-VLG，一个将视觉和语言生成统一为序列生成问题的框架。 DU-VLG 采用新颖的双重预训练任务进行训练：多模态去噪自动编码器任务和模态翻译任务。为了弥合图像理解和生成之间的差距，我们进一步设计了一种新颖的承诺损失。我们比较图像字幕和文本到图像生成数据集的预训练目标。结果表明，DU-VLG 比使用单向生成目标训练的变体或没有承诺损失的变体产生更好的性能。与之前最先进的系统相比，我们在三个视觉和语言生成任务上也获得了更高的分数。此外，人类评委进一步确认我们的模型生成真实且相关的图像以及忠实且信息丰富的字幕。 本文提出DU-VLG框架，通过双序列到序列预训练任务统一视觉和语言生成，解决现有模型双向生成能力不足的问题。 Luyang Huang,Guocheng Niu,Jiachen Liu,Xinyan Xiao,Hua Wu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Wei Wang,Loai Danial,Yang Li,Eric Herbelin,Evgeny Pikhay,Yakov Roizin,Barak Hoffer,Zhongrui Wang,Shahar Kvatinsky
title: A memristive deep belief neural network based on silicon synapses
title_zh: 基于硅突触的忆阻深度信念神经网络
abstract: Memristor-based neuromorphic computing could overcome the limitations of traditional von Neumann computing architectures -- in which data are shuffled between separate memory and processing units -- and improve the performance of deep neural networks. However, this will require accurate synaptic-like device performance, and memristors typically suffer from poor yield and a limited number of reliable conductance states. Here we report floating gate memristive synaptic devices that are fabricated in a commercial complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) process. These silicon synapses offer analogue tunability, high endurance, long retention times, predictable cycling degradation, moderate device-to-device variations, and high yield. They also provide two orders of magnitude higher energy efficiency for multiply-accumulate operations than graphics processing units. We use two 12-by-8 arrays of the memristive devices for in-situ training of a 19-by-8 memristive restricted Boltzmann machine for pattern recognition via a gradient descent algorithm based on contrastive divergence. We then create a memristive deep belief neural network consisting of three memristive restricted Boltzmann machines. We test this on the modified National Institute of Standards and Technology (MNIST) dataset, demonstrating recognition accuracy up to 97.05%.
summary: Memristor-based neuromorphic computing could overcome the limitations of traditional von Neumann computing architectures -- in which data are shuffled between separate memory and processing units -- and improve the performance of deep neural networks. However, this will require accurate synaptic-like device performance, and memristors typically suffer from poor yield and a limited number of reliable conductance states. Here we report floating gate memristive synaptic devices that are fabricated in a commercial complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) process. These silicon synapses offer analogue tunability, high endurance, long retention times, predictable cycling degradation, moderate device-to-device variations, and high yield. They also provide two orders of magnitude higher energy efficiency for multiply-accumulate operations than graphics processing units. We use two 12-by-8 arrays of the memristive devices for in-situ training of a 19-by-8 memristive restricted Boltzmann machine for pattern recognition via a gradient descent algorithm based on contrastive divergence. We then create a memristive deep belief neural network consisting of three memristive restricted Boltzmann machines. We test this on the modified National Institute of Standards and Technology (MNIST) dataset, demonstrating recognition accuracy up to 97.05%.
abstract_zh: 基于忆阻器的神经拟态计算可以克服传统冯诺依曼计算架构的局限性（其中数据在单独的内存和处理单元之间进行洗牌），并提高深度神经网络的性能。然而，这将需要精确的类似突触的器件性能，而忆阻器通常会遇到产量低和可靠电导状态数量有限的问题。在这里，我们报告了采用商业互补金属氧化物半导体（CMOS）工艺制造的浮栅忆阻突触器件。这些硅突触提供模拟可调性、高耐用性、长保留时间、可预测的循环退化、适度的器件间变化和高产量。它们还为乘法累加运算提供比图形处理单元高两个数量级的能源效率。我们使用两个 12×8 忆阻器件阵列对 19×8 忆阻受限玻尔兹曼机进行原位训练，通过基于对比散度的梯度下降算法进行模式识别。然后，我们创建一个由三个忆阻受限玻尔兹曼机组成的忆阻深度信念神经网络。我们在修改后的美国国家标准技术研究院 (MNIST) 数据集上进行了测试，结果表明识别准确率高达 97.05%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于硅突触的忆阻器深度信念神经网络，旨在克服传统冯·诺依曼架构的限制，提升深度神经网络的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统计算架构存在内存与处理器间数据传输瓶颈，忆阻器虽具潜力但面临良率低、导电态有限等问题，需开发高性能突触器件以推动类脑计算。
AI.method: 采用商用CMOS工艺制造浮栅忆阻器突触，实现类比可调、高耐久性与能效；利用12×8阵列进行原位训练，构建三层受限玻尔兹曼机组成的深度信念网络，并在MNIST数据集上测试。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上实现97.05%的识别准确率，乘积累加运算能效较GPU高两个数量级，器件良率高且循环退化可预测。
AI.conclusion: 硅突触器件为高效类脑计算提供了可行方案，其高能效与可靠性可推动忆阻器在深度学习中的应用。

authors_text: Yaohui Wang,Di Yang,Francois Bremond,Antitza Dantcheva
title: Latent Image Animator: Learning to Animate Images via Latent Space Navigation
title_zh: 潜在图像动画师：学习通过潜在空间导航制作图像动画
abstract: Due to the remarkable progress of deep generative models, animating images has become increasingly efficient, whereas associated results have become increasingly realistic. Current animation-approaches commonly exploit structure representation extracted from driving videos. Such structure representation is instrumental in transferring motion from driving videos to still images. However, such approaches fail in case the source image and driving video encompass large appearance variation. Moreover, the extraction of structure information requires additional modules that endow the animation-model with increased complexity. Deviating from such models, we here introduce the Latent Image Animator (LIA), a self-supervised autoencoder that evades need for structure representation. LIA is streamlined to animate images by linear navigation in the latent space. Specifically, motion in generated video is constructed by linear displacement of codes in the latent space. Towards this, we learn a set of orthogonal motion directions simultaneously, and use their linear combination, in order to represent any displacement in the latent space. Extensive quantitative and qualitative analysis suggests that our model systematically and significantly outperforms state-of-art methods on VoxCeleb, Taichi and TED-talk datasets w.r.t. generated quality.
summary: Due to the remarkable progress of deep generative models, animating images has become increasingly efficient, whereas associated results have become increasingly realistic. Current animation-approaches commonly exploit structure representation extracted from driving videos. Such structure representation is instrumental in transferring motion from driving videos to still images. However, such approaches fail in case the source image and driving video encompass large appearance variation. Moreover, the extraction of structure information requires additional modules that endow the animation-model with increased complexity. Deviating from such models, we here introduce the Latent Image Animator (LIA), a self-supervised autoencoder that evades need for structure representation. LIA is streamlined to animate images by linear navigation in the latent space. Specifically, motion in generated video is constructed by linear displacement of codes in the latent space. Towards this, we learn a set of orthogonal motion directions simultaneously, and use their linear combination, in order to represent any displacement in the latent space. Extensive quantitative and qualitative analysis suggests that our model systematically and significantly outperforms state-of-art methods on VoxCeleb, Taichi and TED-talk datasets w.r.t. generated quality.
abstract_zh: 由于深度生成模型的显着进步，动画图像变得越来越高效，而相关结果也变得越来越真实。当前的动画方法通常利用从驾驶视频中提取的结构表示。这种结构表示有助于将运动从驾驶视频转移到静态图像。然而，如果源图像和驾驶视频包含较大的外观变化，这种方法就会失败。此外，结构信息的提取需要额外的模块，这使得动画模型变得更加复杂。与此类模型不同，我们在这里引入了潜在图像动画器（LIA），这是一种自我监督的自动编码器，可以避免结构表示的需要。 LIA 经过简化，可通过潜在空间中的线性导航来制作动画图像。具体来说，生成视频中的运动是通过潜在空间中代码的线性位移来构造的。为此，我们同时学习一组正交运动方向，并使用它们的线性组合，以表示潜在空间中的任何位移。广泛的定量和定性分析表明，我们的模型在 VoxCeleb、Taichi 和 TED-talk 数据集上系统地、显着地优于最先进的方法。生成的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Latent Image Animator (LIA)的自监督自动编码器，通过在潜在空间中进行线性导航来实现图像动画化，无需依赖结构表示。
AI.motivation: 现有图像动画方法依赖于驱动视频的结构表示，但存在源图像与驱动视频外观差异大时失效的问题，且结构信息提取模块增加了模型复杂度。
AI.method: LIA通过学习一组正交运动方向，并利用其线性组合表示潜在空间中的任意位移，仅通过潜在空间的线性导航生成动画视频。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb、Taichi和TED-talk数据集上，LIA在生成质量方面系统性地显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: LIA通过潜在空间导航避免了结构表示的依赖，提供了一种更高效且通用的图像动画解决方案。

LIA is streamlined to animate images by linear navigation in the latent space. Specifically, motion in generated video is constructed by linear displacement of codes in the latent space. Towards this, we learn a set of orthogonal motion directions simultaneously, and use their linear combination, in order to represent any displacement in the latent space. Extensive quantitative and qualitative analysis suggests that our model systematically and significantly outperforms state-of-art methods on VoxCeleb, Taichi and TED-talk datasets w.r.t. generated quality. 由于深度生成模型的显着进步，动画图像变得越来越高效，而相关结果也变得越来越真实。当前的动画方法通常利用从驾驶视频中提取的结构表示。这种结构表示有助于将运动从驾驶视频转移到静态图像。然而，如果源图像和驾驶视频包含较大的外观变化，这种方法就会失败。此外，结构信息的提取需要额外的模块，这使得动画模型变得更加复杂。与此类模型不同，我们在这里引入了潜在图像动画器（LIA），这是一种自我监督的自动编码器，可以避免结构表示的需要。 LIA 经过简化，可通过潜在空间中的线性导航来制作动画图像。具体来说，生成视频中的运动是通过潜在空间中代码的线性位移来构造的。为此，我们同时学习一组正交运动方向，并使用它们的线性组合，以表示潜在空间中的任何位移。广泛的定量和定性分析表明，我们的模型在 VoxCeleb、Taichi 和 TED-talk 数据集上系统地、显着地优于最先进的方法。生成的质量。 本文提出了一种名为Latent Image Animator (LIA)的自监督自动编码器，通过在潜在空间中进行线性导航来实现图像动画化，无需依赖结构表示。 Yaohui Wang,Di Yang,Francois Bremond,Antitza Dantcheva cs.CV

authors_text: Qing Chang,Junran Peng,Lingxie Xie,Jiajun Sun,Haoran Yin,Qi Tian,Zhaoxiang Zhang
title: DATA: Domain-Aware and Task-Aware Self-supervised Learning
title_zh: DATA：领域感知和任务感知的自我监督学习
abstract: The paradigm of training models on massive data without label through self-supervised learning (SSL) and finetuning on many downstream tasks has become a trend recently. However, due to the high training costs and the unconsciousness of downstream usages, most self-supervised learning methods lack the capability to correspond to the diversities of downstream scenarios, as there are various data domains, different vision tasks and latency constraints on models. Neural architecture search (NAS) is one universally acknowledged fashion to conquer the issues above, but applying NAS on SSL seems impossible as there is no label or metric provided for judging model selection. In this paper, we present DATA, a simple yet effective NAS approach specialized for SSL that provides Domain-Aware and Task-Aware pre-training. Specifically, we (i) train a supernet which could be deemed as a set of millions of networks covering a wide range of model scales without any label, (ii) propose a flexible searching mechanism compatible with SSL that enables finding networks of different computation costs, for various downstream vision tasks and data domains without explicit metric provided. Instantiated With MoCo v2, our method achieves promising results across a wide range of computation costs on downstream tasks, including image classification, object detection and semantic segmentation. DATA is orthogonal to most existing SSL methods and endows them the ability of customization on downstream needs. Extensive experiments on other SSL methods demonstrate the generalizability of the proposed method. Code is released at https://github.com/GAIA-vision/GAIA-ssl
summary: The paradigm of training models on massive data without label through self-supervised learning (SSL) and finetuning on many downstream tasks has become a trend recently. However, due to the high training costs and the unconsciousness of downstream usages, most self-supervised learning methods lack the capability to correspond to the diversities of downstream scenarios, as there are various data domains, different vision tasks and latency constraints on models. Neural architecture search (NAS) is one universally acknowledged fashion to conquer the issues above, but applying NAS on SSL seems impossible as there is no label or metric provided for judging model selection. In this paper, we present DATA, a simple yet effective NAS approach specialized for SSL that provides Domain-Aware and Task-Aware pre-training. Specifically, we (i) train a supernet which could be deemed as a set of millions of networks covering a wide range of model scales without any label, (ii) propose a flexible searching mechanism compatible with SSL that enables finding networks of different computation costs, for various downstream vision tasks and data domains without explicit metric provided. Instantiated With MoCo v2, our method achieves promising results across a wide range of computation costs on downstream tasks, including image classification, object detection and semantic segmentation. DATA is orthogonal to most existing SSL methods and endows them the ability of customization on downstream needs. Extensive experiments on other SSL methods demonstrate the generalizability of the proposed method. Code is released at https://github.com/GAIA-vision/GAIA-ssl
abstract_zh: 通过自监督学习（SSL）和对许多下游任务进行微调来对无标签的海量数据进行训练模型的范例最近已成为一种趋势。然而，由于高昂的训练成本和下游使用的无意识，大多数自监督学习方法缺乏对应下游场景多样性的能力，因为下游场景存在各种数据域、不同的视觉任务和模型的延迟约束。神经架构搜索（NAS）是一种公认​​的解决上述问题的方式，但在 SSL 上应用 NAS 似乎是不可能的，因为没有提供用于判断模型选择的标签或指标。在本文中，我们提出了 DATA，一种简单而有效的 NAS 方法，专门用于 SSL，提供域感知和任务感知预训练。具体来说，我们（i）训练一个超级网络，它可以被视为一组数百万个网络，覆盖广泛的模型规模，没有任何标签，（ii）提出一种与 SSL 兼容的灵活搜索机制，能够为各种下游视觉任务和数据域找到不同计算成本的网络，而无需提供明确的度量。通过 MoCo v2 实例化，我们的方法在下游任务的各种计算成本上取得了有希望的结果，包括图像分类、对象检测和语义分割。 DATA 与大多数现有的 SSL 方法正交，并赋予它们根据下游需求进行定制的能力。对其他 SSL 方法的大量实验证明了该方法的通用性。代码发布于 https://github.com/GAIA-vision/GAIA-ssl

AI.tldr: 本文提出DATA方法，通过领域和任务感知的神经架构搜索（NAS）解决自监督学习（SSL）在下游任务中的适应性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SSL方法缺乏对下游任务多样性（如不同数据领域、视觉任务和延迟约束）的适配能力，而NAS因缺乏标签难以直接应用于SSL。
AI.method: 训练无需标签的超网络，并设计兼容SSL的灵活搜索机制，实现不同计算成本下针对多任务和多领域的模型搜索。
AI.result: 在图像分类、目标检测和语义分割任务中，DATA在多种计算成本下均取得优异结果，且与多种SSL方法兼容。
AI.conclusion: DATA为SSL方法提供了下游需求定制能力，其通用性通过其他SSL方法的实验得到验证。

authors_text: Kashish Dhal,Abhishek Kashyap,Animesh Chakravarthy
title: Collision Avoidance of 3-Dimensional Objects in Dynamic Environments
title_zh: 动态环境中 3 维物体的碰撞避免
abstract: Achieving collision avoidance between moving objects is an important objective while determining robot trajectories. In performing collision avoidance maneuvers, the relative shapes of the objects play an important role. The literature largely models the shapes of the objects as spheres, and this can make the avoidance maneuvers very conservative, especially when the objects are of elongated shape and/or non-convex. In this paper, we model the shapes of the objects using suitable combinations of ellipsoids and one-sheeted/two-sheeted hyperboloids, and employ a collision cone approach to achieve collision avoidance. We present a method to construct the 3-D collision cone, and present simulation results demonstrating the working of the collision avoidance laws.
summary: Achieving collision avoidance between moving objects is an important objective while determining robot trajectories. In performing collision avoidance maneuvers, the relative shapes of the objects play an important role. The literature largely models the shapes of the objects as spheres, and this can make the avoidance maneuvers very conservative, especially when the objects are of elongated shape and/or non-convex. In this paper, we model the shapes of the objects using suitable combinations of ellipsoids and one-sheeted/two-sheeted hyperboloids, and employ a collision cone approach to achieve collision avoidance. We present a method to construct the 3-D collision cone, and present simulation results demonstrating the working of the collision avoidance laws.
abstract_zh: 在确定机器人轨迹时，实现移动物体之间的碰撞避免是一个重要目标。在执行防撞机动时，物体的相对形状起着重要作用。文献主要将物体的形状建模为球体，这可以使回避动作非常保守，特别是当物体具有细长形状和/或非凸面时。在本文中，我们使用椭球体和单片/两片双曲面的适当组合对物体的形状进行建模，并采用碰撞锥方法来实现避免碰撞。我们提出了一种构建 3-D 碰撞锥体的方法，并提供了模拟结果，证明了防撞法则的工作原理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于椭球体和双曲面组合模型的三维碰撞避免方法，用于动态环境中移动物体的轨迹规划。
AI.motivation: 传统球体模型在细长或非凸物体避碰中过于保守，需更精确的几何模型提升避碰效率。
AI.method: 采用椭球体与单叶/双叶双曲面组合描述物体形状，结合碰撞锥理论构建三维碰撞锥模型。
AI.result: 仿真验证了新方法在动态环境中的有效性，相比球体模型能更灵活地处理复杂形状物体的避碰。
AI.conclusion: 提出的几何建模与碰撞锥方法可提升三维动态避碰的精度，适用于复杂形态物体的轨迹规划。

authors_text: Chaoyu Liu,Zhonghua Qiao,Qian Zhang
title: An Active Contour Model with Local Variance Force Term and Its Efficient Minimization Solver for Multi-phase Image Segmentation
title_zh: 具有局部方差力项的主动轮廓模型及其高效的多相图像分割最小化求解器
abstract: In this paper, we propose an active contour model with a local variance force (LVF) term that can be applied to multi-phase image segmentation problems. With the LVF, the proposed model is very effective in the segmentation of images with noise. To solve this model efficiently, we represent the regularization term by characteristic functions and then design a minimization algorithm based on a modification of the iterative convolution-thresholding method (ICTM), namely ICTM-LVF. This minimization algorithm enjoys the energy-decaying property under some conditions and has highly efficient performance in the segmentation. To overcome the initialization issue of active contour models, we generalize the inhomogeneous graph Laplacian initialization method (IGLIM) to the multi-phase case and then apply it to give the initial contour of the ICTM-LVF solver. Numerical experiments are conducted on synthetic images and real images to demonstrate the capability of our initialization method, and the effectiveness of the local variance force for noise robustness in the multi-phase image segmentation.
summary: In this paper, we propose an active contour model with a local variance force (LVF) term that can be applied to multi-phase image segmentation problems. With the LVF, the proposed model is very effective in the segmentation of images with noise. To solve this model efficiently, we represent the regularization term by characteristic functions and then design a minimization algorithm based on a modification of the iterative convolution-thresholding method (ICTM), namely ICTM-LVF. This minimization algorithm enjoys the energy-decaying property under some conditions and has highly efficient performance in the segmentation. To overcome the initialization issue of active contour models, we generalize the inhomogeneous graph Laplacian initialization method (IGLIM) to the multi-phase case and then apply it to give the initial contour of the ICTM-LVF solver. Numerical experiments are conducted on synthetic images and real images to demonstrate the capability of our initialization method, and the effectiveness of the local variance force for noise robustness in the multi-phase image segmentation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种具有局部方差力（LVF）项的活动轮廓模型，可应用于多相图像分割问题。借助 LVF，所提出的模型在带有噪声的图像分割中非常有效。为了有效地求解该模型，我们用特征函数表示正则化项，然后设计基于迭代卷积阈值方法（ICTM）的修改的最小化算法，即ICTM-LVF。该最小化算法在一定条件下具有能量衰减特性，在分割方面具有高效的性能。为了克服活动轮廓模型的初始化问题，我们将非齐次图拉普拉斯初始化方法（IGLIM）推广到多相情况，然后应用它来给出 ICTM-LVF 求解器的初始轮廓。在合成图像和真实图像上进行了数值实验，以证明我们的初始化方法的能力，以及多相图像分割中局部方差力对噪声鲁棒性的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合局部方差力项的活动轮廓模型及高效求解算法，用于解决多相图像分割问题，尤其针对噪声图像的分割效果显著。
AI.motivation: 传统活动轮廓模型在噪声图像分割中表现不佳，且初始化敏感。需设计更鲁棒的模型及初始化方法以提升分割精度与稳定性。
AI.method: 引入局部方差力项增强噪声鲁棒性，通过特征函数表示正则化项并设计ICTM-LVF算法；改进非均匀图拉普拉斯初始化方法（IGLIM）用于多相初始轮廓生成。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，所提方法在合成图像与真实图像中均能有效分割，初始化方法可靠，LVF项显著提升噪声环境下的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 新模型与算法在多相图像分割中展现优异的噪声鲁棒性与高效性，改进的初始化方法有效缓解了传统模型对初始位置的依赖问题。

search_text: An Active Contour Model with Local Variance Force Term and Its Efficient Minimization Solver for Multi-phase Image Segmentation 具有局部方差力项的主动轮廓模型及其高效的多相图像分割最小化求解器 In this paper, we propose an active contour model with a local variance force (LVF) term that can be applied to multi-phase image segmentation problems. With the LVF, the proposed model is very effective in the segmentation of images with noise. To solve this model efficiently, we represent the regularization term by characteristic functions and then design a minimization algorithm based on a modification of the iterative convolution-thresholding method (ICTM), namely ICTM-LVF. This minimization algorithm enjoys the energy-decaying property under some conditions and has highly efficient performance in the segmentation. To overcome the initialization issue of active contour models, we generalize the inhomogeneous graph Laplacian initialization method (IGLIM) to the multi-phase case and then apply it to give the initial contour of the ICTM-LVF solver. Numerical experiments are conducted on synthetic images and real images to demonstrate the capability of our initialization method, and the effectiveness of the local variance force for noise robustness in the multi-phase image segmentation. 在本文中，我们提出了一种具有局部方差力（LVF）项的活动轮廓模型，可应用于多相图像分割问题。借助 LVF，所提出的模型在带有噪声的图像分割中非常有效。为了有效地求解该模型，我们用特征函数表示正则化项，然后设计基于迭代卷积阈值方法（ICTM）的修改的最小化算法，即ICTM-LVF。该最小化算法在一定条件下具有能量衰减特性，在分割方面具有高效的性能。为了克服活动轮廓模型的初始化问题，我们将非齐次图拉普拉斯初始化方法（IGLIM）推广到多相情况，然后应用它来给出 ICTM-LVF 求解器的初始轮廓。在合成图像和真实图像上进行了数值实验，以证明我们的初始化方法的能力，以及多相图像分割中局部方差力对噪声鲁棒性的有效性。 本文提出一种结合局部方差力项的活动轮廓模型及高效求解算法，用于解决多相图像分割问题，尤其针对噪声图像的分割效果显著。 Chaoyu Liu,Zhonghua Qiao,Qian Zhang cs.CV,math.NA

authors_text: Dat Vu,Bao Ngo,Hung Phan
title: HybridNets: End-to-End Perception Network
title_zh: HybridNets：端到端感知网络
abstract: End-to-end Network has become increasingly important in multi-tasking. One prominent example of this is the growing significance of a driving perception system in autonomous driving. This paper systematically studies an end-to-end perception network for multi-tasking and proposes several key optimizations to improve accuracy. First, the paper proposes efficient segmentation head and box/class prediction networks based on weighted bidirectional feature network. Second, the paper proposes automatically customized anchor for each level in the weighted bidirectional feature network. Third, the paper proposes an efficient training loss function and training strategy to balance and optimize network. Based on these optimizations, we have developed an end-to-end perception network to perform multi-tasking, including traffic object detection, drivable area segmentation and lane detection simultaneously, called HybridNets, which achieves better accuracy than prior art. In particular, HybridNets achieves 77.3 mean Average Precision on Berkeley DeepDrive Dataset, outperforms lane detection with 31.6 mean Intersection Over Union with 12.83 million parameters and 15.6 billion floating-point operations. In addition, it can perform visual perception tasks in real-time and thus is a practical and accurate solution to the multi-tasking problem. Code is available at https://github.com/datvuthanh/HybridNets.
summary: End-to-end Network has become increasingly important in multi-tasking. One prominent example of this is the growing significance of a driving perception system in autonomous driving. This paper systematically studies an end-to-end perception network for multi-tasking and proposes several key optimizations to improve accuracy. First, the paper proposes efficient segmentation head and box/class prediction networks based on weighted bidirectional feature network. Second, the paper proposes automatically customized anchor for each level in the weighted bidirectional feature network. Third, the paper proposes an efficient training loss function and training strategy to balance and optimize network. Based on these optimizations, we have developed an end-to-end perception network to perform multi-tasking, including traffic object detection, drivable area segmentation and lane detection simultaneously, called HybridNets, which achieves better accuracy than prior art. In particular, HybridNets achieves 77.3 mean Average Precision on Berkeley DeepDrive Dataset, outperforms lane detection with 31.6 mean Intersection Over Union with 12.83 million parameters and 15.6 billion floating-point operations. In addition, it can perform visual perception tasks in real-time and thus is a practical and accurate solution to the multi-tasking problem. Code is available at https://github.com/datvuthanh/HybridNets.
abstract_zh: 端到端网络在多任务处理中变得越来越重要。一个突出的例子是驾驶感知系统在自动驾驶中日益重要。本文系统地研究了用于多任务处理的端到端感知网络，并提出了几个提高准确性的关键优化。首先，论文提出了基于加权双向特征网络的高效分割头和框/类预测网络。其次，论文提出了加权双向特征网络中每个级别的自动定制锚点。第三，论文提出了一种高效的训练损失函数和训练策略来平衡和优化网络。基于这些优化，我们开发了一种端到端感知网络来执行多任务，包括同时进行交通对象检测、可行驶区域分割和车道检测，称为HybridNets，其精度比现有技术更高。特别是，HybridNets 在 Berkeley DeepDrive 数据集上实现了 77.3 的平均精度，优于车道检测，具有 1283 万个参数和 156 亿次浮点运算，平均交集比并集为 31.6。此外，它可以实时执行视觉感知任务，因此是多任务问题的实用且准确的解决方案。代码可在 https://github.com/datvuthanh/HybridNets 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的多任务感知网络HybridNets，用于自动驾驶中的交通目标检测、可行驶区域分割和车道线检测。
AI.motivation: 端到端网络在多任务处理中愈发重要，尤其在自动驾驶感知系统中需同时处理多个视觉任务，传统方法存在精度与效率难以平衡的问题。
AI.method: 基于加权双向特征网络设计高效分割头和边界框/分类预测网络；为每个特征层级自动生成定制化锚框；提出平衡优化的训练损失函数与策略。
AI.result: 在Berkeley DeepDrive数据集上达到77.3 mAP，车道线检测31.6 mIoU，参数量12.83M，计算量15.6B FLOPs，支持实时视觉感知。
AI.conclusion: HybridNets通过多项优化实现多任务精度与效率的平衡，为自动驾驶提供实用且精确的解决方案。

authors_text: Liang Peng,Nan Wang,Jie Xu,Xiaofeng Zhu,Xiaoxiao Li
title: GATE: Graph CCA for Temporal SElf-supervised Learning for Label-efficient fMRI Analysis
title_zh: GATE：用于时间自监督学习的图 CCA，用于标签高效的 fMRI 分析
abstract: In this work, we focus on the challenging task, neuro-disease classification, using functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI). In population graph-based disease analysis, graph convolutional neural networks (GCNs) have achieved remarkable success. However, these achievements are inseparable from abundant labeled data and sensitive to spurious signals. To improve fMRI representation learning and classification under a label-efficient setting, we propose a novel and theory-driven self-supervised learning (SSL) framework on GCNs, namely Graph CCA for Temporal self-supervised learning on fMRI analysis GATE. Concretely, it is demanding to design a suitable and effective SSL strategy to extract formation and robust features for fMRI. To this end, we investigate several new graph augmentation strategies from fMRI dynamic functional connectives (FC) for SSL training. Further, we leverage canonical-correlation analysis (CCA) on different temporal embeddings and present the theoretical implications. Consequently, this yields a novel two-step GCN learning procedure comprised of (i) SSL on an unlabeled fMRI population graph and (ii) fine-tuning on a small labeled fMRI dataset for a classification task. Our method is tested on two independent fMRI datasets, demonstrating superior performance on autism and dementia diagnosis.
summary: In this work, we focus on the challenging task, neuro-disease classification, using functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI). In population graph-based disease analysis, graph convolutional neural networks (GCNs) have achieved remarkable success. However, these achievements are inseparable from abundant labeled data and sensitive to spurious signals. To improve fMRI representation learning and classification under a label-efficient setting, we propose a novel and theory-driven self-supervised learning (SSL) framework on GCNs, namely Graph CCA for Temporal self-supervised learning on fMRI analysis GATE. Concretely, it is demanding to design a suitable and effective SSL strategy to extract formation and robust features for fMRI. To this end, we investigate several new graph augmentation strategies from fMRI dynamic functional connectives (FC) for SSL training. Further, we leverage canonical-correlation analysis (CCA) on different temporal embeddings and present the theoretical implications. Consequently, this yields a novel two-step GCN learning procedure comprised of (i) SSL on an unlabeled fMRI population graph and (ii) fine-tuning on a small labeled fMRI dataset for a classification task. Our method is tested on two independent fMRI datasets, demonstrating superior performance on autism and dementia diagnosis.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们重点关注具有挑战性的任务，即使用功能磁共振成像 (fMRI) 进行神经疾病分类。在基于群体图的疾病分析中，图卷积神经网络（GCN）取得了显着的成功。然而，这些成就离不开丰富的标记数据和对杂散信号的敏感。为了在标签有效的设置下改进 fMRI 表示学习和分类，我们在 GCN 上提出了一种新颖的、理论驱动的自监督学习（SSL）框架，即用于 fMRI 分析 GATE 上的时间自监督学习的图 CCA。具体来说，需要设计一种合适且有效的 SSL 策略来提取 fMRI 的结构和鲁棒特征。为此，我们研究了用于 SSL 训练的 fMRI 动态功能连接词 (FC) 的几种新的图形增强策略。此外，我们对不同的时间嵌入利用典型相关分析（CCA）并提出理论意义。因此，这产生了一种新颖的两步 GCN 学习过程，包括 (i) 在未标记的 fMRI 群体图上进行 SSL 和 (ii) 在小型标记的 fMRI 数据集上进行分类任务的微调。我们的方法在两个独立的功能磁共振成像数据集上进行了测试，证明了在自闭症和痴呆症诊断方面的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图CCA的时序自监督学习框架GATE，用于在标签高效设置下改进fMRI的表示学习和神经疾病分类。
AI.motivation: 现有图卷积网络（GCN）在fMRI疾病分析中依赖大量标注数据且易受伪信号干扰，需设计更高效的自监督学习策略以提升标签效率。
AI.method: 提出GATE框架，包含两个步骤：（i）基于动态功能连接的图增强策略进行无标签fMRI图的自监督学习；（ii）利用典型相关分析（CCA）对齐时序嵌入，并在小规模标注数据集上微调分类模型。
AI.result: 在两个独立fMRI数据集上测试，GATE在自闭症和痴呆症诊断中均表现出优于现有方法的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: GATE通过理论驱动的自监督学习和时序特征对齐，有效提升了标签高效场景下的fMRI分析能力，为神经疾病分类提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.result: 在两个独立fMRI数据集上测试，GATE在自闭症和痴呆症诊断中均表现出优于现有方法的分类性能。

search_text: GATE: Graph CCA for Temporal SElf-supervised Learning for Label-efficient fMRI Analysis GATE：用于时间自监督学习的图 CCA，用于标签高效的 fMRI 分析 In this work, we focus on the challenging task, neuro-disease classification, using functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI). In population graph-based disease analysis, graph convolutional neural networks (GCNs) have achieved remarkable success. However, these achievements are inseparable from abundant labeled data and sensitive to spurious signals. To improve fMRI representation learning and classification under a label-efficient setting, we propose a novel and theory-driven self-supervised learning (SSL) framework on GCNs, namely Graph CCA for Temporal self-supervised learning on fMRI analysis GATE. Concretely, it is demanding to design a suitable and effective SSL strategy to extract formation and robust features for fMRI. To this end, we investigate several new graph augmentation strategies from fMRI dynamic functional connectives (FC) for SSL training. Further, we leverage canonical-correlation analysis (CCA) on different temporal embeddings and present the theoretical implications. Consequently, this yields a novel two-step GCN learning procedure comprised of (i) SSL on an unlabeled fMRI population graph and (ii) fine-tuning on a small labeled fMRI dataset for a classification task. Our method is tested on two independent fMRI datasets, demonstrating superior performance on autism and dementia diagnosis. 在这项工作中，我们重点关注具有挑战性的任务，即使用功能磁共振成像 (fMRI) 进行神经疾病分类。在基于群体图的疾病分析中，图卷积神经网络（GCN）取得了显着的成功。然而，这些成就离不开丰富的标记数据和对杂散信号的敏感。为了在标签有效的设置下改进 fMRI 表示学习和分类，我们在 GCN 上提出了一种新颖的、理论驱动的自监督学习（SSL）框架，即用于 fMRI 分析 GATE 上的时间自监督学习的图 CCA。具体来说，需要设计一种合适且有效的 SSL 策略来提取 fMRI 的结构和鲁棒特征。为此，我们研究了用于 SSL 训练的 fMRI 动态功能连接词 (FC) 的几种新的图形增强策略。此外，我们对不同的时间嵌入利用典型相关分析（CCA）并提出理论意义。因此，这产生了一种新颖的两步 GCN 学习过程，包括 (i) 在未标记的 fMRI 群体图上进行 SSL 和 (ii) 在小型标记的 fMRI 数据集上进行分类任务的微调。我们的方法在两个独立的功能磁共振成像数据集上进行了测试，证明了在自闭症和痴呆症诊断方面的卓越性能。 本文提出一种基于图CCA的时序自监督学习框架GATE，用于在标签高效设置下改进fMRI的表示学习和神经疾病分类。 Liang Peng,Nan Wang,Jie Xu,Xiaofeng Zhu,Xiaoxiao Li cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Antonios Saravanos,Dongnanzi Zheng,Stavros Zervoudakis
title: Measuring Consumer Perceived Warm-Glow for Technology Adoption Modeling
title_zh: 测量消费者感知的暖光以进行技术采用建模
abstract: In this paper, we adapt and validate two constructs-perceived extrinsic warm-glow (PEWG) and perceived intrinsic warm-glow (PIWG)-to measure the two dimensions of consumer perceived warm-glow (i.e., extrinsic and intrinsic) for use with the practice of technology adoption modeling. Taking an experimental approach, participants were exposed to one of four vignettes designed to simulate either the absence or the presence of warm-glow (specifically, extrinsic warm-glow, intrinsic warm-glow, and concurrently extrinsic and intrinsic warm-glow). The results revealed that both constructs measured their respective forms of warm-glow with two caveats. Firstly, singularly trying to evoke extrinsic warm-glow led to only a slight increase in consumer perception of extrinsic warm-glow. We attributed this finding to individuals not being attracted to technology products that overtly target and seek to satisfy their vanity, instead preferring technology that does so in a more subtle way. The second is that singularly trying to evoke intrinsic warm-glow also resulted in the manifestation of extrinsic warm-glow. Thus, warm-glow appears as a blend of extrinsic and intrinsic dimensions. This finding serves to reinforce what has already been reported in existing literature regarding warm-glow and the idea of impure altruism.
summary: In this paper, we adapt and validate two constructs-perceived extrinsic warm-glow (PEWG) and perceived intrinsic warm-glow (PIWG)-to measure the two dimensions of consumer perceived warm-glow (i.e., extrinsic and intrinsic) for use with the practice of technology adoption modeling. Taking an experimental approach, participants were exposed to one of four vignettes designed to simulate either the absence or the presence of warm-glow (specifically, extrinsic warm-glow, intrinsic warm-glow, and concurrently extrinsic and intrinsic warm-glow). The results revealed that both constructs measured their respective forms of warm-glow with two caveats. Firstly, singularly trying to evoke extrinsic warm-glow led to only a slight increase in consumer perception of extrinsic warm-glow. We attributed this finding to individuals not being attracted to technology products that overtly target and seek to satisfy their vanity, instead preferring technology that does so in a more subtle way. The second is that singularly trying to evoke intrinsic warm-glow also resulted in the manifestation of extrinsic warm-glow. Thus, warm-glow appears as a blend of extrinsic and intrinsic dimensions. This finding serves to reinforce what has already been reported in existing literature regarding warm-glow and the idea of impure altruism.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们采用并验证了两种构造——感知的外在暖光（PEWG）和感知的内在暖光（PIWG）——来测量消费者感知的暖光的两个维度（即外在和内在），以用于技术采用建模的实践。采用实验方法，参与者暴露于四个小插图之一，这些小插图旨在模拟暖光的不存在或存在（具体来说，外在暖光、内在暖光以及同时存在的外在和内在暖光）。结果表明，两种结构都测量了各自形式的暖光，但有两个注意事项。首先，单独尝试唤起外在暖光仅导致消费者对外在暖光的感知略有增加。我们将这一发现归因于个人不被那些公开瞄准并寻求满足其虚荣心的技术产品所吸引，而是更喜欢以更微妙的方式实现这一目标的技术。第二，单纯地试图唤起内在的暖光也导致了外在的暖光的表现。因此，暖光表现为外在维度和内在维度的混合。这一发现强化了现有文献中关于暖光和不纯粹利他主义思想的报道。

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建并验证感知外在温暖 glow（PEWG）和感知内在温暖 glow（PIWG）两个构念，用于衡量消费者在技术采纳模型中的温暖 glow 两个维度。
AI.motivation: 现有技术采纳模型未充分考虑温暖 glow 的内外在双重维度，导致对消费者行为预测的偏差，需通过区分内外在温暖 glow 提升模型准确性。
AI.method: 采用实验方法，让参与者接触四种情景描述（模拟温暖 glow 的存在或缺失，包括外在、内在及两者并存），测量其感知差异。
AI.result: 单独激发外在温暖 glow 仅小幅提升感知，因消费者偏好隐性满足虚荣的技术；单独激发内在温暖 glow 却同时引发外在温暖 glow，表明两者难以分离。
AI.conclusion: 温暖 glow 是外在与内在维度的混合体，支持‘不纯利他主义’理论，未来技术采纳模型需整合双重维度以更精准预测行为。

authors_text: Shuo Yu,Huafei Huang,Minh N. Dao,Feng Xia
title: Graph Augmentation Learning
title_zh: 图增强学习
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures, Accepted in The First International Workshop on Graph Learning in IW3C2
comments: 14 pages, 4 figures, Accepted in The First International Workshop on Graph Learning in IW3C2
abstract: Graph Augmentation Learning (GAL) provides outstanding solutions for graph learning in handling incomplete data, noise data, etc. Numerous GAL methods have been proposed for graph-based applications such as social network analysis and traffic flow forecasting. However, the underlying reasons for the effectiveness of these GAL methods are still unclear. As a consequence, how to choose optimal graph augmentation strategy for a certain application scenario is still in black box. There is a lack of systematic, comprehensive, and experimentally validated guideline of GAL for scholars. Therefore, in this survey, we in-depth review GAL techniques from macro (graph), meso (subgraph), and micro (node/edge) levels. We further detailedly illustrate how GAL enhance the data quality and the model performance. The aggregation mechanism of augmentation strategies and graph learning models are also discussed by different application scenarios, i.e., data-specific, model-specific, and hybrid scenarios. To better show the outperformance of GAL, we experimentally validate the effectiveness and adaptability of different GAL strategies in different downstream tasks. Finally, we share our insights on several open issues of GAL, including heterogeneity, spatio-temporal dynamics, scalability, and generalization.
summary: Graph Augmentation Learning (GAL) provides outstanding solutions for graph learning in handling incomplete data, noise data, etc. Numerous GAL methods have been proposed for graph-based applications such as social network analysis and traffic flow forecasting. However, the underlying reasons for the effectiveness of these GAL methods are still unclear. As a consequence, how to choose optimal graph augmentation strategy for a certain application scenario is still in black box. There is a lack of systematic, comprehensive, and experimentally validated guideline of GAL for scholars. Therefore, in this survey, we in-depth review GAL techniques from macro (graph), meso (subgraph), and micro (node/edge) levels. We further detailedly illustrate how GAL enhance the data quality and the model performance. The aggregation mechanism of augmentation strategies and graph learning models are also discussed by different application scenarios, i.e., data-specific, model-specific, and hybrid scenarios. To better show the outperformance of GAL, we experimentally validate the effectiveness and adaptability of different GAL strategies in different downstream tasks. Finally, we share our insights on several open issues of GAL, including heterogeneity, spatio-temporal dynamics, scalability, and generalization.
abstract_zh: 图增强学习（GAL）为图学习处理不完整数据、噪声数据等提供了出色的解决方案。针对社交网络分析和交通流预测等基于图的应用，人们提出了许多GAL方法。然而，这些 GAL 方法有效的根本原因仍不清楚。因此，如何针对特定的应用场景选择最佳的图增强策略仍然是一个黑匣子。目前学者们缺乏系统的、全面的、经过实验验证的 GAL 指南。因此，在本次调查中，我们从宏观（图）、中观（子图）和微观（节点/边缘）层面深入回顾了 GAL 技术。我们进一步详细说明了 GAL 如何提高数据质量和模型性能。增强策略和图学习模型的聚合机制也通过不同的应用场景进行了讨论，即特定于数据、特定于模型和混合场景。为了更好地展示 GAL 的优异性能，我们通过实验验证了不同 GAL 策略在不同下游任务中的有效性和适应性。最后，我们分享了对 GAL 几个开放问题的见解，包括异构性、时空动态、可扩展性和泛化性。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述图增强学习（GAL）技术，从宏观、中观、微观三个层面分析其原理与应用，并通过实验验证不同策略的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有GAL方法缺乏系统性指导原则，如何选择最优策略仍处于黑箱状态，亟需全面分析以提供理论依据和实践指南。
AI.method: 从图级、子图级、节点/边级三个层次回顾GAL技术，结合数据特性、模型需求和混合场景讨论增强机制，并通过实验对比验证策略适应性。
AI.result: 实验验证了GAL策略在多个下游任务中的有效性，揭示了不同场景下的性能差异，总结出增强策略与任务需求的关联规律。
AI.conclusion: GAL研究需重点关注异质图处理、时空动态建模、算法可扩展性及跨领域泛化能力等核心挑战。

motivation: 现有GAL方法缺乏系统性指导原则，如何选择最优策略仍处于黑箱状态，亟需全面分析以提供理论依据和实践指南。
method: 从图级、子图级、节点/边级三个层次回顾GAL技术，结合数据特性、模型需求和混合场景讨论增强机制，并通过实验对比验证策略适应性。
result: 实验验证了GAL策略在多个下游任务中的有效性，揭示了不同场景下的性能差异，总结出增强策略与任务需求的关联规律。
conclusion: GAL研究需重点关注异质图处理、时空动态建模、算法可扩展性及跨领域泛化能力等核心挑战。
search_text: Graph Augmentation Learning 图增强学习 Graph Augmentation Learning (GAL) provides outstanding solutions for graph learning in handling incomplete data, noise data, etc. Numerous GAL methods have been proposed for graph-based applications such as social network analysis and traffic flow forecasting. However, the underlying reasons for the effectiveness of these GAL methods are still unclear. As a consequence, how to choose optimal graph augmentation strategy for a certain application scenario is still in black box. There is a lack of systematic, comprehensive, and experimentally validated guideline of GAL for scholars. Therefore, in this survey, we in-depth review GAL techniques from macro (graph), meso (subgraph), and micro (node/edge) levels. We further detailedly illustrate how GAL enhance the data quality and the model performance. The aggregation mechanism of augmentation strategies and graph learning models are also discussed by different application scenarios, i.e., data-specific, model-specific, and hybrid scenarios. To better show the outperformance of GAL, we experimentally validate the effectiveness and adaptability of different GAL strategies in different downstream tasks. Finally, we share our insights on several open issues of GAL, including heterogeneity, spatio-temporal dynamics, scalability, and generalization. 图增强学习（GAL）为图学习处理不完整数据、噪声数据等提供了出色的解决方案。针对社交网络分析和交通流预测等基于图的应用，人们提出了许多GAL方法。然而，这些 GAL 方法有效的根本原因仍不清楚。因此，如何针对特定的应用场景选择最佳的图增强策略仍然是一个黑匣子。目前学者们缺乏系统的、全面的、经过实验验证的 GAL 指南。因此，在本次调查中，我们从宏观（图）、中观（子图）和微观（节点/边缘）层面深入回顾了 GAL 技术。我们进一步详细说明了 GAL 如何提高数据质量和模型性能。增强策略和图学习模型的聚合机制也通过不同的应用场景进行了讨论，即特定于数据、特定于模型和混合场景。为了更好地展示 GAL 的优异性能，我们通过实验验证了不同 GAL 策略在不同下游任务中的有效性和适应性。最后，我们分享了对 GAL 几个开放问题的见解，包括异构性、时空动态、可扩展性和泛化性。 本文系统综述图增强学习（GAL）技术，从宏观、中观、微观三个层面分析其原理与应用，并通过实验验证不同策略的有效性。 Shuo Yu,Huafei Huang,Minh N. Dao,Feng Xia cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Bo Liu,Qiulei Dong,Zhanyi Hu
title: Semantic-diversity transfer network for generalized zero-shot learning via inner disagreement based OOD detector
title_zh: 通过基于内部分歧的 OOD 检测器实现广义零样本学习的语义多样性转移网络
abstract: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to recognize objects from unseen classes, where the kernel problem is to transfer knowledge from seen classes to unseen classes by establishing appropriate mappings between visual and semantic features. The knowledge transfer in many existing works is limited mainly due to the facts that 1) the widely used visual features are global ones but not totally consistent with semantic attributes; 2) only one mapping is learned in existing works, which is not able to effectively model diverse visual-semantic relations; 3) the bias problem in the generalized ZSL (GZSL) could not be effectively handled. In this paper, we propose two techniques to alleviate these limitations. Firstly, we propose a Semantic-diversity transfer Network (SetNet) addressing the first two limitations, where 1) a multiple-attention architecture and a diversity regularizer are proposed to learn multiple local visual features that are more consistent with semantic attributes and 2) a projector ensemble that geometrically takes diverse local features as inputs is proposed to model visual-semantic relations from diverse local perspectives. Secondly, we propose an inner disagreement based domain detection module (ID3M) for GZSL to alleviate the third limitation, which picks out unseen-class data before class-level classification. Due to the absence of unseen-class data in training stage, ID3M employs a novel self-contained training scheme and detects out unseen-class data based on a designed inner disagreement criterion. Experimental results on three public datasets demonstrate that the proposed SetNet with the explored ID3M achieves a significant improvement against $30$ state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to recognize objects from unseen classes, where the kernel problem is to transfer knowledge from seen classes to unseen classes by establishing appropriate mappings between visual and semantic features. The knowledge transfer in many existing works is limited mainly due to the facts that 1) the widely used visual features are global ones but not totally consistent with semantic attributes; 2) only one mapping is learned in existing works, which is not able to effectively model diverse visual-semantic relations; 3) the bias problem in the generalized ZSL (GZSL) could not be effectively handled. In this paper, we propose two techniques to alleviate these limitations. Firstly, we propose a Semantic-diversity transfer Network (SetNet) addressing the first two limitations, where 1) a multiple-attention architecture and a diversity regularizer are proposed to learn multiple local visual features that are more consistent with semantic attributes and 2) a projector ensemble that geometrically takes diverse local features as inputs is proposed to model visual-semantic relations from diverse local perspectives. Secondly, we propose an inner disagreement based domain detection module (ID3M) for GZSL to alleviate the third limitation, which picks out unseen-class data before class-level classification. Due to the absence of unseen-class data in training stage, ID3M employs a novel self-contained training scheme and detects out unseen-class data based on a designed inner disagreement criterion. Experimental results on three public datasets demonstrate that the proposed SetNet with the explored ID3M achieves a significant improvement against $30$ state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 零样本学习（ZSL）旨在识别未见类中的对象，其核心问题是通过在视觉特征和语义特征之间建立适当的映射，将知识从已见类转移到未见类。许多现有作品中的知识迁移受到限制，主要是由于以下事实：1）广泛使用的视觉特征是全局特征，但与语义属性不完全一致； 2）现有作品中仅学习了一种映射，无法有效地建模多样化的视觉语义关系； 3）广义ZSL（GZSL）中的偏差问题无法得到有效处理。在本文中，我们提出了两种技术来缓解这些限制。首先，我们提出了一种语义多样性转移网络（SetNet）来解决前两个限制，其中1）提出了一种多注意架构和多样性正则化器来学习与语义属性更一致的多个局部视觉特征，2）提出了一种在几何上将不同的局部特征作为输入的投影仪集成，以从不同的局部角度对视觉语义关系进行建模。其次，我们为 GZSL 提出了一种基于内部分歧的域检测模块（ID3M）来缓解第三个限制，该模块在类级别分类之前挑选出未见过的类数据。由于训练阶段缺乏未见类数据，ID3M 采用了一种新颖的自包含训练方案，并根据设计的内部不一致标准检测未见类数据。三个公共数据集的实验结果表明，所提出的 SetNet 与探索的 ID3M 相比 30 美元的最先进方法取得了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语义多样性的迁移网络（SetNet）和内部不一致的领域检测模块（ID3M），以解决通用零样本学习（GZSL）中知识迁移不足和未见类偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本学习方法存在全局视觉特征与语义属性不一致、单一映射无法建模多样关系以及GZSL中未见类偏差难以处理等局限性。
AI.method: 提出SetNet通过多注意力架构和多样性正则化学习局部视觉特征，并采用投影器集成从多视角建模视觉-语义关系；设计ID3M模块通过内部不一致准则检测未见类数据，无需训练阶段的未见类标签。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上，SetNet结合ID3M显著优于30种最新方法，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过语义多样性迁移和未见类检测机制，有效解决了GZSL中的关键挑战，为零样本学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Rachel Love,Edith Law,Philip R. Cohen,Dana Kulić
title: Natural Language Communication with a Teachable Agent
title_zh: 与可教代理的自然语言交流
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Conversational teachable agents offer a promising platform to support learning, both in the classroom and in remote settings. In this context, the agent takes the role of the novice, while the student takes on the role of teacher. This framing is significant for its ability to elicit the Protégé effect in the student-teacher, a pedagogical phenomenon known to increase engagement in the teaching task, and also improve cognitive outcomes. In prior work, teachable agents often take a passive role in the learning interaction, and there are few studies in which the agent and student engage in natural language dialogue during the teaching task. This work investigates the effect of teaching modality when interacting with a virtual agent, via the web-based teaching platform, the Curiosity Notebook. A method of teaching the agent by selecting sentences from source material is compared to a method paraphrasing the source material and typing text input to teach. A user study has been conducted to measure the effect teaching modality on the learning outcomes and engagement of the participants. The results indicate that teaching via paraphrasing and text input has a positive effect on learning outcomes for the material covered, and also on aspects of affective engagement. Furthermore, increased paraphrasing effort, as measured by the similarity between the source material and the material the teacher conveyed to the robot, improves learning outcomes for participants.

In this context, the agent takes the role of the novice, while the student takes on the role of teacher. This framing is significant for its ability to elicit the Protégé effect in the student-teacher, a pedagogical phenomenon known to increase engagement in the teaching task, and also improve cognitive outcomes.
