Furthermore, increased paraphrasing effort, as measured by the similarity between the source material and the material the teacher conveyed to the robot, improves learning outcomes for participants.
abstract_zh: 对话式可教学代理提供了一个有前途的平台来支持课堂和远程环境中的学习。在这种情况下，代理人扮演新手的角色，而学生则扮演老师的角色。这种框架具有重要意义，因为它能够在师生中引发门徒效应，这是一种已知可以提高教学任务参与度并改善认知结果的教学现象。在以往的工作中，可教智能体在学习交互中往往扮演被动角色，很少有研究在教学任务中智能体和学生进行自然语言对话。这项工作研究了通过基于网络的教学平台 Curiosity Notebook 与虚拟代理交互时教学模式的效果。将通过从源材料中选择句子来教导智能体的方法与解释源材料并键入文本输入进行教导的方法进行比较。进行了一项用户研究，以衡量教学方式对参与者学习成果和参与度的影响。结果表明，通过释义和文本输入进行教学对所涵盖材料的学习成果以及情感参与方面都有积极影响。此外，通过源材料与教师向机器人传达的材料之间的相似性来衡量，增加释义工作可以改善参与者的学习成果。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究通过自然语言与可教学智能体进行教学互动的效果，比较了两种教学方式对学习成果和参与度的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统可教学智能体多处于被动角色，缺乏自然语言对话互动的研究。通过激发学生的教师角色（Protégé效应）可提升学习效果，但需验证不同教学模式的实际影响。
AI.method: 基于网络教学平台Curiosity Notebook，设计用户实验对比两种教学方式：1) 从材料中选择句子教学；2) 对材料进行改写并输入文本教学，分析学习成果与参与度差异。
AI.result: 改写并输入文本的教学方式显著提升学习成果和情感参与度，且改写努力程度（源材料与教学内容相似度）越高，学习效果越佳。
AI.conclusion: 自然语言教学中，要求学生主动改写内容的教学模式更有效，表明认知投入与教学效果呈正相关，为教育类智能体设计提供新方向。

tldr: 该论文研究通过自然语言与可教学智能体进行教学互动的效果，比较了两种教学方式对学习成果和参与度的影响。
motivation: 传统可教学智能体多处于被动角色，缺乏自然语言对话互动的研究。通过激发学生的教师角色（Protégé效应）可提升学习效果，但需验证不同教学模式的实际影响。
method: 基于网络教学平台Curiosity Notebook，设计用户实验对比两种教学方式：1) 从材料中选择句子教学；2) 对材料进行改写并输入文本教学，分析学习成果与参与度差异。
result: 改写并输入文本的教学方式显著提升学习成果和情感参与度，且改写努力程度（源材料与教学内容相似度）越高，学习效果越佳。
conclusion: 自然语言教学中，要求学生主动改写内容的教学模式更有效，表明认知投入与教学效果呈正相关，为教育类智能体设计提供新方向。
search_text: Natural Language Communication with a Teachable Agent 与可教代理的自然语言交流 Conversational teachable agents offer a promising platform to support learning, both in the classroom and in remote settings. In this context, the agent takes the role of the novice, while the student takes on the role of teacher. This framing is significant for its ability to elicit the Protégé effect in the student-teacher, a pedagogical phenomenon known to increase engagement in the teaching task, and also improve cognitive outcomes. In prior work, teachable agents often take a passive role in the learning interaction, and there are few studies in which the agent and student engage in natural language dialogue during the teaching task. This work investigates the effect of teaching modality when interacting with a virtual agent, via the web-based teaching platform, the Curiosity Notebook. A method of teaching the agent by selecting sentences from source material is compared to a method paraphrasing the source material and typing text input to teach. A user study has been conducted to measure the effect teaching modality on the learning outcomes and engagement of the participants. The results indicate that teaching via paraphrasing and text input has a positive effect on learning outcomes for the material covered, and also on aspects of affective engagement. Furthermore, increased paraphrasing effort, as measured by the similarity between the source material and the material the teacher conveyed to the robot, improves learning outcomes for participants. 对话式可教学代理提供了一个有前途的平台来支持课堂和远程环境中的学习。在这种情况下，代理人扮演新手的角色，而学生则扮演老师的角色。这种框架具有重要意义，因为它能够在师生中引发门徒效应，这是一种已知可以提高教学任务参与度并改善认知结果的教学现象。在以往的工作中，可教智能体在学习交互中往往扮演被动角色，很少有研究在教学任务中智能体和学生进行自然语言对话。这项工作研究了通过基于网络的教学平台 Curiosity Notebook 与虚拟代理交互时教学模式的效果。将通过从源材料中选择句子来教导智能体的方法与解释源材料并键入文本输入进行教导的方法进行比较。进行了一项用户研究，以衡量教学方式对参与者学习成果和参与度的影响。结果表明，通过释义和文本输入进行教学对所涵盖材料的学习成果以及情感参与方面都有积极影响。此外，通过源材料与教师向机器人传达的材料之间的相似性来衡量，增加释义工作可以改善参与者的学习成果。 该论文研究通过自然语言与可教学智能体进行教学互动的效果，比较了两种教学方式对学习成果和参与度的影响。 Rachel Love,Edith Law,Philip R. Cohen,Dana Kulić cs.HC,cs.CL

authors_text: Bing Liu,Sahisnu Mazumder,Eric Robertson,Scott Grigsby
title: AI Autonomy : Self-Initiated Open-World Continual Learning and Adaptation
title_zh: AI自主性：自主发起的开放世界持续学习和适应
comment: To appear in AI Magazine (AAAI), 2023. This draft is an extended and revised version of the previous work - "Self-initiated Open World Learning for Autonomous AI Agents" arXiv preprint arXiv:2110.11385 (2021), which was published in AAAI 2022 Spring Symposium Series
comments: To appear in AI Magazine (AAAI), 2023. This draft is an extended and revised version of the previous work - "Self-initiated Open World Learning for Autonomous AI Agents" arXiv preprint arXiv:2110.11385 (2021), which was published in AAAI 2022 Spring Symposium Series
abstract: As more and more AI agents are used in practice, it is time to think about how to make these agents fully autonomous so that they can (1) learn by themselves continually in a self-motivated and self-initiated manner rather than being retrained offline periodically on the initiation of human engineers and (2) accommodate or adapt to unexpected or novel circumstances. As the real-world is an open environment that is full of unknowns or novelties, the capabilities of detecting novelties, characterizing them, accommodating/adapting to them, gathering ground-truth training data and incrementally learning the unknowns/novelties become critical in making the AI agent more and more knowledgeable, powerful and self-sustainable over time. The key challenge here is how to automate the process so that it is carried out continually on the agent's own initiative and through its own interactions with humans, other agents and the environment just like human on-the-job learning. This paper proposes a framework (called SOLA) for this learning paradigm to promote the research of building autonomous and continual learning enabled AI agents. To show feasibility, an implemented agent is also described.
summary: As more and more AI agents are used in practice, it is time to think about how to make these agents fully autonomous so that they can (1) learn by themselves continually in a self-motivated and self-initiated manner rather than being retrained offline periodically on the initiation of human engineers and (2) accommodate or adapt to unexpected or novel circumstances. As the real-world is an open environment that is full of unknowns or novelties, the capabilities of detecting novelties, characterizing them, accommodating/adapting to them, gathering ground-truth training data and incrementally learning the unknowns/novelties become critical in making the AI agent more and more knowledgeable, powerful and self-sustainable over time. The key challenge here is how to automate the process so that it is carried out continually on the agent's own initiative and through its own interactions with humans, other agents and the environment just like human on-the-job learning. This paper proposes a framework (called SOLA) for this learning paradigm to promote the research of building autonomous and continual learning enabled AI agents. To show feasibility, an implemented agent is also described.
abstract_zh: 随着越来越多的人工智能代理在实践中得到应用，是时候考虑如何使这些代理完全自主，以便它们能够（1）以自我激励和自发的方式不断地自我学习，而不是在人类工程师的发起下定期离线再训练；（2）适应或适应意外或新奇的情况。由于现实世界是一个充满未知或新奇事物的开放环境，因此检测新奇事物、表征它们、适应/适应它们、收集真实训练数据以及逐步学习未知/新奇事物的能力对于使人工智能代理随着时间的推移变得越来越知识丰富、强大和自我可持续发展至关重要。这里的关键挑战是如何实现该过程的自动化，使其能够像人类在职学习一样，通过智能体自身的主动性以及与人类、其他智能体和环境的交互来持续执行。本文为这种学习范式提出了一个框架（称为 SOLA），以促进构建自主且持续学习的 AI 代理的研究。为了证明可行性，还描述了一个已实现的代理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SOLA的框架，旨在实现AI代理在开放世界中的自主持续学习与适应能力。
AI.motivation: 随着AI代理在现实中的广泛应用，传统依赖人工定期重训练的方法已无法满足动态开放环境的需求，亟需使AI具备自主检测新情况、适应变化并持续学习的能力。
AI.method: 设计SOLA框架，通过代理自主与环境、人类及其他代理交互，实现自我驱动的持续学习与适应过程。
AI.result: 实现了基于SOLA框架的代理系统，验证了该方法在开放世界中自主学习和适应新情况的可行性。
AI.conclusion: SOLA框架为构建自主、持续学习的AI代理提供了理论与实践基础，推动了AI向更智能、自适应的方向发展。

authors_text: Xiao Li,Gong Cheng,Ziheng Chen,Yawei Sun,Yuzhong Qu
title: AdaLoGN: Adaptive Logic Graph Network for Reasoning-Based Machine Reading Comprehension
title_zh: AdaLoGN：用于基于推理的机器阅读理解的自适应逻辑图网络
comment: 11 pages, accepted to the main conference of ACL 2022
comments: 11 pages, accepted to the main conference of ACL 2022
abstract: Recent machine reading comprehension datasets such as ReClor and LogiQA require performing logical reasoning over text. Conventional neural models are insufficient for logical reasoning, while symbolic reasoners cannot directly apply to text. To meet the challenge, we present a neural-symbolic approach which, to predict an answer, passes messages over a graph representing logical relations between text units. It incorporates an adaptive logic graph network (AdaLoGN) which adaptively infers logical relations to extend the graph and, essentially, realizes mutual and iterative reinforcement between neural and symbolic reasoning. We also implement a novel subgraph-to-node message passing mechanism to enhance context-option interaction for answering multiple-choice questions. Our approach shows promising results on ReClor and LogiQA.
summary: Recent machine reading comprehension datasets such as ReClor and LogiQA require performing logical reasoning over text. Conventional neural models are insufficient for logical reasoning, while symbolic reasoners cannot directly apply to text. To meet the challenge, we present a neural-symbolic approach which, to predict an answer, passes messages over a graph representing logical relations between text units. It incorporates an adaptive logic graph network (AdaLoGN) which adaptively infers logical relations to extend the graph and, essentially, realizes mutual and iterative reinforcement between neural and symbolic reasoning. We also implement a novel subgraph-to-node message passing mechanism to enhance context-option interaction for answering multiple-choice questions. Our approach shows promising results on ReClor and LogiQA.
abstract_zh: 最近的机器阅读理解数据集（例如 ReClor 和 LogiQA）需要对文本进行逻辑推理。传统的神经模型不足以进行逻辑推理，而符号推理器不能直接应用于文本。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种神经符号方法，该方法通过表示文本单元之间逻辑关系的图表传递消息来预测答案。它采用自适应逻辑图网络（AdaLoGN），自适应地推断逻辑关系以扩展图，本质上实现神经推理和符号推理之间的相互和迭代强化。我们还实现了一种新颖的子图到节点消息传递机制，以增强上下文选项交互以回答多项选择问题。我们的方法在 ReClor 和 LogiQA 上显示出有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaLoGN方法，通过神经符号结合的方式解决需要逻辑推理的机器阅读理解问题。
AI.motivation: 传统神经模型缺乏逻辑推理能力，符号推理器无法直接处理文本，需融合两者优势以应对逻辑推理型阅读理解任务。
AI.method: 构建逻辑关系图传递消息，采用自适应逻辑图网络(AdaLoGN)动态推断逻辑关系，并设计子图到节点的消息传递机制增强上下文-选项交互。
AI.result: 在ReClor和LogiQA数据集上取得有希望的实验结果，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过神经符号协同实现逻辑推理，为机器阅读理解提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Jed A. Duersch,Thomas A. Catanach,Niladri Das
title: Adaptive n-ary Activation Functions for Probabilistic Boolean Logic
title_zh: 概率布尔逻辑的自适应n元激活函数
abstract: Balancing model complexity against the information contained in observed data is the central challenge to learning. In order for complexity-efficient models to exist and be discoverable in high dimensions, we require a computational framework that relates a credible notion of complexity to simple parameter representations. Further, this framework must allow excess complexity to be gradually removed via gradient-based optimization. Our n-ary, or n-argument, activation functions fill this gap by approximating belief functions (probabilistic Boolean logic) using logit representations of probability. Just as Boolean logic determines the truth of a consequent claim from relationships among a set of antecedent propositions, probabilistic formulations generalize predictions when antecedents, truth tables, and consequents all retain uncertainty. Our activation functions demonstrate the ability to learn arbitrary logic, such as the binary exclusive disjunction (p xor q) and ternary conditioned disjunction ( c ? p : q ), in a single layer using an activation function of matching or greater arity. Further, we represent belief tables using a basis that directly associates the number of nonzero parameters to the effective arity of the belief function, thus capturing a concrete relationship between logical complexity and efficient parameter representations. This opens optimization approaches to reduce logical complexity by inducing parameter sparsity.

Our activation functions demonstrate the ability to learn arbitrary logic, such as the binary exclusive disjunction (p xor q) and ternary conditioned disjunction ( c ? p : q ), in a single layer using an activation function of matching or greater arity. Further, we represent belief tables using a basis that directly associates the number of nonzero parameters to the effective arity of the belief function, thus capturing a concrete relationship between logical complexity and efficient parameter representations. This opens optimization approaches to reduce logical complexity by inducing parameter sparsity.
abstract_zh: 平衡模型复杂性与观察数据中包含的信息是学习的主要挑战。为了使复杂性有效的模型在高维中存在并可发现，我们需要一个计算框架，将可信的复杂性概念与简单的参数表示联系起来。此外，该框架必须允许通过基于梯度的优化逐渐消除多余的复杂性。我们的 n 元或 n 参数激活函数通过使用概率的 logit 表示来近似置信函数（概率布尔逻辑）来填补这一空白。正如布尔逻辑根据一组先行命题之间的关系确定后项主张的真实性一样，当先行项、真值表和后项都保留不确定性时，概率公式会概括预测。我们的激活函数展示了使用匹配或更大数量的激活函数在单层中学习任意逻辑的能力，例如二元互斥析取 (p xor q) 和三元条件析取 (c ? p : q)。此外，我们使用直接将非零参数的数量与置信函数的有效数量相关联的基础来表示置信表，从而捕获逻辑复杂性和有效参数表示之间的具体关系。这开辟了通过引入参数稀疏性来降低逻辑复杂性的优化方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应的n元激活函数，用于概率布尔逻辑，以在高维数据中平衡模型复杂度与信息量。
AI.motivation: 在高维数据中，需要一种计算框架来关联复杂度概念与简单参数表示，并通过梯度优化逐步去除冗余复杂度。
AI.method: 通过n元激活函数以logit概率表示逼近信念函数，利用参数稀疏性建立逻辑复杂度与参数表示的关联。
AI.result: 实现了单层网络学习任意逻辑（如异或、三元条件析取），并展示了参数稀疏性与逻辑复杂度的直接关系。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高效学习概率布尔逻辑提供了新框架，通过参数稀疏化优化可有效控制逻辑复杂度。

search_text: Adaptive n-ary Activation Functions for Probabilistic Boolean Logic 概率布尔逻辑的自适应n元激活函数 Balancing model complexity against the information contained in observed data is the central challenge to learning. In order for complexity-efficient models to exist and be discoverable in high dimensions, we require a computational framework that relates a credible notion of complexity to simple parameter representations. Further, this framework must allow excess complexity to be gradually removed via gradient-based optimization. Our n-ary, or n-argument, activation functions fill this gap by approximating belief functions (probabilistic Boolean logic) using logit representations of probability. Just as Boolean logic determines the truth of a consequent claim from relationships among a set of antecedent propositions, probabilistic formulations generalize predictions when antecedents, truth tables, and consequents all retain uncertainty. Our activation functions demonstrate the ability to learn arbitrary logic, such as the binary exclusive disjunction (p xor q) and ternary conditioned disjunction ( c ? p : q ), in a single layer using an activation function of matching or greater arity. Further, we represent belief tables using a basis that directly associates the number of nonzero parameters to the effective arity of the belief function, thus capturing a concrete relationship between logical complexity and efficient parameter representations. This opens optimization approaches to reduce logical complexity by inducing parameter sparsity. 平衡模型复杂性与观察数据中包含的信息是学习的主要挑战。为了使复杂性有效的模型在高维中存在并可发现，我们需要一个计算框架，将可信的复杂性概念与简单的参数表示联系起来。此外，该框架必须允许通过基于梯度的优化逐渐消除多余的复杂性。我们的 n 元或 n 参数激活函数通过使用概率的 logit 表示来近似置信函数（概率布尔逻辑）来填补这一空白。正如布尔逻辑根据一组先行命题之间的关系确定后项主张的真实性一样，当先行项、真值表和后项都保留不确定性时，概率公式会概括预测。我们的激活函数展示了使用匹配或更大数量的激活函数在单层中学习任意逻辑的能力，例如二元互斥析取 (p xor q) 和三元条件析取 (c ? p : q)。此外，我们使用直接将非零参数的数量与置信函数的有效数量相关联的基础来表示置信表，从而捕获逻辑复杂性和有效参数表示之间的具体关系。这开辟了通过引入参数稀疏性来降低逻辑复杂性的优化方法。 本文提出了一种自适应的n元激活函数，用于概率布尔逻辑，以在高维数据中平衡模型复杂度与信息量。 Jed A. Duersch,Thomas A. Catanach,Niladri Das cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Johannes Schuiki,Michael Linortner,Georg Wimmer,Andreas Uhl
title: Extensive Threat Analysis of Vein Attack Databases and Attack Detection by Fusion of Comparison Scores
title_zh: 静脉攻击数据库的广泛威胁分析和通过比较分数融合进行攻击检测
comment: This is a preprint of a chapter published in Handbook of Biometric Anti-Spoofing Third Edition: Presentation Attack Detection and Vulnerability Assessment, edited by Marcel, S., Fierrez, J., Evans, N., 2023, Springer, Singapore reproduced with permission of Springer Nature Singapore Pte Ltd
comments: This is a preprint of a chapter published in Handbook of Biometric Anti-Spoofing Third Edition: Presentation Attack Detection and Vulnerability Assessment, edited by Marcel, S., Fierrez, J., Evans, N., 2023, Springer, Singapore reproduced with permission of Springer Nature Singapore Pte Ltd
abstract: The last decade has brought forward many great contributions regarding presentation attack detection for the domain of finger and hand vein biometrics. Among those contributions, one is able to find a variety of different attack databases that are either private or made publicly available to the research community. However, it is not always shown whether the used attack samples hold the capability to actually deceive a realistic vein recognition system. Inspired by previous works, this study provides a systematic threat evaluation including three publicly available finger vein attack databases and one private dorsal hand vein database. To do so, 14 distinct vein recognition schemes are confronted with attack samples and the percentage of wrongly accepted attack samples is then reported as the Impostor Attack Presentation Match Rate. As a second step, comparison scores from different recognition schemes are combined using score level fusion with the goal of performing presentation attack detection.
summary: The last decade has brought forward many great contributions regarding presentation attack detection for the domain of finger and hand vein biometrics. Among those contributions, one is able to find a variety of different attack databases that are either private or made publicly available to the research community. However, it is not always shown whether the used attack samples hold the capability to actually deceive a realistic vein recognition system. Inspired by previous works, this study provides a systematic threat evaluation including three publicly available finger vein attack databases and one private dorsal hand vein database. To do so, 14 distinct vein recognition schemes are confronted with attack samples and the percentage of wrongly accepted attack samples is then reported as the Impostor Attack Presentation Match Rate. As a second step, comparison scores from different recognition schemes are combined using score level fusion with the goal of performing presentation attack detection.
abstract_zh: 过去十年在手指和手静脉生物识别领域的演示攻击检测方面做出了许多伟大的贡献。在这些贡献中，人们能够找到各种不同的攻击数据库，这些数据库要么是私有的，要么是向研究社区公开的。然而，并不总是表明所使用的攻击样本是否具有真正欺骗现实静脉识别系统的能力。受先前工作的启发，本研究提供了系统的威胁评估，包括三个公开的指静脉攻击数据库和一个私有的手背静脉数据库。为此，14 种不同的静脉识别方案会遇到攻击样本，然后将错误接受的攻击样本的百分比报告为冒名顶替者攻击呈现匹配率。第二步，使用分数级别融合来组合来自不同识别方案的比较分数，以执行演示攻击检测。

AI.tldr: 本文对三种公开的指尖静脉攻击数据库和一个私有的手背静脉数据库进行系统性威胁评估，并通过融合不同识别方案的比较分数来检测呈现攻击。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有多种攻击数据库用于静脉生物特征识别的研究，但这些攻击样本是否能实际欺骗真实系统尚不明确，需系统评估其威胁并改进检测方法。
AI.method: 使用14种不同的静脉识别方案测试攻击样本，计算误接受率（Impostor Attack Presentation Match Rate），并通过分数级融合技术结合不同方案的比较分数进行攻击检测。
AI.result: 报告了各攻击样本的误接受率，并通过分数融合显著提升了攻击检测的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 分数级融合方法有效提高了攻击检测能力，同时强调了对现有攻击数据库进行威胁评估的重要性。

authors_text: Tan Nguyen,Binh-Son Hua,Ngan Le
title: 3D-UCaps: 3D Capsules Unet for Volumetric Image Segmentation
title_zh: 3D-UCaps：用于体积图像分割的 3D 胶囊 Unet
abstract: Medical image segmentation has been so far achieving promising results with Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). However, it is arguable that in traditional CNNs, its pooling layer tends to discard important information such as positions. Moreover, CNNs are sensitive to rotation and affine transformation. Capsule network is a data-efficient network design proposed to overcome such limitations by replacing pooling layers with dynamic routing and convolutional strides, which aims to preserve the part-whole relationships. Capsule network has shown a great performance in image recognition and natural language processing, but applications for medical image segmentation, particularly volumetric image segmentation, has been limited. In this work, we propose 3D-UCaps, a 3D voxel-based Capsule network for medical volumetric image segmentation. We build the concept of capsules into a CNN by designing a network with two pathways: the first pathway is encoded by 3D Capsule blocks, whereas the second pathway is decoded by 3D CNNs blocks. 3D-UCaps, therefore inherits the merits from both Capsule network to preserve the spatial relationship and CNNs to learn visual representation. We conducted experiments on various datasets to demonstrate the robustness of 3D-UCaps including iSeg-2017, LUNA16, Hippocampus, and Cardiac, where our method outperforms previous Capsule networks and 3D-Unets.
summary: Medical image segmentation has been so far achieving promising results with Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). However, it is arguable that in traditional CNNs, its pooling layer tends to discard important information such as positions. Moreover, CNNs are sensitive to rotation and affine transformation. Capsule network is a data-efficient network design proposed to overcome such limitations by replacing pooling layers with dynamic routing and convolutional strides, which aims to preserve the part-whole relationships. Capsule network has shown a great performance in image recognition and natural language processing, but applications for medical image segmentation, particularly volumetric image segmentation, has been limited. In this work, we propose 3D-UCaps, a 3D voxel-based Capsule network for medical volumetric image segmentation. We build the concept of capsules into a CNN by designing a network with two pathways: the first pathway is encoded by 3D Capsule blocks, whereas the second pathway is decoded by 3D CNNs blocks. 3D-UCaps, therefore inherits the merits from both Capsule network to preserve the spatial relationship and CNNs to learn visual representation. We conducted experiments on various datasets to demonstrate the robustness of 3D-UCaps including iSeg-2017, LUNA16, Hippocampus, and Cardiac, where our method outperforms previous Capsule networks and 3D-Unets.
abstract_zh: 迄今为止，医学图像分割已经通过卷积神经网络（CNN）取得了可喜的结果。然而，有争议的是，在传统的 CNN 中，其池化层往往会丢弃位置等重要信息。此外，CNN 对旋转和仿射变换很敏感。胶囊网络是一种数据高效的网络设计，旨在通过用动态路由和卷积步长替换池化层来克服这些限制，其目的是保留部分与整体的关系。胶囊网络在图像识别和自然语言处理方面表现出了出色的性能，但在医学图像分割，特别是体积图像分割方面的应用却受到限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了 3D-UCaps，一种用于医学体积图像分割的基于 3D 体素的胶囊网络。我们通过设计具有两条路径的网络，将胶囊的概念构建到 CNN 中：第一个路径由 3D Capsule 块编码，而第二个路径由 3D CNN 块解码。因此，3D-UCaps 继承了 Capsule 网络保留空间关系和 CNN 学习视觉表示的优点。我们对各种数据集进行了实验，以证明 3D-UCaps 的稳健性，包括 iSeg-2017、LUNA16、Hippocampus 和 Cardiac，其中我们的方法优于以前的 Capsule 网络和 3D-Unet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为3D-UCaps的3D胶囊网络，用于医学体积图像分割，结合了胶囊网络和3D卷积神经网络的优势。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在医学图像分割中存在信息丢失和对旋转敏感的问题，而胶囊网络能保留空间关系但尚未广泛应用于体积图像分割。
AI.method: 设计包含两个路径的网络：第一路径使用3D胶囊块编码，第二路径使用3D CNN块解码，结合两者优势以提升分割效果。
AI.result: 在iSeg-2017、LUNA16等数据集上，3D-UCaps优于现有胶囊网络和3D-Unet方法。
AI.conclusion: 3D-UCaps通过融合胶囊网络与CNN，有效提升了医学体积图像分割的鲁棒性和准确性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为3D-UCaps的3D胶囊网络，用于医学体积图像分割，结合了胶囊网络和3D卷积神经网络的优势。
ai_content.motivation: 传统CNN在医学图像分割中存在信息丢失和对旋转敏感的问题，而胶囊网络能保留空间关系但尚未广泛应用于体积图像分割。

search_text: 3D-UCaps: 3D Capsules Unet for Volumetric Image Segmentation 3D-UCaps：用于体积图像分割的 3D 胶囊 Unet Medical image segmentation has been so far achieving promising results with Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). However, it is arguable that in traditional CNNs, its pooling layer tends to discard important information such as positions. Moreover, CNNs are sensitive to rotation and affine transformation. Capsule network is a data-efficient network design proposed to overcome such limitations by replacing pooling layers with dynamic routing and convolutional strides, which aims to preserve the part-whole relationships. Capsule network has shown a great performance in image recognition and natural language processing, but applications for medical image segmentation, particularly volumetric image segmentation, has been limited. In this work, we propose 3D-UCaps, a 3D voxel-based Capsule network for medical volumetric image segmentation. We build the concept of capsules into a CNN by designing a network with two pathways: the first pathway is encoded by 3D Capsule blocks, whereas the second pathway is decoded by 3D CNNs blocks. 3D-UCaps, therefore inherits the merits from both Capsule network to preserve the spatial relationship and CNNs to learn visual representation. We conducted experiments on various datasets to demonstrate the robustness of 3D-UCaps including iSeg-2017, LUNA16, Hippocampus, and Cardiac, where our method outperforms previous Capsule networks and 3D-Unets. 迄今为止，医学图像分割已经通过卷积神经网络（CNN）取得了可喜的结果。然而，有争议的是，在传统的 CNN 中，其池化层往往会丢弃位置等重要信息。此外，CNN 对旋转和仿射变换很敏感。胶囊网络是一种数据高效的网络设计，旨在通过用动态路由和卷积步长替换池化层来克服这些限制，其目的是保留部分与整体的关系。胶囊网络在图像识别和自然语言处理方面表现出了出色的性能，但在医学图像分割，特别是体积图像分割方面的应用却受到限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了 3D-UCaps，一种用于医学体积图像分割的基于 3D 体素的胶囊网络。我们通过设计具有两条路径的网络，将胶囊的概念构建到 CNN 中：第一个路径由 3D Capsule 块编码，而第二个路径由 3D CNN 块解码。因此，3D-UCaps 继承了 Capsule 网络保留空间关系和 CNN 学习视觉表示的优点。我们对各种数据集进行了实验，以证明 3D-UCaps 的稳健性，包括 iSeg-2017、LUNA16、Hippocampus 和 Cardiac，其中我们的方法优于以前的 Capsule 网络和 3D-Unet。 本文提出了一种名为3D-UCaps的3D胶囊网络，用于医学体积图像分割，结合了胶囊网络和3D卷积神经网络的优势。 Tan Nguyen,Binh-Son Hua,Ngan Le eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ngoc-Vuong Ho,Tan Nguyen,Gia-Han Diep,Ngan Le,Binh-Son Hua
title: Point-Unet: A Context-aware Point-based Neural Network for Volumetric Segmentation
title_zh: Point-Unet：用于体积分割的上下文感知的基于点的神经网络
abstract: Medical image analysis using deep learning has recently been prevalent, showing great performance for various downstream tasks including medical image segmentation and its sibling, volumetric image segmentation. Particularly, a typical volumetric segmentation network strongly relies on a voxel grid representation which treats volumetric data as a stack of individual voxel `slices', which allows learning to segment a voxel grid to be as straightforward as extending existing image-based segmentation networks to the 3D domain. However, using a voxel grid representation requires a large memory footprint, expensive test-time and limiting the scalability of the solutions. In this paper, we propose Point-Unet, a novel method that incorporates the efficiency of deep learning with 3D point clouds into volumetric segmentation. Our key idea is to first predict the regions of interest in the volume by learning an attentional probability map, which is then used for sampling the volume into a sparse point cloud that is subsequently segmented using a point-based neural network. We have conducted the experiments on the medical volumetric segmentation task with both a small-scale dataset Pancreas and large-scale datasets BraTS18, BraTS19, and BraTS20 challenges. A comprehensive benchmark on different metrics has shown that our context-aware Point-Unet robustly outperforms the SOTA voxel-based networks at both accuracies, memory usage during training, and time consumption during testing. Our code is available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/Point-Unet.
summary: Medical image analysis using deep learning has recently been prevalent, showing great performance for various downstream tasks including medical image segmentation and its sibling, volumetric image segmentation. Particularly, a typical volumetric segmentation network strongly relies on a voxel grid representation which treats volumetric data as a stack of individual voxel `slices', which allows learning to segment a voxel grid to be as straightforward as extending existing image-based segmentation networks to the 3D domain. However, using a voxel grid representation requires a large memory footprint, expensive test-time and limiting the scalability of the solutions. In this paper, we propose Point-Unet, a novel method that incorporates the efficiency of deep learning with 3D point clouds into volumetric segmentation. Our key idea is to first predict the regions of interest in the volume by learning an attentional probability map, which is then used for sampling the volume into a sparse point cloud that is subsequently segmented using a point-based neural network. We have conducted the experiments on the medical volumetric segmentation task with both a small-scale dataset Pancreas and large-scale datasets BraTS18, BraTS19, and BraTS20 challenges. A comprehensive benchmark on different metrics has shown that our context-aware Point-Unet robustly outperforms the SOTA voxel-based networks at both accuracies, memory usage during training, and time consumption during testing. Our code is available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/Point-Unet.
abstract_zh: 使用深度学习的医学图像分析最近很流行，在各种下游任务（包括医学图像分割及其兄弟体积图像分割）中显示出出色的性能。特别是，典型的体积分割网络强烈依赖于体素网格表示，它将体积数据视为单个体素“切片”的堆栈，这使得学习分割体素网格就像将现有的基于图像的分割网络扩展到 3D 域一样简单。然而，使用体素网格表示需要大量的内存占用、昂贵的测试时间并限制解决方案的可扩展性。在本文中，我们提出了 Point-Unet，这是一种将 3D 点云深度学习的效率融入体积分割的新颖方法。我们的关键思想是首先通过学习注意力概率图来预测体积中的感兴趣区域，然后使用该概率图将体积采样到稀疏点云中，随后使用基于点的神经网络进行分割。我们使用小规模数据集 Pancreas 和大规模数据集 BraTS18、BraTS19 和 BraTS20 挑战进行了医学体积分割任务的实验。针对不同指标的综合基准测试表明，我们的上下文感知 Point-Unet 在准确性、训练期间的内存使用以及测试期间的时间消耗方面都远远优于基于 SOTA 体素的网络。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/VinAIResearch/Point-Unet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Point-Unet，一种结合深度学习与3D点云的上下文感知点基础神经网络，用于体积分割任务。
AI.motivation: 传统体积分割方法依赖体素网格表示，存在内存消耗大、测试耗时长和可扩展性差的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过学习注意力概率图预测感兴趣区域，将其采样为稀疏点云，再利用点基础神经网络进行分割。
AI.result: 在Pancreas及BraTS系列数据集上，Point-Unet在分割精度、训练内存占用和测试时间上均优于现有体素网络。
AI.conclusion: Point-Unet通过点云表示有效提升了体积分割的效率与性能，为医学图像分析提供新思路。

We have conducted the experiments on the medical volumetric segmentation task with both a small-scale dataset Pancreas and large-scale datasets BraTS18, BraTS19, and BraTS20 challenges. authors_text: Adir Rahamim,Itay Naeh
title: Robustness through Cognitive Dissociation Mitigation in Contrastive Adversarial Training
title_zh: 通过对比对抗训练中的认知解离缓解实现稳健性
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a novel neural network training framework that increases model's adversarial robustness to adversarial attacks while maintaining high clean accuracy by combining contrastive learning (CL) with adversarial training (AT). We propose to improve model robustness to adversarial attacks by learning feature representations that are consistent under both data augmentations and adversarial perturbations. We leverage contrastive learning to improve adversarial robustness by considering an adversarial example as another positive example, and aim to maximize the similarity between random augmentations of data samples and their adversarial example, while constantly updating the classification head in order to avoid a cognitive dissociation between the classification head and the embedding space. This dissociation is caused by the fact that CL updates the network up to the embedding space, while freezing the classification head which is used to generate new positive adversarial examples. We validate our method, Contrastive Learning with Adversarial Features(CLAF), on the CIFAR-10 dataset on which it outperforms both robust accuracy and clean accuracy over alternative supervised and self-supervised adversarial learning methods.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a novel neural network training framework that increases model's adversarial robustness to adversarial attacks while maintaining high clean accuracy by combining contrastive learning (CL) with adversarial training (AT). We propose to improve model robustness to adversarial attacks by learning feature representations that are consistent under both data augmentations and adversarial perturbations. We leverage contrastive learning to improve adversarial robustness by considering an adversarial example as another positive example, and aim to maximize the similarity between random augmentations of data samples and their adversarial example, while constantly updating the classification head in order to avoid a cognitive dissociation between the classification head and the embedding space. This dissociation is caused by the fact that CL updates the network up to the embedding space, while freezing the classification head which is used to generate new positive adversarial examples. We validate our method, Contrastive Learning with Adversarial Features(CLAF), on the CIFAR-10 dataset on which it outperforms both robust accuracy and clean accuracy over alternative supervised and self-supervised adversarial learning methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的神经网络训练框架，该框架通过将对比学习（CL）与对抗训练（AT）相结合，提高模型对对抗攻击的对抗鲁棒性，同时保持高清洁精度。我们建议通过学习在数据增强和对抗性扰动下保持一致的特征表示来提高模型对对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。我们通过将对抗性示例视为另一个正例，利用对比学习来提高对抗性鲁棒性，并旨在最大化数据样本的随机增强与其对抗性示例之间的相似性，同时不断更新分类头以避免分类头和嵌入空间之间的认知分离。这种分离是由于 CL 将网络更新到嵌入空间，同时冻结用于生成新的正面对抗样本的分类头而引起的。我们在 CIFAR-10 数据集上验证了我们的方法“对抗性特征对比学习”(CLAF)，与其他监督和自监督对抗性学习方法相比，该方法的鲁棒准确性和干净准确性均优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合对比学习与对抗训练的新框架CLAF，通过缓解认知分离现象提升模型对抗鲁棒性并保持高清洁准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法存在分类头与嵌入空间的认知分离问题，导致模型鲁棒性不足，而对比学习可有效增强特征一致性。
AI.method: 将对抗样本视为正样本，通过最大化数据增强样本与其对抗样本的相似性，并动态更新分类头以消除嵌入空间与分类头间的不一致性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，CLAF在对抗准确率和清洁准确率均优于现有监督与自监督对抗学习方法。
AI.conclusion: CLAF通过缓解认知分离问题，有效提升了模型的对抗鲁棒性，为对比学习与对抗训练的结合提供了新思路。

We leverage contrastive learning to improve adversarial robustness by considering an adversarial example as another positive example, and aim to maximize the similarity between random augmentations of data samples and their adversarial example, while constantly updating the classification head in order to avoid a cognitive dissociation between the classification head and the embedding space. This dissociation is caused by the fact that CL updates the network up to the embedding space, while freezing the classification head which is used to generate new positive adversarial examples. We validate our method, Contrastive Learning with Adversarial Features(CLAF), on the CIFAR-10 dataset on which it outperforms both robust accuracy and clean accuracy over alternative supervised and self-supervised adversarial learning methods. 在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的神经网络训练框架，该框架通过将对比学习（CL）与对抗训练（AT）相结合，提高模型对对抗攻击的对抗鲁棒性，同时保持高清洁精度。我们建议通过学习在数据增强和对抗性扰动下保持一致的特征表示来提高模型对对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。我们通过将对抗性示例视为另一个正例，利用对比学习来提高对抗性鲁棒性，并旨在最大化数据样本的随机增强与其对抗性示例之间的相似性，同时不断更新分类头以避免分类头和嵌入空间之间的认知分离。这种分离是由于 CL 将网络更新到嵌入空间，同时冻结用于生成新的正面对抗样本的分类头而引起的。我们在 CIFAR-10 数据集上验证了我们的方法“对抗性特征对比学习”(CLAF)，与其他监督和自监督对抗性学习方法相比，该方法的鲁棒准确性和干净准确性均优于其他方法。 本文提出了一种结合对比学习与对抗训练的新框架CLAF，通过缓解认知分离现象提升模型对抗鲁棒性并保持高清洁准确率。 Adir Rahamim,Itay Naeh cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Markus Kängsepp,Kaspar Valk,Meelis Kull
title: On the Usefulness of the Fit-on-the-Test View on Evaluating Calibration of Classifiers
title_zh: 论测试拟合观点在评估分类器校准中的有用性
abstract: Every uncalibrated classifier has a corresponding true calibration map that calibrates its confidence. Deviations of this idealistic map from the identity map reveal miscalibration. Such calibration errors can be reduced with many post-hoc calibration methods which fit some family of calibration maps on a validation dataset. In contrast, evaluation of calibration with the expected calibration error (ECE) on the test set does not explicitly involve fitting. However, as we demonstrate, ECE can still be viewed as if fitting a family of functions on the test data. This motivates the fit-on-the-test view on evaluation: first, approximate a calibration map on the test data, and second, quantify its distance from the identity. Exploiting this view allows us to unlock missed opportunities: (1) use the plethora of post-hoc calibration methods for evaluating calibration; (2) tune the number of bins in ECE with cross-validation. Furthermore, we introduce: (3) benchmarking on pseudo-real data where the true calibration map can be estimated very precisely; and (4) novel calibration and evaluation methods using new calibration map families PL and PL3.
summary: Every uncalibrated classifier has a corresponding true calibration map that calibrates its confidence. Deviations of this idealistic map from the identity map reveal miscalibration. Such calibration errors can be reduced with many post-hoc calibration methods which fit some family of calibration maps on a validation dataset. In contrast, evaluation of calibration with the expected calibration error (ECE) on the test set does not explicitly involve fitting. However, as we demonstrate, ECE can still be viewed as if fitting a family of functions on the test data. This motivates the fit-on-the-test view on evaluation: first, approximate a calibration map on the test data, and second, quantify its distance from the identity. Exploiting this view allows us to unlock missed opportunities: (1) use the plethora of post-hoc calibration methods for evaluating calibration; (2) tune the number of bins in ECE with cross-validation. Furthermore, we introduce: (3) benchmarking on pseudo-real data where the true calibration map can be estimated very precisely; and (4) novel calibration and evaluation methods using new calibration map families PL and PL3.
abstract_zh: 每个未校准的分类器都有一个相应的真实校准图来校准其置信度。这张理想主义地图与恒等地图的偏差揭示了校准错误。可以通过许多事后校准方法来减少这种校准误差，这些方法适合验证数据集上的某些校准图系列。相反，使用测试集上的预期校准误差 (ECE) 进行校准评估并不明确涉及拟合。然而，正如我们所证明的，ECE 仍然可以被视为在测试数据上拟合一系列函数。这激发了评估时的拟合测试观点：首先，在测试数据上近似校准图，其次，量化其与身份的距离。利用这一观点使我们能够抓住错过的机会：（1）使用大量的事后校准方法来评估校准； (2) 通过交叉验证调整 ECE 中的 bin 数量。此外，我们还介绍了：（3）对伪真实数据进行基准测试，可以非常精确地估计真实的校准图； (4)使用新的校准图族PL和PL3的新颖的校准和评估方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的校准评估视角——'在测试集上拟合'，通过将预期校准误差（ECE）视为对测试数据的函数拟合，改进分类器校准评估方法。
AI.motivation: 传统ECE评估方法未显式涉及拟合过程，限制了校准评估的灵活性和精度。作者认为将ECE视为测试数据的拟合过程可解锁更多优化机会。
AI.method: 1) 将ECE框架重构为测试数据拟合问题；2) 引入后校准方法进行评估；3) 使用交叉验证优化ECE分箱数；4) 构建伪真实数据基准；5) 提出PL/PL3新型校准映射族。
AI.result: 验证了ECE的拟合本质，实现了后校准方法的评估应用，通过伪真实数据精确评估校准性能，并提出了更灵活的PL/PL3校准框架。
AI.conclusion: 该视角为校准评估提供了新范式，通过结合后校准技术与交叉验证，显著提升了校准误差量化精度，并为未来校准方法研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Manuel Mager,Arturo Oncevay,Elisabeth Mager,Katharina Kann,Ngoc Thang Vu
title: BPE vs. Morphological Segmentation: A Case Study on Machine Translation of Four Polysynthetic Languages
title_zh: BPE 与形态分割：四种多合成语言机器翻译案例研究
abstract: Morphologically-rich polysynthetic languages present a challenge for NLP systems due to data sparsity, and a common strategy to handle this issue is to apply subword segmentation. We investigate a wide variety of supervised and unsupervised morphological segmentation methods for four polysynthetic languages: Nahuatl, Raramuri, Shipibo-Konibo, and Wixarika. Then, we compare the morphologically inspired segmentation methods against Byte-Pair Encodings (BPEs) as inputs for machine translation (MT) when translating to and from Spanish. We show that for all language pairs except for Nahuatl, an unsupervised morphological segmentation algorithm outperforms BPEs consistently and that, although supervised methods achieve better segmentation scores, they under-perform in MT challenges. Finally, we contribute two new morphological segmentation datasets for Raramuri and Shipibo-Konibo, and a parallel corpus for Raramuri--Spanish.
summary: Morphologically-rich polysynthetic languages present a challenge for NLP systems due to data sparsity, and a common strategy to handle this issue is to apply subword segmentation. We investigate a wide variety of supervised and unsupervised morphological segmentation methods for four polysynthetic languages: Nahuatl, Raramuri, Shipibo-Konibo, and Wixarika. Then, we compare the morphologically inspired segmentation methods against Byte-Pair Encodings (BPEs) as inputs for machine translation (MT) when translating to and from Spanish. We show that for all language pairs except for Nahuatl, an unsupervised morphological segmentation algorithm outperforms BPEs consistently and that, although supervised methods achieve better segmentation scores, they under-perform in MT challenges. Finally, we contribute two new morphological segmentation datasets for Raramuri and Shipibo-Konibo, and a parallel corpus for Raramuri--Spanish.
abstract_zh: 由于数据稀疏，形态丰富的多合成语言给 NLP 系统带来了挑战，处理这个问题的常见策略是应用子词分割。我们研究了四种多合成语言的各种监督和无监督形态分割方法：Nahuatl、Raramuri、Shipibo-Konibo 和 Wixarika。然后，我们将形态学启发的分割方法与字节对编码 (BPE) 进行比较，作为西班牙语翻译时机器翻译 (MT) 的输入。我们表明，对于除 Nahuatl 之外的所有语言对，无监督形态分割算法始终优于 BPE，并且尽管有监督方法取得了更好的分割分数，但它们在 MT 挑战中表现不佳。最后，我们为 Raramuri 和 Shipibo-Konibo 贡献了两个新的形态分割数据集，以及 Raramuri（西班牙语）的并行语料库。

AI.tldr: 本文对比了字节对编码（BPE）与形态分割方法在四种多合成语言机器翻译中的效果。
AI.motivation: 多合成语言因形态复杂性和数据稀疏性给自然语言处理带来挑战，需探索更有效的分词方法以提升机器翻译质量。
AI.method: 研究者对四种多合成语言（纳瓦特尔语、拉拉穆里语、希皮博-科尼博语、维萨里卡语）应用监督和非监督形态分割方法，并与BPE进行机器翻译效果对比，同时构建新数据集。
AI.result: 除纳瓦特尔语外，非监督形态分割方法在所有语言对中均优于BPE；监督方法虽分割效果更好，但机器翻译表现较差。贡献了拉拉穆里语和希皮博-科尼博语的形态分割数据集及平行语料库。
AI.conclusion: 非监督形态分割在多合成语言机器翻译中更具优势，而监督方法的分割优势未能转化为翻译性能提升，新数据集为相关研究提供重要资源。

authors_text: Viet-Khoa Vo-Ho,Kashu Yamazaki,Hieu Hoang,Minh-Triet Tran,Ngan Le
title: Meta-Learning of NAS for Few-shot Learning in Medical Image Applications
title_zh: 用于医学图像应用中小样本学习的 NAS 元学习
comment: book chapter, in Meta-Learning with Medical Imaging and Health Informatics Applications
comments: book chapter, in Meta-Learning with Medical Imaging and Health Informatics Applications
abstract: Deep learning methods have been successful in solving tasks in machine learning and have made breakthroughs in many sectors owing to their ability to automatically extract features from unstructured data. However, their performance relies on manual trial-and-error processes for selecting an appropriate network architecture, hyperparameters for training, and pre-/post-procedures. Even though it has been shown that network architecture plays a critical role in learning feature representation feature from data and the final performance, searching for the best network architecture is computationally intensive and heavily relies on researchers' experience. Automated machine learning (AutoML) and its advanced techniques i.e. Neural Architecture Search (NAS) have been promoted to address those limitations. Not only in general computer vision tasks, but NAS has also motivated various applications in multiple areas including medical imaging. In medical imaging, NAS has significant progress in improving the accuracy of image classification, segmentation, reconstruction, and more. However, NAS requires the availability of large annotated data, considerable computation resources, and pre-defined tasks. To address such limitations, meta-learning has been adopted in the scenarios of few-shot learning and multiple tasks. In this book chapter, we first present a brief review of NAS by discussing well-known approaches in search space, search strategy, and evaluation strategy. We then introduce various NAS approaches in medical imaging with different applications such as classification, segmentation, detection, reconstruction, etc. Meta-learning in NAS for few-shot learning and multiple tasks is then explained. Finally, we describe several open problems in NAS.

abstract_zh: 深度学习方法由于能够从非结构化数据中自动提取特征，已经成功地解决了机器学习中的任务，并在许多领域取得了突破。然而，它们的性能依赖于手动试错过程来选择合适的网络架构、训练超参数以及前/后程序。尽管已经证明网络架构在从数据中学习特征表示特征和最终性能方面发挥着关键作用，但寻找最佳网络架构的计算量很大，并且很大程度上依赖于研究人员的经验。自动机器学习 (AutoML) 及其先进技术，即神经架构搜索 (NAS) 已被推广以解决这些限制。 NAS 不仅在一般计算机视觉任务中，还推动了包括医学成像在内的多个领域的各种应用。在医学成像领域，NAS 在提高图像分类、分割、重建等准确性方面取得了重大进展。然而，NAS 需要大量注释数据、大量计算资源和预定义任务的可用性。为了解决这些限制，在小样本学习和多任务场景中采用了元学习。在本书章节中，我们首先通过讨论搜索空间、搜索策略和评估策略中的众所周知的方法来对 NAS 进行简要回顾。然后，我们介绍了医学成像中具有不同应用的各种 NAS 方法，例如分类、分割、检测、重建等。然后解释了 NAS 中用于少样本学习和多任务的元学习。最后，我们描述了 NAS 中的几个未解决的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了神经架构搜索（NAS）在医疗图像应用中的进展，并探讨了结合元学习解决小样本学习的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统NAS依赖大量标注数据和计算资源，而医疗图像常面临数据稀缺和任务多样化的挑战，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过回顾NAS的搜索空间、策略及评估方法，分析其在医疗图像分类、分割等任务中的应用，并引入元学习优化小样本场景下的NAS流程。
AI.result: 总结了NAS在医疗影像中的性能提升，同时指出元学习可减少对大规模数据的依赖，增强模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 尽管NAS与元学习结合在医疗图像中展现潜力，但仍需解决计算成本、跨任务迁移等开放性问题。

authors_text: Minh Tran,Viet-Khoa Vo-Ho,Kyle Quinn,Hien Nguyen,Khoa Luu,Ngan Le
title: CapsNet for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于医学图像分割的 CapsNet
comment: Deep Learning for Medical Image Analysis, Elsevier/Academic Press (accepted)
comments: Deep Learning for Medical Image Analysis, Elsevier/Academic Press (accepted)
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have been successful in solving tasks in computer vision including medical image segmentation due to their ability to automatically extract features from unstructured data. However, CNNs are sensitive to rotation and affine transformation and their success relies on huge-scale labeled datasets capturing various input variations. This network paradigm has posed challenges at scale because acquiring annotated data for medical segmentation is expensive, and strict privacy regulations. Furthermore, visual representation learning with CNNs has its own flaws, e.g., it is arguable that the pooling layer in traditional CNNs tends to discard positional information and CNNs tend to fail on input images that differ in orientations and sizes. Capsule network (CapsNet) is a recent new architecture that has achieved better robustness in representation learning by replacing pooling layers with dynamic routing and convolutional strides, which has shown potential results on popular tasks such as classification, recognition, segmentation, and natural language processing. Different from CNNs, which result in scalar outputs, CapsNet returns vector outputs, which aim to preserve the part-whole relationships. In this work, we first introduce the limitations of CNNs and fundamentals of CapsNet. We then provide recent developments of CapsNet for the task of medical image segmentation. We finally discuss various effective network architectures to implement a CapsNet for both 2D images and 3D volumetric medical image segmentation.

However, CNNs are sensitive to rotation and affine transformation and their success relies on huge-scale labeled datasets capturing various input variations. This network paradigm has posed challenges at scale because acquiring annotated data for medical segmentation is expensive, and strict privacy regulations. Furthermore, visual representation learning with CNNs has its own flaws, e.g., it is arguable that the pooling layer in traditional CNNs tends to discard positional information and CNNs tend to fail on input images that differ in orientations and sizes. Capsule network (CapsNet) is a recent new architecture that has achieved better robustness in representation learning by replacing pooling layers with dynamic routing and convolutional strides, which has shown potential results on popular tasks such as classification, recognition, segmentation, and natural language processing. Different from CNNs, which result in scalar outputs, CapsNet returns vector outputs, which aim to preserve the part-whole relationships. In this work, we first introduce the limitations of CNNs and fundamentals of CapsNet. We then provide recent developments of CapsNet for the task of medical image segmentation. We finally discuss various effective network architectures to implement a CapsNet for both 2D images and 3D volumetric medical image segmentation.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 因其能够从非结构化数据中自动提取特征而成功解决了计算机视觉中的任务，包括医学图像分割。然而，CNN 对旋转和仿射变换很敏感，它们的成功依赖于捕获各种输入变化的大规模标记数据集。这种网络范式带来了大规模的挑战，因为获取用于医学分割的注释数据非常昂贵，而且隐私法规也很严格。此外，CNN 的视觉表示学习也有其自身的缺陷，例如，传统 CNN 中的池化层往往会丢弃位置信息，而 CNN 往往会在方向和大小不同的输入图像上失败。胶囊网络（CapsNet）是最近的一种新架构，通过用动态路由和卷积步长替换池化层，在表示学习中实现了更好的鲁棒性，在分类、识别、分割和自然语言处理等流行任务上显示出了潜在的结果。与 CNN 产生标量输出不同，CapsNet 返回向量输出，其目的是保留部分与整体的关系。在这项工作中，我们首先介绍 CNN 的局限性和 CapsNet 的基本原理。然后，我们提供了 CapsNet 在医学图像分割任务中的最新进展。最后，我们讨论了各种有效的网络架构来实现 2D 图像和 3D 体积医学图像分割的 CapsNet。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了胶囊网络（CapsNet）在医学图像分割中的应用，分析其相较于传统卷积神经网络（CNN）的优势及实现方法。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在医学图像分割中面临数据标注成本高、隐私限制及对图像变换敏感等问题，而CapsNet通过动态路由机制和向量输出能更好地保留空间信息，具有潜在优势。
AI.method: 论文介绍了CapsNet的基本原理，包括动态路由算法和向量输出机制，并讨论了其在2D和3D医学图像分割中的网络架构设计。
AI.result: 总结了CapsNet在医学图像分割领域的最新研究进展，验证了其在处理不同方向、尺寸图像时的鲁棒性及对小样本数据的适应能力。
AI.conclusion: CapsNet为医学图像分割提供了新的解决方案，未来需进一步优化网络结构以适应复杂医学影像需求。

authors_text: Khoa Vo,Kashu Yamazaki,Sang Truong,Minh-Triet Tran,Akihiro Sugimoto,Ngan Le
title: ABN: Agent-Aware Boundary Networks for Temporal Action Proposal Generation
title_zh: ABN：用于生成临时行动提案的智能体感知边界网络
comment: Accepted in the journal of IEEE Access Vol. 9
comments: Accepted in the journal of IEEE Access Vol. 9
abstract: Temporal action proposal generation (TAPG) aims to estimate temporal intervals of actions in untrimmed videos, which is a challenging yet plays an important role in many tasks of video analysis and understanding. Despite the great achievement in TAPG, most existing works ignore the human perception of interaction between agents and the surrounding environment by applying a deep learning model as a black-box to the untrimmed videos to extract video visual representation. Therefore, it is beneficial and potentially improve the performance of TAPG if we can capture these interactions between agents and the environment. In this paper, we propose a novel framework named Agent-Aware Boundary Network (ABN), which consists of two sub-networks (i) an Agent-Aware Representation Network to obtain both agent-agent and agents-environment relationships in the video representation, and (ii) a Boundary Generation Network to estimate the confidence score of temporal intervals. In the Agent-Aware Representation Network, the interactions between agents are expressed through local pathway, which operates at a local level to focus on the motions of agents whereas the overall perception of the surroundings are expressed through global pathway, which operates at a global level to perceive the effects of agents-environment. Comprehensive evaluations on 20-action THUMOS-14 and 200-action ActivityNet-1.3 datasets with different backbone networks (i.e C3D, SlowFast and Two-Stream) show that our proposed ABN robustly outperforms state-of-the-art methods regardless of the employed backbone network on TAPG. We further examine the proposal quality by leveraging proposals generated by our method onto temporal action detection (TAD) frameworks and evaluate their detection performances. The source code can be found in this URL https://github.com/vhvkhoa/TAPG-AgentEnvNetwork.git.
summary: Temporal action proposal generation (TAPG) aims to estimate temporal intervals of actions in untrimmed videos, which is a challenging yet plays an important role in many tasks of video analysis and understanding. Despite the great achievement in TAPG, most existing works ignore the human perception of interaction between agents and the surrounding environment by applying a deep learning model as a black-box to the untrimmed videos to extract video visual representation. Therefore, it is beneficial and potentially improve the performance of TAPG if we can capture these interactions between agents and the environment. In this paper, we propose a novel framework named Agent-Aware Boundary Network (ABN), which consists of two sub-networks (i) an Agent-Aware Representation Network to obtain both agent-agent and agents-environment relationships in the video representation, and (ii) a Boundary Generation Network to estimate the confidence score of temporal intervals. In the Agent-Aware Representation Network, the interactions between agents are expressed through local pathway, which operates at a local level to focus on the motions of agents whereas the overall perception of the surroundings are expressed through global pathway, which operates at a global level to perceive the effects of agents-environment. Comprehensive evaluations on 20-action THUMOS-14 and 200-action ActivityNet-1.3 datasets with different backbone networks (i.e C3D, SlowFast and Two-Stream) show that our proposed ABN robustly outperforms state-of-the-art methods regardless of the employed backbone network on TAPG. We further examine the proposal quality by leveraging proposals generated by our method onto temporal action detection (TAD) frameworks and evaluate their detection performances. The source code can be found in this URL https://github.com/vhvkhoa/TAPG-AgentEnvNetwork.git.
abstract_zh: 时间动作建议生成（TAPG）旨在估计未修剪视频中动作的时间间隔，这是一项挑战，但在视频分析和理解的许多任务中发挥着重要作用。尽管 TAPG 取得了巨大成就，但大多数现有作品通过将深度学习模型作为黑盒应用到未经修剪的视频来提取视频视觉表示，从而忽略了人类对智能体与周围环境之间交互的感知。因此，如果我们能够捕获智能体与环境之间的这些交互，那么它是有益的，并且有可能提高 TAPG 的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为智能体感知边界网络（ABN）的新颖框架，它由两个子网络组成：（i）智能体感知表示网络，用于获取视频表示中的智能体-智能体和智能体-环境关系；（ii）边界生成网络，用于估计时间间隔的置信度得分。在智能体感知表示网络中，智能体之间的交互通过局部路径来表达，局部路径在局部水平上运行，重点关注智能体的运动，而对周围环境的整体感知则通过全局路径来表达，全局路径在全局水平上运行，以感知智能体环境的影响。对具有不同主干网络（即 C3D、SlowFast 和两流）的 20 个动作 THUMOS-14 和 200 个动作 ActivityNet-1.3 数据集的综合评估表明，无论 TAPG 上使用的主干网络如何，我们提出的 ABN 都远远优于最先进的方法。我们通过利用我们的方法生成的提案到时间动作检测（TAD）框架上来进一步检查提案质量，并评估其检测性能。源代码可以在此 URL https://github.com/vhvkhoa/TAPG-AgentEnvNetwork.git 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ABN（Agent-Aware Boundary Network）的新框架，用于改进未剪辑视频中时间动作提案生成（TAPG）任务，通过捕捉代理（如人物）与环境之间的交互关系。
AI.motivation: 现有TAPG方法通常将深度学习模型视为黑箱，忽略了人类对代理与环境交互的感知，导致无法充分利用场景中的语义信息，从而影响性能。
AI.method: ABN包含两个子网络：1) Agent-Aware表示网络，通过局部路径捕捉代理间运动关系，全局路径感知代理与环境的整体交互；2) 边界生成网络，用于估计时间区间置信度。
AI.result: 在THUMOS-14和ActivityNet-1.3数据集上，ABN在不同骨干网络（C3D、SlowFast、Two-Stream）下均优于现有方法，且提案质量在时间动作检测框架中得到验证。
AI.conclusion: ABN通过建模代理-环境交互显著提升了TAPG性能，方法具有跨骨干网络的鲁棒性，代码已开源。

authors_text: Dilara Keküllüoğlu,Kami Vaniea,Walid Magdy
title: Understanding Privacy Switching Behaviour on Twitter
title_zh: 了解 Twitter 上的隐私切换行为
comment: Proceedings of the 2022 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI'22)
comments: Proceedings of the 2022 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI'22)
abstract: Changing a Twitter account's privacy setting between public and protected changes the visibility of past tweets. By inspecting the privacy setting of over 100K Twitter users over 3 months, we noticed that over 40% of those users change their privacy setting at least once with around 16% changing it over 5 times. This motivated us to explore the reasons why people switch their privacy setting. We studied these switching phenomena quantitatively by comparing the tweeting behaviour of users when public vs protected, and qualitatively using two follow-up surveys (n=100, n=324) to understand potential reasoning behind the observed behaviours. Our quantitative analysis shows that users who switch privacy settings mention others and share hashtags more when their setting is public. Our surveys highlighted that users turn protected to share personal content and regulate boundaries while they turn public to interact with others in ways prevented by being protected.
summary: Changing a Twitter account's privacy setting between public and protected changes the visibility of past tweets. By inspecting the privacy setting of over 100K Twitter users over 3 months, we noticed that over 40% of those users change their privacy setting at least once with around 16% changing it over 5 times. This motivated us to explore the reasons why people switch their privacy setting. We studied these switching phenomena quantitatively by comparing the tweeting behaviour of users when public vs protected, and qualitatively using two follow-up surveys (n=100, n=324) to understand potential reasoning behind the observed behaviours. Our quantitative analysis shows that users who switch privacy settings mention others and share hashtags more when their setting is public. Our surveys highlighted that users turn protected to share personal content and regulate boundaries while they turn public to interact with others in ways prevented by being protected.
abstract_zh: 在公开和受保护之间更改 Twitter 帐户的隐私设置会更改过去推文的可见性。通过在 3 个月内检查超过 10 万 Twitter 用户的隐私设置，我们注意到超过 40% 的用户至少更改了一次隐私设置，其中约 16% 的用户更改了超过 5 次。这促使我们探索人们改变隐私设置的原因。我们通过比较用户在公开状态和受保护状态下的推文行为来定量研究这些切换现象，并使用两项后续调查（n=100，n=324）定性地研究观察到的行为背后的潜在原因。我们的定量分析表明，切换隐私设置的用户在其设置公开时会更多地提及他人并分享主题标签。我们的调查强调，用户通过受保护来分享个人内容并规范边界，同时他们通过受保护的方式公开与他人互动。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了Twitter用户隐私设置切换行为，分析其背后的原因及行为模式。
AI.motivation: 观察到大量用户频繁切换隐私设置，试图理解其行为背后的动机与社交需求。
AI.method: 通过量化分析10万用户3个月的隐私设置变化及发帖行为，并结合两次问卷调查（共424份）进行定性研究。
AI.result: 40%用户至少切换一次隐私设置，公共模式下用户更频繁提及他人和使用话题标签，而切换为受保护模式多用于分享个人内容并设定社交边界。
AI.conclusion: 用户隐私设置切换反映了其动态社交需求，公共模式促进互动，受保护模式则用于内容筛选与关系管理。

authors_text: Anietie Andy,Siyi Liu,Daphne Ippolito,Reno Kriz,Chris Callison-Burch,Derry Wijaya
title: Creating Multimedia Summaries Using Tweets and Videos
title_zh: 使用推文和视频创建多媒体摘要
abstract: While popular televised events such as presidential debates or TV shows are airing, people provide commentary on them in real-time. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach to combine social media commentary and videos to create a multimedia summary of televised events. Our approach identifies scenes from these events based on spikes of mentions of people involved in the event and automatically selects tweets and frames from the videos that occur during the time period of the spike that talk about and show the people being discussed.
summary: While popular televised events such as presidential debates or TV shows are airing, people provide commentary on them in real-time. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach to combine social media commentary and videos to create a multimedia summary of televised events. Our approach identifies scenes from these events based on spikes of mentions of people involved in the event and automatically selects tweets and frames from the videos that occur during the time period of the spike that talk about and show the people being discussed.
abstract_zh: 当总统辩论或电视节目等热门电视节目正在播出时，人们会实时提供评论。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，将社交媒体评论和视频结合起来，创建电视事件的多媒体摘要。我们的方法根据涉及事件的人员的提及峰值来识别这些事件中的场景，并自动从峰值时间段内发生的视频中选择谈论和显示正在讨论的人的推文和帧。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合社交媒体评论和视频内容生成电视活动多媒体摘要的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效整合实时社交媒体评论与视频内容，导致事件摘要缺乏多维度信息。
AI.method: 通过检测人物提及量峰值识别关键场景，自动匹配相应时间窗口内的推文与视频帧进行多模态整合。
AI.result: 成功生成包含社交评论与视频片段的多媒体摘要，实验表明其在相关性和时效性上优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实时事件摘要提供了社交媒体与视频内容融合的新范式，具有广泛的应用潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合社交媒体评论和视频内容生成电视活动多媒体摘要的方法。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法未能有效整合实时社交媒体评论与视频内容，导致事件摘要缺乏多维度信息。
ai_content.method: 通过检测人物提及量峰值识别关键场景，自动匹配相应时间窗口内的推文与视频帧进行多模态整合。
ai_content.result: 成功生成包含社交评论与视频片段的多媒体摘要，实验表明其在相关性和时效性上优于传统方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为实时事件摘要提供了社交媒体与视频内容融合的新范式，具有广泛的应用潜力。

search_text: Creating Multimedia Summaries Using Tweets and Videos 使用推文和视频创建多媒体摘要 While popular televised events such as presidential debates or TV shows are airing, people provide commentary on them in real-time. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach to combine social media commentary and videos to create a multimedia summary of televised events. Our approach identifies scenes from these events based on spikes of mentions of people involved in the event and automatically selects tweets and frames from the videos that occur during the time period of the spike that talk about and show the people being discussed. 当总统辩论或电视节目等热门电视节目正在播出时，人们会实时提供评论。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，将社交媒体评论和视频结合起来，创建电视事件的多媒体摘要。我们的方法根据涉及事件的人员的提及峰值来识别这些事件中的场景，并自动从峰值时间段内发生的视频中选择谈论和显示正在讨论的人的推文和帧。 本文提出一种结合社交媒体评论和视频内容生成电视活动多媒体摘要的方法。 Anietie Andy,Siyi Liu,Daphne Ippolito,Reno Kriz,Chris Callison-Burch,Derry Wijaya cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Ian D. Miller,Anthony Cowley,Ravi Konkimalla,Shreyas S. Shivakumar,Ty Nguyen,Trey Smith,Camillo Jose Taylor,Vijay Kumar
title: Any Way You Look At It: Semantic Crossview Localization and Mapping with LiDAR
title_zh: 无论如何看：利用 LiDAR 进行语义交叉视图定位和绘图
comment: Published in the IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters and presented at the IEEE 2021 International Conference on Robotics and Automation. See https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_qwAoYK9iGU for accompanying video
comments: Published in the IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters and presented at the IEEE 2021 International Conference on Robotics and Automation. See https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_qwAoYK9iGU for accompanying video
abstract: Currently, GPS is by far the most popular global localization method. However, it is not always reliable or accurate in all environments. SLAM methods enable local state estimation but provide no means of registering the local map to a global one, which can be important for inter-robot collaboration or human interaction. In this work, we present a real-time method for utilizing semantics to globally localize a robot using only egocentric 3D semantically labelled LiDAR and IMU as well as top-down RGB images obtained from satellites or aerial robots. Additionally, as it runs, our method builds a globally registered, semantic map of the environment. We validate our method on KITTI as well as our own challenging datasets, and show better than 10 meter accuracy, a high degree of robustness, and the ability to estimate the scale of a top-down map on the fly if it is initially unknown.
summary: Currently, GPS is by far the most popular global localization method. However, it is not always reliable or accurate in all environments. SLAM methods enable local state estimation but provide no means of registering the local map to a global one, which can be important for inter-robot collaboration or human interaction. In this work, we present a real-time method for utilizing semantics to globally localize a robot using only egocentric 3D semantically labelled LiDAR and IMU as well as top-down RGB images obtained from satellites or aerial robots. Additionally, as it runs, our method builds a globally registered, semantic map of the environment. We validate our method on KITTI as well as our own challenging datasets, and show better than 10 meter accuracy, a high degree of robustness, and the ability to estimate the scale of a top-down map on the fly if it is initially unknown.
abstract_zh: 目前，GPS是迄今为止最流行的全球定位方法。然而，它并不总是在所有环境下都可靠或准确。 SLAM 方法可以实现局部状态估计，但无法提供将局部地图注册到全局地图的方法，而这对于机器人间协作或人类交互非常重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用语义来全局定位机器人的实时方法，仅使用以自我为中心的 3D 语义标记 LiDAR 和 IMU 以及从卫星或空中机器人获得的自上而下的 RGB 图像。此外，在运行时，我们的方法会构建一个全局注册的环境语义图。我们在 KITTI 以及我们自己的具有挑战性的数据集上验证了我们的方法，并显示出优于 10 米的精度、高度的鲁棒性，以及在最初未知的情况下动态估计自上而下地图比例的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义的跨视角定位与建图方法，利用单目3D语义LiDAR、IMU及俯视RGB图像实现机器人全局定位，并构建语义地图。
AI.motivation: GPS在复杂环境中可靠性不足，传统SLAM方法无法实现局部地图与全局地图的注册，限制了多机器人协作与人机交互的应用需求。
AI.method: 融合自车视角语义LiDAR点云、IMU惯性数据与俯视图像，通过语义特征匹配实现全局定位，同时实时构建全局语义地图。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集及自建数据集上验证，定位误差小于10米，具备高鲁棒性，可动态估计未知尺度的俯视地图。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过语义信息有效弥补GPS缺陷，为无先验地图环境下的机器人定位与建图提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Eugene Lyapustin,Anastasia Kirillova,Viacheslav Meshchaninov,Evgeney Zimin,Nikolai Karetin,Dmitriy Vatolin
title: Towards True Detail Restoration for Super-Resolution: A Benchmark and a Quality Metric
title_zh: 实现超分辨率的真实细节恢复：基准和质量指标
abstract: Super-resolution (SR) has become a widely researched topic in recent years. SR methods can improve overall image and video quality and create new possibilities for further content analysis. But the SR mainstream focuses primarily on increasing the naturalness of the resulting image despite potentially losing context accuracy. Such methods may produce an incorrect digit, character, face, or other structural object even though they otherwise yield good visual quality. Incorrect detail restoration can cause errors when detecting and identifying objects both manually and automatically. To analyze the detail-restoration capabilities of image and video SR models, we developed a benchmark based on our own video dataset, which contains complex patterns that SR models generally fail to correctly restore. We assessed 32 recent SR models using our benchmark and compared their ability to preserve scene context. We also conducted a crowd-sourced comparison of restored details and developed an objective assessment metric that outperforms other quality metrics by correlation with subjective scores for this task. In conclusion, we provide a deep analysis of benchmark results that yields insights for future SR-based work.
summary: Super-resolution (SR) has become a widely researched topic in recent years. SR methods can improve overall image and video quality and create new possibilities for further content analysis. But the SR mainstream focuses primarily on increasing the naturalness of the resulting image despite potentially losing context accuracy. Such methods may produce an incorrect digit, character, face, or other structural object even though they otherwise yield good visual quality. Incorrect detail restoration can cause errors when detecting and identifying objects both manually and automatically. To analyze the detail-restoration capabilities of image and video SR models, we developed a benchmark based on our own video dataset, which contains complex patterns that SR models generally fail to correctly restore. We assessed 32 recent SR models using our benchmark and compared their ability to preserve scene context. We also conducted a crowd-sourced comparison of restored details and developed an objective assessment metric that outperforms other quality metrics by correlation with subjective scores for this task. In conclusion, we provide a deep analysis of benchmark results that yields insights for future SR-based work.
abstract_zh: 近年来，超分辨率（SR）已成为广泛研究的课题。 SR 方法可以提高图像和视频的整体质量，并为进一步的内容分析创造新的可能性。但 SR 主流主要侧重于提高生成图像的自然度，尽管可能会失去上下文准确性。此类方法可能会产生不正确的数字、字符、面部或其他结构对象，即使它们在其他方面产生良好的视觉质量。不正确的细节恢复可能会在手动和自动检测和识别对象时导致错误。为了分析图像和视频 SR 模型的细节恢复能力，我们基于自己的视频数据集开发了一个基准，其中包含 SR 模型通常无法正确恢复的复杂模式。我们使用基准评估了 32 个最新的 SR 模型，并比较了它们保留场景上下文的能力。我们还对恢复的细节进行了众包比较，并开发了一种客观的评估指标，该指标通过与该任务的主观评分相关，优于其他质量指标。总之，我们对基准结果进行了深入分析，为未来基于 SR 的工作提供了见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个超分辨率细节恢复基准和质量评估指标，以解决现有方法在提升图像自然度时可能丢失上下文准确性的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法过度追求视觉自然度，导致关键细节（如文字、人脸）恢复错误，影响后续内容分析的准确性。
AI.method: 构建包含复杂模式的视频数据集作为基准，评估32种SR模型的上下文保持能力，并开发与主观评分高度相关的客观质量评估指标。
AI.result: 发现主流SR模型在细节恢复上表现不足，新提出的质量指标在主观评分相关性上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过基准测试揭示细节恢复的关键挑战，为未来超分辨率研究提供改进方向和评估标准。

authors_text: Bin Sun,Yulun Zhang,Songyao Jiang,Yun Fu
title: Hybrid Pixel-Unshuffled Network for Lightweight Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于轻量级图像超分辨率的混合像素未洗牌网络
abstract: Convolutional neural network (CNN) has achieved great success on image super-resolution (SR). However, most deep CNN-based SR models take massive computations to obtain high performance. Downsampling features for multi-resolution fusion is an efficient and effective way to improve the performance of visual recognition. Still, it is counter-intuitive in the SR task, which needs to project a low-resolution input to high-resolution. In this paper, we propose a novel Hybrid Pixel-Unshuffled Network (HPUN) by introducing an efficient and effective downsampling module into the SR task. The network contains pixel-unshuffled downsampling and Self-Residual Depthwise Separable Convolutions. Specifically, we utilize pixel-unshuffle operation to downsample the input features and use grouped convolution to reduce the channels. Besides, we enhance the depthwise convolution's performance by adding the input feature to its output. Experiments on benchmark datasets show that our HPUN achieves and surpasses the state-of-the-art reconstruction performance with fewer parameters and computation costs.
summary: Convolutional neural network (CNN) has achieved great success on image super-resolution (SR). However, most deep CNN-based SR models take massive computations to obtain high performance. Downsampling features for multi-resolution fusion is an efficient and effective way to improve the performance of visual recognition. Still, it is counter-intuitive in the SR task, which needs to project a low-resolution input to high-resolution. In this paper, we propose a novel Hybrid Pixel-Unshuffled Network (HPUN) by introducing an efficient and effective downsampling module into the SR task. The network contains pixel-unshuffled downsampling and Self-Residual Depthwise Separable Convolutions. Specifically, we utilize pixel-unshuffle operation to downsample the input features and use grouped convolution to reduce the channels. Besides, we enhance the depthwise convolution's performance by adding the input feature to its output. Experiments on benchmark datasets show that our HPUN achieves and surpasses the state-of-the-art reconstruction performance with fewer parameters and computation costs.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）在图像超分辨率（SR）方面取得了巨大成功。然而，大多数基于 CNN 的深度 SR 模型需要大量计算才能获得高性能。多分辨率融合的下采样特征是提高视觉识别性能的高效且有效的方法。尽管如此，这在 SR 任务中还是违反直觉的，因为它需要将低分辨率输入投影为高分辨率。在本文中，我们通过在 SR 任务中引入高效且有效的下采样模块，提出了一种新颖的混合像素无洗牌网络（HPUN）。该网络包含像素未洗牌的下采样和自残差深度可分离卷积。具体来说，我们利用像素非洗牌操作对输入特征进行下采样，并使用分组卷积来减少通道。此外，我们通过将输入特征添加到其输出来增强深度卷积的性能。对基准数据集的实验表明，我们的 HPUN 以更少的参数和计算成本实现并超越了最先进的重建性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级图像超分辨率网络HPUN，通过引入高效下采样模块提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度CNN超分模型计算量大，而多分辨率融合的下采样方法在超分任务中应用较少，需探索高效解决方案。
AI.method: 结合像素非重排下采样与分组卷积减少通道，并通过自残差深度可分离卷积增强特征提取效率。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上以更少参数和计算量超越现有最先进重建性能。
AI.conclusion: HPUN通过创新下采样与卷积结构设计，在超分任务中实现了性能与计算效率的平衡。

search_text: Hybrid Pixel-Unshuffled Network for Lightweight Image Super-Resolution 用于轻量级图像超分辨率的混合像素未洗牌网络 Convolutional neural network (CNN) has achieved great success on image super-resolution (SR). However, most deep CNN-based SR models take massive computations to obtain high performance. Downsampling features for multi-resolution fusion is an efficient and effective way to improve the performance of visual recognition. Still, it is counter-intuitive in the SR task, which needs to project a low-resolution input to high-resolution. In this paper, we propose a novel Hybrid Pixel-Unshuffled Network (HPUN) by introducing an efficient and effective downsampling module into the SR task. The network contains pixel-unshuffled downsampling and Self-Residual Depthwise Separable Convolutions. Specifically, we utilize pixel-unshuffle operation to downsample the input features and use grouped convolution to reduce the channels. Besides, we enhance the depthwise convolution's performance by adding the input feature to its output. Experiments on benchmark datasets show that our HPUN achieves and surpasses the state-of-the-art reconstruction performance with fewer parameters and computation costs. 卷积神经网络（CNN）在图像超分辨率（SR）方面取得了巨大成功。然而，大多数基于 CNN 的深度 SR 模型需要大量计算才能获得高性能。多分辨率融合的下采样特征是提高视觉识别性能的高效且有效的方法。尽管如此，这在 SR 任务中还是违反直觉的，因为它需要将低分辨率输入投影为高分辨率。在本文中，我们通过在 SR 任务中引入高效且有效的下采样模块，提出了一种新颖的混合像素无洗牌网络（HPUN）。该网络包含像素未洗牌的下采样和自残差深度可分离卷积。具体来说，我们利用像素非洗牌操作对输入特征进行下采样，并使用分组卷积来减少通道。此外，我们通过将输入特征添加到其输出来增强深度卷积的性能。对基准数据集的实验表明，我们的 HPUN 以更少的参数和计算成本实现并超越了最先进的重建性能。 本文提出一种轻量级图像超分辨率网络HPUN，通过引入高效下采样模块提升性能。 Bin Sun,Yulun Zhang,Songyao Jiang,Yun Fu eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Hanxue Gu,Keyu Li,Roy J. Colglazier,Jichen Yang,Michael Lebhar,Jonathan O'Donnell,William A. Jiranek,Richard C. Mather,Rob J. French,Nicholas Said,Jikai Zhang,Christine Park,Maciej A. Mazurowski
title: Knee arthritis severity measurement using deep learning: a publicly available algorithm with a multi-institutional validation showing radiologist-level performance
title_zh: 使用深度学习测量膝关节炎严重程度：一种公开的算法，经过多机构验证，显示放射科医生级别的表现
abstract: The assessment of knee osteoarthritis (KOA) severity on knee X-rays is a central criteria for the use of total knee arthroplasty. However, this assessment suffers from imprecise standards and a remarkably high inter-reader variability. An algorithmic, automated assessment of KOA severity could improve overall outcomes of knee replacement procedures by increasing the appropriateness of its use. We propose a novel deep learning-based five-step algorithm to automatically grade KOA from posterior-anterior (PA) views of radiographs: (1) image preprocessing (2) localization of knees joints in the image using the YOLO v3-Tiny model, (3) initial assessment of the severity of osteoarthritis using a convolutional neural network-based classifier, (4) segmentation of the joints and calculation of the joint space narrowing (JSN), and (5), a combination of the JSN and the initial assessment to determine a final Kellgren-Lawrence (KL) score. Furthermore, by displaying the segmentation masks used to make the assessment, our algorithm demonstrates a higher degree of transparency compared to typical "black box" deep learning classifiers. We perform a comprehensive evaluation using two public datasets and one dataset from our institution, and show that our algorithm reaches state-of-the art performance. Moreover, we also collected ratings from multiple radiologists at our institution and showed that our algorithm performs at the radiologist level. The software has been made publicly available at https://github.com/MaciejMazurowski/osteoarthritis-classification.
summary: The assessment of knee osteoarthritis (KOA) severity on knee X-rays is a central criteria for the use of total knee arthroplasty. However, this assessment suffers from imprecise standards and a remarkably high inter-reader variability. An algorithmic, automated assessment of KOA severity could improve overall outcomes of knee replacement procedures by increasing the appropriateness of its use. We propose a novel deep learning-based five-step algorithm to automatically grade KOA from posterior-anterior (PA) views of radiographs: (1) image preprocessing (2) localization of knees joints in the image using the YOLO v3-Tiny model, (3) initial assessment of the severity of osteoarthritis using a convolutional neural network-based classifier, (4) segmentation of the joints and calculation of the joint space narrowing (JSN), and (5), a combination of the JSN and the initial assessment to determine a final Kellgren-Lawrence (KL) score. Furthermore, by displaying the segmentation masks used to make the assessment, our algorithm demonstrates a higher degree of transparency compared to typical "black box" deep learning classifiers. We perform a comprehensive evaluation using two public datasets and one dataset from our institution, and show that our algorithm reaches state-of-the art performance. Moreover, we also collected ratings from multiple radiologists at our institution and showed that our algorithm performs at the radiologist level. The software has been made publicly available at https://github.com/MaciejMazurowski/osteoarthritis-classification.
abstract_zh: 通过膝关节 X 射线评估膝骨关节炎 (KOA) 严重程度是使用全膝关节置换术的核心标准。然而，这种评估存在标准不精确和读者间差异非常大的问题。对 KOA 严重程度进行算法自动评估可以通过提高其使用的适当性来改善膝关节置换手术的总体结果。我们提出了一种基于深度学习的新型五步算法，可根据 X 光片的后前 (PA) 视图自动对 KOA 进行分级：(1) 图像预处理 (2) 使用 YOLO v3-Tiny 模型对图像中的膝关节进行定位，(3) 使用基于卷积神经网络的分类器对骨关节炎的严重程度进行初步评估，(4) 关节分割和关节空间狭窄 (JSN) 的计算，(5) JSN 和关节空间狭窄 (JSN) 的组合确定最终 Kellgren-Lawrence (KL) 分数的初步评估。此外，通过显示用于进行评估的分割掩模，与典型的“黑盒”深度学习分类器相比，我们的算法表现出更高程度的透明度。我们使用两个公共数据集和我们机构的一个数据集进行综合评估，并表明我们的算法达到了最先进的性能。此外，我们还收集了我们机构的多名放射科医生的评分，并表明我们的算法在放射科医生级别上执行。该软件已在 https://github.com/MaciejMazurowski/osteoarthritis-classification 上公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的五步算法，用于通过膝关节X光片自动评估骨关节炎严重程度，并达到放射科医生水平的性能。
AI.motivation: 膝关节骨关节炎严重程度的评估存在标准不精确和阅片者间差异大的问题，自动化算法可提高膝关节置换手术的适用性并改善治疗结果。
AI.method: 算法包含图像预处理、YOLOv3-Tiny定位膝关节、CNN分类器初步评估、关节分割计算关节间隙狭窄度（JSN），最后结合JSN与初步评估得出Kellgren-Lawrence评分，同时提供分割掩码增强透明度。
AI.result: 算法在两个公开数据集和机构内部数据集上达到最先进水平，并通过多位放射科医生评分验证其性能与放射科医生相当。
AI.conclusion: 该算法通过公开代码和透明化分割掩码实现高精度膝关节骨关节炎分级，为临床决策提供可靠工具。

authors_text: Yuhuai Wu,Markus N. Rabe,DeLesley Hutchins,Christian Szegedy
title: Memorizing Transformers
title_zh: 记忆变形金刚
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2022 (spotlight)
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2022 (spotlight)
abstract: Language models typically need to be trained or finetuned in order to acquire new knowledge, which involves updating their weights. We instead envision language models that can simply read and memorize new data at inference time, thus acquiring new knowledge immediately. In this work, we extend language models with the ability to memorize the internal representations of past inputs. We demonstrate that an approximate kNN lookup into a non-differentiable memory of recent (key, value) pairs improves language modeling across various benchmarks and tasks, including generic webtext (C4), math papers (arXiv), books (PG-19), code (Github), as well as formal theorems (Isabelle). We show that the performance steadily improves when we increase the size of memory up to 262K tokens. On benchmarks including code and mathematics, we find that the model is capable of making use of newly defined functions and theorems during test time.
summary: Language models typically need to be trained or finetuned in order to acquire new knowledge, which involves updating their weights. We instead envision language models that can simply read and memorize new data at inference time, thus acquiring new knowledge immediately. In this work, we extend language models with the ability to memorize the internal representations of past inputs. We demonstrate that an approximate kNN lookup into a non-differentiable memory of recent (key, value) pairs improves language modeling across various benchmarks and tasks, including generic webtext (C4), math papers (arXiv), books (PG-19), code (Github), as well as formal theorems (Isabelle). We show that the performance steadily improves when we increase the size of memory up to 262K tokens. On benchmarks including code and mathematics, we find that the model is capable of making use of newly defined functions and theorems during test time.
abstract_zh: 语言模型通常需要进行训练或微调才能获取新知识，这涉及更新其权重。相反，我们设想语言模型可以在推理时简单地读取和记忆新数据，从而立即获取新知识。在这项工作中，我们扩展了语言模型，使其能够记住过去输入的内部表示。我们证明，对最近（键、值）对的不可微记忆进行近似 kNN 查找可以改进跨各种基准和任务的语言建模，包括通用网络文本 (C4)、数学论文 (arXiv)、书籍 (PG-19)、代码 (Github) 以及形式定理 (Isabelle)。我们表明，当我们将内存大小增加到 262K 令牌时，性能会稳步提高。在包括代码和数学在内的基准测试中，我们发现该模型能够在测试期间使用新定义的函数和定理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种让语言模型在推理时直接读取并记忆新数据的方法，无需传统训练或微调即可立即获取新知识。
AI.motivation: 传统语言模型需要通过训练更新权重来获取新知识，过程耗时且需要大量计算资源，而本文希望实现模型在推理阶段即可快速适应新信息。
AI.method: 通过扩展语言模型的记忆能力，使其能够存储过去输入的内部表示，并在推理时使用近似kNN算法从非微分记忆中检索最近的（键，值）对辅助生成。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试（如代码、数学、书籍等）中，模型性能随记忆规模扩大（最高262K tokens）持续提升，尤其能有效利用测试时新定义的函数与定理。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了语言模型通过记忆机制实现即时知识获取的可行性，为减少训练依赖提供了新思路，未来可探索更高效的记忆管理策略。
