search_text: Memorizing Transformers 记忆变形金刚 Language models typically need to be trained or finetuned in order to acquire new knowledge, which involves updating their weights. We instead envision language models that can simply read and memorize new data at inference time, thus acquiring new knowledge immediately. In this work, we extend language models with the ability to memorize the internal representations of past inputs. We demonstrate that an approximate kNN lookup into a non-differentiable memory of recent (key, value) pairs improves language modeling across various benchmarks and tasks, including generic webtext (C4), math papers (arXiv), books (PG-19), code (Github), as well as formal theorems (Isabelle). We show that the performance steadily improves when we increase the size of memory up to 262K tokens. On benchmarks including code and mathematics, we find that the model is capable of making use of newly defined functions and theorems during test time. 语言模型通常需要进行训练或微调才能获取新知识，这涉及更新其权重。相反，我们设想语言模型可以在推理时简单地读取和记忆新数据，从而立即获取新知识。在这项工作中，我们扩展了语言模型，使其能够记住过去输入的内部表示。我们证明，对最近（键、值）对的不可微记忆进行近似 kNN 查找可以改进跨各种基准和任务的语言建模，包括通用网络文本 (C4)、数学论文 (arXiv)、书籍 (PG-19)、代码 (Github) 以及形式定理 (Isabelle)。我们表明，当我们将内存大小增加到 262K 令牌时，性能会稳步提高。在包括代码和数学在内的基准测试中，我们发现该模型能够在测试期间使用新定义的函数和定理。 本文提出一种让语言模型在推理时直接读取并记忆新数据的方法，无需传统训练或微调即可立即获取新知识。 Yuhuai Wu,Markus N. Rabe,DeLesley Hutchins,Christian Szegedy cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Wonse Jo,Jaeeun Kim,Ruiqi Wang,Jeremy Pan,Revanth Krishna Senthilkumaran,Byung-Cheol Min
title: SMARTmBOT: A ROS2-based Low-cost and Open-source Mobile Robot Platform
title_zh: SMARTmBOT：基于ROS2的低成本开源移动机器人平台
comment: 6 pages, 7 figures, and this paper was submitted to the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: 6 pages, 7 figures, and this paper was submitted to the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: This paper introduces SMARTmBOT, an open-source mobile robot platform based on Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2). The characteristics of the SMARTmBOT, including low-cost, modular-typed, customizable and expandable design, make it an easily achievable and effective robot platform to support broad robotics research and education involving either single-robot or multi-robot systems. The total cost per robot is approximately $210, and most hardware components can be fabricated by a generic 3D printer, hence allowing users to build the robots or replace any broken parts conveniently. The SMARTmBot is also equipped with a rich range of sensors, making it competent for general task scenarios, such as point-to-point navigation and obstacle avoidance. We validated the mobility and function of SMARTmBOT through various robot navigation experiments and applications with tasks including go-to-goal, pure-pursuit, line following, and swarming. All source code necessary for reading sensors, streaming from an embedded camera, and controlling the robot including robot navigation controllers is available through an online repository that can be found at https://github.com/SMARTlab-Purdue/SMARTmBOT.
summary: This paper introduces SMARTmBOT, an open-source mobile robot platform based on Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2). The characteristics of the SMARTmBOT, including low-cost, modular-typed, customizable and expandable design, make it an easily achievable and effective robot platform to support broad robotics research and education involving either single-robot or multi-robot systems. The total cost per robot is approximately $210, and most hardware components can be fabricated by a generic 3D printer, hence allowing users to build the robots or replace any broken parts conveniently. The SMARTmBot is also equipped with a rich range of sensors, making it competent for general task scenarios, such as point-to-point navigation and obstacle avoidance. We validated the mobility and function of SMARTmBOT through various robot navigation experiments and applications with tasks including go-to-goal, pure-pursuit, line following, and swarming. All source code necessary for reading sensors, streaming from an embedded camera, and controlling the robot including robot navigation controllers is available through an online repository that can be found at https://github.com/SMARTlab-Purdue/SMARTmBOT.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了SMARTmBOT，一个基于机器人操作系统2（ROS2）的开源移动机器人平台。 SMARTmBOT 的特点，包括低成本、模块化、可定制和可扩展的设计，使其成为一个易于实现且有效的机器人平台，支持涉及单机器人或多机器人系统的广泛机器人研究和教育。每个机器人的总成本约为 210 美元，大多数硬件组件可以通过通用 3D 打印机制造，因此用户可以方便地构建机器人或更换任何损坏的部件。 SMARTmBot还配备了丰富的传感器，使其能够胜任点对点导航、避障等一般任务场景。我们通过各种机器人导航实验和应用来验证 SMARTmBOT 的移动性和功能，这些实验和应用的任务包括目标、纯粹追踪、循线和蜂群。读取传感器、从嵌入式摄像头传输数据以及控制机器人（包括机器人导航控制器）所需的所有源代码都可以通过在线存储库获得，该存储库可以在 https://github.com/SMARTlab-Purdue/SMARTmBOT 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种基于ROS2的低成本开源移动机器人平台SMARTmBOT，支持单机器人和多机器人系统的科研与教育应用。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人平台成本高且不够灵活，需开发一种低成本、模块化且可扩展的开源方案以促进机器人技术普及与教育。
AI.method: 基于ROS2设计模块化硬件架构，采用3D打印制造组件，集成多种传感器，并通过导航实验（如目标点导航、避障等）验证平台功能。
AI.result: 验证了SMARTmBOT在移动性与多功能性上的有效性，单机成本约210美元，所有代码与设计文件已开源。
AI.conclusion: SMARTmBOT为教育与科研提供了经济高效的机器人平台，其开源特性有助于推动机器人技术的协作发展。

authors_text: John S. Schreck,Gabrielle Gantos,Matthew Hayman,Aaron Bansemer,David John Gagne
title: Neural network processing of holographic images
title_zh: 全息图像的神经网络处理
comment: 38 pages, 15 figures. Submitted to Atmospheric Measurement Techniques
comments: 38 pages, 15 figures. Submitted to Atmospheric Measurement Techniques
abstract: HOLODEC, an airborne cloud particle imager, captures holographic images of a fixed volume of cloud to characterize the types and sizes of cloud particles, such as water droplets and ice crystals. Cloud particle properties include position, diameter, and shape. We present a hologram processing algorithm, HolodecML, that utilizes a neural segmentation model, GPUs, and computational parallelization. HolodecML is trained using synthetically generated holograms based on a model of the instrument, and predicts masks around particles found within reconstructed images. From these masks, the position and size of the detected particles can be characterized in three dimensions. In order to successfully process real holograms, we find we must apply a series of image corrupting transformations and noise to the synthetic images used in training. In this evaluation, HolodecML had comparable position and size estimation performance to the standard processing method, but improved particle detection by nearly 20\% on several thousand manually labeled HOLODEC images. However, the improvement only occurred when image corruption was performed on the simulated images during training, thereby mimicking non-ideal conditions in the actual probe. The trained model also learned to differentiate artifacts and other impurities in the HOLODEC images from the particles, even though no such objects were present in the training data set, while the standard processing method struggled to separate particles from artifacts. The novelty of the training approach, which leveraged noise as a means for parameterizing non-ideal aspects of the HOLODEC detector, could be applied in other domains where the theoretical model is incapable of fully describing the real-world operation of the instrument and accurate truth data required for supervised learning cannot be obtained from real-world observations.
summary: HOLODEC, an airborne cloud particle imager, captures holographic images of a fixed volume of cloud to characterize the types and sizes of cloud particles, such as water droplets and ice crystals. Cloud particle properties include position, diameter, and shape. We present a hologram processing algorithm, HolodecML, that utilizes a neural segmentation model, GPUs, and computational parallelization. HolodecML is trained using synthetically generated holograms based on a model of the instrument, and predicts masks around particles found within reconstructed images. From these masks, the position and size of the detected particles can be characterized in three dimensions. In order to successfully process real holograms, we find we must apply a series of image corrupting transformations and noise to the synthetic images used in training. In this evaluation, HolodecML had comparable position and size estimation performance to the standard processing method, but improved particle detection by nearly 20\% on several thousand manually labeled HOLODEC images. However, the improvement only occurred when image corruption was performed on the simulated images during training, thereby mimicking non-ideal conditions in the actual probe. The trained model also learned to differentiate artifacts and other impurities in the HOLODEC images from the particles, even though no such objects were present in the training data set, while the standard processing method struggled to separate particles from artifacts. The novelty of the training approach, which leveraged noise as a means for parameterizing non-ideal aspects of the HOLODEC detector, could be applied in other domains where the theoretical model is incapable of fully describing the real-world operation of the instrument and accurate truth data required for supervised learning cannot be obtained from real-world observations.
abstract_zh: HOLODEC 是一种机载云粒子成像仪，可捕获固定体积云的全息图像，以表征云粒子（例如水滴和冰晶）的类型和大小。云粒子属性包括位置、直径和形状。我们提出了一种全息图处理算法 HolodecML，它利用神经分割模型、GPU 和计算并行化。 HolodecML 使用基于仪器模型的合成生成的全息图进行训练，并预测重建图像中发现的粒子周围的掩模。从这些掩模中，可以在三个维度上表征检测到的颗粒的位置和大小。为了成功处理真实的全息图，我们发现必须对训练中使用的合成图像应用一系列图像破坏变换和噪声。在本次评估中，HolodecML 的位置和尺寸估计性能与标准处理方法相当，但在数千张手动标记的 HOLODEC 图像上将粒子​​检测提高了近 20%。然而，只有在训练期间对模拟图像进行图像损坏时才会出现这种改进，从而模仿实际探头中的非理想条件。经过训练的模型还学会了将 HOLODEC 图像中的伪影和其他杂质与粒子区分开来，即使训练数据集中不存在此类对象，而标准处理方法却很难将粒子与伪影分开。这种新颖的训练方法利用噪声作为参数化 HOLODEC 探测器非理想方面的手段，可以应用于理论模型无法完全描述仪器的真实操作并且无法从真实世界观察中获得监督学习所需的准确真实数据的其他领域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的算法HolodecML，用于处理HOLODEC云粒子成像仪的全息图像，以提高粒子检测和表征的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在云粒子检测中存在检测率不足和难以区分噪声的问题，需开发更鲁棒的算法以适应实际探测器的非理想条件。
AI.method: 利用神经分割模型、GPU加速和并行计算，通过合成全息图像训练模型，并在训练中引入图像退化和噪声模拟真实探测器条件。
AI.result: HolodecML在粒子检测率上提升近20%，且能区分训练数据中未出现的伪影，而传统方法表现较差。
AI.conclusion: 通过噪声增强的训练方法可有效提升模型鲁棒性，该思路适用于理论模型无法完全描述实际仪器的其他领域。

ai_content_json.method: 利用神经分割模型、GPU加速和并行计算，通过合成全息图像训练模型，并在训练中引入图像退化和噪声模拟真实探测器条件。
ai_content_json.result: HolodecML在粒子检测率上提升近20%，且能区分训练数据中未出现的伪影，而传统方法表现较差。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过噪声增强的训练方法可有效提升模型鲁棒性，该思路适用于理论模型无法完全描述实际仪器的其他领域。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的算法HolodecML，用于处理HOLODEC云粒子成像仪的全息图像，以提高粒子检测和表征的准确性。
motivation: 传统方法在云粒子检测中存在检测率不足和难以区分噪声的问题，需开发更鲁棒的算法以适应实际探测器的非理想条件。
method: 利用神经分割模型、GPU加速和并行计算，通过合成全息图像训练模型，并在训练中引入图像退化和噪声模拟真实探测器条件。
result: HolodecML在粒子检测率上提升近20%，且能区分训练数据中未出现的伪影，而传统方法表现较差。
conclusion: 通过噪声增强的训练方法可有效提升模型鲁棒性，该思路适用于理论模型无法完全描述实际仪器的其他领域。
search_text: Neural network processing of holographic images 全息图像的神经网络处理 HOLODEC, an airborne cloud particle imager, captures holographic images of a fixed volume of cloud to characterize the types and sizes of cloud particles, such as water droplets and ice crystals. Cloud particle properties include position, diameter, and shape. We present a hologram processing algorithm, HolodecML, that utilizes a neural segmentation model, GPUs, and computational parallelization. HolodecML is trained using synthetically generated holograms based on a model of the instrument, and predicts masks around particles found within reconstructed images. From these masks, the position and size of the detected particles can be characterized in three dimensions. In order to successfully process real holograms, we find we must apply a series of image corrupting transformations and noise to the synthetic images used in training. In this evaluation, HolodecML had comparable position and size estimation performance to the standard processing method, but improved particle detection by nearly 20\% on several thousand manually labeled HOLODEC images. However, the improvement only occurred when image corruption was performed on the simulated images during training, thereby mimicking non-ideal conditions in the actual probe. The trained model also learned to differentiate artifacts and other impurities in the HOLODEC images from the particles, even though no such objects were present in the training data set, while the standard processing method struggled to separate particles from artifacts. The novelty of the training approach, which leveraged noise as a means for parameterizing non-ideal aspects of the HOLODEC detector, could be applied in other domains where the theoretical model is incapable of fully describing the real-world operation of the instrument and accurate truth data required for supervised learning cannot be obtained from real-world observations. HOLODEC 是一种机载云粒子成像仪，可捕获固定体积云的全息图像，以表征云粒子（例如水滴和冰晶）的类型和大小。云粒子属性包括位置、直径和形状。我们提出了一种全息图处理算法 HolodecML，它利用神经分割模型、GPU 和计算并行化。 HolodecML 使用基于仪器模型的合成生成的全息图进行训练，并预测重建图像中发现的粒子周围的掩模。从这些掩模中，可以在三个维度上表征检测到的颗粒的位置和大小。为了成功处理真实的全息图，我们发现必须对训练中使用的合成图像应用一系列图像破坏变换和噪声。在本次评估中，HolodecML 的位置和尺寸估计性能与标准处理方法相当，但在数千张手动标记的 HOLODEC 图像上将粒子​​检测提高了近 20%。然而，只有在训练期间对模拟图像进行图像损坏时才会出现这种改进，从而模仿实际探头中的非理想条件。经过训练的模型还学会了将 HOLODEC 图像中的伪影和其他杂质与粒子区分开来，即使训练数据集中不存在此类对象，而标准处理方法却很难将粒子与伪影分开。这种新颖的训练方法利用噪声作为参数化 HOLODEC 探测器非理想方面的手段，可以应用于理论模型无法完全描述仪器的真实操作并且无法从真实世界观察中获得监督学习所需的准确真实数据的其他领域。 本文提出一种基于神经网络的算法HolodecML，用于处理HOLODEC云粒子成像仪的全息图像，以提高粒子检测和表征的准确性。 John S. Schreck,Gabrielle Gantos,Matthew Hayman,Aaron Bansemer,David John Gagne eess.IV,cs.LG,physics.ins-det

authors_text: Swathikiran Sudhakaran,Sergio Escalera,Oswald Lanz
title: Gate-Shift-Fuse for Video Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于视频动作识别的 Gate-Shift-Fuse
comment: Accepted to TPAMI. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1912.00381
comments: Accepted to TPAMI. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1912.00381
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks are the de facto models for image recognition. However 3D CNNs, the straight forward extension of 2D CNNs for video recognition, have not achieved the same success on standard action recognition benchmarks. One of the main reasons for this reduced performance of 3D CNNs is the increased computational complexity requiring large scale annotated datasets to train them in scale. 3D kernel factorization approaches have been proposed to reduce the complexity of 3D CNNs. Existing kernel factorization approaches follow hand-designed and hard-wired techniques. In this paper we propose Gate-Shift-Fuse (GSF), a novel spatio-temporal feature extraction module which controls interactions in spatio-temporal decomposition and learns to adaptively route features through time and combine them in a data dependent manner. GSF leverages grouped spatial gating to decompose input tensor and channel weighting to fuse the decomposed tensors. GSF can be inserted into existing 2D CNNs to convert them into an efficient and high performing spatio-temporal feature extractor, with negligible parameter and compute overhead. We perform an extensive analysis of GSF using two popular 2D CNN families and achieve state-of-the-art or competitive performance on five standard action recognition benchmarks.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks are the de facto models for image recognition. However 3D CNNs, the straight forward extension of 2D CNNs for video recognition, have not achieved the same success on standard action recognition benchmarks. One of the main reasons for this reduced performance of 3D CNNs is the increased computational complexity requiring large scale annotated datasets to train them in scale. 3D kernel factorization approaches have been proposed to reduce the complexity of 3D CNNs. Existing kernel factorization approaches follow hand-designed and hard-wired techniques. In this paper we propose Gate-Shift-Fuse (GSF), a novel spatio-temporal feature extraction module which controls interactions in spatio-temporal decomposition and learns to adaptively route features through time and combine them in a data dependent manner. GSF leverages grouped spatial gating to decompose input tensor and channel weighting to fuse the decomposed tensors. GSF can be inserted into existing 2D CNNs to convert them into an efficient and high performing spatio-temporal feature extractor, with negligible parameter and compute overhead. We perform an extensive analysis of GSF using two popular 2D CNN families and achieve state-of-the-art or competitive performance on five standard action recognition benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络是图像识别事实上的模型。然而，3D CNN（2D CNN 在视频识别方面的直接扩展）并未在标准动作识别基准上取得同样的成功。 3D CNN 性能下降的主要原因之一是计算复杂性增加，需要大规模注释数据集来对其进行大规模训练。 3D 内核分解方法已被提出来降低 3D CNN 的复杂性。现有的核分解方法遵循手工设计和硬连线技术。在本文中，我们提出了 Gate-Shift-Fuse (GSF)，一种新颖的时空特征提取模块，它控制时空分解中的交互，并学习随着时间自适应地路由特征并以数据依赖的方式组合它们。 GSF 利用分组空间门控来分解输入张量和通道权重来融合分解的张量。 GSF 可以插入现有的 2D CNN，将其转换为高效、高性能的时空特征提取器，参数和计算开销可以忽略不计。我们使用两个流行的 2D CNN 系列对 GSF 进行了广泛的分析，并在五个标准动作识别基准上实现了最先进的或有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Gate-Shift-Fuse (GSF)的新模块，用于视频动作识别中的时空特征提取。
AI.motivation: 3D卷积神经网络在视频动作识别任务中由于计算复杂度高而未取得与2D CNN在图像识别中相同的成功。现有的3D核分解方法依赖于手工设计的技术，缺乏自适应性。
AI.method: 提出Gate-Shift-Fuse (GSF)模块，该模块通过分组空间门控分解输入张量，并利用通道加权融合分解后的张量，从而在时间和空间维度上自适应地路由和组合特征。
AI.result: 在两个流行的2D CNN架构中插入GSF模块，实现了在五个标准动作识别基准上具有竞争力或最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: GSF模块能够有效地将2D CNN转换为高效的时空特征提取器，具有极小的参数和计算开销，为视频动作识别提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: Gate-Shift-Fuse for Video Action Recognition 用于视频动作识别的 Gate-Shift-Fuse Convolutional Neural Networks are the de facto models for image recognition. However 3D CNNs, the straight forward extension of 2D CNNs for video recognition, have not achieved the same success on standard action recognition benchmarks. One of the main reasons for this reduced performance of 3D CNNs is the increased computational complexity requiring large scale annotated datasets to train them in scale. 3D kernel factorization approaches have been proposed to reduce the complexity of 3D CNNs. Existing kernel factorization approaches follow hand-designed and hard-wired techniques. In this paper we propose Gate-Shift-Fuse (GSF), a novel spatio-temporal feature extraction module which controls interactions in spatio-temporal decomposition and learns to adaptively route features through time and combine them in a data dependent manner. GSF leverages grouped spatial gating to decompose input tensor and channel weighting to fuse the decomposed tensors. GSF can be inserted into existing 2D CNNs to convert them into an efficient and high performing spatio-temporal feature extractor, with negligible parameter and compute overhead. We perform an extensive analysis of GSF using two popular 2D CNN families and achieve state-of-the-art or competitive performance on five standard action recognition benchmarks. 卷积神经网络是图像识别事实上的模型。然而，3D CNN（2D CNN 在视频识别方面的直接扩展）并未在标准动作识别基准上取得同样的成功。 3D CNN 性能下降的主要原因之一是计算复杂性增加，需要大规模注释数据集来对其进行大规模训练。 3D 内核分解方法已被提出来降低 3D CNN 的复杂性。现有的核分解方法遵循手工设计和硬连线技术。在本文中，我们提出了 Gate-Shift-Fuse (GSF)，一种新颖的时空特征提取模块，它控制时空分解中的交互，并学习随着时间自适应地路由特征并以数据依赖的方式组合它们。 GSF 利用分组空间门控来分解输入张量和通道权重来融合分解的张量。 GSF 可以插入现有的 2D CNN，将其转换为高效、高性能的时空特征提取器，参数和计算开销可以忽略不计。我们使用两个流行的 2D CNN 系列对 GSF 进行了广泛的分析，并在五个标准动作识别基准上实现了最先进的或有竞争力的性能。 本文提出了一种名为Gate-Shift-Fuse (GSF)的新模块，用于视频动作识别中的时空特征提取。 Swathikiran Sudhakaran,Sergio Escalera,Oswald Lanz cs.CV

authors_text: Roger Marí,Gabriele Facciolo,Thibaud Ehret
title: Sat-NeRF: Learning Multi-View Satellite Photogrammetry With Transient Objects and Shadow Modeling Using RPC Cameras
title_zh: Sat-NeRF：使用 RPC 相机学习瞬态物体和阴影建模的多视图卫星摄影测量
abstract: We introduce the Satellite Neural Radiance Field (Sat-NeRF), a new end-to-end model for learning multi-view satellite photogrammetry in the wild. Sat-NeRF combines some of the latest trends in neural rendering with native satellite camera models, represented by rational polynomial coefficient (RPC) functions. The proposed method renders new views and infers surface models of similar quality to those obtained with traditional state-of-the-art stereo pipelines. Multi-date images exhibit significant changes in appearance, mainly due to varying shadows and transient objects (cars, vegetation). Robustness to these challenges is achieved by a shadow-aware irradiance model and uncertainty weighting to deal with transient phenomena that cannot be explained by the position of the sun. We evaluate Sat-NeRF using WorldView-3 images from different locations and stress the advantages of applying a bundle adjustment to the satellite camera models prior to training. This boosts the network performance and can optionally be used to extract additional cues for depth supervision.
summary: We introduce the Satellite Neural Radiance Field (Sat-NeRF), a new end-to-end model for learning multi-view satellite photogrammetry in the wild. Sat-NeRF combines some of the latest trends in neural rendering with native satellite camera models, represented by rational polynomial coefficient (RPC) functions. The proposed method renders new views and infers surface models of similar quality to those obtained with traditional state-of-the-art stereo pipelines. Multi-date images exhibit significant changes in appearance, mainly due to varying shadows and transient objects (cars, vegetation). Robustness to these challenges is achieved by a shadow-aware irradiance model and uncertainty weighting to deal with transient phenomena that cannot be explained by the position of the sun. We evaluate Sat-NeRF using WorldView-3 images from different locations and stress the advantages of applying a bundle adjustment to the satellite camera models prior to training. This boosts the network performance and can optionally be used to extract additional cues for depth supervision.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了卫星神经辐射场（Sat-NeRF），这是一种用于在野外学习多视图卫星摄影测量的新端到端模型。 Sat-NeRF 将神经渲染的一些最新趋势与本机卫星相机模型相结合，以有理多项式系数 (RPC) 函数表示。所提出的方法呈现新视图并推断出与使用传统最先进的立体管道获得的质量相似的表面模型。多日期图像在外观上表现出显着变化，主要是由于变化的阴影和瞬态物体（汽车、植被）造成的。通过阴影感知辐照度模型和不确定性加权来处理无法用太阳位置解释的瞬态现象，从而实现了对这些挑战的鲁棒性。我们使用来自不同位置的 WorldView-3 图像评估 Sat-NeRF，并强调在训练之前对卫星相机模型应用捆绑调整的优势。这提高了网络性能，并且可以选择用于提取额外的线索以进行深度监督。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sat-NeRF模型，结合神经渲染与RPC卫星相机模型，解决多视角卫星影像中动态物体和阴影的摄影测量问题。
AI.motivation: 传统卫星影像处理难以应对动态物体和阴影变化，而现有NeRF方法未充分适配卫星相机特性，需开发更鲁棒的模型。
AI.method: 融合RPC相机模型与NeRF，引入阴影感知照度模型及不确定性加权机制，并通过预训练光束法平差优化相机参数。
AI.result: 在WorldView-3数据集上实现与传统立体视觉相当的重建质量，光束法平差显著提升性能并辅助深度监督。
AI.conclusion: Sat-NeRF有效解决了卫星影像动态场景建模难题，验证了RPC相机与神经渲染结合的可行性。

search_text: Sat-NeRF: Learning Multi-View Satellite Photogrammetry With Transient Objects and Shadow Modeling Using RPC Cameras Sat-NeRF：使用 RPC 相机学习瞬态物体和阴影建模的多视图卫星摄影测量 We introduce the Satellite Neural Radiance Field (Sat-NeRF), a new end-to-end model for learning multi-view satellite photogrammetry in the wild. Sat-NeRF combines some of the latest trends in neural rendering with native satellite camera models, represented by rational polynomial coefficient (RPC) functions. The proposed method renders new views and infers surface models of similar quality to those obtained with traditional state-of-the-art stereo pipelines. Multi-date images exhibit significant changes in appearance, mainly due to varying shadows and transient objects (cars, vegetation). Robustness to these challenges is achieved by a shadow-aware irradiance model and uncertainty weighting to deal with transient phenomena that cannot be explained by the position of the sun. We evaluate Sat-NeRF using WorldView-3 images from different locations and stress the advantages of applying a bundle adjustment to the satellite camera models prior to training. This boosts the network performance and can optionally be used to extract additional cues for depth supervision. 我们介绍了卫星神经辐射场（Sat-NeRF），这是一种用于在野外学习多视图卫星摄影测量的新端到端模型。 Sat-NeRF 将神经渲染的一些最新趋势与本机卫星相机模型相结合，以有理多项式系数 (RPC) 函数表示。所提出的方法呈现新视图并推断出与使用传统最先进的立体管道获得的质量相似的表面模型。多日期图像在外观上表现出显着变化，主要是由于变化的阴影和瞬态物体（汽车、植被）造成的。通过阴影感知辐照度模型和不确定性加权来处理无法用太阳位置解释的瞬态现象，从而实现了对这些挑战的鲁棒性。我们使用来自不同位置的 WorldView-3 图像评估 Sat-NeRF，并强调在训练之前对卫星相机模型应用捆绑调整的优势。这提高了网络性能，并且可以选择用于提取额外的线索以进行深度监督。 本文提出Sat-NeRF模型，结合神经渲染与RPC卫星相机模型，解决多视角卫星影像中动态物体和阴影的摄影测量问题。 Roger Marí,Gabriele Facciolo,Thibaud Ehret cs.CV

authors_text: Alberto Pozanco,Francesca Mosca,Parisa Zehtabi,Daniele Magazzeni,Sarit Kraus
title: Explaining Preference-driven Schedules: the EXPRES Framework
title_zh: 解释偏好驱动的时间表：EXPRES 框架
abstract: Scheduling is the task of assigning a set of scarce resources distributed over time to a set of agents, who typically have preferences about the assignments they would like to get. Due to the constrained nature of these problems, satisfying all agents' preferences is often infeasible, which might lead to some agents not being happy with the resulting schedule. Providing explanations has been shown to increase satisfaction and trust in solutions produced by AI tools. However, it is particularly challenging to explain solutions that are influenced by and impact on multiple agents. In this paper we introduce the EXPRES framework, which can explain why a given preference was unsatisfied in a given optimal schedule. The EXPRES framework consists of: (i) an explanation generator that, based on a Mixed-Integer Linear Programming model, finds the best set of reasons that can explain an unsatisfied preference; and (ii) an explanation parser, which translates the generated explanations into human interpretable ones. Through simulations, we show that the explanation generator can efficiently scale to large instances. Finally, through a set of user studies within J.P. Morgan, we show that employees preferred the explanations generated by EXPRES over human-generated ones when considering workforce scheduling scenarios.
summary: Scheduling is the task of assigning a set of scarce resources distributed over time to a set of agents, who typically have preferences about the assignments they would like to get. Due to the constrained nature of these problems, satisfying all agents' preferences is often infeasible, which might lead to some agents not being happy with the resulting schedule. Providing explanations has been shown to increase satisfaction and trust in solutions produced by AI tools. However, it is particularly challenging to explain solutions that are influenced by and impact on multiple agents. In this paper we introduce the EXPRES framework, which can explain why a given preference was unsatisfied in a given optimal schedule. The EXPRES framework consists of: (i) an explanation generator that, based on a Mixed-Integer Linear Programming model, finds the best set of reasons that can explain an unsatisfied preference; and (ii) an explanation parser, which translates the generated explanations into human interpretable ones. Through simulations, we show that the explanation generator can efficiently scale to large instances. Finally, through a set of user studies within J.P. Morgan, we show that employees preferred the explanations generated by EXPRES over human-generated ones when considering workforce scheduling scenarios.
abstract_zh: 调度是将一组随时间分布的稀缺资源分配给一组代理的任务，这些代理通常对他们想要获得的分配有偏好。由于这些问题的局限性，满足所有代理商的偏好通常是不可行的，这可能会导致一些代理商对最终的时间表不满意。事实证明，提供解释可以提高对人工智能工具生成的解决方案的满意度和信任度。然而，解释受多个主体影响的解决方案尤其具有挑战性。在本文中，我们介绍了 EXPRES 框架，它可以解释为什么给定的偏好在给定的最优调度中不被满足。 EXPRES 框架包括： (i) 一个解释生成器，基于混合整数线性规划模型，找到可以解释不满意偏好的最佳原因集； (ii) 解释解析器，它将生成的解释翻译成人类可解释的解释。通过模拟，我们表明解释生成器可以有效地扩展到大型实例。最后，通过摩根大通内部的一系列用户研究，我们表明，在考虑劳动力调度场景时，员工更喜欢 EXPRES 生成的解释，而不是人工生成的解释。

AI.tldr: 介绍EXPRES框架，用于解释调度中未满足的偏好原因
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的调度问题中，满足所有代理偏好不可行，需解释未满足原因以提高满意度和信任，但现有方法难以处理多代理影响的情况
AI.method: 提出EXPRES框架，包含基于混合整数线性规划模型的解释生成器和人类可理解的解释解析器
AI.result: 模拟显示生成器可扩展处理大规模实例，用户研究显示员工更偏好EXPRES生成的解释而非人工生成的
AI.conclusion: EXPRES框架能有效解释调度中的偏好未满足问题，提升用户满意度和信任

authors_text: Yucong Lin,Keming Lu,Sheng Yu,Tianxi Cai,Marinka Zitnik
title: Multimodal Learning on Graphs for Disease Relation Extraction
title_zh: 用于疾病关系提取的图多模态学习
abstract: Objective: Disease knowledge graphs are a way to connect, organize, and access disparate information about diseases with numerous benefits for artificial intelligence (AI). To create knowledge graphs, it is necessary to extract knowledge from multimodal datasets in the form of relationships between disease concepts and normalize both concepts and relationship types. Methods: We introduce REMAP, a multimodal approach for disease relation extraction and classification. The REMAP machine learning approach jointly embeds a partial, incomplete knowledge graph and a medical language dataset into a compact latent vector space, followed by aligning the multimodal embeddings for optimal disease relation extraction. Results: We apply REMAP approach to a disease knowledge graph with 96,913 relations and a text dataset of 1.24 million sentences. On a dataset annotated by human experts, REMAP improves text-based disease relation extraction by 10.0% (accuracy) and 17.2% (F1-score) by fusing disease knowledge graphs with text information. Further, REMAP leverages text information to recommend new relationships in the knowledge graph, outperforming graph-based methods by 8.4% (accuracy) and 10.4% (F1-score). Conclusion: REMAP is a multimodal approach for extracting and classifying disease relationships by fusing structured knowledge and text information. REMAP provides a flexible neural architecture to easily find, access, and validate AI-driven relationships between disease concepts.
summary: Objective: Disease knowledge graphs are a way to connect, organize, and access disparate information about diseases with numerous benefits for artificial intelligence (AI). To create knowledge graphs, it is necessary to extract knowledge from multimodal datasets in the form of relationships between disease concepts and normalize both concepts and relationship types. Methods: We introduce REMAP, a multimodal approach for disease relation extraction and classification. The REMAP machine learning approach jointly embeds a partial, incomplete knowledge graph and a medical language dataset into a compact latent vector space, followed by aligning the multimodal embeddings for optimal disease relation extraction. Results: We apply REMAP approach to a disease knowledge graph with 96,913 relations and a text dataset of 1.24 million sentences. On a dataset annotated by human experts, REMAP improves text-based disease relation extraction by 10.0% (accuracy) and 17.2% (F1-score) by fusing disease knowledge graphs with text information. Further, REMAP leverages text information to recommend new relationships in the knowledge graph, outperforming graph-based methods by 8.4% (accuracy) and 10.4% (F1-score). Conclusion: REMAP is a multimodal approach for extracting and classifying disease relationships by fusing structured knowledge and text information. REMAP provides a flexible neural architecture to easily find, access, and validate AI-driven relationships between disease concepts.
abstract_zh: 目标：疾病知识图是一种连接、组织和访问有关疾病的不同信息的方法，对人工智能 (AI) 具有诸多好处。为了创建知识图，需要以疾病概念之间的关系的形式从多模态数据集中提取知识，并对概念和关系类型进行标准化。方法：我们引入 REMAP，一种用于疾病关系提取和分类的多模式方法。 REMAP 机器学习方法将部分、不完整的知识图和医学语言数据集联合嵌入到紧凑的潜在向量空间中，然后对齐多模态嵌入以实现最佳的疾病关系提取。结果：我们将 REMAP 方法应用于包含 96,913 个关系的疾病知识图和包含 124 万个句子的文本数据集。在人类专家注释的数据集上，REMAP 通过将疾病知识图与文本信息融合，将基于文本的疾病关系提取提高了 10.0%（准确度）和 17.2%（F1 分数）。此外，REMAP 利用文本信息推荐知识图中的新关系，其性能比基于图的方法高出 8.4%（准确率）和 10.4%（F1 分数）。结论：REMAP 是一种通过融合结构化知识和文本信息来提取和分类疾病关系的多模式方法。 REMAP 提供了灵活的神经架构，可以轻松查找、访问和验证疾病概念之间人工智能驱动的关系。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多模态方法REMAP，通过融合疾病知识图谱和文本信息来提取和分类疾病关系。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在疾病关系抽取中依赖单一数据源，难以有效整合结构化知识与文本信息，限制了准确性和全面性。
AI.method: REMAP通过联合嵌入不完整的知识图谱和医学文本数据集到共享的潜在向量空间，并对齐多模态嵌入以优化疾病关系抽取。
AI.result: 在包含96,913个关系的知识图谱和124万句文本数据上，REMAP在准确率和F1分数上分别提升10.0%和17.2%，新关系推荐任务中优于图方法8.4%和10.4%。
AI.conclusion: REMAP通过融合结构化知识与文本信息，提供灵活的神经架构实现疾病概念间关系的高效提取与验证。

authors_text: Elizabeth D. Vasquez,Allison M. Okamura,Sean Follmer
title: Social-Cultural Factors in the Design of Technology for Hispanic People with Stroke
title_zh: 西班牙裔中风患者技术设计中的社会文化因素
abstract: Stroke is a leading cause of serious, long-term disability in the United States. There exist disparities in both stroke prevalence and outcomes between people with stroke in Hispanic and Latinx communities and the general stroke population. Current stroke technology - which aims to improve quality of life and bring people with stroke to the most functional, independent state possible - has shown promising results for the general stroke population, but has failed to close the recovery outcome gap for underserved Hispanic and Latinx people with stroke. Previous work in health education, digital health, and HRI has improved human health outcomes by incorporating social-cultural factors, though not for stroke. In this position paper, we aim to justify accounting for unique cultural factors in stroke technology design for the Hispanic and Latinx community. We review examples of successful culturally appropriate interventions and suggest design considerations (mutually beneficial community consultation, accommodating for barriers beforehand, building on culture, and incorporating education of the family) to provide more culturally appropriate design of Hispanic and Latinx stroke technology and reduce the disparity gap.
summary: Stroke is a leading cause of serious, long-term disability in the United States. In this position paper, we aim to justify accounting for unique cultural factors in stroke technology design for the Hispanic and Latinx community. We review examples of successful culturally appropriate interventions and suggest design considerations (mutually beneficial community consultation, accommodating for barriers beforehand, building on culture, and incorporating education of the family) to provide more culturally appropriate design of Hispanic and Latinx stroke technology and reduce the disparity gap.
abstract_zh: 在美国，中风是导致严重、长期残疾的主要原因。西班牙裔和拉丁裔社区的中风患者与一般中风人群之间的中风患病率和结果存在差异。目前的中风技术旨在提高生活质量，使中风患者尽可能恢复功能性、独立性，已为普通中风人群带来了可喜的结果，但未能缩小服务不足的西班牙裔和拉丁裔中风患者康复结果的差距。之前在健康教育、数字健康和 HRI 方面的工作通过纳入社会文化因素改善了人类健康结果，但并未针对中风。在这篇立场文件中，我们的目标是证明西班牙裔和拉丁裔社区中风技术设计中考虑独特文化因素的合理性。我们回顾了成功的文化上适当的干预措施的例子，并提出了设计考虑因素（互惠互利的社区协商、事先适应障碍、以文化为基础、纳入家庭教育），以提供更文化上适当的西班牙裔和拉丁裔中风技术设计，并缩小差距。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在论证在为西班牙裔和拉丁裔中风患者设计技术时需考虑独特的社会文化因素，并提出相应的设计建议。
AI.motivation: 西班牙裔和拉丁裔社区中风的发病率和康复结果存在显著差异，现有技术未能缩小这一差距，需通过文化因素改进设计以减少不平等。
AI.method: 通过综述现有文化适配干预案例，提出包括社区协作、预判障碍、文化融合及家庭教育等设计原则。
AI.result: 总结出针对西班牙裔中风患者的四条文化敏感性设计建议，为技术开发提供理论框架。
AI.conclusion: 融入社会文化因素的技术设计可提升西班牙裔中风患者的康复效果，减少群体间健康差距。

search_text: Social-Cultural Factors in the Design of Technology for Hispanic People with Stroke 西班牙裔中风患者技术设计中的社会文化因素 Stroke is a leading cause of serious, long-term disability in the United States. There exist disparities in both stroke prevalence and outcomes between people with stroke in Hispanic and Latinx communities and the general stroke population. Current stroke technology - which aims to improve quality of life and bring people with stroke to the most functional, independent state possible - has shown promising results for the general stroke population, but has failed to close the recovery outcome gap for underserved Hispanic and Latinx people with stroke. Previous work in health education, digital health, and HRI has improved human health outcomes by incorporating social-cultural factors, though not for stroke. In this position paper, we aim to justify accounting for unique cultural factors in stroke technology design for the Hispanic and Latinx community. We review examples of successful culturally appropriate interventions and suggest design considerations (mutually beneficial community consultation, accommodating for barriers beforehand, building on culture, and incorporating education of the family) to provide more culturally appropriate design of Hispanic and Latinx stroke technology and reduce the disparity gap. 在美国，中风是导致严重、长期残疾的主要原因。西班牙裔和拉丁裔社区的中风患者与一般中风人群之间的中风患病率和结果存在差异。目前的中风技术旨在提高生活质量，使中风患者尽可能恢复功能性、独立性，已为普通中风人群带来了可喜的结果，但未能缩小服务不足的西班牙裔和拉丁裔中风患者康复结果的差距。之前在健康教育、数字健康和 HRI 方面的工作通过纳入社会文化因素改善了人类健康结果，但并未针对中风。在这篇立场文件中，我们的目标是证明西班牙裔和拉丁裔社区中风技术设计中考虑独特文化因素的合理性。我们回顾了成功的文化上适当的干预措施的例子，并提出了设计考虑因素（互惠互利的社区协商、事先适应障碍、以文化为基础、纳入家庭教育），以提供更文化上适当的西班牙裔和拉丁裔中风技术设计，并缩小差距。 本文旨在论证在为西班牙裔和拉丁裔中风患者设计技术时需考虑独特的社会文化因素，并提出相应的设计建议。 Elizabeth D. authors_text: Xingchen Wan,Binxin Ru,Pedro M. Esperança,Zhenguo Li
title: On Redundancy and Diversity in Cell-based Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: 基于细胞的神经架构搜索中的冗余性和多样性
comment: ICLR 2022. 10 pages, 10 figures, 2 tables (25 pages, 34 figures, 3 tables including references and appendices)
comments: ICLR 2022. 10 pages, 10 figures, 2 tables (25 pages, 34 figures, 3 tables including references and appendices)
abstract: Searching for the architecture cells is a dominant paradigm in NAS. However, little attention has been devoted to the analysis of the cell-based search spaces even though it is highly important for the continual development of NAS. In this work, we conduct an empirical post-hoc analysis of architectures from the popular cell-based search spaces and find that the existing search spaces contain a high degree of redundancy: the architecture performance is minimally sensitive to changes at large parts of the cells, and universally adopted designs, like the explicit search for a reduction cell, significantly increase the complexities but have very limited impact on the performance. Across architectures found by a diverse set of search strategies, we consistently find that the parts of the cells that do matter for architecture performance often follow similar and simple patterns. By explicitly constraining cells to include these patterns, randomly sampled architectures can match or even outperform the state of the art. These findings cast doubts into our ability to discover truly novel architectures in the existing cell-based search spaces, and inspire our suggestions for improvement to guide future NAS research. Code is available at https://github.com/xingchenwan/cell-based-NAS-analysis.
summary: Searching for the architecture cells is a dominant paradigm in NAS. However, little attention has been devoted to the analysis of the cell-based search spaces even though it is highly important for the continual development of NAS. In this work, we conduct an empirical post-hoc analysis of architectures from the popular cell-based search spaces and find that the existing search spaces contain a high degree of redundancy: the architecture performance is minimally sensitive to changes at large parts of the cells, and universally adopted designs, like the explicit search for a reduction cell, significantly increase the complexities but have very limited impact on the performance. Across architectures found by a diverse set of search strategies, we consistently find that the parts of the cells that do matter for architecture performance often follow similar and simple patterns. By explicitly constraining cells to include these patterns, randomly sampled architectures can match or even outperform the state of the art. These findings cast doubts into our ability to discover truly novel architectures in the existing cell-based search spaces, and inspire our suggestions for improvement to guide future NAS research. Code is available at https://github.com/xingchenwan/cell-based-NAS-analysis.
abstract_zh: 搜索架构单元是 NAS 中的主导范例。然而，尽管基于单元的搜索空间的分析对于 NAS 的持续发展非常重要，但很少有人关注它。在这项工作中，我们对流行的基于单元的搜索空间的架构进行了实证事后分析，发现现有的搜索空间包含高度的冗余：架构性能对大部分单元的变化几乎不敏感，而普遍采用的设计，如显式搜索缩减单元，显着增加了复杂性，但对性能的影响非常有限。在通过多种搜索策略发现的架构中，我们一致发现对架构性能重要的单元部分通常遵循相似且简单的模式。通过明确限制单元包含这些模式，随机采样的架构可以匹配甚至超越现有技术。这些发现使人们对我们在现有基于细胞的搜索空间中发现真正新颖的架构的能力产生了怀疑，并激发了我们提出改进建议以指导未来的 NAS 研究。代码可在 https://github.com/xingchenwan/cell-based-NAS-analysis 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了基于单元的神经架构搜索（NAS）中的冗余性和多样性问题，旨在改进搜索空间设计。
AI.motivation: 现有基于单元的NAS搜索空间存在高度冗余，且通用设计（如降采样单元）增加复杂性但对性能提升有限，阻碍了真正新颖架构的发现。
AI.method: 通过经验性事后分析，研究流行单元搜索空间中的架构，识别冗余部分及影响性能的关键模式，并通过约束这些模式生成随机架构进行验证。
AI.result: 发现单元中影响性能的部分遵循简单模式，约束这些模式后随机生成的架构可匹配甚至超越现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 现有搜索空间难以发现真正新颖的架构，需通过约束关键模式等改进策略推动未来NAS研究。

authors_text: Nicolas Bousquet,Laurent Feuilloley,Marc Heinrich,Mikaël Rabie
title: Short and local transformations between ($Δ+1$)-colorings
title_zh: ($Δ+1$)-着色之间的短局部变换
comment: Second version. Section 1 has been rewritten
comments: Second version. Section 1 has been rewritten
abstract: Recoloring a graph is about finding a sequence of proper colorings of this graph from an initial coloring $σ$ to a target coloring $η$. Adding the constraint that each pair of consecutive colorings must differ on exactly one vertex, one asks: Is there a sequence of colorings from $σ$ to $η$? If yes, how short can it be? In this paper, we focus on $(Δ+1)$-colorings of graphs of maximum degree $Δ$. Feghali, Johnson and Paulusma proved that, if both colorings are non-frozen (i.e. we can change the color of a least one vertex), then a quadratic recoloring sequence always exists. We improve their result by proving that there actually exists a linear transformation (assuming that $Δ$ is a constant). In addition, we prove that the core of our algorithm can be performed locally. Informally, this means that after some preprocessing, the color changes that a given node has to perform only depend on the colors of the vertices in a constant size neighborhood. We make this precise by designing of an efficient recoloring algorithm in the LOCAL model of distributed computing.
summary: Recoloring a graph is about finding a sequence of proper colorings of this graph from an initial coloring $σ$ to a target coloring $η$. Adding the constraint that each pair of consecutive colorings must differ on exactly one vertex, one asks: Is there a sequence of colorings from $σ$ to $η$? If yes, how short can it be? In this paper, we focus on $(Δ+1)$-colorings of graphs of maximum degree $Δ$. Feghali, Johnson and Paulusma proved that, if both colorings are non-frozen (i.e. we can change the color of a least one vertex), then a quadratic recoloring sequence always exists. We improve their result by proving that there actually exists a linear transformation (assuming that $Δ$ is a constant). In addition, we prove that the core of our algorithm can be performed locally. Informally, this means that after some preprocessing, the color changes that a given node has to perform only depend on the colors of the vertices in a constant size neighborhood. We make this precise by designing of an efficient recoloring algorithm in the LOCAL model of distributed computing.
abstract_zh: 对图重新着色就是找到该图的一系列正确着色，从初始着色 $σ$ 到目标着色 $η$。添加每对连续着色必须在一个顶点上不同的约束，人们会问：是否存在从 $σ$ 到 $η$ 的着色序列？如果可以的话，可以多短？在本文中，我们关注最大度 $Δ$ 的图的 $(Δ+1)$ 着色。 Feghali、Johnson 和 Paulusma 证明，如果两种着色都是非冻结的（即我们可以改变至少一个顶点的颜色），那么二次重着色序列总是存在。我们通过证明实际上存在线性变换（假设 $Δ$ 是一个常数）来改进他们的结果。此外，我们证明了我们算法的核心可以在本地执行。非正式地，这意味着经过一些预处理后，给定节点必须执行的颜色变化仅取决于恒定大小邻域中顶点的颜色。我们通过在分布式计算的 LOCAL 模型中设计高效的重新着色算法来实现这一点。

AI.tldr: 研究在最大度数为Δ的图中，如何在线性时间内实现(Δ+1)-着色之间的局部转换。
AI.motivation: 改进现有二次时间复杂度的重着色序列结果，探索更高效的线性时间算法并实现分布式计算中的局部性处理。
AI.method: 通过证明线性变换的存在性，设计基于LOCAL模型的分布式算法，使节点仅需依赖常数大小邻域的局部信息完成颜色调整。
AI.result: 证明存在线性长度的重着色序列，且核心算法可在LOCAL模型中以局部方式高效执行。
AI.conclusion: 在保证着色正确性的前提下，实现了比现有结果更优的线性时间复杂度，并为分布式图算法提供了新的局部处理范式。

ai_content_json.result: 证明存在线性长度的重着色序列，且核心算法可在LOCAL模型中以局部方式高效执行。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 在保证着色正确性的前提下，实现了比现有结果更优的线性时间复杂度，并为分布式图算法提供了新的局部处理范式。

search_text: Short and local transformations between ($Δ+1$)-colorings ($Δ+1$)-着色之间的短局部变换 Recoloring a graph is about finding a sequence of proper colorings of this graph from an initial coloring $σ$ to a target coloring $η$. Adding the constraint that each pair of consecutive colorings must differ on exactly one vertex, one asks: Is there a sequence of colorings from $σ$ to $η$? If yes, how short can it be? In this paper, we focus on $(Δ+1)$-colorings of graphs of maximum degree $Δ$. Feghali, Johnson and Paulusma proved that, if both colorings are non-frozen (i.e. we can change the color of a least one vertex), then a quadratic recoloring sequence always exists. We improve their result by proving that there actually exists a linear transformation (assuming that $Δ$ is a constant). In addition, we prove that the core of our algorithm can be performed locally. Informally, this means that after some preprocessing, the color changes that a given node has to perform only depend on the colors of the vertices in a constant size neighborhood. We make this precise by designing of an efficient recoloring algorithm in the LOCAL model of distributed computing. 对图重新着色就是找到该图的一系列正确着色，从初始着色 $σ$ 到目标着色 $η$。添加每对连续着色必须在一个顶点上不同的约束，人们会问：是否存在从 $σ$ 到 $η$ 的着色序列？如果可以的话，可以多短？在本文中，我们关注最大度 $Δ$ 的图的 $(Δ+1)$ 着色。 Feghali、Johnson 和 Paulusma 证明，如果两种着色都是非冻结的（即我们可以改变至少一个顶点的颜色），那么二次重着色序列总是存在。我们通过证明实际上存在线性变换（假设 $Δ$ 是一个常数）来改进他们的结果。此外，我们证明了我们算法的核心可以在本地执行。非正式地，这意味着经过一些预处理后，给定节点必须执行的颜色变化仅取决于恒定大小邻域中顶点的颜色。我们通过在分布式计算的 LOCAL 模型中设计高效的重新着色算法来实现这一点。 研究在最大度数为Δ的图中，如何在线性时间内实现(Δ+1)-着色之间的局部转换。 Nicolas Bousquet,Laurent Feuilloley,Marc Heinrich,Mikaël Rabie cs.DM,cs.DC,cs.DS,math.CO

authors_text: Bike Chen,Wei Peng,Xiaofeng Cao,Juha Röning
title: Hyperbolic Uncertainty Aware Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 双曲不确定性感知语义分割
comment: We have added more content to the manuscript
comments: We have added more content to the manuscript
abstract: Semantic segmentation (SS) aims to classify each pixel into one of the pre-defined classes. This task plays an important role in self-driving cars and autonomous drones. In SS, many works have shown that most misclassified pixels are commonly near object boundaries with high uncertainties. However, existing SS loss functions are not tailored to handle these uncertain pixels during training, as these pixels are usually treated equally as confidently classified pixels and cannot be embedded with arbitrary low distortion in Euclidean space, thereby degenerating the performance of SS. To overcome this problem, this paper designs a "Hyperbolic Uncertainty Loss" (HyperUL), which dynamically highlights the misclassified and high-uncertainty pixels in Hyperbolic space during training via the hyperbolic distances. The proposed HyperUL is model agnostic and can be easily applied to various neural architectures. After employing HyperUL to three recent SS models, the experimental results on Cityscapes and UAVid datasets reveal that the segmentation performance of existing SS models can be consistently improved.
summary: Semantic segmentation (SS) aims to classify each pixel into one of the pre-defined classes. This task plays an important role in self-driving cars and autonomous drones. In SS, many works have shown that most misclassified pixels are commonly near object boundaries with high uncertainties. However, existing SS loss functions are not tailored to handle these uncertain pixels during training, as these pixels are usually treated equally as confidently classified pixels and cannot be embedded with arbitrary low distortion in Euclidean space, thereby degenerating the performance of SS. To overcome this problem, this paper designs a "Hyperbolic Uncertainty Loss" (HyperUL), which dynamically highlights the misclassified and high-uncertainty pixels in Hyperbolic space during training via the hyperbolic distances. The proposed HyperUL is model agnostic and can be easily applied to various neural architectures. After employing HyperUL to three recent SS models, the experimental results on Cityscapes and UAVid datasets reveal that the segmentation performance of existing SS models can be consistently improved.
abstract_zh: 语义分割（SS）旨在将每个像素分类到预定义的类别之一。这项任务在自动驾驶汽车和自动无人机中发挥着重要作用。在SS中，许多工作表明，大多数错误分类的像素通常靠近对象边界，具有很高的不确定性。然而，现有的 SS 损失函数并未在训练期间处理这些不确定的像素，因为这些像素通常被视为自信分类的像素，并且不能以任意低失真嵌入欧几里得空间中，从而降低了 SS 的性能。为了克服这个问题，本文设计了一种“双曲不确定性损失”（HyperUL），它在训练过程中通过双曲距离动态突出双曲空间中错误分类和高不确定性的像素。所提出的 HyperUL 与模型无关，可以轻松应用于各种神经架构。将 HyperUL 应用于最近的三个 SS 模型后，Cityscapes 和 UAVid 数据集上的实验结果表明，现有 SS 模型的分割性能可以得到持续改进。

AI.tldr: 设计一种双曲不确定性感知的语义分割方法，通过动态强调高不确定像素来提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割损失函数未能有效处理边界附近高不确定像素，导致性能下降，需设计新方法。
AI.method: 提出双曲不确定性损失（HyperUL），在训练中利用双曲空间距离动态强调高不确定像素，且适用于多种神经网络架构。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，应用HyperUL后，三个最新语义分割模型在Cityscapes和UAVid数据集上的性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: HyperUL有效提升语义分割性能，证明双曲空间处理不确定像素的优势。

authors_text: Kaisar Kushibar,Víctor Manuel Campello,Lidia Garrucho Moras,Akis Linardos,Petia Radeva,Karim Lekadir
title: Layer Ensembles: A Single-Pass Uncertainty Estimation in Deep Learning for Segmentation
title_zh: 层集成：深度学习分割中的单通道不确定性估计
abstract: Uncertainty estimation in deep learning has become a leading research field in medical image analysis due to the need for safe utilisation of AI algorithms in clinical practice. Most approaches for uncertainty estimation require sampling the network weights multiple times during testing or training multiple networks. This leads to higher training and testing costs in terms of time and computational resources. In this paper, we propose Layer Ensembles, a novel uncertainty estimation method that uses a single network and requires only a single pass to estimate predictive uncertainty of a network. Moreover, we introduce an image-level uncertainty metric, which is more beneficial for segmentation tasks compared to the commonly used pixel-wise metrics such as entropy and variance. We evaluate our approach on 2D and 3D, binary and multi-class medical image segmentation tasks. Our method shows competitive results with state-of-the-art Deep Ensembles, requiring only a single network and a single pass.
summary: Uncertainty estimation in deep learning has become a leading research field in medical image analysis due to the need for safe utilisation of AI algorithms in clinical practice. Most approaches for uncertainty estimation require sampling the network weights multiple times during testing or training multiple networks. This leads to higher training and testing costs in terms of time and computational resources. In this paper, we propose Layer Ensembles, a novel uncertainty estimation method that uses a single network and requires only a single pass to estimate predictive uncertainty of a network. Moreover, we introduce an image-level uncertainty metric, which is more beneficial for segmentation tasks compared to the commonly used pixel-wise metrics such as entropy and variance. We evaluate our approach on 2D and 3D, binary and multi-class medical image segmentation tasks. Our method shows competitive results with state-of-the-art Deep Ensembles, requiring only a single network and a single pass.
abstract_zh: 由于临床实践中安全使用人工智能算法的需要，深度学习中的不确定性估计已成为医学图像分析的领先研究领域。大多数不确定性估计方法都需要在测试或训练多个网络期间对网络权重进行多次采样。这导致时间和计算资源方面的培训和测试成本更高。在本文中，我们提出了层集成（Layer Ensembles），这是一种新颖的不确定性估计方法，它使用单个网络，并且只需要一次传递即可估计网络的预测不确定性。此外，我们引入了图像级不确定性度量，与常用的像素级度量（例如熵和方差）相比，它更有利于分割任务。我们在 2D 和 3D、二元和多类医学图像分割任务上评估我们的方法。我们的方法显示了与最先进的深度集成相媲美的结果，只需要一个网络和一次传递。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Layer Ensembles的新型不确定性估计方法，用于深度学习中的医学图像分割任务，该方法仅需单次网络前向传播即可估计预测不确定性。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性估计方法需要多次采样网络权重或训练多个网络，导致计算成本高且耗时，难以满足医学图像分析中对安全性和效率的需求。
AI.method: 通过单个网络的单次前向传播生成层集成，结合图像级不确定性度量（替代传统像素级指标如熵和方差），实现高效不确定性估计。
AI.result: 在2D/3D及二分类/多分类医学图像分割任务中，该方法在保持竞争力的同时，仅需单个网络和单次前向传播，显著降低计算成本。
AI.conclusion: Layer Ensembles为医学图像分割提供了高效且准确的不确定性估计方案，优于传统深度集成方法。

authors_text: Yoshitomo Matsubara,Ruihan Yang,Marco Levorato,Stephan Mandt
title: SC2 Benchmark: Supervised Compression for Split Computing
title_zh: SC2 基准：分割计算的监督压缩
comment: Accepted at TMLR. Code and models are available at https://github.com/yoshitomo-matsubara/sc2-benchmark
comments: Accepted at TMLR. Code and models are available at https://github.com/yoshitomo-matsubara/sc2-benchmark
abstract: With the increasing demand for deep learning models on mobile devices, splitting neural network computation between the device and a more powerful edge server has become an attractive solution. However, existing split computing approaches often underperform compared to a naive baseline of remote computation on compressed data. Recent studies propose learning compressed representations that contain more relevant information for supervised downstream tasks, showing improved tradeoffs between compressed data size and supervised performance. However, existing evaluation metrics only provide an incomplete picture of split computing. This study introduces supervised compression for split computing (SC2) and proposes new evaluation criteria: minimizing computation on the mobile device, minimizing transmitted data size, and maximizing model accuracy. We conduct a comprehensive benchmark study using 10 baseline methods, three computer vision tasks, and over 180 trained models, and discuss various aspects of SC2. We also release sc2bench, a Python package for future research on SC2. Our proposed metrics and package will help researchers better understand the tradeoffs of supervised compression in split computing.
summary: With the increasing demand for deep learning models on mobile devices, splitting neural network computation between the device and a more powerful edge server has become an attractive solution. However, existing split computing approaches often underperform compared to a naive baseline of remote computation on compressed data. Recent studies propose learning compressed representations that contain more relevant information for supervised downstream tasks, showing improved tradeoffs between compressed data size and supervised performance. However, existing evaluation metrics only provide an incomplete picture of split computing. This study introduces supervised compression for split computing (SC2) and proposes new evaluation criteria: minimizing computation on the mobile device, minimizing transmitted data size, and maximizing model accuracy. We conduct a comprehensive benchmark study using 10 baseline methods, three computer vision tasks, and over 180 trained models, and discuss various aspects of SC2. We also release sc2bench, a Python package for future research on SC2. Our proposed metrics and package will help researchers better understand the tradeoffs of supervised compression in split computing.
abstract_zh: 随着移动设备上对深度学习模型的需求不断增加，在设备和更强大的边缘服务器之间拆分神经网络计算已成为一种有吸引力的解决方案。然而，与压缩数据远程计算的简单基线相比，现有的分割计算方法通常表现不佳。最近的研究提出学习压缩表示，其中包含更多与监督下游任务相关的信息，显示压缩数据大小和监督性能之间的权衡得到了改善。然而，现有的评估指标仅提供了分割计算的不完整图像。本研究引入了分割计算（SC2）的监督压缩，并提出了新的评估标准：最小化移动设备上的计算、最小化传输的数据大小以及最大化模型精度。我们使用 10 种基线方法、三个计算机视觉任务和 180 多个经过训练的模型进行了全面的基准研究，并讨论了 SC2 的各个方面。我们还发布了 sc2bench，这是一个用于 SC2 未来研究的 Python 包。我们提出的指标和包将帮助研究人员更好地理解分割计算中监督压缩的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SC2基准测试及评估指标，用于改进分割计算中的监督压缩方法。
AI.motivation: 现有分割计算方法在移动设备与边缘服务器间的数据压缩和计算分配上表现不佳，且评估指标不全面。
AI.method: 引入SC2框架，定义最小化移动设备计算量、传输数据量及最大化模型准确率的评估标准，并构建包含10种基线方法、3个视觉任务和180个模型的基准测试。
AI.result: 系统评估了多种方法的权衡关系，发布了sc2bench工具包以支持未来研究。
AI.conclusion: 提出的评估指标和工具包有助于更全面理解监督压缩在分割计算中的性能权衡。

search_text: SC2 Benchmark: Supervised Compression for Split Computing SC2 基准：分割计算的监督压缩 With the increasing demand for deep learning models on mobile devices, splitting neural network computation between the device and a more powerful edge server has become an attractive solution. However, existing split computing approaches often underperform compared to a naive baseline of remote computation on compressed data. Recent studies propose learning compressed representations that contain more relevant information for supervised downstream tasks, showing improved tradeoffs between compressed data size and supervised performance. However, existing evaluation metrics only provide an incomplete picture of split computing. This study introduces supervised compression for split computing (SC2) and proposes new evaluation criteria: minimizing computation on the mobile device, minimizing transmitted data size, and maximizing model accuracy. We conduct a comprehensive benchmark study using 10 baseline methods, three computer vision tasks, and over 180 trained models, and discuss various aspects of SC2. We also release sc2bench, a Python package for future research on SC2. Our proposed metrics and package will help researchers better understand the tradeoffs of supervised compression in split computing. 随着移动设备上对深度学习模型的需求不断增加，在设备和更强大的边缘服务器之间拆分神经网络计算已成为一种有吸引力的解决方案。然而，与压缩数据远程计算的简单基线相比，现有的分割计算方法通常表现不佳。最近的研究提出学习压缩表示，其中包含更多与监督下游任务相关的信息，显示压缩数据大小和监督性能之间的权衡得到了改善。然而，现有的评估指标仅提供了分割计算的不完整图像。本研究引入了分割计算（SC2）的监督压缩，并提出了新的评估标准：最小化移动设备上的计算、最小化传输的数据大小以及最大化模型精度。我们使用 10 种基线方法、三个计算机视觉任务和 180 多个经过训练的模型进行了全面的基准研究，并讨论了 SC2 的各个方面。我们还发布了 sc2bench，这是一个用于 SC2 未来研究的 Python 包。我们提出的指标和包将帮助研究人员更好地理解分割计算中监督压缩的权衡。 本文提出SC2基准测试及评估指标，用于改进分割计算中的监督压缩方法。 Yoshitomo Matsubara,Ruihan Yang,Marco Levorato,Stephan Mandt cs.LG,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Franklin Mingzhe Li,Franchesca Spektor,Meng Xia,Mina Huh,Peter Cederberg,Yuqi Gong,Kristen Shinohara,Patrick Carrington
title: "It Feels Like Taking a Gamble": Exploring Perceptions, Practices, and Challenges of Using Makeup and Cosmetics for People with Visual Impairments
title_zh: “感觉就像一场赌博”：探索视障人士使用化妆品的看法、实践和挑战
comment: In CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22), April 29-May 5, 2022, New Orleans, LA, USA. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 15 pages. https://doi.org/10.1145/3491102.3517490
comments: In CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22), April 29-May 5, 2022, New Orleans, LA, USA. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 15 pages. https://doi.org/10.1145/3491102.3517490
abstract: Makeup and cosmetics offer the potential for self-expression and the reshaping of social roles for visually impaired people. However, there exist barriers to conducting a beauty regime because of the reliance on visual information and color variances in makeup. We present a content analysis of 145 YouTube videos to demonstrate visually impaired individuals' unique practices before, during, and after doing makeup. Based on the makeup practices, we then conducted semi-structured interviews with 12 visually impaired people to discuss their perceptions of and challenges with the makeup process in more depth. Overall, through our findings and discussion, we present novel perceptions of makeup from visually impaired individuals (e.g., broader representations of blindness and beauty). The existing challenges provide opportunities for future research to address learning barriers, insufficient feedback, and physical and environmental barriers, making the experience of doing makeup more accessible to people with visual impairments.
summary: Makeup and cosmetics offer the potential for self-expression and the reshaping of social roles for visually impaired people. However, there exist barriers to conducting a beauty regime because of the reliance on visual information and color variances in makeup. We present a content analysis of 145 YouTube videos to demonstrate visually impaired individuals' unique practices before, during, and after doing makeup. Based on the makeup practices, we then conducted semi-structured interviews with 12 visually impaired people to discuss their perceptions of and challenges with the makeup process in more depth. Overall, through our findings and discussion, we present novel perceptions of makeup from visually impaired individuals (e.g., broader representations of blindness and beauty). The existing challenges provide opportunities for future research to address learning barriers, insufficient feedback, and physical and environmental barriers, making the experience of doing makeup more accessible to people with visual impairments.
abstract_zh: 化妆和化妆品为视障人士提供了自我表达和重塑社会角色的潜力。然而，由于对视觉信息和化妆颜色差异的依赖，进行美容制度存在障碍。我们对 145 个 YouTube 视频进行了内容分析，以展示视障人士在化妆之前、期间和之后的独特做法。基于化妆实践，我们对 12 名视障人士进行了半结构化访谈，更深入地讨论了他们对化妆过程的看法和挑战。总的来说，通过我们的发现和讨论，我们提出了视障人士对化妆的新颖看法（例如，对失明和美丽的更广泛的表征）。现有的挑战为未来的研究提供了机会，以解决学习障碍、反馈不足以及物理和环境障碍，使视力障碍人士更容易获得化妆体验。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨视觉障碍者使用化妆品时的感知、实践及面临的挑战，旨在提升其化妆体验的可及性。
AI.motivation: 现有化妆品设计和使用流程主要依赖视觉信息，忽视了视觉障碍者的需求，导致他们在化妆过程中面临独特困难。
AI.method: 通过分析145个YouTube视频中的化妆实践，并对12名视觉障碍者进行半结构化访谈，深入探讨其体验与挑战。
AI.result: 研究发现视觉障碍者通过触觉、气味等非视觉方式构建美妆实践，并提出对‘盲人与美的关系’的新认知；同时揭示了学习障碍、反馈不足及环境限制等核心问题。
AI.conclusion: 未来需针对视觉障碍者的反馈机制、培训工具及环境适配性进行创新设计，以降低化妆门槛并促进包容性美妆产品开发。

authors_text: Jonathan P. Epperlein,Sergiy Zhuk
title: A Real-Time Region Tracking Algorithm Tailored to Endoscopic Video with Open-Source Implementation
title_zh: 一种针对内窥镜视频定制的实时区域跟踪算法，具有开源实现
comment: Submitted to MICCAI 2022. Code can be found at https://github.com/IBM/optflow-region-tracker
comments: Submitted to MICCAI 2022. Code can be found at https://github.com/IBM/optflow-region-tracker
abstract: With a video data source, such as multispectral video acquired during administration of fluorescent tracers, extraction of time-resolved data typically requires the compensation of motion. While this can be done manually, which is arduous, or using off-the-shelf object tracking software, which often yields unsatisfactory performance, we present an algorithm which is simple and performant. Most importantly, we provide an open-source implementation, with an easy-to-use interface for researchers not inclined to write their own code, as well as Python modules that can be used programmatically.
summary: With a video data source, such as multispectral video acquired during administration of fluorescent tracers, extraction of time-resolved data typically requires the compensation of motion. While this can be done manually, which is arduous, or using off-the-shelf object tracking software, which often yields unsatisfactory performance, we present an algorithm which is simple and performant. Most importantly, we provide an open-source implementation, with an easy-to-use interface for researchers not inclined to write their own code, as well as Python modules that can be used programmatically.
abstract_zh: 对于视频数据源，例如在荧光示踪剂管理期间获取的多光谱视频，时间分辨数据的提取通常需要运动补偿。虽然这可以手动完成（这是一项艰巨的任务），或者使用现成的对象跟踪软件（这通常会产生不令人满意的性能），但我们提出了一种简单且高性能的算法。最重要的是，我们提供了一个开源实现，为那些不愿意编写自己的代码的研究人员提供了易于使用的界面，以及可以通过编程方式使用的 Python 模块。

AI.tldr: 开发一种针对内窥镜视频的实时区域跟踪算法，并提供开源实现。
AI.motivation: 手动补偿运动繁琐，现成软件效果不佳，需更高效且易用的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出一种简单高效的实时区域跟踪算法，结合开源实现以提升可用性。
AI.result: 实现并开源了该算法，提供用户友好的接口和可编程Python模块。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效解决运动补偿问题，开源实现促进研究和应用。

authors_text: Yuning Qiu,Guoxu Zhou,Qibin Zhao,Shengli Xie
title: Noisy Tensor Completion via Low-rank Tensor Ring
title_zh: 通过低阶张量环完成噪声张量
abstract: Tensor completion is a fundamental tool for incomplete data analysis, where the goal is to predict missing entries from partial observations. However, existing methods often make the explicit or implicit assumption that the observed entries are noise-free to provide a theoretical guarantee of exact recovery of missing entries, which is quite restrictive in practice. To remedy such drawbacks, this paper proposes a novel noisy tensor completion model, which complements the incompetence of existing works in handling the degeneration of high-order and noisy observations. Specifically, the tensor ring nuclear norm (TRNN) and least-squares estimator are adopted to regularize the underlying tensor and the observed entries, respectively. In addition, a non-asymptotic upper bound of estimation error is provided to depict the statistical performance of the proposed estimator. Two efficient algorithms are developed to solve the optimization problem with convergence guarantee, one of which is specially tailored to handle large-scale tensors by replacing the minimization of TRNN of the original tensor equivalently with that of a much smaller one in a heterogeneous tensor decomposition framework. Experimental results on both synthetic and real-world data demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed model in recovering noisy incomplete tensor data compared with state-of-the-art tensor completion models.

However, existing methods often make the explicit or implicit assumption that the observed entries are noise-free to provide a theoretical guarantee of exact recovery of missing entries, which is quite restrictive in practice. To remedy such drawbacks, this paper proposes a novel noisy tensor completion model, which complements the incompetence of existing works in handling the degeneration of high-order and noisy observations. Specifically, the tensor ring nuclear norm (TRNN) and least-squares estimator are adopted to regularize the underlying tensor and the observed entries, respectively. In addition, a non-asymptotic upper bound of estimation error is provided to depict the statistical performance of the proposed estimator. Two efficient algorithms are developed to solve the optimization problem with convergence guarantee, one of which is specially tailored to handle large-scale tensors by replacing the minimization of TRNN of the original tensor equivalently with that of a much smaller one in a heterogeneous tensor decomposition framework. Experimental results on both synthetic and real-world data demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed model in recovering noisy incomplete tensor data compared with state-of-the-art tensor completion models.
abstract_zh: 张量补全是不完整数据分析的基本工具，其目标是从部分观察中预测缺失的条目。然而，现有的方法经常做出显式或隐式的假设，即观察到的条目是无噪声的，以提供精确恢复丢失条目的理论保证，这在实践中具有很大的限制性。为了弥补这些缺陷，本文提出了一种新颖的噪声张量完成模型，它补充了现有工作在处理高阶和噪声观测退化方面的无能。具体来说，采用张量环核范数（TRNN）和最小二乘估计器分别对底层张量和观察到的条目进行正则化。此外，还提供了估计误差的非渐近上限来描述所提出的估计器的统计性能。开发了两种有效的算法来解决具有收敛保证的优化问题，其中一种是专门为处理大规模张量而设计的，通过将原始张量的 TRNN 最小化等效替换为异构张量分解框架中小得多的 TRNN 的最小化。合成数据和真实数据的实验结果证明了与最先进的张量完成模型相比，所提出的模型在恢复噪声不完整张量数据方面的有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于低秩张量环的噪声张量补全模型，解决高阶噪声观测数据的缺失值恢复问题。
AI.motivation: 现有张量补全方法通常假设观测数据无噪声，难以处理实际中的噪声和高阶张量退化问题。
AI.method: 采用张量环核范数（TRNN）和最小二乘估计分别正则化目标张量和观测项，并设计两种高效算法求解优化问题。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上验证了该模型在噪声缺失数据恢复中的有效性与效率，优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的噪声张量补全模型通过理论误差界分析和算法设计，在处理高阶噪声数据时表现出优越性能。

However, existing methods often make the explicit or implicit assumption that the observed entries are noise-free to provide a theoretical guarantee of exact recovery of missing entries, which is quite restrictive in practice. To remedy such drawbacks, this paper proposes a novel noisy tensor completion model, which complements the incompetence of existing works in handling the degeneration of high-order and noisy observations. Specifically, the tensor ring nuclear norm (TRNN) and least-squares estimator are adopted to regularize the underlying tensor and the observed entries, respectively. authors_text: Leah R. M. Dickhoff,Ellen M. Kerkhof,Heloisa H. Deuzeman,Carien L. Creutzberg,Tanja Alderliesten,Peter A. N. Bosman
title: Adaptive Objective Configuration in Bi-Objective Evolutionary Optimization for Cervical Cancer Brachytherapy Treatment Planning
title_zh: 宫颈癌近距离放射治疗计划双目标进化优化中的自适应目标配置
abstract: The Multi-Objective Real-Valued Gene-pool Optimal Mixing Evolutionary Algorithm (MO-RV-GOMEA) has been proven effective and efficient in solving real-world problems. A prime example is optimizing treatment plans for prostate cancer brachytherapy, an internal form of radiation treatment, for which equally important clinical aims from a base protocol are grouped into two objectives and bi-objectively optimized. This use of MO-RV-GOMEA was recently successfully introduced into clinical practice. Brachytherapy can also play an important role in treating cervical cancer. However, using the same approach to optimize treatment plans often does not immediately lead to clinically desirable results. Concordantly, medical experts indicate that they use additional aims beyond the cervix base protocol. Moreover, these aims have different priorities and can be patient-specifically adjusted. For this reason, we propose a novel adaptive objective configuration method to use with MO-RV-GOMEA so that we can accommodate additional aims of this nature. Based on results using only the base protocol, in consultation with medical experts, we configured key additional aims. We show how, for 10 patient cases, the new approach achieves the intended result, properly taking into account the additional aims. Consequently, plans resulting from the new approach are preferred by medical specialists in 8/10 cases.
summary: The Multi-Objective Real-Valued Gene-pool Optimal Mixing Evolutionary Algorithm (MO-RV-GOMEA) has been proven effective and efficient in solving real-world problems. A prime example is optimizing treatment plans for prostate cancer brachytherapy, an internal form of radiation treatment, for which equally important clinical aims from a base protocol are grouped into two objectives and bi-objectively optimized. This use of MO-RV-GOMEA was recently successfully introduced into clinical practice. Brachytherapy can also play an important role in treating cervical cancer. However, using the same approach to optimize treatment plans often does not immediately lead to clinically desirable results. Concordantly, medical experts indicate that they use additional aims beyond the cervix base protocol. Moreover, these aims have different priorities and can be patient-specifically adjusted. For this reason, we propose a novel adaptive objective configuration method to use with MO-RV-GOMEA so that we can accommodate additional aims of this nature. Based on results using only the base protocol, in consultation with medical experts, we configured key additional aims. We show how, for 10 patient cases, the new approach achieves the intended result, properly taking into account the additional aims. Consequently, plans resulting from the new approach are preferred by medical specialists in 8/10 cases.
abstract_zh: 多目标实值基因库最优混合进化算法（MO-RV-GOMEA）已被证明在解决现实世界问题方面是有效且高效的。一个典型的例子是优化前列腺癌近距离放射治疗的治疗计划，这是一种放射治疗的内部形式，基本方案中同等重要的临床目标被分为两个目标并进行双目标优化。 MO-RV-GOMEA 的这种用途最近成功引入临床实践。近距离放射治疗在治疗宫颈癌方面也可以发挥重要作用。然而，使用相同的方法来优化治疗计划通常不会立即产生临床上理想的结果。同样，医学专家表示，除了子宫颈基础方案之外，他们还使用其他目标。此外，这些目标有不同的优先级，可以根据患者的具体情况进行调整。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的自适应目标配置方法，与 MO-RV-GOMEA 一起使用，以便我们可以适应这种性质的其他目标。根据仅使用基本方案的结果，并与医学专家协商，我们配置了关键的附加目标。我们展示了针对 10 个患者病例，新方法如何在适当考虑其他目标的情况下实现预期结果。因此，在 8/10 的病例中，医学专家更倾向于采用新方法制定的计划。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应目标配置方法，用于改进宫颈癌近距离放疗计划的双目标进化优化。
AI.motivation: 现有基于基础协议的双目标优化方法在宫颈癌治疗中效果不佳，临床专家指出需纳入患者特异性的额外目标以提升治疗效果。
AI.method: 基于基础协议优化结果，联合医学专家配置关键额外目标，并通过MO-RV-GOMEA算法进行自适应优化。
AI.result: 在10例患者案例中，新方法生成的治疗方案在8例中获得医学专家的优先推荐。
AI.conclusion: 自适应目标配置方法能有效整合临床专家的个性化需求，提升宫颈癌放疗计划的临床适用性。

authors_text: Luisa Lucie-Smith,Hiranya V. Peiris,Andrew Pontzen,Brian Nord,Jeyan Thiyagalingam,Davide Piras
title: Discovering the building blocks of dark matter halo density profiles with neural networks
title_zh: 利用神经网络发现暗物质晕密度分布的构建模块
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures. Minor changes to match version accepted for publication in PRD
comments: 12 pages, 6 figures. Minor changes to match version accepted for publication in PRD
abstract: The density profiles of dark matter halos are typically modeled using empirical formulae fitted to the density profiles of relaxed halo populations. We present a neural network model that is trained to learn the mapping from the raw density field containing each halo to the dark matter density profile. We show that the model recovers the widely-used Navarro-Frenk-White (NFW) profile out to the virial radius, and can additionally describe the variability in the outer profile of the halos. The neural network architecture consists of a supervised encoder-decoder framework, which first compresses the density inputs into a low-dimensional latent representation, and then outputs $ρ(r)$ for any desired value of radius $r$. The latent representation contains all the information used by the model to predict the density profiles. This allows us to interpret the latent representation by quantifying the mutual information between the representation and the halos' ground-truth density profiles. A two-dimensional representation is sufficient to accurately model the density profiles up to the virial radius; however, a three-dimensional representation is required to describe the outer profiles beyond the virial radius. The additional dimension in the representation contains information about the infalling material in the outer profiles of dark matter halos, thus discovering the splashback boundary of halos without prior knowledge of the halos' dynamical history.
summary: The density profiles of dark matter halos are typically modeled using empirical formulae fitted to the density profiles of relaxed halo populations. We present a neural network model that is trained to learn the mapping from the raw density field containing each halo to the dark matter density profile. We show that the model recovers the widely-used Navarro-Frenk-White (NFW) profile out to the virial radius, and can additionally describe the variability in the outer profile of the halos. The neural network architecture consists of a supervised encoder-decoder framework, which first compresses the density inputs into a low-dimensional latent representation, and then outputs $ρ(r)$ for any desired value of radius $r$. The latent representation contains all the information used by the model to predict the density profiles. This allows us to interpret the latent representation by quantifying the mutual information between the representation and the halos' ground-truth density profiles. A two-dimensional representation is sufficient to accurately model the density profiles up to the virial radius; however, a three-dimensional representation is required to describe the outer profiles beyond the virial radius. The additional dimension in the representation contains information about the infalling material in the outer profiles of dark matter halos, thus discovering the splashback boundary of halos without prior knowledge of the halos' dynamical history.
abstract_zh: 暗物质晕的密度分布通常使用适合松弛晕群体密度分布的经验公式来建模。我们提出了一个神经网络模型，经过训练可以学习从包含每个光环的原始密度场到暗物质密度分布的映射。我们证明该模型将广泛使用的纳瓦罗-弗伦克-怀特（NFW）轮廓恢复到维里半径，并且还可以描述光晕外部轮廓的变化。神经网络架构由一个有监督的编码器-解码器框架组成，该框架首先将密度输入压缩为低维潜在表示，然后输出任意所需半径 $r$ 值的 $ρ(r)$。潜在表示包含模型用于预测密度剖面的所有信息。这使我们能够通过量化表示和光环的真实密度分布之间的互信息来解释潜在表示。二维表示足以精确模拟直至维里半径的密度分布；然而，需要三维表示来描述超出维里半径的外部轮廓。表示中的附加维度包含有关暗物质晕外部轮廓中的下落物质的信息，从而在不事先了解晕的动力学历史的情况下发现晕的溅射边界。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用神经网络模型来学习暗物质晕密度分布的构建模块，替代传统的经验公式建模方法。
AI.motivation: 传统暗物质晕密度分布模型依赖经验公式，难以准确描述晕的外层结构变化。需开发更灵活且可解释的方法以捕捉密度分布的复杂特征。
AI.method: 采用监督编码-解码框架的神经网络，将密度场压缩为低维潜在表示，再输出任意半径的密度值，并通过互信息量化潜在表示与真实密度分布的关系。
AI.result: 模型可恢复NFW剖面至晕的 virial 半径，二维潜在空间可准确建模至该范围，而三维空间能描述外层剖面，其中额外维度包含关于晕外层吸积物质的信息，自动识别出splashback边界。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络方法有效揭示了暗物质晕密度剖面的构建模块，证明外层剖面需额外潜在维度表征吸积物质，从而无需动力学历史即可识别splashback边界。

search_text: Discovering the building blocks of dark matter halo density profiles with neural networks 利用神经网络发现暗物质晕密度分布的构建模块 The density profiles of dark matter halos are typically modeled using empirical formulae fitted to the density profiles of relaxed halo populations. We present a neural network model that is trained to learn the mapping from the raw density field containing each halo to the dark matter density profile. We show that the model recovers the widely-used Navarro-Frenk-White (NFW) profile out to the virial radius, and can additionally describe the variability in the outer profile of the halos. The neural network architecture consists of a supervised encoder-decoder framework, which first compresses the density inputs into a low-dimensional latent representation, and then outputs $ρ(r)$ for any desired value of radius $r$. The latent representation contains all the information used by the model to predict the density profiles. This allows us to interpret the latent representation by quantifying the mutual information between the representation and the halos' ground-truth density profiles. A two-dimensional representation is sufficient to accurately model the density profiles up to the virial radius; however, a three-dimensional representation is required to describe the outer profiles beyond the virial radius. The additional dimension in the representation contains information about the infalling material in the outer profiles of dark matter halos, thus discovering the splashback boundary of halos without prior knowledge of the halos' dynamical history. 暗物质晕的密度分布通常使用适合松弛晕群体密度分布的经验公式来建模。我们提出了一个神经网络模型，经过训练可以学习从包含每个光环的原始密度场到暗物质密度分布的映射。我们证明该模型将广泛使用的纳瓦罗-弗伦克-怀特（NFW）轮廓恢复到维里半径，并且还可以描述光晕外部轮廓的变化。神经网络架构由一个有监督的编码器-解码器框架组成，该框架首先将密度输入压缩为低维潜在表示，然后输出任意所需半径 $r$ 值的 $ρ(r)$。潜在表示包含模型用于预测密度剖面的所有信息。这使我们能够通过量化表示和光环的真实密度分布之间的互信息来解释潜在表示。二维表示足以精确模拟直至维里半径的密度分布；然而，需要三维表示来描述超出维里半径的外部轮廓。表示中的附加维度包含有关暗物质晕外部轮廓中的下落物质的信息，从而在不事先了解晕的动力学历史的情况下发现晕的溅射边界。 该论文提出使用神经网络模型来学习暗物质晕密度分布的构建模块，替代传统的经验公式建模方法。 Luisa Lucie-Smith,Hiranya V. Peiris,Andrew Pontzen,Brian Nord,Jeyan Thiyagalingam,Davide Piras astro-ph.CO,astro-ph.IM,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Nikos Karantzas,Emma Besier,Josue Ortega Caro,Xaq Pitkow,Andreas S. Tolias,Ankit B. Patel,Fabio Anselmi
title: Understanding robustness and generalization of artificial neural networks through Fourier masks
title_zh: 通过傅里叶掩模了解人工神经网络的鲁棒性和泛化性
abstract: Despite the enormous success of artificial neural networks (ANNs) in many disciplines, the characterization of their computations and the origin of key properties such as generalization and robustness remain open questions. Recent literature suggests that robust networks with good generalization properties tend to be biased towards processing low frequencies in images. To explore the frequency bias hypothesis further, we develop an algorithm that allows us to learn modulatory masks highlighting the essential input frequencies needed for preserving a trained network's performance. We achieve this by imposing invariance in the loss with respect to such modulations in the input frequencies. We first use our method to test the low-frequency preference hypothesis of adversarially trained or data-augmented networks. Our results suggest that adversarially robust networks indeed exhibit a low-frequency bias but we find this bias is also dependent on directions in frequency space. However, this is not necessarily true for other types of data augmentation. Our results also indicate that the essential frequencies in question are effectively the ones used to achieve generalization in the first place. Surprisingly, images seen through these modulatory masks are not recognizable and resemble texture-like patterns.
summary: Despite the enormous success of artificial neural networks (ANNs) in many disciplines, the characterization of their computations and the origin of key properties such as generalization and robustness remain open questions. Recent literature suggests that robust networks with good generalization properties tend to be biased towards processing low frequencies in images. To explore the frequency bias hypothesis further, we develop an algorithm that allows us to learn modulatory masks highlighting the essential input frequencies needed for preserving a trained network's performance. We achieve this by imposing invariance in the loss with respect to such modulations in the input frequencies. We first use our method to test the low-frequency preference hypothesis of adversarially trained or data-augmented networks. Our results suggest that adversarially robust networks indeed exhibit a low-frequency bias but we find this bias is also dependent on directions in frequency space. However, this is not necessarily true for other types of data augmentation. Our results also indicate that the essential frequencies in question are effectively the ones used to achieve generalization in the first place. Surprisingly, images seen through these modulatory masks are not recognizable and resemble texture-like patterns.
abstract_zh: 尽管人工神经网络（ANN）在许多学科中取得了巨大成功，但其计算的表征以及泛化性和鲁棒性等关键属性的起源仍然是悬而未决的问题。最近的文献表明，具有良好泛化特性的鲁棒网络往往偏向于处理图像中的低频。为了进一步探索频率偏差假设，我们开发了一种算法，使我们能够学习调制掩模，突出显示保持经过训练的网络性能所需的基本输入频率。我们通过对输入频率中的此类调制施加损耗不变性来实现这一点。我们首先使用我们的方法来测试对抗性训练或数据增强网络的低频偏好假设。我们的结果表明，对抗性鲁棒网络确实表现出低频偏差，但我们发现这种偏差也取决于频率空间的方向。然而，对于其他类型的数据增强来说不一定如此。我们的结果还表明，所讨论的基本频率实际上是首先用于实现泛化的频率。令人惊讶的是，通过这些调制掩模看到的图像是不可识别的，并且类似于纹理状图案。

AI.tldr: 通过傅里叶掩码分析人工神经网络的鲁棒性和泛化能力，验证低频频率偏好假设。
AI.motivation: 尽管人工神经网络在多领域取得成功，但其计算机制及泛化、鲁棒性来源尚不明确。现有研究显示鲁棒网络可能偏好处理低频信息，需进一步验证该假设。
AI.method: 开发学习调制掩码算法，通过在损失函数中引入输入频率调制的不变性，识别维持网络性能的关键频率。
AI.result: 对抗训练网络确实存在低频偏好但依赖频率方向，其他数据增强类型不必然；关键频率与泛化相关，但掩码图像呈现不可识别的纹理模式。
AI.conclusion: 低频偏好存在但方向依赖，关键频率促进泛化，但具体机制及掩码图像的不可识别性需进一步研究。
