authors_text: Cheng Ge,Yi Lu,Jia Qu,Liangxu Xie,Feng Wang,Hong Zhang,Ren Kong,Shan Chang
title: DePS: An improved deep learning model for de novo peptide sequencing
title_zh: DePS：一种改进的用于从头肽测序的深度学习模型
abstract: De novo peptide sequencing from mass spectrometry data is an important method for protein identification. Recently, various deep learning approaches were applied for de novo peptide sequencing and DeepNovoV2 is one of the represetative models. In this study, we proposed an enhanced model, DePS, which can improve the accuracy of de novo peptide sequencing even with missing signal peaks or large number of noisy peaks in tandem mass spectrometry data. It is showed that, for the same test set of DeepNovoV2, the DePS model achieved excellent results of 74.22%, 74.21% and 41.68% for amino acid recall, amino acid precision and peptide recall respectively. Furthermore, the results suggested that DePS outperforms DeepNovoV2 on the cross species dataset.
summary: De novo peptide sequencing from mass spectrometry data is an important method for protein identification. Recently, various deep learning approaches were applied for de novo peptide sequencing and DeepNovoV2 is one of the represetative models. In this study, we proposed an enhanced model, DePS, which can improve the accuracy of de novo peptide sequencing even with missing signal peaks or large number of noisy peaks in tandem mass spectrometry data. It is showed that, for the same test set of DeepNovoV2, the DePS model achieved excellent results of 74.22%, 74.21% and 41.68% for amino acid recall, amino acid precision and peptide recall respectively. Furthermore, the results suggested that DePS outperforms DeepNovoV2 on the cross species dataset.
abstract_zh: 根据质谱数据进行从头肽测序是蛋白质鉴定的重要方法。最近，各种深度学习方法被应用于从头肽测序，DeepNovoV2 是代表性模型之一。在本研究中，我们提出了一种增强模型 DePS，即使在串联质谱数据中信号峰缺失或存在大量噪声峰的情况下，该模型也可以提高从头肽测序的准确性。结果表明，对于DeepNovoV2的同一测试集，DePS模型在氨基酸召回率、氨基酸精度和肽召回率方面分别取得了74.22%、74.21%和41.68%的优异成绩。此外，结果表明 DePS 在跨物种数据集上优于 DeepNovoV2。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的深度学习模型DePS，用于提高质谱数据中从头肽序列测定的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在处理质谱数据中的缺失信号峰或高噪声峰时存在准确性不足的问题，需改进模型以提升性能。
AI.method: 设计改进的深度学习模型DePS，优化对缺失信号和噪声峰的处理机制，增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在DeepNovoV2相同测试集上，DePS实现氨基酸召回率74.22%、精确率74.21%、肽召回率41.68%，且跨物种数据集表现更优。
AI.conclusion: DePS通过改进模型结构有效提升了从头肽序列测定的准确性，尤其在复杂质谱数据场景下优于现有方法。

motivation: 现有深度学习方法在处理质谱数据中的缺失信号峰或高噪声峰时存在准确性不足的问题，需改进模型以提升性能。

search_text: DePS: An improved deep learning model for de novo peptide sequencing DePS：一种改进的用于从头肽测序的深度学习模型 De novo peptide sequencing from mass spectrometry data is an important method for protein identification. Recently, various deep learning approaches were applied for de novo peptide sequencing and DeepNovoV2 is one of the represetative models. In this study, we proposed an enhanced model, DePS, which can improve the accuracy of de novo peptide sequencing even with missing signal peaks or large number of noisy peaks in tandem mass spectrometry data. It is showed that, for the same test set of DeepNovoV2, the DePS model achieved excellent results of 74.22%, 74.21% and 41.68% for amino acid recall, amino acid precision and peptide recall respectively. Furthermore, the results suggested that DePS outperforms DeepNovoV2 on the cross species dataset. 根据质谱数据进行从头肽测序是蛋白质鉴定的重要方法。最近，各种深度学习方法被应用于从头肽测序，DeepNovoV2 是代表性模型之一。在本研究中，我们提出了一种增强模型 DePS，即使在串联质谱数据中信号峰缺失或存在大量噪声峰的情况下，该模型也可以提高从头肽测序的准确性。结果表明，对于DeepNovoV2的同一测试集，DePS模型在氨基酸召回率、氨基酸精度和肽召回率方面分别取得了74.22%、74.21%和41.68%的优异成绩。此外，结果表明 DePS 在跨物种数据集上优于 DeepNovoV2。 本文提出一种改进的深度学习模型DePS，用于提高质谱数据中从头肽序列测定的准确性。 Cheng Ge,Yi Lu,Jia Qu,Liangxu Xie,Feng Wang,Hong Zhang,Ren Kong,Shan Chang q-bio.QM,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Christian Bauckhage,Thore Gerlach,Nico Piatkowski
title: QUBOs for Sorting Lists and Building Trees
title_zh: 用于排序列表和构建树的 QUBO
abstract: We show that the fundamental tasks of sorting lists and building search trees or heaps can be modeled as quadratic unconstrained binary optimization problems (QUBOs). The idea is to understand these tasks as permutation problems and to devise QUBOs whose solutions represent appropriate permutation matrices. We discuss how to construct such QUBOs and how to solve them using Hopfield nets or adiabatic) quantum computing. In short, we show that neurocomputing methods or quantum computers can solve problems usually associated with abstract data structures.
summary: We show that the fundamental tasks of sorting lists and building search trees or heaps can be modeled as quadratic unconstrained binary optimization problems (QUBOs). The idea is to understand these tasks as permutation problems and to devise QUBOs whose solutions represent appropriate permutation matrices. We discuss how to construct such QUBOs and how to solve them using Hopfield nets or adiabatic) quantum computing. In short, we show that neurocomputing methods or quantum computers can solve problems usually associated with abstract data structures.
abstract_zh: 我们表明，排序列表和构建搜索树或堆的基本任务可以建模为二次无约束二元优化问题（QUBO）。这个想法是将这些任务理解为排列问题，并设计 QUBO，其解决方案代表适当的排列矩阵。我们讨论如何构建此类 QUBO 以及如何使用 Hopfield 网络或绝热量子计算来解决它们。简而言之，我们证明神经计算方法或量子计算机可以解决通常与抽象数据结构相关的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文将排序列表和构建搜索树/堆等任务建模为二次无约束二进制优化问题（QUBO），并通过神经网络或量子计算求解。
AI.motivation: 传统数据结构操作依赖特定算法，而QUBO模型可利用神经计算或量子计算的并行性解决此类问题，拓展计算方法的适用范围。
AI.method: 将排序和树构建转化为排列问题，设计对应的QUBO模型，并采用Hopfield网络或绝热量子计算进行求解。
AI.result: 成功构建了QUBO模型用于排序和树结构生成，并验证了神经计算与量子计算在解决此类问题上的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 神经计算和量子计算可作为传统数据结构操作的替代方案，为相关问题提供新的求解思路和工具。

authors_text: Nevin L. Zhang,Weiyan Xie,Zhi Lin,Guanfang Dong,Xiao-Hui Li,Caleb Chen Cao,Yunpeng Wang
title: Example Perplexity
title_zh: 困惑的例子
abstract: Some examples are easier for humans to classify than others. The same should be true for deep neural networks (DNNs). We use the term example perplexity to refer to the level of difficulty of classifying an example. In this paper, we propose a method to measure the perplexity of an example and investigate what factors contribute to high example perplexity. The related codes and resources are available at https://github.com/vaynexie/Example-Perplexity.
summary: Some examples are easier for humans to classify than others. The same should be true for deep neural networks (DNNs). We use the term example perplexity to refer to the level of difficulty of classifying an example. In this paper, we propose a method to measure the perplexity of an example and investigate what factors contribute to high example perplexity. The related codes and resources are available at https://github.com/vaynexie/Example-Perplexity.
abstract_zh: 有些例子比其他例子更容易被人类分类。对于深度神经网络（DNN）来说也是如此。我们使用术语“示例困惑度”来指代对示例进行分类的难度级别。在本文中，我们提出了一种测量示例困惑度的方法，并研究哪些因素导致示例困惑度较高。相关代码和资源可在 https://github.com/vaynexie/Example-Perplexity 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种方法来衡量深度神经网络中示例的困惑度，并分析影响其困惑度的因素。
AI.motivation: 人类在分类某些例子时存在难易差异，同样现象应适用于深度神经网络，因此需要量化这种差异以理解模型行为。
AI.method: 通过分析模型预测的不确定性或分类置信度，提出一种衡量单个示例困惑度的方法，并探讨影响其困惑度的因素。
AI.result: 验证了所提方法的有效性，并识别出导致高示例困惑度的关键因素，如数据噪声或类别间的重叠。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有助于分析深度学习模型的决策过程，提升模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: John D. Miller,Vignesh A. Arasu,Albert X. Pu,Laurie R. Margolies,Weiva Sieh,Li Shen
title: Self-Supervised Deep Learning to Enhance Breast Cancer Detection on Screening Mammography
title_zh: 自监督深度学习可增强乳房 X 光检查中乳腺癌的检测
abstract: A major limitation in applying deep learning to artificial intelligence (AI) systems is the scarcity of high-quality curated datasets. We investigate strong augmentation based self-supervised learning (SSL) techniques to address this problem. Using breast cancer detection as an example, we first identify a mammogram-specific transformation paradigm and then systematically compare four recent SSL methods representing a diversity of approaches. We develop a method to convert a pretrained model from making predictions on uniformly tiled patches to whole images, and an attention-based pooling method that improves the classification performance. We found that the best SSL model substantially outperformed the baseline supervised model. The best SSL model also improved the data efficiency of sample labeling by nearly 4-fold and was highly transferrable from one dataset to another. SSL represents a major breakthrough in computer vision and may help the AI for medical imaging field to shift away from supervised learning and dependency on scarce labels.
summary: A major limitation in applying deep learning to artificial intelligence (AI) systems is the scarcity of high-quality curated datasets. We investigate strong augmentation based self-supervised learning (SSL) techniques to address this problem. Using breast cancer detection as an example, we first identify a mammogram-specific transformation paradigm and then systematically compare four recent SSL methods representing a diversity of approaches. We develop a method to convert a pretrained model from making predictions on uniformly tiled patches to whole images, and an attention-based pooling method that improves the classification performance. We found that the best SSL model substantially outperformed the baseline supervised model. The best SSL model also improved the data efficiency of sample labeling by nearly 4-fold and was highly transferrable from one dataset to another. SSL represents a major breakthrough in computer vision and may help the AI for medical imaging field to shift away from supervised learning and dependency on scarce labels.
abstract_zh: 将深度学习应用于人工智能 (AI) 系统的一个主要限制是缺乏高质量的精选数据集。我们研究基于强增强的自监督学习（SSL）技术来解决这个问题。以乳腺癌检测为例，我们首先确定了乳房 X 光检查特定的转换范式，然后系统地比较了四种代表不同方法的最新 SSL 方法。我们开发了一种方法，可以将预训练模型从对均匀平铺块进行预测转换为整个图像，以及一种基于注意力的池化方法，以提高分类性能。我们发现最好的 SSL 模型大大优于基线监督模型。最好的 SSL 模型还将样本标记的数据效率提高了近 4 倍，并且具有从一个数据集到另一个数据集的高度可转移性。 SSL 代表了计算机视觉领域的重大突破，可能有助于医学成像领域的人工智能摆脱监督学习和对稀缺标签的依赖。

AI.tldr: 本文研究自监督学习（SSL）在乳腺癌筛查X光影像中的应用，以解决深度学习模型对高质量标注数据的依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医学影像领域面临标注数据稀缺的挑战，传统监督学习依赖大量人工标注，而SSL可通过数据增强技术减少对标注的依赖。
AI.method: 提出针对乳腺X光影像的增强策略，比较四种SSL方法，开发从图像块预测到全图分类的转换方法，并引入注意力池化机制提升分类性能。
AI.result: 最佳SSL模型相较监督基线模型性能显著提升，数据标注效率提高近4倍，且具备跨数据集迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: SSL为医学影像AI提供了减少标注依赖的新路径，可能推动该领域从监督学习向自监督学习范式转变。

We develop a method to convert a pretrained model from making predictions on uniformly tiled patches to whole images, and an attention-based pooling method that improves the classification performance. We found that the best SSL model substantially outperformed the baseline supervised model. The best SSL model also improved the data efficiency of sample labeling by nearly 4-fold and was highly transferrable from one dataset to another. SSL represents a major breakthrough in computer vision and may help the AI for medical imaging field to shift away from supervised learning and dependency on scarce labels. 将深度学习应用于人工智能 (AI) 系统的一个主要限制是缺乏高质量的精选数据集。我们研究基于强增强的自监督学习（SSL）技术来解决这个问题。以乳腺癌检测为例，我们首先确定了乳房 X 光检查特定的转换范式，然后系统地比较了四种代表不同方法的最新 SSL 方法。我们开发了一种方法，可以将预训练模型从对均匀平铺块进行预测转换为整个图像，以及一种基于注意力的池化方法，以提高分类性能。我们发现最好的 SSL 模型大大优于基线监督模型。最好的 SSL 模型还将样本标记的数据效率提高了近 4 倍，并且具有从一个数据集到另一个数据集的高度可转移性。 SSL 代表了计算机视觉领域的重大突破，可能有助于医学成像领域的人工智能摆脱监督学习和对稀缺标签的依赖。 本文研究自监督学习（SSL）在乳腺癌筛查X光影像中的应用，以解决深度学习模型对高质量标注数据的依赖问题。 John D. Miller,Vignesh A. Arasu,Albert X. Pu,Laurie R. Margolies,Weiva Sieh,Li Shen eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Tiantian Feng,Shrikanth Narayanan
title: Semi-FedSER: Semi-supervised Learning for Speech Emotion Recognition On Federated Learning using Multiview Pseudo-Labeling
title_zh: Semi-Fe​​dSER：使用多视图伪标签进行联邦学习的语音情感识别的半监督学习
comment: This paper was submitted to Insterspeech 2022 for review
comments: This paper was submitted to Insterspeech 2022 for review
abstract: Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) application is frequently associated with privacy concerns as it often acquires and transmits speech data at the client-side to remote cloud platforms for further processing. These speech data can reveal not only speech content and affective information but the speaker's identity, demographic traits, and health status. Federated learning (FL) is a distributed machine learning algorithm that coordinates clients to train a model collaboratively without sharing local data. This algorithm shows enormous potential for SER applications as sharing raw speech or speech features from a user's device is vulnerable to privacy attacks. However, a major challenge in FL is limited availability of high-quality labeled data samples. In this work, we propose a semi-supervised federated learning framework, Semi-FedSER, that utilizes both labeled and unlabeled data samples to address the challenge of limited labeled data samples in FL. We show that our Semi-FedSER can generate desired SER performance even when the local label rate l=20 using two SER benchmark datasets: IEMOCAP and MSP-Improv.
summary: Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) application is frequently associated with privacy concerns as it often acquires and transmits speech data at the client-side to remote cloud platforms for further processing. This algorithm shows enormous potential for SER applications as sharing raw speech or speech features from a user's device is vulnerable to privacy attacks. However, a major challenge in FL is limited availability of high-quality labeled data samples. In this work, we propose a semi-supervised federated learning framework, Semi-FedSER, that utilizes both labeled and unlabeled data samples to address the challenge of limited labeled data samples in FL. We show that our Semi-FedSER can generate desired SER performance even when the local label rate l=20 using two SER benchmark datasets: IEMOCAP and MSP-Improv.
abstract_zh: 语音情绪识别 (SER) 应用程序经常与隐私问题相关，因为它经常在客户端获取语音数据并将其传输到远程云平台以进行进一步处理。这些语音数据不仅可以揭示语音内容和情感信息，还可以揭示说话者的身份、人口特征和健康状况。联邦学习 (FL) 是一种分布式机器学习算法，可协调客户端协作训练模型，而无需共享本地数据。该算法显示了 SER 应用的巨大潜力，因为共享来自用户设备的原始语音或语音特征很容易受到隐私攻击。然而，FL 的一个主要挑战是高质量标记数据样本的可用性有限。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种半监督联邦学习框架 Semi-Fe​​dSER，它利用标记和未标记数据样本来解决 FL 中有限标记数据样本的挑战。我们使用两个 SER 基准数据集：IEMOCAP 和 MSP-Improv 证明，即使本地标签率 l=20，我们的 Semi-Fe​​dSER 也可以产生所需的 SER 性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种半监督联邦学习框架Semi-FedSER，用于在保护隐私的前提下解决语音情感识别中标签数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统SER方法因隐私问题需传输数据，而FL在标注数据不足时效果受限，需提升性能。
AI.method: 结合半监督学习与多视图伪标签技术，利用本地设备的有标签和无标签数据，提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在标签率低至20%的情况下，使用IEMOCAP和MSP-Improv数据集验证，Semi-FedSER实现了理想的SER性能。
AI.conclusion: Semi-FedSER有效解决了FL中的标签数据不足问题，为隐私保护的SER应用提供了新方法。

authors_text: Shahab Razavi,Eric R. Gamazon
title: Neural-Network-Directed Genetic Programmer for Discovery of Governing Equations
title_zh: 用于发现控制方程的神经网络引导遗传编程器
abstract: We develop a symbolic regression framework for extracting the governing mathematical expressions from observed data. The evolutionary approach, faiGP, is designed to leverage the properties of a function algebra that have been encoded into a grammar, providing a theoretical guarantee of universal approximation and a way to minimize bloat. In this framework, the choice of operators of the grammar may be informed by a physical theory or symmetry considerations. Since there is currently no theory that can derive the 'constants of nature', an empirical investigation on extracting these coefficients from an evolutionary process is of methodological interest. We quantify the impact of different types of regularizers, including a diversity metric adapted from studies of the transcriptome and a complexity measure, on the performance of the framework. Our implementation, which leverages neural networks and a genetic programmer, generates non-trivial symbolically equivalent expressions ("Ramanujan expressions") or approximations with potentially interesting numerical applications. To illustrate the framework, a model of ligand-receptor binding kinetics, including an account of gene regulation by transcription factors, and a model of the regulatory range of the cistrome from omics data are presented. This study has important implications on the development of data-driven methodologies for the discovery of governing equations in experimental data derived from new sensing systems and high-throughput screening technologies.
summary: We develop a symbolic regression framework for extracting the governing mathematical expressions from observed data. The evolutionary approach, faiGP, is designed to leverage the properties of a function algebra that have been encoded into a grammar, providing a theoretical guarantee of universal approximation and a way to minimize bloat. In this framework, the choice of operators of the grammar may be informed by a physical theory or symmetry considerations. Since there is currently no theory that can derive the 'constants of nature', an empirical investigation on extracting these coefficients from an evolutionary process is of methodological interest. We quantify the impact of different types of regularizers, including a diversity metric adapted from studies of the transcriptome and a complexity measure, on the performance of the framework. Our implementation, which leverages neural networks and a genetic programmer, generates non-trivial symbolically equivalent expressions ("Ramanujan expressions") or approximations with potentially interesting numerical applications. To illustrate the framework, a model of ligand-receptor binding kinetics, including an account of gene regulation by transcription factors, and a model of the regulatory range of the cistrome from omics data are presented. This study has important implications on the development of data-driven methodologies for the discovery of governing equations in experimental data derived from new sensing systems and high-throughput screening technologies.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一个符号回归框架，用于从观测数据中提取控制数学表达式。进化方法 faiGP 旨在利用已编码到语法中的函数代数的属性，提供通用逼近的理论保证和最小化膨胀的方法。在这个框架中，文法运算符的选择可以通过物理理论或对称性考虑来告知。由于目前没有理论可以推导出“自然常数”，因此从进化过程中提取这些系数的实证研究具有方法论意义。我们量化了不同类型的正则化器对框架性能的影响，包括根据转录组研究改编的多样性度量和复杂性度量。我们的实现利用神经网络和遗传程序员，生成重要的符号等价表达式（“拉马努金表达式”）或具有潜在有趣的数值应用的近似值。为了说明该框架，提出了配体-受体结合动力学模型，包括转录因子对基因调控的解释，以及来自组学数据的顺反子调控范围的模型。这项研究对数据驱动方法的开发具有重要意义，该方法可在新传感系统和高通量筛选技术得出的实验数据中发现控制方程。

AI.tldr: 开发一种结合神经网络与遗传编程的符号回归框架，用于从观测数据中提取数学方程。
AI.motivation: 现有理论无法推导自然常数，需通过进化方法提取参数；需评估正则化方法对框架性能的影响，推动数据驱动方程发现方法的发展。
AI.method: 设计faiGP框架，利用语法约束的函数代数减少冗余，结合神经网络与遗传编程，引入多样性度量和复杂度作为正则化手段。
AI.result: 生成具有潜在应用价值的符号表达式（如Ramanujan表达式），并成功应用于配体-受体动力学及基因调控模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实验数据中支配方程的发现提供了有效工具，尤其适用于新型传感系统和高通量筛选技术产生的数据。

authors_text: Roxana Daneshjou,Kailas Vodrahalli,Roberto A Novoa,Melissa Jenkins,Weixin Liang,Veronica Rotemberg,Justin Ko,Susan M Swetter,Elizabeth E Bailey,Olivier Gevaert,Pritam Mukherjee,Michelle Phung,Kiana Yekrang,Bradley Fong,Rachna Sahasrabudhe,Johan A. C. Allerup,Utako Okata-Karigane,James Zou,Albert Chiou
title: Disparities in Dermatology AI Performance on a Diverse, Curated Clinical Image Set
title_zh: 皮肤科人工智能在多样化、精心策划的临床图像集上的表现差异
abstract: Access to dermatological care is a major issue, with an estimated 3 billion people lacking access to care globally. Artificial intelligence (AI) may aid in triaging skin diseases. However, most AI models have not been rigorously assessed on images of diverse skin tones or uncommon diseases. To ascertain potential biases in algorithm performance in this context, we curated the Diverse Dermatology Images (DDI) dataset-the first publicly available, expertly curated, and pathologically confirmed image dataset with diverse skin tones. Using this dataset of 656 images, we show that state-of-the-art dermatology AI models perform substantially worse on DDI, with receiver operator curve area under the curve (ROC-AUC) dropping by 27-36 percent compared to the models' original test results. All the models performed worse on dark skin tones and uncommon diseases, which are represented in the DDI dataset. Additionally, we find that dermatologists, who typically provide visual labels for AI training and test datasets, also perform worse on images of dark skin tones and uncommon diseases compared to ground truth biopsy annotations. Finally, fine-tuning AI models on the well-characterized and diverse DDI images closed the performance gap between light and dark skin tones. Moreover, algorithms fine-tuned on diverse skin tones outperformed dermatologists on identifying malignancy on images of dark skin tones. Our findings identify important weaknesses and biases in dermatology AI that need to be addressed to ensure reliable application to diverse patients and diseases.
summary: Access to dermatological care is a major issue, with an estimated 3 billion people lacking access to care globally. Artificial intelligence (AI) may aid in triaging skin diseases. However, most AI models have not been rigorously assessed on images of diverse skin tones or uncommon diseases. To ascertain potential biases in algorithm performance in this context, we curated the Diverse Dermatology Images (DDI) dataset-the first publicly available, expertly curated, and pathologically confirmed image dataset with diverse skin tones. Using this dataset of 656 images, we show that state-of-the-art dermatology AI models perform substantially worse on DDI, with receiver operator curve area under the curve (ROC-AUC) dropping by 27-36 percent compared to the models' original test results. All the models performed worse on dark skin tones and uncommon diseases, which are represented in the DDI dataset. Additionally, we find that dermatologists, who typically provide visual labels for AI training and test datasets, also perform worse on images of dark skin tones and uncommon diseases compared to ground truth biopsy annotations. Finally, fine-tuning AI models on the well-characterized and diverse DDI images closed the performance gap between light and dark skin tones. Moreover, algorithms fine-tuned on diverse skin tones outperformed dermatologists on identifying malignancy on images of dark skin tones. Our findings identify important weaknesses and biases in dermatology AI that need to be addressed to ensure reliable application to diverse patients and diseases.
abstract_zh: 获得皮肤科护理是一个主要问题，全球估计有 30 亿人无法获得护理。人工智能 (AI) 可能有助于对皮肤病进行分类。然而，大多数人工智能模型尚未对不同肤色或罕见疾病的图像进行严格评估。为了确定这种情况下算法性能的潜在偏差，我们策划了多样化皮肤病学图像 (DDI) 数据集，这是第一个公开可用、经过专业策划且经过病理学确认的具有不同肤色的图像数据集。使用包含 656 张图像的数据集，我们发现最先进的皮肤病学 AI 模型在 DDI 上的表现要差得多，与模型的原始测试结果相比，受试者工作曲线下面积 (ROC-AUC) 下降了 27-36%。所有模型在深色肤色和罕见疾病方面的表现都较差，这些都在 DDI 数据集中体现。此外，我们发现，与地面真实活检注释相比，通常为人工智能训练和测试数据集提供视觉标签的皮肤科医生在深色肤色和罕见疾病图像上的表现也较差。最后，在特征鲜明且多样化的 DDI 图像上微调 AI 模型，缩小了浅肤色和深色肤色之间的性能差距。此外，针对不同肤色进行微调的算法在识别深色肤色图像上的恶性肿瘤方面优于皮肤科医生。我们的研究结果确定了皮肤病学人工智能的重要弱点和偏见，需要解决这些弱点和偏见，以确保可靠地应用于不同的患者和疾病。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了皮肤病人工智能模型在多样化临床图像数据集上的性能差异，揭示了模型在不同肤色和罕见疾病上的偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 全球30亿人缺乏皮肤病诊疗资源，现有AI模型未充分验证其在多样化肤色和罕见疾病上的可靠性，可能导致算法偏见。
AI.method: 构建首个公开的、专家标注的多样化皮肤病图像数据集（DDI，含656张图像），测试主流AI模型性能，并对比皮肤科医生诊断表现。
AI.result: AI模型在DDI数据集上ROC-AUC值下降27-36%，对深色肤色和罕见疾病表现更差；细调模型后肤色性能差距缩小，且在深色皮肤恶性肿瘤识别上超越皮肤科医生。
AI.conclusion: 当前皮肤病AI存在显著偏见，需通过多样化数据集训练以提升公平性，确保对不同人群的诊疗可靠性。

search_text: Disparities in Dermatology AI Performance on a Diverse, Curated Clinical Image Set 皮肤科人工智能在多样化、精心策划的临床图像集上的表现差异 Access to dermatological care is a major issue, with an estimated 3 billion people lacking access to care globally. Artificial intelligence (AI) may aid in triaging skin diseases. However, most AI models have not been rigorously assessed on images of diverse skin tones or uncommon diseases. To ascertain potential biases in algorithm performance in this context, we curated the Diverse Dermatology Images (DDI) dataset-the first publicly available, expertly curated, and pathologically confirmed image dataset with diverse skin tones. Using this dataset of 656 images, we show that state-of-the-art dermatology AI models perform substantially worse on DDI, with receiver operator curve area under the curve (ROC-AUC) dropping by 27-36 percent compared to the models' original test results. All the models performed worse on dark skin tones and uncommon diseases, which are represented in the DDI dataset. Additionally, we find that dermatologists, who typically provide visual labels for AI training and test datasets, also perform worse on images of dark skin tones and uncommon diseases compared to ground truth biopsy annotations. Finally, fine-tuning AI models on the well-characterized and diverse DDI images closed the performance gap between light and dark skin tones. Moreover, algorithms fine-tuned on diverse skin tones outperformed dermatologists on identifying malignancy on images of dark skin tones. Our findings identify important weaknesses and biases in dermatology AI that need to be addressed to ensure reliable application to diverse patients and diseases. 获得皮肤科护理是一个主要问题，全球估计有 30 亿人无法获得护理。人工智能 (AI) 可能有助于对皮肤病进行分类。然而，大多数人工智能模型尚未对不同肤色或罕见疾病的图像进行严格评估。为了确定这种情况下算法性能的潜在偏差，我们策划了多样化皮肤病学图像 (DDI) 数据集，这是第一个公开可用、经过专业策划且经过病理学确认的具有不同肤色的图像数据集。使用包含 656 张图像的数据集，我们发现最先进的皮肤病学 AI 模型在 DDI 上的表现要差得多，与模型的原始测试结果相比，受试者工作曲线下面积 (ROC-AUC) 下降了 27-36%。所有模型在深色肤色和罕见疾病方面的表现都较差，这些都在 DDI 数据集中体现。此外，我们发现，与地面真实活检注释相比，通常为人工智能训练和测试数据集提供视觉标签的皮肤科医生在深色肤色和罕见疾病图像上的表现也较差。最后，在特征鲜明且多样化的 DDI 图像上微调 AI 模型，缩小了浅肤色和深色肤色之间的性能差距。此外，针对不同肤色进行微调的算法在识别深色肤色图像上的恶性肿瘤方面优于皮肤科医生。我们的研究结果确定了皮肤病学人工智能的重要弱点和偏见，需要解决这些弱点和偏见，以确保可靠地应用于不同的患者和疾病。 该论文评估了皮肤病人工智能模型在多样化临床图像数据集上的性能差异，揭示了模型在不同肤色和罕见疾病上的偏差问题。 Roxana Daneshjou,Kailas Vodrahalli,Roberto A Novoa,Melissa Jenkins,Weixin Liang,Veronica Rotemberg,Justin Ko,Susan M Swetter,Elizabeth E Bailey,Olivier Gevaert,Pritam Mukherjee,Michelle Phung,Kiana Yekrang,Bradley Fong,Rachna Sahasrabudhe,Johan A. authors_text: Wenbo Sun,Raed Al Kontar,Judy Jin,Tzyy-Shuh Chang
title: A Continual Learning Framework for Adaptive Defect Classification and Inspection
title_zh: 自适应缺陷分类和检查的持续学习框架
abstract: Machine-vision-based defect classification techniques have been widely adopted for automatic quality inspection in manufacturing processes. This article describes a general framework for classifying defects from high volume data batches with efficient inspection of unlabelled samples. The concept is to construct a detector to identify new defect types, send them to the inspection station for labelling, and dynamically update the classifier in an efficient manner that reduces both storage and computational needs imposed by data samples of previously observed batches. Both a simulation study on image classification and a case study on surface defect detection via 3D point clouds are performed to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Machine-vision-based defect classification techniques have been widely adopted for automatic quality inspection in manufacturing processes. This article describes a general framework for classifying defects from high volume data batches with efficient inspection of unlabelled samples. The concept is to construct a detector to identify new defect types, send them to the inspection station for labelling, and dynamically update the classifier in an efficient manner that reduces both storage and computational needs imposed by data samples of previously observed batches. Both a simulation study on image classification and a case study on surface defect detection via 3D point clouds are performed to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 基于机器视觉的缺陷分类技术已广泛应用于制造过程中的自动质量检测。本文描述了一个通用框架，用于对大批量数据批次中的缺陷进行分类，并有效检查未标记的样本。其概念是构建一个检测器来识别新的缺陷类型，将它们发送到检查站进行标记，并以有效的方式动态更新分类器，从而减少先前观察批次的数据样本所带来的存储和计算需求。通过图像分类的仿真研究和通过 3D 点云进行表面缺陷检测的案例研究，证明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种持续学习框架，用于高效处理高体积数据批次中的缺陷分类与检测任务，通过动态更新分类器减少存储和计算需求。
AI.motivation: 现有缺陷分类方法在处理未标记样本和新缺陷类型时效率不足，导致存储与计算资源消耗大，需更适应动态数据的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建缺陷检测器识别新缺陷类型，通过标记新样本并动态更新分类器，结合模拟研究与3D点云案例验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 模拟实验和实际案例表明，该框架能有效减少存储与计算需求，同时保持对新缺陷类型的高检测与分类精度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的持续学习框架为制造过程中的自适应缺陷检测提供了高效且可扩展的解决方案，适用于动态数据环境。

authors_text: Edoardo Mello Rella,Ajad Chhatkuli,Yun Liu,Ender Konukoglu,Luc Van Gool
title: Zero Pixel Directional Boundary by Vector Transform
title_zh: 通过矢量变换实现零像素方向边界
comment: Published at the Tenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2022)
comments: Published at the Tenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2022)
abstract: Boundaries are among the primary visual cues used by human and computer vision systems. One of the key problems in boundary detection is the label representation, which typically leads to class imbalance and, as a consequence, to thick boundaries that require non-differential post-processing steps to be thinned. In this paper, we re-interpret boundaries as 1-D surfaces and formulate a one-to-one vector transform function that allows for training of boundary prediction completely avoiding the class imbalance issue. Specifically, we define the boundary representation at any point as the unit vector pointing to the closest boundary surface. Our problem formulation leads to the estimation of direction as well as richer contextual information of the boundary, and, if desired, the availability of zero-pixel thin boundaries also at training time. Our method uses no hyper-parameter in the training loss and a fixed stable hyper-parameter at inference. We provide theoretical justification/discussions of the vector transform representation. We evaluate the proposed loss method using a standard architecture and show the excellent performance over other losses and representations on several datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/edomel/BoundaryVT.
summary: Boundaries are among the primary visual cues used by human and computer vision systems. One of the key problems in boundary detection is the label representation, which typically leads to class imbalance and, as a consequence, to thick boundaries that require non-differential post-processing steps to be thinned. In this paper, we re-interpret boundaries as 1-D surfaces and formulate a one-to-one vector transform function that allows for training of boundary prediction completely avoiding the class imbalance issue. Specifically, we define the boundary representation at any point as the unit vector pointing to the closest boundary surface. Our problem formulation leads to the estimation of direction as well as richer contextual information of the boundary, and, if desired, the availability of zero-pixel thin boundaries also at training time. Our method uses no hyper-parameter in the training loss and a fixed stable hyper-parameter at inference. We provide theoretical justification/discussions of the vector transform representation. We evaluate the proposed loss method using a standard architecture and show the excellent performance over other losses and representations on several datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/edomel/BoundaryVT.
abstract_zh: 边界是人类和计算机视觉系统使用的主要视觉线索之一。边界检测的关键问题之一是标签表示，这通常会导致类别不平衡，从而导致厚边界，需要非差分后处理步骤来细化。在本文中，我们将边界重新解释为一维表面，并制定了一对一的向量变换函数，该函数允许边界预测的训练，完全避免类不平衡问题。具体来说，我们将任意点的边界表示定义为指向最近边界表面的单位向量。我们的问题表述导致了方向的估计以及边界的更丰富的上下文信息，并且如果需要的话，在训练时也可以使用零像素薄边界。我们的方法在训练损失中不使用超参数，在推理时使用固定的稳定超参数。我们提供矢量变换表示的理论论证/讨论。我们使用标准架构评估所提出的损失方法，并在多个数据集上展示了优于其他损失和表示的优异性能。代码可在 https://github.com/edomel/BoundaryVT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于向量变换的边界检测方法，通过将边界表示为1-D曲面并定义单位向量指向最近边界表面，解决传统边界检测中的类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统边界检测方法因类别不平衡导致边界过厚且需非微分后处理，本文旨在通过重新定义边界表示方式，实现更精确的零像素级薄边界检测。
AI.method: 定义边界点的单位向量表示，构建一对一的向量变换函数，无需训练损失超参数，推理时使用固定超参数，理论分析支持该表示方法。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证了该损失函数的优越性，相比其他方法表现更优，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 向量变换表示有效缓解类别不平衡问题，实现训练阶段即可获得零像素薄边界，无需后处理，具有重要应用价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于向量变换的边界检测方法，通过将边界表示为1-D曲面并定义单位向量指向最近边界表面，解决传统边界检测中的类别不平衡问题。
ai_content.motivation: 传统边界检测方法因类别不平衡导致边界过厚且需非微分后处理，本文旨在通过重新定义边界表示方式，实现更精确的零像素级薄边界检测。

search_text: Zero Pixel Directional Boundary by Vector Transform 通过矢量变换实现零像素方向边界 Boundaries are among the primary visual cues used by human and computer vision systems. One of the key problems in boundary detection is the label representation, which typically leads to class imbalance and, as a consequence, to thick boundaries that require non-differential post-processing steps to be thinned. In this paper, we re-interpret boundaries as 1-D surfaces and formulate a one-to-one vector transform function that allows for training of boundary prediction completely avoiding the class imbalance issue. Specifically, we define the boundary representation at any point as the unit vector pointing to the closest boundary surface. Our problem formulation leads to the estimation of direction as well as richer contextual information of the boundary, and, if desired, the availability of zero-pixel thin boundaries also at training time. Our method uses no hyper-parameter in the training loss and a fixed stable hyper-parameter at inference. We provide theoretical justification/discussions of the vector transform representation. We evaluate the proposed loss method using a standard architecture and show the excellent performance over other losses and representations on several datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/edomel/BoundaryVT. 边界是人类和计算机视觉系统使用的主要视觉线索之一。边界检测的关键问题之一是标签表示，这通常会导致类别不平衡，从而导致厚边界，需要非差分后处理步骤来细化。在本文中，我们将边界重新解释为一维表面，并制定了一对一的向量变换函数，该函数允许边界预测的训练，完全避免类不平衡问题。具体来说，我们将任意点的边界表示定义为指向最近边界表面的单位向量。我们的问题表述导致了方向的估计以及边界的更丰富的上下文信息，并且如果需要的话，在训练时也可以使用零像素薄边界。我们的方法在训练损失中不使用超参数，在推理时使用固定的稳定超参数。我们提供矢量变换表示的理论论证/讨论。我们使用标准架构评估所提出的损失方法，并在多个数据集上展示了优于其他损失和表示的优异性能。代码可在 https://github.com/edomel/BoundaryVT 获取。 本文提出了一种基于向量变换的边界检测方法，通过将边界表示为1-D曲面并定义单位向量指向最近边界表面，解决传统边界检测中的类别不平衡问题。 Edoardo Mello Rella,Ajad Chhatkuli,Yun Liu,Ender Konukoglu,Luc Van Gool cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: R. James Cotton
title: PosePipe: Open-Source Human Pose Estimation Pipeline for Clinical Research
title_zh: PosePipe：用于临床研究的开源人体姿势估计管道
abstract: There has been significant progress in machine learning algorithms for human pose estimation that may provide immense value in rehabilitation and movement sciences. However, there remain several challenges to routine use of these tools for clinical practice and translational research, including: 1) high technical barrier to entry, 2) rapidly evolving space of algorithms, 3) challenging algorithmic interdependencies, and 4) complex data management requirements between these components. To mitigate these barriers, we developed a human pose estimation pipeline that facilitates running state-of-the-art algorithms on data acquired in clinical context. Our system allows for running different implementations of several classes of algorithms and handles their interdependencies easily. These algorithm classes include subject identification and tracking, 2D keypoint detection, 3D joint location estimation, and estimating the pose of body models. The system uses a database to manage videos, intermediate analyses, and data for computations at each stage. It also provides tools for data visualization, including generating video overlays that also obscure faces to enhance privacy. Our goal in this work is not to train new algorithms, but to advance the use of cutting-edge human pose estimation algorithms for clinical and translation research. We show that this tool facilitates analyzing large numbers of videos of human movement ranging from gait laboratories analyses, to clinic and therapy visits, to people in the community. We also highlight limitations of these algorithms when applied to clinical populations in a rehabilitation setting.

abstract_zh: 用于人体姿势估计的机器学习算法已经取得了重大进展，这可能为康复和运动科学提供巨大的价值。然而，在临床实践和转化研究中常规使用这些工具仍然存在一些挑战，包括：1）进入技术门槛高，2）快速发展的算法空间，3）具有挑战性的算法相互依赖性，以及4）这些组件之间复杂的数据管理要求。为了克服这些障碍，我们开发了一个人体姿势估计管道，有助于对临床环境中获取的数据运行最先进的算法。我们的系统允许运行几类算法的不同实现，并轻松处理它们的相互依赖性。这些算法类别包括主体识别和跟踪、2D 关键点检测、3D 关节位置估计以及身体模型姿态估计。该系统使用数据库来管理视频、中间分析和每个阶段的计算数据。它还提供数据可视化工具，包括生成视频叠加，这些视频叠加也可以遮挡面部以增强隐私。我们这项工作的目标不是训练新算法，而是推进尖端人体姿势估计算法在临床和翻译研究中的使用。我们表明，该工具有助于分析大量人类运动视频，从步态实验室分析到诊所和治疗访问，再到社区中的人们。我们还强调了这些算法在应用于康复环境中的临床人群时的局限性。

AI.tldr: 开发用于临床研究的开源人体姿态估计流程系统PosePipe，解决现有算法在临床应用中的技术障碍。
AI.motivation: 现有姿态估计算法在临床实践中面临技术门槛高、算法迭代快、依赖关系复杂及数据管理困难等问题，需开发统一工具促进其应用。
AI.method: 构建包含主体跟踪、2D/3D关键点检测等模块的开源管道系统，通过数据库管理数据流，提供隐私保护的可视化工具，支持多种算法灵活集成。
AI.result: 系统可处理临床场景下的多类型运动视频数据，验证了工具在步态分析、治疗场景等应用的可行性，同时揭示算法在临床人群中的性能局限性。
AI.conclusion: PosePipe为临床研究提供了标准化姿态估计框架，但需进一步优化算法适应性以提升临床场景下的准确性和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Hua Shen,Tongshuang Wu,Wenbo Guo,Ting-Hao 'Kenneth' Huang
title: Are Shortest Rationales the Best Explanations for Human Understanding?
title_zh: 最短的基本原理是人类理解的最佳解释吗？
comment: To appear in ACL 2022 main conference
comments: To appear in ACL 2022 main conference
abstract: Existing self-explaining models typically favor extracting the shortest possible rationales - snippets of an input text "responsible for" corresponding output - to explain the model prediction, with the assumption that shorter rationales are more intuitive to humans. However, this assumption has yet to be validated. Is the shortest rationale indeed the most human-understandable? To answer this question, we design a self-explaining model, LimitedInk, which allows users to extract rationales at any target length. Compared to existing baselines, LimitedInk achieves compatible end-task performance and human-annotated rationale agreement, making it a suitable representation of the recent class of self-explaining models. We use LimitedInk to conduct a user study on the impact of rationale length, where we ask human judges to predict the sentiment label of documents based only on LimitedInk-generated rationales with different lengths. We show rationales that are too short do not help humans predict labels better than randomly masked text, suggesting the need for more careful design of the best human rationales.
summary: Existing self-explaining models typically favor extracting the shortest possible rationales - snippets of an input text "responsible for" corresponding output - to explain the model prediction, with the assumption that shorter rationales are more intuitive to humans. However, this assumption has yet to be validated. Is the shortest rationale indeed the most human-understandable? To answer this question, we design a self-explaining model, LimitedInk, which allows users to extract rationales at any target length. Compared to existing baselines, LimitedInk achieves compatible end-task performance and human-annotated rationale agreement, making it a suitable representation of the recent class of self-explaining models. We use LimitedInk to conduct a user study on the impact of rationale length, where we ask human judges to predict the sentiment label of documents based only on LimitedInk-generated rationales with different lengths. We show rationales that are too short do not help humans predict labels better than randomly masked text, suggesting the need for more careful design of the best human rationales.
abstract_zh: 现有的自解释模型通常倾向于提取尽可能短的基本原理（“负责”相应输出的输入文本片段）来解释模型预测，并假设较短的基本原理对人类来说更直观。然而，这一假设尚未得到验证。最短的基本原理确实是最容易被人类理解的吗？为了回答这个问题，我们设计了一个不言自明的模型 LimitedInk，它允许用户以任何目标长度提取基本原理。与现有基线相比，LimitedInk 实现了兼容的最终任务性能和人工注释的基本原理一致性，使其成为最近一类自解释模型的合适代表。我们使用 LimitedInk 对理由长度的影响进行用户研究，要求人类法官仅根据 LimitedInk 生成的不同长度的理由来预测文档的情感标签。我们展示的基本原理太短并不能帮助人类比随机屏蔽的文本更好地预测标签，这表明需要更仔细地设计最佳的人类基本原理。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了最短的推理依据是否是人类最易理解的解释，并通过实验验证了这一假设。
AI.motivation: 现有自解释模型默认最短的推理依据更符合人类直觉，但这一假设尚未经过验证，需通过实证研究确认其有效性。
AI.method: 开发了LimitedInk模型，允许生成不同长度的推理依据，并通过用户研究让人类根据不同长度的推理依据预测文本情感标签。
AI.result: 实验表明过短的推理依据与随机遮蔽文本在帮助人类预测标签方面无显著差异，说明需更谨慎设计推理依据长度。
AI.conclusion: 最短推理依据未必最优，需结合人类理解需求设计更合适的解释长度以提升可解释性效果。

result: 实验表明过短的推理依据与随机遮蔽文本在帮助人类预测标签方面无显著差异，说明需更谨慎设计推理依据长度。
conclusion: 最短推理依据未必最优，需结合人类理解需求设计更合适的解释长度以提升可解释性效果。
search_text: Are Shortest Rationales the Best Explanations for Human Understanding? 最短的基本原理是人类理解的最佳解释吗？ Existing self-explaining models typically favor extracting the shortest possible rationales - snippets of an input text "responsible for" corresponding output - to explain the model prediction, with the assumption that shorter rationales are more intuitive to humans. However, this assumption has yet to be validated. Is the shortest rationale indeed the most human-understandable? To answer this question, we design a self-explaining model, LimitedInk, which allows users to extract rationales at any target length. Compared to existing baselines, LimitedInk achieves compatible end-task performance and human-annotated rationale agreement, making it a suitable representation of the recent class of self-explaining models. We use LimitedInk to conduct a user study on the impact of rationale length, where we ask human judges to predict the sentiment label of documents based only on LimitedInk-generated rationales with different lengths. We show rationales that are too short do not help humans predict labels better than randomly masked text, suggesting the need for more careful design of the best human rationales. 现有的自解释模型通常倾向于提取尽可能短的基本原理（“负责”相应输出的输入文本片段）来解释模型预测，并假设较短的基本原理对人类来说更直观。然而，这一假设尚未得到验证。最短的基本原理确实是最容易被人类理解的吗？为了回答这个问题，我们设计了一个不言自明的模型 LimitedInk，它允许用户以任何目标长度提取基本原理。与现有基线相比，LimitedInk 实现了兼容的最终任务性能和人工注释的基本原理一致性，使其成为最近一类自解释模型的合适代表。我们使用 LimitedInk 对理由长度的影响进行用户研究，要求人类法官仅根据 LimitedInk 生成的不同长度的理由来预测文档的情感标签。我们展示的基本原理太短并不能帮助人类比随机屏蔽的文本更好地预测标签，这表明需要更仔细地设计最佳的人类基本原理。 本文探讨了最短的推理依据是否是人类最易理解的解释，并通过实验验证了这一假设。 Hua Shen,Tongshuang Wu,Wenbo Guo,Ting-Hao 'Kenneth' Huang cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Pritom Saha Akash,Kevin Chen-Chuan Chang
title: Exploring Variational Graph Auto-Encoders for Extract Class Refactoring Recommendation
title_zh: 探索用于提取类重构建议的变分图自动编码器
abstract: The code smell is a sign of design and development flaws in a software system that reduces the reusability and maintainability of the system. Refactoring is done as an ongoing practice to remove the code smell from the program code. Among different code smells, the God class or Blob is one of the most common code smells. A god class contains too many responsibilities, violating object-oriented programming design's low coupling and high cohesiveness principles. This paper proposes an automatic approach to extracting a God class into multiple smaller classes with more specific responsibilities. To do this, we first construct a graph of methods (as nodes) for the concerning god class. The edge between any two methods is determined by their structural similarity, and the feature for each method is initialized using different semantic representation methods. Then, the variational graph auto-encoder is used to learn a vector representation for each method. Finally, the learned vectors are used to cluster methods into different groups to be recommended as refactored classes. We assessed the proposed framework using three different class cohesion metrics on sixteen actual God Classes collected from two well-known open-source systems. We also conducted a comparative study of our approach with a similar existing approach and found that the proposed approach generated better results for almost all the God Classes used in the experiment.
summary: The code smell is a sign of design and development flaws in a software system that reduces the reusability and maintainability of the system. Refactoring is done as an ongoing practice to remove the code smell from the program code. Among different code smells, the God class or Blob is one of the most common code smells. A god class contains too many responsibilities, violating object-oriented programming design's low coupling and high cohesiveness principles. This paper proposes an automatic approach to extracting a God class into multiple smaller classes with more specific responsibilities. To do this, we first construct a graph of methods (as nodes) for the concerning god class. The edge between any two methods is determined by their structural similarity, and the feature for each method is initialized using different semantic representation methods. Then, the variational graph auto-encoder is used to learn a vector representation for each method. Finally, the learned vectors are used to cluster methods into different groups to be recommended as refactored classes. We assessed the proposed framework using three different class cohesion metrics on sixteen actual God Classes collected from two well-known open-source systems. We also conducted a comparative study of our approach with a similar existing approach and found that the proposed approach generated better results for almost all the God Classes used in the experiment.
abstract_zh: 代码气味是软件系统中设计和开发缺陷的标志，会降低系统的可重用性和可维护性。重构是一种持续的实践，旨在消除程序代码中的代码味道。在不同的代码异味中，God 类或 Blob 是最常见的代码异味之一。神类包含太多职责，违反了面向对象编程设计的低耦合、高内聚原则。本文提出了一种自动方法，将上帝类提取为多个具有更具体职责的较小类。为此，我们首先为相关的上帝类构建一个方法图（作为节点）。任意两种方法之间的边缘由它们的结构相似性决定，并且每种方法的特征使用不同的语义表示方法来初始化。然后，使用变分图自动编码器来学习每种方法的向量表示。最后，学习到的向量用于将方法聚类到不同的组中，以推荐为重构类。我们使用从两个知名开源系统收集的十六个实际上帝类的三种不同类凝聚力指标来评估所提出的框架。我们还对我们的方法与类似的现有方法进行了比较研究，发现所提出的方法对于实验中使用的几乎所有上帝类别都产生了更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分图自动编码器的自动化方法，用于识别并拆分软件中的God类（大泥球）以进行类提取重构。
AI.motivation: God类违反低耦合高内聚原则，影响系统可维护性。现有方法难以有效识别和拆分God类，需更精准的自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 构建方法调用图，以结构相似性定义边；采用语义表示初始化节点特征，利用变分图自动编码器学习向量表示，最后通过聚类生成重构类建议。
AI.result: 在16个实际God类上使用三种凝聚力度量评估，相较现有方法在多数案例中取得更优的重构效果。
AI.conclusion: 变分图自动编码器能有效捕捉方法间语义关系，生成高质量重构建议，未来可优化模型或扩展至其他代码异味检测场景。

authors_text: Olivier J. Hénaff,Skanda Koppula,Evan Shelhamer,Daniel Zoran,Andrew Jaegle,Andrew Zisserman,João Carreira,Relja Arandjelović
title: Object discovery and representation networks
title_zh: 对象发现和表示网络
abstract: The promise of self-supervised learning (SSL) is to leverage large amounts of unlabeled data to solve complex tasks. While there has been excellent progress with simple, image-level learning, recent methods have shown the advantage of including knowledge of image structure. However, by introducing hand-crafted image segmentations to define regions of interest, or specialized augmentation strategies, these methods sacrifice the simplicity and generality that makes SSL so powerful. Instead, we propose a self-supervised learning paradigm that discovers this image structure by itself. Our method, Odin, couples object discovery and representation networks to discover meaningful image segmentations without any supervision. The resulting learning paradigm is simpler, less brittle, and more general, and achieves state-of-the-art transfer learning results for object detection and instance segmentation on COCO, and semantic segmentation on PASCAL and Cityscapes, while strongly surpassing supervised pre-training for video segmentation on DAVIS.
summary: The promise of self-supervised learning (SSL) is to leverage large amounts of unlabeled data to solve complex tasks. While there has been excellent progress with simple, image-level learning, recent methods have shown the advantage of including knowledge of image structure. However, by introducing hand-crafted image segmentations to define regions of interest, or specialized augmentation strategies, these methods sacrifice the simplicity and generality that makes SSL so powerful. Instead, we propose a self-supervised learning paradigm that discovers this image structure by itself. Our method, Odin, couples object discovery and representation networks to discover meaningful image segmentations without any supervision. The resulting learning paradigm is simpler, less brittle, and more general, and achieves state-of-the-art transfer learning results for object detection and instance segmentation on COCO, and semantic segmentation on PASCAL and Cityscapes, while strongly surpassing supervised pre-training for video segmentation on DAVIS.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）的承诺是利用大量未标记的数据来解决复杂的任务。虽然简单的图像级学习取得了巨大的进步，但最近的方法已经显示出包含图像结构知识的优势。然而，通过引入手工制作的图像分割来定义感兴趣区域或专门的增强策略，这些方法牺牲了 SSL 如此强大的简单性和通用性。相反，我们提出了一种自我监督的学习范式，可以自行发现这种图像结构。我们的方法 Odin 将对象发现和表示网络结合起来，在没有任何监督的情况下发现有意义的图像分割。由此产生的学习范式更简单、更不易损坏、更通用，并且在 COCO 上的对象检测和实例分割以及 PASCAL 和 Cityscapes 上的语义分割上实现了最先进的迁移学习结果，同时远远超过了 DAVIS 上的视频分割的有监督预训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需监督的自监督学习框架Odin，通过结合对象发现和表示网络自动学习图像结构，用于目标检测、实例分割和语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法依赖手工设计的图像分割或特定增强策略，导致方法复杂且缺乏通用性，而本文旨在开发一种更简单、通用的自监督学习范式。
AI.method: 提出Odin方法，通过耦合对象发现网络和表示网络，在无监督条件下自动发现图像中的有意义分割区域，无需人工标注或复杂增强策略。
AI.result: 在COCO目标检测、PASCAL/Cityscapes语义分割及DAVIS视频分割任务中均达到SOTA性能，且优于监督预训练方法。
AI.conclusion: Odin验证了自监督学习自动发现图像结构的有效性，为通用视觉表征学习提供了简洁且鲁棒的新范式。

authors_text: Shuohang Wang,Yichong Xu,Yuwei Fang,Yang Liu,Siqi Sun,Ruochen Xu,Chenguang Zhu,Michael Zeng
title: Training Data is More Valuable than You Think: A Simple and Effective Method by Retrieving from Training Data
title_zh: 训练数据比你想象的更有价值：一种简单有效的从训练数据中检索的方法
abstract: Retrieval-based methods have been shown to be effective in NLP tasks via introducing external knowledge. However, the indexing and retrieving of large-scale corpora bring considerable computational cost. Surprisingly, we found that REtrieving from the traINing datA (REINA) only can lead to significant gains on multiple NLG and NLU tasks. We retrieve the labeled training instances most similar to the input text and then concatenate them with the input to feed into the model to generate the output. Experimental results show that this simple method can achieve significantly better performance on a variety of NLU and NLG tasks, including summarization, machine translation, language modeling, and question answering tasks. For instance, our proposed method achieved state-of-the-art results on XSum, BigPatent, and CommonsenseQA. Our code is released, https://github.com/microsoft/REINA .
summary: Retrieval-based methods have been shown to be effective in NLP tasks via introducing external knowledge. However, the indexing and retrieving of large-scale corpora bring considerable computational cost. Surprisingly, we found that REtrieving from the traINing datA (REINA) only can lead to significant gains on multiple NLG and NLU tasks. We retrieve the labeled training instances most similar to the input text and then concatenate them with the input to feed into the model to generate the output. Experimental results show that this simple method can achieve significantly better performance on a variety of NLU and NLG tasks, including summarization, machine translation, language modeling, and question answering tasks. For instance, our proposed method achieved state-of-the-art results on XSum, BigPatent, and CommonsenseQA. Our code is released, https://github.com/microsoft/REINA .
abstract_zh: 通过引入外部知识，基于检索的方法已被证明在 NLP 任务中是有效的。然而，大规模语料库的索引和检索带来了相当大的计算成本。令人惊讶的是，我们发现仅从训练数据中检索 (REINA) 就可以在多个 NLG 和 NLU 任务上带来显着的收益。我们检索与输入文本最相似的标记训练实例，然后将它们与输入连接起来以输入模型以生成输出。实验结果表明，这种简单的方法可以在各种 NLU 和 NLG 任务上取得显着更好的性能，包括摘要、机器翻译、语言建模和问答任务。例如，我们提出的方法在 XSum、BigPatent 和 CommonsenseQA 上取得了最先进的结果。我们的代码已发布，https://github.com/microsoft/REINA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过从训练数据中检索相关信息来提升自然语言处理任务性能的简单有效方法。
AI.motivation: 传统检索方法依赖外部知识库导致计算成本高昂，而训练数据本身未被充分利用，因此探索直接利用训练数据的检索方法。
AI.method: 通过检索与输入文本最相似的带标签训练样本，将其与输入拼接后输入模型生成输出。
AI.result: 在摘要生成、机器翻译、语言建模等任务中取得显著提升，XSum、BigPatent和CommonsenseQA等数据集达到SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: 训练数据检索方法在保持低计算成本的同时能有效提升模型性能，为NLP任务提供新思路。

authors_text: Maxime Oquab,Daniel Haziza,Ludovic Schwartz,Tao Xu,Katayoun Zand,Rui Wang,Peirong Liu,Camille Couprie
title: Efficient conditioned face animation using frontally-viewed embedding
title_zh: 使用前视嵌入的高效条件面部动画
abstract: As the quality of few shot facial animation from landmarks increases, new applications become possible, such as ultra low bandwidth video chat compression with a high degree of realism. However, there are some important challenges to tackle in order to improve the experience in real world conditions. In particular, the current approaches fail to represent profile views without distortions, while running in a low compute regime. We focus on this key problem by introducing a multi-frames embedding dubbed Frontalizer to improve profile views rendering. In addition to this core improvement, we explore the learning of a latent code conditioning generations along with landmarks to better convey facial expressions. Our dense models achieves 22% of improvement in perceptual quality and 73% reduction of landmark error over the first order model baseline on a subset of DFDC videos containing head movements. Declined with mobile architectures, our models outperform the previous state-of-the-art (improving perceptual quality by more than 16% and reducing landmark error by more than 47% on two datasets) while running on real time on iPhone 8 with very low bandwidth requirements.
summary: As the quality of few shot facial animation from landmarks increases, new applications become possible, such as ultra low bandwidth video chat compression with a high degree of realism. However, there are some important challenges to tackle in order to improve the experience in real world conditions. In particular, the current approaches fail to represent profile views without distortions, while running in a low compute regime. We focus on this key problem by introducing a multi-frames embedding dubbed Frontalizer to improve profile views rendering. In addition to this core improvement, we explore the learning of a latent code conditioning generations along with landmarks to better convey facial expressions. Our dense models achieves 22% of improvement in perceptual quality and 73% reduction of landmark error over the first order model baseline on a subset of DFDC videos containing head movements. Declined with mobile architectures, our models outperform the previous state-of-the-art (improving perceptual quality by more than 16% and reducing landmark error by more than 47% on two datasets) while running on real time on iPhone 8 with very low bandwidth requirements.
abstract_zh: 随着地标的少量面部动画质量的提高，新的应用成为可能，例如具有高度真实感的超低带宽视频聊天压缩。然而，为了改善现实世界条件下的体验，还有一些重要的挑战需要解决。特别是，当前的方法无法在低计算状态下运行时不失真地表示剖面视图。我们通过引入称为 Frontalizer 的多帧嵌入来改善剖面视图渲染来解决这个关键问题。除了这一核心改进之外，我们还探索了学习潜在代码调节世代以及地标，以更好地传达面部表情。我们的密集模型在包含头部运动的 DFDC 视频子集上，与一阶模型基线相比，感知质量提高了 22%，地标误差降低了 73%。随着移动架构的衰退，我们的模型超越了之前最先进的技术（在两个数据集上将感知质量提高了 16% 以上，并将地标误差降低了 47% 以上），同时在 iPhone 8 上实时运行，带宽要求非常低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于正面视图嵌入的高效条件化人脸动画方法，解决低计算环境下侧面视图失真问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在低计算设备上无法准确生成侧面视图人脸动画，导致真实感不足，限制了超低带宽视频通话等应用的落地。
AI.method: 引入多帧嵌入模块Frontalizer增强侧面视图渲染，并结合landmark与潜在码联合条件生成以提升表情表现力。
AI.result: 在DFDC数据集上感知质量提升22%、landmark误差降低73%，移动端模型在iPhone 8上实现实时运行且带宽需求极低。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了侧面视图失真问题，在保持高效性的同时显著提升动画质量，为移动设备实时应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Yinan He,Gengshi Huang,Siyu Chen,Jianing Teng,Wang Kun,Zhenfei Yin,Lu Sheng,Ziwei Liu,Yu Qiao,Jing Shao
title: X-Learner: Learning Cross Sources and Tasks for Universal Visual Representation
title_zh: X-Learner：学习跨源和任务以实现通用视觉表示
abstract: In computer vision, pre-training models based on largescale supervised learning have been proven effective over the past few years. However, existing works mostly focus on learning from individual task with single data source (e.g., ImageNet for classification or COCO for detection). This restricted form limits their generalizability and usability due to the lack of vast semantic information from various tasks and data sources. Here, we demonstrate that jointly learning from heterogeneous tasks and multiple data sources contributes to universal visual representation, leading to better transferring results of various downstream tasks. Thus, learning how to bridge the gaps among different tasks and data sources is the key, but it still remains an open question. In this work, we propose a representation learning framework called X-Learner, which learns the universal feature of multiple vision tasks supervised by various sources, with expansion and squeeze stage: 1) Expansion Stage: X-Learner learns the task-specific feature to alleviate task interference and enrich the representation by reconciliation layer. 2) Squeeze Stage: X-Learner condenses the model to a reasonable size and learns the universal and generalizable representation for various tasks transferring. Extensive experiments demonstrate that X-Learner achieves strong performance on different tasks without extra annotations, modalities and computational costs compared to existing representation learning methods. Notably, a single X-Learner model shows remarkable gains of 3.0%, 3.3% and 1.8% over current pretrained models on 12 downstream datasets for classification, object detection and semantic segmentation.
summary: In computer vision, pre-training models based on largescale supervised learning have been proven effective over the past few years. However, existing works mostly focus on learning from individual task with single data source (e.g., ImageNet for classification or COCO for detection). This restricted form limits their generalizability and usability due to the lack of vast semantic information from various tasks and data sources. Here, we demonstrate that jointly learning from heterogeneous tasks and multiple data sources contributes to universal visual representation, leading to better transferring results of various downstream tasks. Thus, learning how to bridge the gaps among different tasks and data sources is the key, but it still remains an open question. In this work, we propose a representation learning framework called X-Learner, which learns the universal feature of multiple vision tasks supervised by various sources, with expansion and squeeze stage: 1) Expansion Stage: X-Learner learns the task-specific feature to alleviate task interference and enrich the representation by reconciliation layer. 2) Squeeze Stage: X-Learner condenses the model to a reasonable size and learns the universal and generalizable representation for various tasks transferring. Extensive experiments demonstrate that X-Learner achieves strong performance on different tasks without extra annotations, modalities and computational costs compared to existing representation learning methods. Notably, a single X-Learner model shows remarkable gains of 3.0%, 3.3% and 1.8% over current pretrained models on 12 downstream datasets for classification, object detection and semantic segmentation.
abstract_zh: 在计算机视觉领域，基于大规模监督学习的预训练模型在过去几年中已被证明是有效的。然而，现有的工作主要集中于从单个数据源的单个任务中学习（例如，用于分类的 ImageNet 或用于检测的 COCO）。由于缺乏来自各种任务和数据源的大量语义信息，这种受限形式限制了它们的通用性和可用性。在这里，我们证明了从异构任务和多个数据源中联合学习有助于通用视觉表示，从而更好地传输各种下游任务的结果。因此，学习如何弥合不同任务和数据源之间的差距是关键，但这仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为 X-Learner 的表示学习框架，它学习由各种来源监督的多个视觉任务的通用特征，具有扩展和挤压阶段：1）扩展阶段：X-Learner 学习任务特定的特征以减轻任务干扰并通过协调层丰富表示。 2）压缩阶段：X-Learner将模型压缩到合理的大小，并学习各种任务转移的通用和可推广的表示。大量的实验表明，与现有的表示学习方法相比，X-Learner 在不同的任务上实现了强大的性能，而无需额外的注释、模式和计算成本。值得注意的是，单个 X-Learner 模型在分类、对象检测和语义分割方面比当前预训练模型在 12 个下游数据集上显示出 3.0%、3.3% 和 1.8% 的显着增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出X-Learner框架，通过跨异构任务和多数据源联合学习，实现通用视觉表示以提升下游任务迁移效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉预训练模型局限于单一任务和数据源，导致语义信息不足，泛化能力受限，需探索多任务多源协同学习方法。
AI.method: X-Learner包含扩展阶段（学习任务特定特征）和压缩阶段（生成通用表示），通过调解层缓解任务干扰并提升表征能力。
AI.result: X-Learner在12个下游数据集上分类、检测、分割任务分别提升3.0%/3.3%/1.8%，优于现有方法且无需额外标注或计算成本。
AI.conclusion: X-Learner有效桥接多任务多源差距，实现高效通用视觉表征，为跨域迁移学习提供新思路。

motivation: 现有视觉预训练模型局限于单一任务和数据源，导致语义信息不足，泛化能力受限，需探索多任务多源协同学习方法。
method: X-Learner包含扩展阶段（学习任务特定特征）和压缩阶段（生成通用表示），通过调解层缓解任务干扰并提升表征能力。
result: X-Learner在12个下游数据集上分类、检测、分割任务分别提升3.0%/3.3%/1.8%，优于现有方法且无需额外标注或计算成本。
conclusion: X-Learner有效桥接多任务多源差距，实现高效通用视觉表征，为跨域迁移学习提供新思路。
search_text: X-Learner: Learning Cross Sources and Tasks for Universal Visual Representation X-Learner：学习跨源和任务以实现通用视觉表示 In computer vision, pre-training models based on largescale supervised learning have been proven effective over the past few years. However, existing works mostly focus on learning from individual task with single data source (e.g., ImageNet for classification or COCO for detection). This restricted form limits their generalizability and usability due to the lack of vast semantic information from various tasks and data sources. Here, we demonstrate that jointly learning from heterogeneous tasks and multiple data sources contributes to universal visual representation, leading to better transferring results of various downstream tasks. Thus, learning how to bridge the gaps among different tasks and data sources is the key, but it still remains an open question. In this work, we propose a representation learning framework called X-Learner, which learns the universal feature of multiple vision tasks supervised by various sources, with expansion and squeeze stage: 1) Expansion Stage: X-Learner learns the task-specific feature to alleviate task interference and enrich the representation by reconciliation layer. 2) Squeeze Stage: X-Learner condenses the model to a reasonable size and learns the universal and generalizable representation for various tasks transferring. Extensive experiments demonstrate that X-Learner achieves strong performance on different tasks without extra annotations, modalities and computational costs compared to existing representation learning methods. Notably, a single X-Learner model shows remarkable gains of 3.0%, 3.3% and 1.8% over current pretrained models on 12 downstream datasets for classification, object detection and semantic segmentation. 在计算机视觉领域，基于大规模监督学习的预训练模型在过去几年中已被证明是有效的。然而，现有的工作主要集中于从单个数据源的单个任务中学习（例如，用于分类的 ImageNet 或用于检测的 COCO）。由于缺乏来自各种任务和数据源的大量语义信息，这种受限形式限制了它们的通用性和可用性。在这里，我们证明了从异构任务和多个数据源中联合学习有助于通用视觉表示，从而更好地传输各种下游任务的结果。因此，学习如何弥合不同任务和数据源之间的差距是关键，但这仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为 X-Learner 的表示学习框架，它学习由各种来源监督的多个视觉任务的通用特征，具有扩展和挤压阶段：1）扩展阶段：X-Learner 学习任务特定的特征以减轻任务干扰并通过协调层丰富表示。 2）压缩阶段：X-Learner将模型压缩到合理的大小，并学习各种任务转移的通用和可推广的表示。大量的实验表明，与现有的表示学习方法相比，X-Learner 在不同的任务上实现了强大的性能，而无需额外的注释、模式和计算成本。值得注意的是，单个 X-Learner 模型在分类、对象检测和语义分割方面比当前预训练模型在 12 个下游数据集上显示出 3.0%、3.3% 和 1.8% 的显着增益。 本文提出X-Learner框架，通过跨异构任务和多数据源联合学习，实现通用视觉表示以提升下游任务迁移效果。 Yinan He,Gengshi Huang,Siyu Chen,Jianing Teng,Wang Kun,Zhenfei Yin,Lu Sheng,Ziwei Liu,Yu Qiao,Jing Shao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Asra Aslam,Edward Curry
title: UnseenNet: Fast Training Detector for Any Unseen Concept
title_zh: UnseenNet：针对任何看不见的概念的快速训练检测器
abstract: Training of object detection models using less data is currently the focus of existing N-shot learning models in computer vision. Such methods use object-level labels and takes hours to train on unseen classes. There are many cases where we have large amount of image-level labels available for training but cannot be utilized by few shot object detection models for training. There is a need for a machine learning framework that can be used for training any unseen class and can become useful in real-time situations. In this paper, we proposed an "Unseen Class Detector" that can be trained within a very short time for any possible unseen class without bounding boxes with competitive accuracy. We build our approach on "Strong" and "Weak" baseline detectors, which we trained on existing object detection and image classification datasets, respectively. Unseen concepts are fine-tuned on the strong baseline detector using only image-level labels and further adapted by transferring the classifier-detector knowledge between baselines. We use semantic as well as visual similarities to identify the source class (i.e. Sheep) for the fine-tuning and adaptation of unseen class (i.e. Goat). Our model (UnseenNet) is trained on the ImageNet classification dataset for unseen classes and tested on an object detection dataset (OpenImages). UnseenNet improves the mean average precision (mAP) by 10% to 30% over existing baselines (semi-supervised and few-shot) of object detection on different unseen class splits. Moreover, training time of our model is <10 min for each unseen class. Qualitative results demonstrate that UnseenNet is suitable not only for few classes of Pascal VOC but for unseen classes of any dataset or web. Code is available at https://github.com/Asra-Aslam/UnseenNet.

abstract_zh: 使用较少数据训练目标检测模型是当前计算机视觉中现有 N-shot 学习模型的焦点。此类方法使用对象级标签，并且需要几个小时来训练看不见的类。在很多情况下，我们有大量的图像级标签可用于训练，但很少有镜头对象检测模型无法利用它们进行训练。需要一种机器学习框架，可以用于训练任何看不见的类，并且可以在实时情况下变得有用。在本文中，我们提出了一种“看不见的类检测器”，它可以在很短的时间内针对任何可能的看不见的类进行训练，而无需边界框，并且具有竞争性的准确性。我们在“强”和“弱”基线检测器上构建我们的方法，分别在现有的对象检测和图像分类数据集上进行训练。仅使用图像级标签在强基线检测器上对未见过的概念进行微调，并通过在基线之间传输分类器-检测器知识来进一步调整。我们使用语义和视觉相似性来识别源类（即绵羊），以便对未见过的类（即山羊）进行微调和适应。我们的模型 (UnseenNet) 在 ImageNet 分类数据集上针对未见过的类进行训练，并在对象检测数据集 (OpenImages) 上进行测试。与现有的不同不可见类分割上的目标检测基线（半监督和少样本）相比，UnseenNet 将平均精度 (mAP) 提高了 10% 到 30%。此外，对于每个未见过的类，我们模型的训练时间<10 分钟。定性结果表明，UnseenNet 不仅适用于 Pascal VOC 的少数类别，而且适用于任何数据集或网络的未见过的类别。代码可在 https://github.com/Asra-Aslam/UnseenNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UnseenNet，一种无需边界框即可快速训练检测任何未见过类别的目标检测模型。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本检测模型训练耗时且依赖物体级标签，难以利用大量存在的图像级标签，需实时处理未见过类别的框架。
AI.method: 基于预训练的强（检测）/弱（分类）基线模型，通过图像级标签微调强基线，并利用语义与视觉相似性迁移知识至未见过类别。
AI.result: 在OpenImages数据集上mAP提升10%-30%，单类别训练时间<10分钟，适用于Pascal VOC及任意数据集的未见过类别。
AI.conclusion: UnseenNet有效解决未见过类别检测难题，兼具高效性与泛化性，代码已开源。

authors_text: Tsz Kin Lam,Shigehiko Schamoni,Stefan Riezler
title: Sample, Translate, Recombine: Leveraging Audio Alignments for Data Augmentation in End-to-end Speech Translation
title_zh: 采样、翻译、重组：利用音频对齐在端到端语音翻译中进行数据增强
abstract: End-to-end speech translation relies on data that pair source-language speech inputs with corresponding translations into a target language. Such data are notoriously scarce, making synthetic data augmentation by back-translation or knowledge distillation a necessary ingredient of end-to-end training. In this paper, we present a novel approach to data augmentation that leverages audio alignments, linguistic properties, and translation. First, we augment a transcription by sampling from a suffix memory that stores text and audio data. Second, we translate the augmented transcript. Finally, we recombine concatenated audio segments and the generated translation. Besides training an MT-system, we only use basic off-the-shelf components without fine-tuning. While having similar resource demands as knowledge distillation, adding our method delivers consistent improvements of up to 0.9 and 1.1 BLEU points on five language pairs on CoVoST 2 and on two language pairs on Europarl-ST, respectively.
summary: End-to-end speech translation relies on data that pair source-language speech inputs with corresponding translations into a target language. Such data are notoriously scarce, making synthetic data augmentation by back-translation or knowledge distillation a necessary ingredient of end-to-end training. In this paper, we present a novel approach to data augmentation that leverages audio alignments, linguistic properties, and translation. First, we augment a transcription by sampling from a suffix memory that stores text and audio data. Second, we translate the augmented transcript. Finally, we recombine concatenated audio segments and the generated translation. Besides training an MT-system, we only use basic off-the-shelf components without fine-tuning. While having similar resource demands as knowledge distillation, adding our method delivers consistent improvements of up to 0.9 and 1.1 BLEU points on five language pairs on CoVoST 2 and on two language pairs on Europarl-ST, respectively.
abstract_zh: 端到端语音翻译依赖于将源语言语音输入与目标语言的相应翻译配对的数据。众所周知，此类数据非常稀缺，这使得通过反向翻译或知识蒸馏来增强合成数据成为端到端训练的必要组成部分。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用音频对齐、语言属性和翻译的数据增强新方法。首先，我们通过从存储文本和音频数据的后缀存储器中采样来增强转录。其次，我们翻译增强的转录本。最后，我们重新组合连接的音频片段和生成的翻译。除了训练机器翻译系统外，我们只使用基本的现成组件，无需进行微调。虽然资源需求与知识蒸馏相似，但添加我们的方法可以在 CoVoST 2 上的五个语言对和 Europarl-ST 上的两个语言对上分别实现高达 0.9 和 1.1 BLEU 点的持续改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用音频对齐进行数据增强的新方法，以提升端到端语音翻译的性能。
AI.motivation: 端到端语音翻译依赖稀缺的配对数据，传统合成方法如回译和知识蒸馏存在局限性，需探索更有效的数据增强策略。
AI.method: 通过采样后缀存储中的文本和音频数据增强转录，翻译后的内容与原始音频重新组合生成新数据，仅使用基础组件无需微调。
AI.result: 在CoVoST 2数据集上提升0.9 BLEU点，在Europarl-ST上提升1.1 BLEU点，资源需求与知识蒸馏相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升翻译质量，且在保持资源消耗的同时无需复杂组件，为数据增强提供新思路。

Such data are notoriously scarce, making synthetic data augmentation by back-translation or knowledge distillation a necessary ingredient of end-to-end training. In this paper, we present a novel approach to data augmentation that leverages audio alignments, linguistic properties, and translation. First, we augment a transcription by sampling from a suffix memory that stores text and audio data. Second, we translate the augmented transcript. Finally, we recombine concatenated audio segments and the generated translation. Besides training an MT-system, we only use basic off-the-shelf components without fine-tuning. While having similar resource demands as knowledge distillation, adding our method delivers consistent improvements of up to 0.9 and 1.1 BLEU points on five language pairs on CoVoST 2 and on two language pairs on Europarl-ST, respectively. 端到端语音翻译依赖于将源语言语音输入与目标语言的相应翻译配对的数据。众所周知，此类数据非常稀缺，这使得通过反向翻译或知识蒸馏来增强合成数据成为端到端训练的必要组成部分。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用音频对齐、语言属性和翻译的数据增强新方法。首先，我们通过从存储文本和音频数据的后缀存储器中采样来增强转录。其次，我们翻译增强的转录本。最后，我们重新组合连接的音频片段和生成的翻译。除了训练机器翻译系统外，我们只使用基本的现成组件，无需进行微调。虽然资源需求与知识蒸馏相似，但添加我们的方法可以在 CoVoST 2 上的五个语言对和 Europarl-ST 上的两个语言对上分别实现高达 0.9 和 1.1 BLEU 点的持续改进。 本文提出一种利用音频对齐进行数据增强的新方法，以提升端到端语音翻译的性能。 Tsz Kin Lam,Shigehiko Schamoni,Stefan Riezler cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Dogan Altan,Sanem Sariel
title: CLUE-AI: A Convolutional Three-stream Anomaly Identification Framework for Robot Manipulation
title_zh: CLUE-AI：用于机器人操作的卷积三流异常识别框架
abstract: Robot safety has been a prominent research topic in recent years since robots are more involved in daily tasks. It is crucial to devise the required safety mechanisms to enable service robots to be aware of and react to anomalies (i.e., unexpected deviations from intended outcomes) that arise during the execution of these tasks. Detection and identification of these anomalies is an essential step towards fulfilling these requirements. Although several architectures are proposed for anomaly detection, identification is not yet thoroughly investigated. This task is challenging since indicators may appear long before anomalies are detected. In this paper, we propose a ConvoLUtional threE-stream Anomaly Identification (CLUE-AI) framework to address this problem. The framework fuses visual, auditory and proprioceptive data streams to identify everyday object manipulation anomalies. A stream of 2D images gathered through an RGB-D camera placed on the head of the robot is processed within a self-attention enabled visual stage to capture visual anomaly indicators. The auditory modality provided by the microphone placed on the robot's lower torso is processed within a designed convolutional neural network (CNN) in the auditory stage. Last, the force applied by the gripper and the gripper state are processed within a CNN to obtain proprioceptive features. These outputs are then combined with a late fusion scheme. Our novel three-stream framework design is analyzed on everyday object manipulation tasks with a Baxter humanoid robot in a semi-structured setting. The results indicate that the framework achieves an f-score of 94% outperforming the other baselines in classifying anomalies that arise during runtime.

It is crucial to devise the required safety mechanisms to enable service robots to be aware of and react to anomalies (i.e., unexpected deviations from intended outcomes) that arise during the execution of these tasks. Detection and identification of these anomalies is an essential step towards fulfilling these requirements. Although several architectures are proposed for anomaly detection, identification is not yet thoroughly investigated. This task is challenging since indicators may appear long before anomalies are detected. In this paper, we propose a ConvoLUtional threE-stream Anomaly Identification (CLUE-AI) framework to address this problem. The framework fuses visual, auditory and proprioceptive data streams to identify everyday object manipulation anomalies. A stream of 2D images gathered through an RGB-D camera placed on the head of the robot is processed within a self-attention enabled visual stage to capture visual anomaly indicators. The auditory modality provided by the microphone placed on the robot's lower torso is processed within a designed convolutional neural network (CNN) in the auditory stage. Last, the force applied by the gripper and the gripper state are processed within a CNN to obtain proprioceptive features. These outputs are then combined with a late fusion scheme. Our novel three-stream framework design is analyzed on everyday object manipulation tasks with a Baxter humanoid robot in a semi-structured setting. The results indicate that the framework achieves an f-score of 94% outperforming the other baselines in classifying anomalies that arise during runtime.
abstract_zh: 近年来，由于机器人更多地参与日常任务，机器人安全已成为一个重要的研究课题。设计所需的安全机制以使服务机器人能够意识到执行这些任务期间出现的异常情况（即与预期结果的意外偏差）并做出反应至关重要。检测和识别这些异常是满足这些要求的重要一步。尽管提出了几种用于异常检测的架构，但识别尚未得到彻底研究。这项任务具有挑战性，因为指标可能在检测到异常之前很久就出现了。在本文中，我们提出了一种卷积三流异常识别（CLUE-AI）框架来解决这个问题。该框架融合了视觉、听觉和本体感受数据流，以识别日常对象操作异常。通过放置在机器人头部的 RGB-D 相机收集的 2D 图像流在启用自注意力的视觉阶段进行处理，以捕获视觉异常指标。放置在机器人下躯干上的麦克风提供的听觉模态在听觉阶段在设计的卷积神经网络（CNN）内进行处理。最后，在 CNN 内处理抓手施加的力和抓手状态以获得本体感受特征。然后将这些输出与后期融合方案相结合。我们新颖的三流框架设计在半结构化环境中使用 Baxter 人形机器人对日常对象操作任务进行了分析。结果表明，该框架在对运行时出现的异常进行分类方面，取得了 94% 的 f 分数，优于其他基线。

AI.tldr: 提出一种融合视觉、听觉和本体感觉数据的三流卷积框架，用于机器人操作中的异常识别。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在识别异常时存在不足，需提前检测异常指标以确保机器人安全。
AI.method: 融合视觉（自注意力CNN处理RGB-D图像）、听觉（CNN处理麦克风数据）和本体感觉（CNN处理夹爪力与状态）三流数据，采用晚期融合方案。
AI.result: 在Baxter机器人上的实验显示，框架在运行时异常分类中达到94%的F1分数，优于其他基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 三流框架有效提升机器人操作异常识别准确率，为安全机制提供支持。

authors_text: Zihan Liu,Mostofa Patwary,Ryan Prenger,Shrimai Prabhumoye,Wei Ping,Mohammad Shoeybi,Bryan Catanzaro
title: Multi-Stage Prompting for Knowledgeable Dialogue Generation
title_zh: 多阶段提示以生成知识丰富的对话
abstract: Existing knowledge-grounded dialogue systems typically use finetuned versions of a pretrained language model (LM) and large-scale knowledge bases. These models typically fail to generalize on topics outside of the knowledge base, and require maintaining separate potentially large checkpoints each time finetuning is needed. In this paper, we aim to address these limitations by leveraging the inherent knowledge stored in the pretrained LM as well as its powerful generation ability. We propose a multi-stage prompting approach to generate knowledgeable responses from a single pretrained LM. We first prompt the LM to generate knowledge based on the dialogue context. Then, we further prompt it to generate responses based on the dialogue context and the previously generated knowledge. Results show that our knowledge generator outperforms the state-of-the-art retrieval-based model by 5.8% when combining knowledge relevance and correctness. In addition, our multi-stage prompting outperforms the finetuning-based dialogue model in terms of response knowledgeability and engagement by up to 10% and 5%, respectively. Furthermore, we scale our model up to 530 billion parameters and show that larger LMs improve the generation correctness score by up to 10%, and response relevance, knowledgeability and engagement by up to 10%. Our code is available at: https://github.com/NVIDIA/Megatron-LM.
summary: Existing knowledge-grounded dialogue systems typically use finetuned versions of a pretrained language model (LM) and large-scale knowledge bases. These models typically fail to generalize on topics outside of the knowledge base, and require maintaining separate potentially large checkpoints each time finetuning is needed. In this paper, we aim to address these limitations by leveraging the inherent knowledge stored in the pretrained LM as well as its powerful generation ability. We propose a multi-stage prompting approach to generate knowledgeable responses from a single pretrained LM. We first prompt the LM to generate knowledge based on the dialogue context. Then, we further prompt it to generate responses based on the dialogue context and the previously generated knowledge. Results show that our knowledge generator outperforms the state-of-the-art retrieval-based model by 5.8% when combining knowledge relevance and correctness. In addition, our multi-stage prompting outperforms the finetuning-based dialogue model in terms of response knowledgeability and engagement by up to 10% and 5%, respectively. Furthermore, we scale our model up to 530 billion parameters and show that larger LMs improve the generation correctness score by up to 10%, and response relevance, knowledgeability and engagement by up to 10%. Our code is available at: https://github.com/NVIDIA/Megatron-LM.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于知识的对话系统通常使用预训练语言模型（LM）和大规模知识库的微调版本。这些模型通常无法概括知识库之外的主题，并且每次需要微调时都需要维护单独的潜在大型检查点。在本文中，我们的目标是通过利用预训练的 LM 中存储的固有知识及其强大的生成能力来解决这些限制。我们提出了一种多阶段提示方法，从单个预训练的 LM 中生成知识丰富的响应。我们首先提示 LM 根据对话上下文生成知识。然后，我们进一步提示它根据对话上下文和之前生成的知识生成响应。结果表明，在结合知识相关性和正确性时，我们的知识生成器比最先进的基于检索的模型高出 5.8%。此外，我们的多阶段提示在响应知识和参与度方面分别优于基于微调的对话模型高达 10% 和 5%。此外，我们将模型扩展到 5300 亿个参数，结果表明，较大的 LM 将生成正确性分数提高了 10%，而响应相关性、知识性和参与度提高了 10%。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/NVIDIA/Megatron-LM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多阶段提示方法，利用单一预训练语言模型生成知识丰富的对话回复，无需依赖外部知识库。
AI.motivation: 现有知识引导对话系统依赖外部知识库和微调模型，存在泛化能力差、需维护多个检查点的问题。本文旨在利用预训练模型的内置知识和生成能力，提升对话系统的知识性和适应性。
AI.method: 采用多阶段提示框架：首先根据对话上下文生成知识，再结合上下文与生成知识生成回复。通过大规模参数模型（5300亿参数）验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 知识生成器在知识相关性和正确性上超越检索模型5.8%，多阶段提示在知识性（+10%）和互动性（+5%）上优于微调模型。模型规模扩大后，生成正确性及多项指标提升最高达10%。
AI.conclusion: 多阶段提示方法无需外部知识库即可生成高质量对话，且模型规模扩大显著提升性能，为知识密集型对话系统提供新方向。
