Our code is available at: https://github.com/NVIDIA/Megatron-LM. 现有的基于知识的对话系统通常使用预训练语言模型（LM）和大规模知识库的微调版本。这些模型通常无法概括知识库之外的主题，并且每次需要微调时都需要维护单独的潜在大型检查点。在本文中，我们的目标是通过利用预训练的 LM 中存储的固有知识及其强大的生成能力来解决这些限制。我们提出了一种多阶段提示方法，从单个预训练的 LM 中生成知识丰富的响应。我们首先提示 LM 根据对话上下文生成知识。然后，我们进一步提示它根据对话上下文和之前生成的知识生成响应。结果表明，在结合知识相关性和正确性时，我们的知识生成器比最先进的基于检索的模型高出 5.8%。此外，我们的多阶段提示在响应知识和参与度方面分别优于基于微调的对话模型高达 10% 和 5%。此外，我们将模型扩展到 5300 亿个参数，结果表明，较大的 LM 将生成正确性分数提高了 10%，而响应相关性、知识性和参与度提高了 10%。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/NVIDIA/Megatron-LM。 本文提出一种多阶段提示方法，利用单一预训练语言模型生成知识丰富的对话回复，无需依赖外部知识库。 Zihan Liu,Mostofa Patwary,Ryan Prenger,Shrimai Prabhumoye,Wei Ping,Mohammad Shoeybi,Bryan Catanzaro cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Binxiao Huang,Chaofan Tao,Rui Lin,Ngai Wong
title: What Do Adversarially trained Neural Networks Focus: A Fourier Domain-based Study
title_zh: 对抗性训练的神经网络关注什么：基于傅里叶域的研究
abstract: Although many fields have witnessed the superior performance brought about by deep learning, the robustness of neural networks remains an open issue. Specifically, a small adversarial perturbation on the input may cause the model to produce a completely different output. Such poor robustness implies many potential hazards, especially in security-critical applications, e.g., autonomous driving and mobile robotics. This work studies what information the adversarially trained model focuses on. Empirically, we notice that the differences between the clean and adversarial data are mainly distributed in the low-frequency region. We then find that an adversarially-trained model is more robust than its naturally-trained counterpart due to the reason that the former pays more attention to learning the dominant information in low-frequency components. In addition, we consider two common ways to improve model robustness, namely, by data augmentation and by using stronger network architectures, and understand these techniques from a frequency-domain perspective. We are hopeful this work can shed light on the design of more robust neural networks.
summary: Although many fields have witnessed the superior performance brought about by deep learning, the robustness of neural networks remains an open issue. Specifically, a small adversarial perturbation on the input may cause the model to produce a completely different output. Such poor robustness implies many potential hazards, especially in security-critical applications, e.g., autonomous driving and mobile robotics. This work studies what information the adversarially trained model focuses on. Empirically, we notice that the differences between the clean and adversarial data are mainly distributed in the low-frequency region. We then find that an adversarially-trained model is more robust than its naturally-trained counterpart due to the reason that the former pays more attention to learning the dominant information in low-frequency components. In addition, we consider two common ways to improve model robustness, namely, by data augmentation and by using stronger network architectures, and understand these techniques from a frequency-domain perspective. We are hopeful this work can shed light on the design of more robust neural networks.
abstract_zh: 尽管许多领域都见证了深度学习带来的优越性能，但神经网络的鲁棒性仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。具体来说，输入上的一个小的对抗性扰动可能会导致模型产生完全不同的输出。如此差的鲁棒性意味着许多潜在的危险，特别是在安全关键型应用中，例如自动驾驶和移动机器人。这项工作研究了对抗训练模型关注的信息。根据经验，我们注意到干净数据和对抗数据之间的差异主要分布在低频区域。然后我们发现，对抗训练的模型比自然训练的模型更稳健，因为前者更注重学习低频分量中的主导信息。此外，我们考虑了两种常见的方法来提高模型的鲁棒性，即通过数据增强和使用更强大的网络架构，并从频域的角度理解这些技术。我们希望这项工作能够为更强大的神经网络的设计提供启发。

AI.tldr: 本文通过频域分析研究对抗训练神经网络的关注点，探讨提升模型鲁棒性的方法。
AI.motivation: 对抗样本的存在威胁模型安全，尤其在关键应用中，需提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过实证分析数据频域差异，结合对抗训练模型的低频关注，从频域角度分析提升鲁棒性的技术。
AI.result: 对抗训练模型因关注低频信息而更鲁棒，数据增强和强架构在频域上各有不同作用。
AI.conclusion: 频域分析为设计鲁棒神经网络提供新视角，指导提升模型鲁棒性的方法。

authors_text: Jovita Lukasik,Steffen Jung,Margret Keuper
title: Learning Where To Look -- Generative NAS is Surprisingly Efficient
title_zh: 学习往哪里看——生成式 NAS 效率惊人
comment: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision 2022
comments: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision 2022
abstract: The efficient, automated search for well-performing neural architectures (NAS) has drawn increasing attention in the recent past. Thereby, the predominant research objective is to reduce the necessity of costly evaluations of neural architectures while efficiently exploring large search spaces. To this aim, surrogate models embed architectures in a latent space and predict their performance, while generative models for neural architectures enable optimization-based search within the latent space the generator draws from. Both, surrogate and generative models, have the aim of facilitating query-efficient search in a well-structured latent space. In this paper, we further improve the trade-off between query-efficiency and promising architecture generation by leveraging advantages from both, efficient surrogate models and generative design. To this end, we propose a generative model, paired with a surrogate predictor, that iteratively learns to generate samples from increasingly promising latent subspaces. This approach leads to very effective and efficient architecture search, while keeping the query amount low. In addition, our approach allows in a straightforward manner to jointly optimize for multiple objectives such as accuracy and hardware latency. We show the benefit of this approach not only w.r.t. the optimization of architectures for highest classification accuracy but also in the context of hardware constraints and outperform state-of-the-art methods on several NAS benchmarks for single and multiple objectives. We also achieve state-of-the-art performance on ImageNet. The code is available at http://github.com/jovitalukasik/AG-Net .
summary: The efficient, automated search for well-performing neural architectures (NAS) has drawn increasing attention in the recent past. Thereby, the predominant research objective is to reduce the necessity of costly evaluations of neural architectures while efficiently exploring large search spaces. To this aim, surrogate models embed architectures in a latent space and predict their performance, while generative models for neural architectures enable optimization-based search within the latent space the generator draws from. Both, surrogate and generative models, have the aim of facilitating query-efficient search in a well-structured latent space. In this paper, we further improve the trade-off between query-efficiency and promising architecture generation by leveraging advantages from both, efficient surrogate models and generative design. To this end, we propose a generative model, paired with a surrogate predictor, that iteratively learns to generate samples from increasingly promising latent subspaces. This approach leads to very effective and efficient architecture search, while keeping the query amount low. In addition, our approach allows in a straightforward manner to jointly optimize for multiple objectives such as accuracy and hardware latency. We show the benefit of this approach not only w.r.t. the optimization of architectures for highest classification accuracy but also in the context of hardware constraints and outperform state-of-the-art methods on several NAS benchmarks for single and multiple objectives. We also achieve state-of-the-art performance on ImageNet. The code is available at http://github.com/jovitalukasik/AG-Net .
abstract_zh: 近年来，对性能良好的神经架构（NAS）的高效、自动搜索引起了越来越多的关注。因此，主要的研究目标是减少昂贵的神经架构评估的必要性，同时有效地探索大型搜索空间。为此，代理模型将架构嵌入到潜在空间中并预测其性能，而神经架构的生成模型可以在生成器所提取的潜在空间内进行基于优化的搜索。代理模型和生成模型都旨在促进结构良好的潜在空间中的查询高效搜索。在本文中，我们通过利用高效代理模型和生成设计的优势，进一步改善查询效率和有前途的架构生成之间的权衡。为此，我们提出了一个生成模型，与代理预测器配对，迭代地学习从越来越有前途的潜在子空间生成样本。这种方法可以实现非常有效且高效的架构搜索，同时保持较低的查询量。此外，我们的方法允许以简单的方式联合优化多个目标，例如准确性和硬件延迟。我们不仅展示了这种方法的好处。架构优化以实现最高分类精度，而且在硬件限制的情况下也能在多个 NAS 基准测试中针对单目标和多目标超越最先进的方法。我们还在 ImageNet 上实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 http://github.com/jovitalukasik/AG-Net 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合生成模型与代理预测器的高效神经架构搜索方法，通过迭代学习潜在子空间生成高质量架构。
AI.motivation: 现有NAS方法在减少架构评估成本与探索大搜索空间之间存在效率与效果的平衡问题，需更高效的多目标优化方案。
AI.method: 设计生成模型与代理预测器联合框架，迭代生成潜在子空间样本，实现低查询量下的多目标架构优化。
AI.result: 在多个NAS基准测试中超越现有方法，支持单/多目标优化，ImageNet表现达SOTA，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 生成模型与代理模型结合可显著提升NAS效率与效果，尤其适用于多目标优化场景。

authors_text: Eva Fluck
title: Tangles and Hierarchical Clustering
title_zh: 缠结和层次聚类
comment: An extended abstract that contains some of the results has appeared at MFCS 2019
comments: An extended abstract that contains some of the results has appeared at MFCS 2019
abstract: We establish a connection between tangles, a concept from structural graph theory that plays a central role in Robertson and Seymour's graph minor project, and hierarchical clustering. Tangles cannot only be defined for graphs, but in fact for arbitrary connectivity functions, which are functions defined on the subsets of some finite universe. In typical clustering applications these universes consist of points in some metric space. Connectivity functions are usually required to be submodular. It is our first contribution to show that the central duality theorem connecting tangles with hierarchical decompositions (so-called branch decompositions) also holds if submodularity is replaced by a different property that we call maximum-submodular. We then define a connectivity function on finite data sets in an arbitrary metric space and prove that its tangles are in one-to-one correspondence with the clusters obtained by applying the well-known single linkage clustering algorithms to the same data set. Lastly we generalize this correspondence for any hierarchical clustering. We show that the data structure that represents hierarchical clustering results, called dendograms, are equivalent to maximum-submodular connectivity functions and their tangles. The idea of viewing tangles as clusters has first been proposed by Diestel and Whittle in 2016 as an approach to image segmentation. To the best of our knowledge, our result is the first that establishes a precise technical connection between tangles and clusters.

Tangles cannot only be defined for graphs, but in fact for arbitrary connectivity functions, which are functions defined on the subsets of some finite universe. We then define a connectivity function on finite data sets in an arbitrary metric space and prove that its tangles are in one-to-one correspondence with the clusters obtained by applying the well-known single linkage clustering algorithms to the same data set. Lastly we generalize this correspondence for any hierarchical clustering. We show that the data structure that represents hierarchical clustering results, called dendograms, are equivalent to maximum-submodular connectivity functions and their tangles. The idea of viewing tangles as clusters has first been proposed by Diestel and Whittle in 2016 as an approach to image segmentation. To the best of our knowledge, our result is the first that establishes a precise technical connection between tangles and clusters.
abstract_zh: 我们在缠结（结构图论中的一个概念）和层次聚类之间建立了联系，该概念在 Robertson 和 Seymour 的图小项目中发挥着核心作用。缠结不仅可以为图定义，而且实际上可以为任意连接函数定义，这些函数是在某些有限宇宙的子集上定义的函数。在典型的聚类应用中，这些宇宙由某些度量空间中的点组成。连接函数通常需要是子模的。我们的第一个贡献是表明，如果子模性被我们称为最大子模的不同属性取代，则将缠结与层次分解（所谓的分支分解）连接起来的中心对偶定理也成立。然后，我们在任意度量空间中的有限数据集上定义连接函数，并证明其缠结与通过将众所周知的单链接聚类算法应用于同一数据集而获得的簇一一对应。最后，我们将这种对应关系推广到任何层次聚类。我们证明，表示层次聚类结果的数据结构（称为树状图）相当于最大子模连接函数及其缠结。将缠结视为簇的想法最初由 Diestel 和 Whittle 于 2016 年提出，作为一种图像分割方法。据我们所知，我们的结果是第一个在缠结和簇之间建立精确技术联系的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文建立tangles与层次聚类之间的精确联系，证明其在度量空间数据集上的簇对应关系，并推广至一般层次聚类。
AI.motivation: tangles作为图论核心概念，可扩展至任意连通函数，而层次聚类需处理度量空间数据，需探索其理论关联。
AI.method: 定义最大次模连通函数替代次模性，证明duality定理；构建度量空间连通函数，证明其tangles与单链接聚类簇一一对应，并推广至任意层次聚类。
AI.result: 确立最大次模性下tangles与分支分解的等价性；证明tangles与单链接聚类簇的双射关系；揭示dendograms与最大次模连通函数的等价性。
AI.conclusion: 首次建立tangles与簇的精确技术联系，为图像分割等应用提供理论基础，拓展了结构图论与数据聚类的交叉研究。

search_text: Tangles and Hierarchical Clustering 缠结和层次聚类 We establish a connection between tangles, a concept from structural graph theory that plays a central role in Robertson and Seymour's graph minor project, and hierarchical clustering. Tangles cannot only be defined for graphs, but in fact for arbitrary connectivity functions, which are functions defined on the subsets of some finite universe. In typical clustering applications these universes consist of points in some metric space. Connectivity functions are usually required to be submodular. It is our first contribution to show that the central duality theorem connecting tangles with hierarchical decompositions (so-called branch decompositions) also holds if submodularity is replaced by a different property that we call maximum-submodular. We then define a connectivity function on finite data sets in an arbitrary metric space and prove that its tangles are in one-to-one correspondence with the clusters obtained by applying the well-known single linkage clustering algorithms to the same data set. Lastly we generalize this correspondence for any hierarchical clustering. We show that the data structure that represents hierarchical clustering results, called dendograms, are equivalent to maximum-submodular connectivity functions and their tangles. The idea of viewing tangles as clusters has first been proposed by Diestel and Whittle in 2016 as an approach to image segmentation. To the best of our knowledge, our result is the first that establishes a precise technical connection between tangles and clusters. 我们在缠结（结构图论中的一个概念）和层次聚类之间建立了联系，该概念在 Robertson 和 Seymour 的图小项目中发挥着核心作用。缠结不仅可以为图定义，而且实际上可以为任意连接函数定义，这些函数是在某些有限宇宙的子集上定义的函数。在典型的聚类应用中，这些宇宙由某些度量空间中的点组成。连接函数通常需要是子模的。我们的第一个贡献是表明，如果子模性被我们称为最大子模的不同属性取代，则将缠结与层次分解（所谓的分支分解）连接起来的中心对偶定理也成立。然后，我们在任意度量空间中的有限数据集上定义连接函数，并证明其缠结与通过将众所周知的单链接聚类算法应用于同一数据集而获得的簇一一对应。最后，我们将这种对应关系推广到任何层次聚类。我们证明，表示层次聚类结果的数据结构（称为树状图）相当于最大子模连接函数及其缠结。将缠结视为簇的想法最初由 Diestel 和 Whittle 于 2016 年提出，作为一种图像分割方法。据我们所知，我们的结果是第一个在缠结和簇之间建立精确技术联系的结果。 本文建立tangles与层次聚类之间的精确联系，证明其在度量空间数据集上的簇对应关系，并推广至一般层次聚类。 Eva Fluck cs.DM,cs.CV,cs.LG,math.CO

authors_text: Sangli Teng,Amit K. Sanyal,Ram Vasudevan,Anthony Bloch,Maani Ghaffari
title: Input Influence Matrix Design for MIMO Discrete-Time Ultra-Local Model
title_zh: MIMO离散时间超局部模型的输入影响矩阵设计
abstract: Ultra-Local Models (ULM) have been applied to perform model-free control of nonlinear systems with unknown or partially known dynamics. Unfortunately, extending these methods to MIMO systems requires designing a dense input influence matrix which is challenging. This paper presents guidelines for designing an input influence matrix for discrete-time, control-affine MIMO systems using an ULM-based controller. This paper analyzes the case that uses ULM and a model-free control scheme: the Hölder-continuous Finite-Time Stable (FTS) control. By comparing the ULM with the actual system dynamics, the paper describes how to extract the input-dependent part from the lumped ULM dynamics and finds that the tracking and state estimation error are coupled. The stability of the ULM-FTS error dynamics is affected by the eigenvalues of the difference (defined by matrix multiplication) between the actual and designed input influence matrix. Finally, the paper shows that a wide range of input influence matrix designs can keep the ULM-FTS error dynamics (at least locally) asymptotically stable. A numerical simulation is included to verify the result. The analysis can also be extended to other ULM-based controllers.
summary: Ultra-Local Models (ULM) have been applied to perform model-free control of nonlinear systems with unknown or partially known dynamics. Unfortunately, extending these methods to MIMO systems requires designing a dense input influence matrix which is challenging. This paper presents guidelines for designing an input influence matrix for discrete-time, control-affine MIMO systems using an ULM-based controller. This paper analyzes the case that uses ULM and a model-free control scheme: the Hölder-continuous Finite-Time Stable (FTS) control. By comparing the ULM with the actual system dynamics, the paper describes how to extract the input-dependent part from the lumped ULM dynamics and finds that the tracking and state estimation error are coupled. The stability of the ULM-FTS error dynamics is affected by the eigenvalues of the difference (defined by matrix multiplication) between the actual and designed input influence matrix. Finally, the paper shows that a wide range of input influence matrix designs can keep the ULM-FTS error dynamics (at least locally) asymptotically stable. A numerical simulation is included to verify the result. The analysis can also be extended to other ULM-based controllers.
abstract_zh: 超局部模型（ULM）已被应用于对具有未知或部分已知动力学的非线性系统进行无模型控制。不幸的是，将这些方法扩展到 MIMO 系统需要设计一个密集的输入影响矩阵，这是一项挑战。本文提出了使用基于 ULM 的控制器为离散时间、控制仿射 MIMO 系统设计输入影响矩阵的指南。本文分析了使用 ULM 和无模型控制方案的案例：Hölder 连续有限时间稳定 (FTS) 控制。通过将 ULM 与实际系统动力学进行比较，本文描述了如何从集总 ULM 动力学中提取依赖于输入的部分，并发现跟踪误差和状态估计误差是耦合的。 ULM-FTS 误差动力学的稳定性受到实际输入影响矩阵与设计输入影响矩阵之间的差异特征值（由矩阵乘法定义）的影响。最后，本文表明，广泛的输入影响矩阵设计可以保持 ULM-FTS 误差动态（至少局部）渐近稳定。包括数值模拟来验证结果。该分析还可以扩展到其他基于 ULM 的控制器。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为多输入多输出（MIMO）离散时间超局部模型（ULM）设计输入影响矩阵，以实现模型无关控制。
AI.motivation: 超局部模型（ULM）在非线性系统控制中应用广泛，但扩展到MIMO系统时需设计复杂的输入影响矩阵，存在挑战。
AI.method: 通过比较ULM与实际系统动态，提取输入相关部分，分析误差耦合关系，并基于矩阵差的特征值确保稳定性。
AI.result: 证明多种输入影响矩阵设计可使ULM-FTS误差动态局部渐近稳定，并通过数值仿真验证结果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的指南为MIMO系统ULM控制器设计提供了理论依据，可推广至其他ULM控制方案。

Finally, the paper shows that a wide range of input influence matrix designs can keep the ULM-FTS error dynamics (at least locally) asymptotically stable. authors_text: Sangli Teng,Dianhao Chen,William Clark,Maani Ghaffari
title: An Error-State Model Predictive Control on Connected Matrix Lie Groups for Legged Robot Control
title_zh: 用于腿式机器人控制的连通​​矩阵李群的错误状态模型预测控制
comment: Proceedings of the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: Proceedings of the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: This paper reports on a new error-state Model Predictive Control (MPC) approach to connected matrix Lie groups for robot control. The linearized tracking error dynamics and the linearized equations of motion are derived in the Lie algebra. Moreover, given an initial condition, the linearized tracking error dynamics and equations of motion are globally valid and evolve independently of the system trajectory. By exploiting the symmetry of the problem, the proposed approach shows faster convergence of rotation and position simultaneously than the state-of-the-art geometric variational MPC based on variational-based linearization. Numerical simulation on tracking control of a fully-actuated 3D rigid body dynamics confirms the benefits of the proposed approach compared to the baselines. Furthermore, the proposed MPC is also verified in pose control and locomotion experiments on a quadrupedal robot MIT Mini Cheetah.
summary: This paper reports on a new error-state Model Predictive Control (MPC) approach to connected matrix Lie groups for robot control. The linearized tracking error dynamics and the linearized equations of motion are derived in the Lie algebra. Moreover, given an initial condition, the linearized tracking error dynamics and equations of motion are globally valid and evolve independently of the system trajectory. By exploiting the symmetry of the problem, the proposed approach shows faster convergence of rotation and position simultaneously than the state-of-the-art geometric variational MPC based on variational-based linearization. Numerical simulation on tracking control of a fully-actuated 3D rigid body dynamics confirms the benefits of the proposed approach compared to the baselines. Furthermore, the proposed MPC is also verified in pose control and locomotion experiments on a quadrupedal robot MIT Mini Cheetah.
abstract_zh: 本文报告了一种新的错误状态模型预测控制（MPC）方法，用于机器人控制的连接矩阵李群。线性化跟踪误差动力学和线性化运动方程由李代数导出。此外，在给定初始条件的情况下，线性化跟踪误差动力学和运动方程全局有效，并且独立于系统轨迹而演化。通过利用问题的对称性，所提出的方法比基于变分线性化的最先进的几何变分 MPC 具有更快的旋转和位置收敛速度。对全驱动 3D 刚体动力学跟踪控制的数值模拟证实了所提出的方法与基线相比的优点。此外，所提出的 MPC 还在四足机器人 MIT Mini Cheetah 的姿态控制和运动实验中得到了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于连接矩阵李群的误差状态模型预测控制方法，用于提升腿部机器人的控制性能。
AI.motivation: 现有几何变分MPC在处理李群上的动力学时存在收敛速度慢、轨迹依赖性强的问题，需更高效的控制方法。
AI.method: 在李代数中推导线性化误差动力学与运动方程，利用系统对称性实现旋转与位置的同步快速收敛控制。
AI.result: 数值仿真与MIT Mini Cheetah四足机器人实验证明，该方法在跟踪控制与运动控制上优于传统变分MPC基线。
AI.conclusion: 所提MPC方法在理论分析与实际应用中均表现出优越性，为腿部机器人控制提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于连接矩阵李群的误差状态模型预测控制方法，用于提升腿部机器人的控制性能。
motivation: 现有几何变分MPC在处理李群上的动力学时存在收敛速度慢、轨迹依赖性强的问题，需更高效的控制方法。
method: 在李代数中推导线性化误差动力学与运动方程，利用系统对称性实现旋转与位置的同步快速收敛控制。
result: 数值仿真与MIT Mini Cheetah四足机器人实验证明，该方法在跟踪控制与运动控制上优于传统变分MPC基线。
conclusion: 所提MPC方法在理论分析与实际应用中均表现出优越性，为腿部机器人控制提供了新思路。
search_text: An Error-State Model Predictive Control on Connected Matrix Lie Groups for Legged Robot Control 用于腿式机器人控制的连通​​矩阵李群的错误状态模型预测控制 This paper reports on a new error-state Model Predictive Control (MPC) approach to connected matrix Lie groups for robot control. The linearized tracking error dynamics and the linearized equations of motion are derived in the Lie algebra. Moreover, given an initial condition, the linearized tracking error dynamics and equations of motion are globally valid and evolve independently of the system trajectory. By exploiting the symmetry of the problem, the proposed approach shows faster convergence of rotation and position simultaneously than the state-of-the-art geometric variational MPC based on variational-based linearization. Numerical simulation on tracking control of a fully-actuated 3D rigid body dynamics confirms the benefits of the proposed approach compared to the baselines. Furthermore, the proposed MPC is also verified in pose control and locomotion experiments on a quadrupedal robot MIT Mini Cheetah. 本文报告了一种新的错误状态模型预测控制（MPC）方法，用于机器人控制的连接矩阵李群。线性化跟踪误差动力学和线性化运动方程由李代数导出。此外，在给定初始条件的情况下，线性化跟踪误差动力学和运动方程全局有效，并且独立于系统轨迹而演化。通过利用问题的对称性，所提出的方法比基于变分线性化的最先进的几何变分 MPC 具有更快的旋转和位置收敛速度。对全驱动 3D 刚体动力学跟踪控制的数值模拟证实了所提出的方法与基线相比的优点。此外，所提出的 MPC 还在四足机器人 MIT Mini Cheetah 的姿态控制和运动实验中得到了验证。 本文提出一种基于连接矩阵李群的误差状态模型预测控制方法，用于提升腿部机器人的控制性能。 Sangli Teng,Dianhao Chen,William Clark,Maani Ghaffari cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Nicholas A. Lord,Romain Mueller,Luca Bertinetto
title: Attacking deep networks with surrogate-based adversarial black-box methods is easy
title_zh: 使用基于代理的对抗性黑盒方法攻击深度网络很容易
abstract: A recent line of work on black-box adversarial attacks has revived the use of transfer from surrogate models by integrating it into query-based search. However, we find that existing approaches of this type underperform their potential, and can be overly complicated besides. Here, we provide a short and simple algorithm which achieves state-of-the-art results through a search which uses the surrogate network's class-score gradients, with no need for other priors or heuristics. The guiding assumption of the algorithm is that the studied networks are in a fundamental sense learning similar functions, and that a transfer attack from one to the other should thus be fairly "easy". This assumption is validated by the extremely low query counts and failure rates achieved: e.g. an untargeted attack on a VGG-16 ImageNet network using a ResNet-152 as the surrogate yields a median query count of 6 at a success rate of 99.9%. Code is available at https://github.com/fiveai/GFCS.
summary: A recent line of work on black-box adversarial attacks has revived the use of transfer from surrogate models by integrating it into query-based search. However, we find that existing approaches of this type underperform their potential, and can be overly complicated besides. Here, we provide a short and simple algorithm which achieves state-of-the-art results through a search which uses the surrogate network's class-score gradients, with no need for other priors or heuristics. The guiding assumption of the algorithm is that the studied networks are in a fundamental sense learning similar functions, and that a transfer attack from one to the other should thus be fairly "easy". This assumption is validated by the extremely low query counts and failure rates achieved: e.g. an untargeted attack on a VGG-16 ImageNet network using a ResNet-152 as the surrogate yields a median query count of 6 at a success rate of 99.9%. Code is available at https://github.com/fiveai/GFCS.
abstract_zh: 最近关于黑盒对抗性攻击的一系列工作通过将代理模型集成到基于查询的搜索中，恢复了代理模型转移的使用。然而，我们发现这种类型的现有方法未能发挥其潜力，而且可能过于复杂。在这里，我们提供了一种简短的算法，通过使用代理网络的类别分数梯度的搜索来实现最先进的结果，而不需要其他先验或启发式方法。该算法的指导性假设是，所研究的网络从根本上讲是在学习相似的功能，因此从一个网络到另一个网络的转移攻击应该相当“容易”。这一假设得到了极低的查询计数和故障率的验证：例如使用 ResNet-152 作为代理对 VGG-16 ImageNet 网络进行无目标攻击，查询计数中位数为 6，成功率为 99.9%。代码可在 https://github.com/ Fiveai/GFCS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于代理模型的简单黑盒对抗攻击算法，通过利用代理网络的类别得分梯度实现高效攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有基于代理模型的黑盒攻击方法复杂且效果不佳，作者认为深度网络学习相似函数，迁移攻击应更简单。
AI.method: 设计无需先验知识的算法，直接使用代理网络的类别得分梯度进行查询搜索。
AI.result: 在VGG-16 ImageNet上使用ResNet-152代理时，中位查询次数仅6次，成功率99.9%。
AI.conclusion: 验证了代理模型迁移攻击的可行性，代码开源，为黑盒攻击提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于代理模型的简单黑盒对抗攻击算法，通过利用代理网络的类别得分梯度实现高效攻击。

authors_text: Mingkai Zheng,Shan You,Fei Wang,Chen Qian,Changshui Zhang,Xiaogang Wang,Chang Xu
title: Weak Augmentation Guided Relational Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 弱增强引导的关系自监督学习
comment: Extended version of NeurIPS 2021 paper. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.09282
comments: Extended version of NeurIPS 2021 paper. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.09282
abstract: Self-supervised Learning (SSL) including the mainstream contrastive learning has achieved great success in learning visual representations without data annotations. However, most methods mainly focus on the instance level information (\ie, the different augmented images of the same instance should have the same feature or cluster into the same class), but there is a lack of attention on the relationships between different instances. In this paper, we introduce a novel SSL paradigm, which we term as relational self-supervised learning (ReSSL) framework that learns representations by modeling the relationship between different instances. Specifically, our proposed method employs sharpened distribution of pairwise similarities among different instances as \textit{relation} metric, which is thus utilized to match the feature embeddings of different augmentations. To boost the performance, we argue that weak augmentations matter to represent a more reliable relation, and leverage momentum strategy for practical efficiency. The designed asymmetric predictor head and an InfoNCE warm-up strategy enhance the robustness to hyper-parameters and benefit the resulting performance. Experimental results show that our proposed ReSSL substantially outperforms the state-of-the-art methods across different network architectures, including various lightweight networks (\eg, EfficientNet and MobileNet).
summary: Self-supervised Learning (SSL) including the mainstream contrastive learning has achieved great success in learning visual representations without data annotations. However, most methods mainly focus on the instance level information (\ie, the different augmented images of the same instance should have the same feature or cluster into the same class), but there is a lack of attention on the relationships between different instances. In this paper, we introduce a novel SSL paradigm, which we term as relational self-supervised learning (ReSSL) framework that learns representations by modeling the relationship between different instances. Specifically, our proposed method employs sharpened distribution of pairwise similarities among different instances as \textit{relation} metric, which is thus utilized to match the feature embeddings of different augmentations. To boost the performance, we argue that weak augmentations matter to represent a more reliable relation, and leverage momentum strategy for practical efficiency. The designed asymmetric predictor head and an InfoNCE warm-up strategy enhance the robustness to hyper-parameters and benefit the resulting performance. Experimental results show that our proposed ReSSL substantially outperforms the state-of-the-art methods across different network architectures, including various lightweight networks (\eg, EfficientNet and MobileNet).
abstract_zh: 包括主流对比学习在内的自监督学习（SSL）在无需数据注释的情况下学习视觉表示方面取得了巨大成功。然而，大多数方法主要关注实例级信息（即同一实例的不同增强图像应具有相同的特征或聚类到同一类），但缺乏对不同实例之间的关系的关注。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的 SSL 范例，我们将其称为关系自监督学习 (ReSSL) 框架，该框架通过对不同实例之间的关系进行建模来学习表示。具体来说，我们提出的方法采用不同实例之间成对相似性的锐化分布作为 \textit{relation} 度量，从而用于匹配不同增强的特征嵌入。为了提高性能，我们认为弱增强对于代表更可靠的关系很重要，并利用动量策略来提高实际效率。设计的非对称预测器头和 InfoNCE 预热策略增强了超参数的鲁棒性，并有利于最终的性能。实验结果表明，我们提出的 ReSSL 在不同的网络架构（包括各种轻量级网络（例如 EfficientNet 和 MobileNet））中显着优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型自监督学习框架ReSSL，通过建模不同实例间的关系来提升视觉表示学习，特别强调弱增强在关系建模中的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法过度关注实例内增强一致性，忽视了不同实例间的关联性，导致表示学习信息利用不充分。
AI.method: 采用实例间相似性锐化分布作为关系度量，结合弱增强策略与动量更新机制，设计非对称预测头和InfoNCE预热策略提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多种网络架构（包括轻量级模型）上显著超越现有SOTA方法，验证了关系建模与弱增强协同的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ReSSL通过建模跨实例关系并优化增强策略，为自监督学习提供了新范式，在保持计算效率的同时提升了表征性能。

authors_text: Sumeet Singh,Francis McCann Ramirez,Jacob Varley,Andy Zeng,Vikas Sindhwani
title: Multiscale Sensor Fusion and Continuous Control with Neural CDEs
title_zh: 多尺度传感器融合和神经 CDE 的连续控制
abstract: Though robot learning is often formulated in terms of discrete-time Markov decision processes (MDPs), physical robots require near-continuous multiscale feedback control. Machines operate on multiple asynchronous sensing modalities, each with different frequencies, e.g., video frames at 30Hz, proprioceptive state at 100Hz, force-torque data at 500Hz, etc. While the classic approach is to batch observations into fixed-time windows then pass them through feed-forward encoders (e.g., with deep networks), we show that there exists a more elegant approach -- one that treats policy learning as modeling latent state dynamics in continuous-time. Specifically, we present 'InFuser', a unified architecture that trains continuous time-policies with Neural Controlled Differential Equations (CDEs). InFuser evolves a single latent state representation over time by (In)tegrating and (Fus)ing multi-sensory observations (arriving at different frequencies), and inferring actions in continuous-time. This enables policies that can react to multi-frequency multi sensory feedback for truly end-to-end visuomotor control, without discrete-time assumptions. Behavior cloning experiments demonstrate that InFuser learns robust policies for dynamic tasks (e.g., swinging a ball into a cup) notably outperforming several baselines in settings where observations from one sensing modality can arrive at much sparser intervals than others.
summary: Though robot learning is often formulated in terms of discrete-time Markov decision processes (MDPs), physical robots require near-continuous multiscale feedback control. Machines operate on multiple asynchronous sensing modalities, each with different frequencies, e.g., video frames at 30Hz, proprioceptive state at 100Hz, force-torque data at 500Hz, etc. While the classic approach is to batch observations into fixed-time windows then pass them through feed-forward encoders (e.g., with deep networks), we show that there exists a more elegant approach -- one that treats policy learning as modeling latent state dynamics in continuous-time. Specifically, we present 'InFuser', a unified architecture that trains continuous time-policies with Neural Controlled Differential Equations (CDEs). InFuser evolves a single latent state representation over time by (In)tegrating and (Fus)ing multi-sensory observations (arriving at different frequencies), and inferring actions in continuous-time. This enables policies that can react to multi-frequency multi sensory feedback for truly end-to-end visuomotor control, without discrete-time assumptions. Behavior cloning experiments demonstrate that InFuser learns robust policies for dynamic tasks (e.g., swinging a ball into a cup) notably outperforming several baselines in settings where observations from one sensing modality can arrive at much sparser intervals than others.
abstract_zh: 尽管机器人学习通常是根据离散时间马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）来制定的，但物理机器人需要近乎连续的多尺度反馈控制。机器在多种异步传感模式上运行，每种模式具有不同的频率，例如，30Hz 的视频帧、100Hz 的本体感觉状态、500Hz 的力扭矩数据等。虽然经典的方法是将观察批量放入固定时间窗口，然后将它们传递给前馈编码器（例如，使用深度网络），但我们表明存在一种更优雅的方法 - 将策略学习视为连续时间中的潜在状​​态动态建模。具体来说，我们提出了“InFuser”，这是一种使用神经控制微分方程（CDE）训练连续时间策略的统一架构。 InFuser 通过（In）整合和（Fus）多感官观察（以不同的频率到达）并推断连续时间的动作，随着时间的推移演化出单一的潜在状态表示。这使得策略能够对多频率多感官反馈做出反应，从而实现真正的端到端视觉运动控制，而无需离散时间假设。行为克隆实验表明，InFuser 学习了针对动态任务（例如，将球摆动到杯子中）的稳健策略，在来自一种传感方式的观察结果的间隔比其他方式稀疏得多的情况下，其表现明显优于多个基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经控制微分方程（Neural CDEs）的多尺度传感器融合与连续控制方法，用于解决机器人学习中的异步多模态传感问题。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人学习方法依赖离散时间马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs），难以处理物理机器人所需的连续多尺度反馈控制问题，尤其当不同传感器以异步频率（如30Hz视频、100Hz本体感觉、500Hz力矩数据）工作时，现有方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 提出名为InFuser的统一架构，通过神经控制微分方程建模连续时间下的潜在状态动态，整合并融合多模态异步观测数据，实现连续时间策略学习与动作推断。
AI.result: 实验表明，InFuser在动态任务（如将球投入杯子）中显著优于多个基线方法，尤其在部分传感器观测稀疏的场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: InFuser通过连续时间建模有效解决了多尺度传感器融合与控制问题，为端到端视觉运动控制提供了新思路。

search_text: Multiscale Sensor Fusion and Continuous Control with Neural CDEs 多尺度传感器融合和神经 CDE 的连续控制 Though robot learning is often formulated in terms of discrete-time Markov decision processes (MDPs), physical robots require near-continuous multiscale feedback control. Machines operate on multiple asynchronous sensing modalities, each with different frequencies, e.g., video frames at 30Hz, proprioceptive state at 100Hz, force-torque data at 500Hz, etc. While the classic approach is to batch observations into fixed-time windows then pass them through feed-forward encoders (e.g., with deep networks), we show that there exists a more elegant approach -- one that treats policy learning as modeling latent state dynamics in continuous-time. Specifically, we present 'InFuser', a unified architecture that trains continuous time-policies with Neural Controlled Differential Equations (CDEs). InFuser evolves a single latent state representation over time by (In)tegrating and (Fus)ing multi-sensory observations (arriving at different frequencies), and inferring actions in continuous-time. This enables policies that can react to multi-frequency multi sensory feedback for truly end-to-end visuomotor control, without discrete-time assumptions. Behavior cloning experiments demonstrate that InFuser learns robust policies for dynamic tasks (e.g., swinging a ball into a cup) notably outperforming several baselines in settings where observations from one sensing modality can arrive at much sparser intervals than others. 尽管机器人学习通常是根据离散时间马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）来制定的，但物理机器人需要近乎连续的多尺度反馈控制。机器在多种异步传感模式上运行，每种模式具有不同的频率，例如，30Hz 的视频帧、100Hz 的本体感觉状态、500Hz 的力扭矩数据等。虽然经典的方法是将观察批量放入固定时间窗口，然后将它们传递给前馈编码器（例如，使用深度网络），但我们表明存在一种更优雅的方法 - 将策略学习视为连续时间中的潜在状​​态动态建模。具体来说，我们提出了“InFuser”，这是一种使用神经控制微分方程（CDE）训练连续时间策略的统一架构。 InFuser 通过（In）整合和（Fus）多感官观察（以不同的频率到达）并推断连续时间的动作，随着时间的推移演化出单一的潜在状态表示。这使得策略能够对多频率多感官反馈做出反应，从而实现真正的端到端视觉运动控制，而无需离散时间假设。行为克隆实验表明，InFuser 学习了针对动态任务（例如，将球摆动到杯子中）的稳健策略，在来自一种传感方式的观察结果的间隔比其他方式稀疏得多的情况下，其表现明显优于多个基线。 本文提出了一种基于神经控制微分方程（Neural CDEs）的多尺度传感器融合与连续控制方法，用于解决机器人学习中的异步多模态传感问题。 Sumeet Singh,Francis McCann Ramirez,Jacob Varley,Andy Zeng,Vikas Sindhwani cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.SY,math.DS

authors_text: Ailing Zeng,Xuan Ju,Lei Yang,Ruiyuan Gao,Xizhou Zhu,Bo Dai,Qiang Xu
title: DeciWatch: A Simple Baseline for 10x Efficient 2D and 3D Pose Estimation
title_zh: DeciWatch：10 倍高效 2D 和 3D 姿势估计的简单基准
abstract: This paper proposes a simple baseline framework for video-based 2D/3D human pose estimation that can achieve 10 times efficiency improvement over existing works without any performance degradation, named DeciWatch. Unlike current solutions that estimate each frame in a video, DeciWatch introduces a simple yet effective sample-denoise-recover framework that only watches sparsely sampled frames, taking advantage of the continuity of human motions and the lightweight pose representation. Specifically, DeciWatch uniformly samples less than 10% video frames for detailed estimation, denoises the estimated 2D/3D poses with an efficient Transformer architecture, and then accurately recovers the rest of the frames using another Transformer-based network. Comprehensive experimental results on three video-based human pose estimation and body mesh recovery tasks with four datasets validate the efficiency and effectiveness of DeciWatch. Code is available at https://github.com/cure-lab/DeciWatch.
summary: This paper proposes a simple baseline framework for video-based 2D/3D human pose estimation that can achieve 10 times efficiency improvement over existing works without any performance degradation, named DeciWatch. Unlike current solutions that estimate each frame in a video, DeciWatch introduces a simple yet effective sample-denoise-recover framework that only watches sparsely sampled frames, taking advantage of the continuity of human motions and the lightweight pose representation. Specifically, DeciWatch uniformly samples less than 10% video frames for detailed estimation, denoises the estimated 2D/3D poses with an efficient Transformer architecture, and then accurately recovers the rest of the frames using another Transformer-based network. Comprehensive experimental results on three video-based human pose estimation and body mesh recovery tasks with four datasets validate the efficiency and effectiveness of DeciWatch. Code is available at https://github.com/cure-lab/DeciWatch.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于视频的 2D/3D 人体姿态估计的简单基线框架，该框架可实现比现有作品 10 倍的效率提升，且性能不会下降，名为 DeciWatch。与估计视频中每一帧的当前解决方案不同，DeciWatch 引入了一个简单而有效的样本去噪恢复框架，该框架仅监视稀疏采样的帧，利用人体运动的连续性和轻量级姿势表示。具体来说，DeciWatch 统一采样不到 10% 的视频帧进行详细估计，使用高效的 Transformer 架构对估计的 2D/3D 姿势进行去噪，然后使用另一个基于 Transformer 的网络准确恢复其余帧。使用四个数据集对三个基于视频的人体姿势估计和身体网格恢复任务进行的综合实验结果验证了 DeciWatch 的效率和有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/cure-lab/DeciWatch 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeciWatch框架，通过稀疏采样和Transformer网络实现视频中2D/3D人体姿态估计效率提升10倍。
AI.motivation: 现有视频姿态估计方法需处理每一帧导致效率低下，而人体运动具有连续性特征可被利用。
AI.method: 采用采样-去噪-恢复框架：稀疏采样视频帧进行详细估计，用轻量Transformer去噪姿态，再通过另一Transformer网络恢复其余帧。
AI.result: 在三个任务四个数据集上验证了DeciWatch的效率与有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: DeciWatch通过运动连续性假设和高效网络设计，为视频姿态估计提供了简单有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Alex Falcon,Giuseppe Serra,Oswald Lanz
title: Learning video retrieval models with relevance-aware online mining
title_zh: 通过相关性感知在线挖掘学习视频检索模型
comment: Accepted at 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP 2021)
comments: Accepted at 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP 2021)
abstract: Due to the amount of videos and related captions uploaded every hour, deep learning-based solutions for cross-modal video retrieval are attracting more and more attention. A typical approach consists in learning a joint text-video embedding space, where the similarity of a video and its associated caption is maximized, whereas a lower similarity is enforced with all the other captions, called negatives. This approach assumes that only the video and caption pairs in the dataset are valid, but different captions - positives - may also describe its visual contents, hence some of them may be wrongly penalized. To address this shortcoming, we propose the Relevance-Aware Negatives and Positives mining (RANP) which, based on the semantics of the negatives, improves their selection while also increasing the similarity of other valid positives. We explore the influence of these techniques on two video-text datasets: EPIC-Kitchens-100 and MSR-VTT. By using the proposed techniques, we achieve considerable improvements in terms of nDCG and mAP, leading to state-of-the-art results, e.g. +5.3% nDCG and +3.0% mAP on EPIC-Kitchens-100. We share code and pretrained models at \url{https://github.com/aranciokov/ranp}.
summary: Due to the amount of videos and related captions uploaded every hour, deep learning-based solutions for cross-modal video retrieval are attracting more and more attention. A typical approach consists in learning a joint text-video embedding space, where the similarity of a video and its associated caption is maximized, whereas a lower similarity is enforced with all the other captions, called negatives. This approach assumes that only the video and caption pairs in the dataset are valid, but different captions - positives - may also describe its visual contents, hence some of them may be wrongly penalized. To address this shortcoming, we propose the Relevance-Aware Negatives and Positives mining (RANP) which, based on the semantics of the negatives, improves their selection while also increasing the similarity of other valid positives. We explore the influence of these techniques on two video-text datasets: EPIC-Kitchens-100 and MSR-VTT. By using the proposed techniques, we achieve considerable improvements in terms of nDCG and mAP, leading to state-of-the-art results, e.g. +5.3% nDCG and +3.0% mAP on EPIC-Kitchens-100. We share code and pretrained models at \url{https://github.com/aranciokov/ranp}.
abstract_zh: 由于每小时上传的视频和相关字幕数量巨大，基于深度学习的跨模态视频检索解决方案吸引了越来越多的关注。典型的方法包括学习联合文本视频嵌入空间，其中视频及其相关字幕的相似性最大化，而与所有其他字幕（称为负片）强制执行较低的相似性。这种方法假设数据集中只有视频和字幕对是有效的，但不同的字幕（正片）也可能描述其视觉内容，因此其中一些可能会受到错误的惩罚。为了解决这个缺点，我们提出了相关性感知否定和肯定挖掘（RANP），它基于否定的语义，改进了它们的选择，同时也增加了其他有效肯定的相似性。我们探讨了这些技术对两个视频文本数据集的影响：EPIC-Kitchens-100 和 MSR-VTT。通过使用所提出的技术，我们在 nDCG 和 mAP 方面取得了相当大的改进，从而获得了最先进的结果，例如EPIC-Kitchens-100 上 +5.3% nDCG 和 +3.0% mAP。我们在 \url{https://github.com/aranciokov/ranp} 共享代码和预训练模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于相关性感知的在线挖掘方法（RANP），用于改进跨模态视频检索模型，通过优化负样本选择和提升有效正样本相似度，显著提高检索性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法假设数据集中仅存在唯一有效视频-字幕对，导致其他可能描述视频内容的正样本被错误惩罚，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 提出RANP方法，基于负样本语义优化其选择策略，同时增强其他有效正样本的相似度计算，提升嵌入空间学习效果。
AI.result: 在EPIC-Kitchens-100和MSR-VTT数据集上，nDCG和mAP指标显著提升，例如EPIC-Kitchens-100的nDCG提升5.3%，mAP提升3.0%。
AI.conclusion: RANP方法有效解决了传统负样本挖掘的局限性，达到跨模态视频检索的最先进水平，并开源了代码和预训练模型。

search_text: Learning video retrieval models with relevance-aware online mining 通过相关性感知在线挖掘学习视频检索模型 Due to the amount of videos and related captions uploaded every hour, deep learning-based solutions for cross-modal video retrieval are attracting more and more attention. A typical approach consists in learning a joint text-video embedding space, where the similarity of a video and its associated caption is maximized, whereas a lower similarity is enforced with all the other captions, called negatives. This approach assumes that only the video and caption pairs in the dataset are valid, but different captions - positives - may also describe its visual contents, hence some of them may be wrongly penalized. To address this shortcoming, we propose the Relevance-Aware Negatives and Positives mining (RANP) which, based on the semantics of the negatives, improves their selection while also increasing the similarity of other valid positives. We explore the influence of these techniques on two video-text datasets: EPIC-Kitchens-100 and MSR-VTT. By using the proposed techniques, we achieve considerable improvements in terms of nDCG and mAP, leading to state-of-the-art results, e.g. +5.3% nDCG and +3.0% mAP on EPIC-Kitchens-100. We share code and pretrained models at \url{https://github.com/aranciokov/ranp}. 由于每小时上传的视频和相关字幕数量巨大，基于深度学习的跨模态视频检索解决方案吸引了越来越多的关注。典型的方法包括学习联合文本视频嵌入空间，其中视频及其相关字幕的相似性最大化，而与所有其他字幕（称为负片）强制执行较低的相似性。这种方法假设数据集中只有视频和字幕对是有效的，但不同的字幕（正片）也可能描述其视觉内容，因此其中一些可能会受到错误的惩罚。为了解决这个缺点，我们提出了相关性感知否定和肯定挖掘（RANP），它基于否定的语义，改进了它们的选择，同时也增加了其他有效肯定的相似性。我们探讨了这些技术对两个视频文本数据集的影响：EPIC-Kitchens-100 和 MSR-VTT。通过使用所提出的技术，我们在 nDCG 和 mAP 方面取得了相当大的改进，从而获得了最先进的结果，例如EPIC-Kitchens-100 上 +5.3% nDCG 和 +3.0% mAP。我们在 \url{https://github.com/aranciokov/ranp} 共享代码和预训练模型。 本文提出一种基于相关性感知的在线挖掘方法（RANP），用于改进跨模态视频检索模型，通过优化负样本选择和提升有效正样本相似度，显著提高检索性能。 Alex Falcon,Giuseppe Serra,Oswald Lanz cs.CV

authors_text: Liam Dugan,Eleni Miltsakaki,Shriyash Upadhyay,Etan Ginsberg,Hannah Gonzalez,Dayheon Choi,Chuning Yuan,Chris Callison-Burch
title: A Feasibility Study of Answer-Agnostic Question Generation for Education
title_zh: 教育中答案不可知问题生成的可行性研究
comment: To be published in 60th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2022)
comments: To be published in 60th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2022)
abstract: We conduct a feasibility study into the applicability of answer-agnostic question generation models to textbook passages. We show that a significant portion of errors in such systems arise from asking irrelevant or uninterpretable questions and that such errors can be ameliorated by providing summarized input. We find that giving these models human-written summaries instead of the original text results in a significant increase in acceptability of generated questions (33% $\rightarrow$ 83%) as determined by expert annotators. We also find that, in the absence of human-written summaries, automatic summarization can serve as a good middle ground.
summary: We conduct a feasibility study into the applicability of answer-agnostic question generation models to textbook passages. We show that a significant portion of errors in such systems arise from asking irrelevant or uninterpretable questions and that such errors can be ameliorated by providing summarized input. We find that giving these models human-written summaries instead of the original text results in a significant increase in acceptability of generated questions (33% $\rightarrow$ 83%) as determined by expert annotators. We also find that, in the absence of human-written summaries, automatic summarization can serve as a good middle ground.
abstract_zh: 我们对答案不可知的问题生成模型对教科书段落的适用性进行了可行性研究。我们表明，此类系统中的很大一部分错误是由提出不相关或无法解释的问题引起的，并且可以通过提供汇总输入来改善此类错误。我们发现，为这些模型提供人工撰写的摘要而不是原始文本，可以显着提高由专家注释者确定的生成问题的可接受性 (33% $\rightarrow$ 83%)。我们还发现，在缺乏人工撰写摘要的情况下，自动摘要可以作为一个很好的中间立场。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究无答案依赖的问题生成模型在教育领域的可行性，探讨通过输入摘要提升生成问题质量的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有问题生成系统常因生成无关或难以理解的问题而影响教育应用效果，需探索改进方案以提高问题质量。
AI.method: 对比使用原始文本与人工摘要作为输入对生成问题质量的影响，并测试自动摘要的替代效果，通过专家标注评估问题接受度。
AI.result: 人工摘要输入使生成问题接受度从33%提升至83%，自动摘要作为中间方案在无人工摘要时表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 输入摘要可显著优化问题生成质量，自动摘要为教育场景提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Anton Bouter,Peter A. N. Bosman
title: GPU-Accelerated Parallel Gene-pool Optimal Mixing in a Gray-Box Optimization Setting
title_zh: 灰盒优化设置中 GPU 加速的并行基因池优化混合
abstract: In a Gray-Box Optimization (GBO) setting that allows for partial evaluations, the fitness of an individual can be updated efficiently after a subset of its variables has been modified. This enables more efficient evolutionary optimization with the Gene-pool Optimal Mixing Evolutionary Algorithm (GOMEA) due to its key strength: Gene-pool Optimal Mixing (GOM). For each solution, GOM performs variation for many (small) sets of variables. To improve efficiency even further, parallel computing can be leveraged. For EAs, typically, this comprises population-wise parallelization. However, unless population sizes are large, this offers limited gains. For large GBO problems, parallelizing GOM-based variation holds greater speed-up potential, regardless of population size. However, this potential cannot be directly exploited because of dependencies between variables. We show how graph coloring can be used to group sets of variables that can undergo variation in parallel without violating dependencies. We test the performance of a CUDA implementation of parallel GOM on a Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) for the Max-Cut problem, a well-known problem for which the dependency structure can be controlled. We find that, for sufficiently large graphs with limited connectivity, finding high-quality solutions can be achieved up to 100 times faster, showcasing the great potential of our approach.
summary: In a Gray-Box Optimization (GBO) setting that allows for partial evaluations, the fitness of an individual can be updated efficiently after a subset of its variables has been modified. This enables more efficient evolutionary optimization with the Gene-pool Optimal Mixing Evolutionary Algorithm (GOMEA) due to its key strength: Gene-pool Optimal Mixing (GOM). For each solution, GOM performs variation for many (small) sets of variables. To improve efficiency even further, parallel computing can be leveraged. For EAs, typically, this comprises population-wise parallelization. However, unless population sizes are large, this offers limited gains. For large GBO problems, parallelizing GOM-based variation holds greater speed-up potential, regardless of population size. However, this potential cannot be directly exploited because of dependencies between variables. We show how graph coloring can be used to group sets of variables that can undergo variation in parallel without violating dependencies. We test the performance of a CUDA implementation of parallel GOM on a Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) for the Max-Cut problem, a well-known problem for which the dependency structure can be controlled. We find that, for sufficiently large graphs with limited connectivity, finding high-quality solutions can be achieved up to 100 times faster, showcasing the great potential of our approach.
abstract_zh: 在允许部分评估的灰盒优化 (GBO) 设置中，在修改个体变量的子集后，可以有效地更新个体的适应度。由于基因库最佳混合进化算法 (GOMEA) 的关键优势：基因库最佳混合 (GOM)，因此可以实现更有效的进化优化。对于每个解决方案，GOM 对许多（小）变量集执行变异。为了进一步提高效率，可以利用并行计算。对于 EA，这通常包括群体并行化。然而，除非人口规模很大，否则这带来的收益有限。对于大型 GBO 问题，无论群体大小如何，并行化基于 GOM 的变异都具有更大的加速潜力。然而，由于变量之间的依赖性，这种潜力无法直接利用。我们展示了如何使用图形着色来对可以并行变化而不违反依赖性的变量集进行分组。我们在图形处理单元 (GPU) 上测试了并行 GOM 的 CUDA 实现的 Max-Cut 问题的性能，这是一个可以控制依赖结构的众所周知的问题。我们发现，对于连接性有限的足够大的图，找到高质量解决方案的速度可以提高 100 倍，这展示了我们方法的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于GPU加速的并行基因池最优混合算法，用于在灰盒优化环境中提高优化效率。
AI.motivation: 在灰盒优化（GBO）环境中，个体适应度可以在部分变量修改后高效更新，而基因池最优混合进化算法（GOMEA）能够通过基因池最优混合（GOM）实现更高效的优化。然而，传统的种群级并行化在种群规模较小时效率提升有限，因此需要探索更高效的并行GOM方法。
AI.method: 本文通过图着色技术将变量分组，使得这些变量可以在不违反依赖关系的前提下并行变异，并在GPU上使用CUDA实现并行GOM算法。
AI.result: 在Max-Cut问题上的实验表明，对于足够大的且连接度有限的图，该方法能够在100倍于传统方法的速度下找到高质量解。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法展示了在灰盒优化环境中利用GPU加速并行GOM的巨大潜力，特别是在处理大规模问题时具有显著的效率提升。

We show how graph coloring can be used to group sets of variables that can undergo variation in parallel without violating dependencies. We test the performance of a CUDA implementation of parallel GOM on a Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) for the Max-Cut problem, a well-known problem for which the dependency structure can be controlled. We find that, for sufficiently large graphs with limited connectivity, finding high-quality solutions can be achieved up to 100 times faster, showcasing the great potential of our approach. 在允许部分评估的灰盒优化 (GBO) 设置中，在修改个体变量的子集后，可以有效地更新个体的适应度。由于基因库最佳混合进化算法 (GOMEA) 的关键优势：基因库最佳混合 (GOM)，因此可以实现更有效的进化优化。对于每个解决方案，GOM 对许多（小）变量集执行变异。为了进一步提高效率，可以利用并行计算。对于 EA，这通常包括群体并行化。然而，除非人口规模很大，否则这带来的收益有限。对于大型 GBO 问题，无论群体大小如何，并行化基于 GOM 的变异都具有更大的加速潜力。然而，由于变量之间的依赖性，这种潜力无法直接利用。我们展示了如何使用图形着色来对可以并行变化而不违反依赖性的变量集进行分组。我们在图形处理单元 (GPU) 上测试了并行 GOM 的 CUDA 实现的 Max-Cut 问题的性能，这是一个可以控制依赖结构的众所周知的问题。我们发现，对于连接性有限的足够大的图，找到高质量解决方案的速度可以提高 100 倍，这展示了我们方法的巨大潜力。 本文提出了一种基于GPU加速的并行基因池最优混合算法，用于在灰盒优化环境中提高优化效率。 Anton Bouter,Peter A. N. Bosman cs.NE

authors_text: Borui Zhao,Quan Cui,Renjie Song,Yiyu Qiu,Jiajun Liang
title: Decoupled Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 解耦知识蒸馏
abstract: State-of-the-art distillation methods are mainly based on distilling deep features from intermediate layers, while the significance of logit distillation is greatly overlooked. To provide a novel viewpoint to study logit distillation, we reformulate the classical KD loss into two parts, i.e., target class knowledge distillation (TCKD) and non-target class knowledge distillation (NCKD). We empirically investigate and prove the effects of the two parts: TCKD transfers knowledge concerning the "difficulty" of training samples, while NCKD is the prominent reason why logit distillation works. More importantly, we reveal that the classical KD loss is a coupled formulation, which (1) suppresses the effectiveness of NCKD and (2) limits the flexibility to balance these two parts. To address these issues, we present Decoupled Knowledge Distillation (DKD), enabling TCKD and NCKD to play their roles more efficiently and flexibly. Compared with complex feature-based methods, our DKD achieves comparable or even better results and has better training efficiency on CIFAR-100, ImageNet, and MS-COCO datasets for image classification and object detection tasks. This paper proves the great potential of logit distillation, and we hope it will be helpful for future research. The code is available at https://github.com/megvii-research/mdistiller.
summary: State-of-the-art distillation methods are mainly based on distilling deep features from intermediate layers, while the significance of logit distillation is greatly overlooked. To provide a novel viewpoint to study logit distillation, we reformulate the classical KD loss into two parts, i.e., target class knowledge distillation (TCKD) and non-target class knowledge distillation (NCKD). We empirically investigate and prove the effects of the two parts: TCKD transfers knowledge concerning the "difficulty" of training samples, while NCKD is the prominent reason why logit distillation works. More importantly, we reveal that the classical KD loss is a coupled formulation, which (1) suppresses the effectiveness of NCKD and (2) limits the flexibility to balance these two parts. To address these issues, we present Decoupled Knowledge Distillation (DKD), enabling TCKD and NCKD to play their roles more efficiently and flexibly. Compared with complex feature-based methods, our DKD achieves comparable or even better results and has better training efficiency on CIFAR-100, ImageNet, and MS-COCO datasets for image classification and object detection tasks. This paper proves the great potential of logit distillation, and we hope it will be helpful for future research. The code is available at https://github.com/megvii-research/mdistiller.
abstract_zh: 最先进的蒸馏方法主要基于从中间层中提取深层特征，而 Logit 蒸馏的重要性被极大地忽视了。为了提供研究 Logit 蒸馏的新观点，我们将经典的 KD 损失重新表述为两部分，即目标类知识蒸馏（TCKD）和非目标类知识蒸馏（NCKD）。我们实证研究并证明了这两部分的效果：TCKD 传递有关训练样本“难度”的知识，而 NCKD 是 Logit 蒸馏起作用的主要原因。更重要的是，我们揭示了经典的 KD 损失是一个耦合公式，它 (1) 抑制了 NCKD 的有效性，(2) 限制了平衡这两部分的灵活性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了解耦知识蒸馏（DKD），使TCKD和NCKD能够更高效、更灵活地发挥各自的作用。与复杂的基于特征的方法相比，我们的 DKD 在图像分类和目标检测任务的 CIFAR-100、ImageNet 和 MS-COCO 数据集上取得了相当甚至更好的结果，并且具有更好的训练效率。本文证明了logit蒸馏的巨大潜力，希望对未来的研究有所帮助。该代码可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/mdistiller 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种解耦的知识蒸馏方法（DKD），通过分离目标类和非目标类知识蒸馏来提升模型训练效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有蒸馏方法过度依赖中间层特征，忽视了logit蒸馏的重要性，且传统KD损失函数存在耦合问题，限制了非目标类知识蒸馏的效果。
AI.method: 将经典KD损失分解为目标类知识蒸馏（TCKD）和非目标类知识蒸馏（NCKD），设计解耦框架使两者独立作用，提升灵活性和效率。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100、ImageNet和MS-COCO数据集上，DKD在图像分类和目标检测任务中达到与复杂特征方法相当或更优的性能，且训练效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 证明了logit蒸馏的潜力，为未来研究提供了新视角，代码已开源。

authors_text: Lennart Bastian,Tobias Czempiel,Christian Heiliger,Konrad Karcz,Ulrich Eck,Benjamin Busam,Nassir Navab
title: Know your sensORs -- A Modality Study For Surgical Action Classification
title_zh: 了解您的传感器——外科手术分类的模态研究
abstract: The surgical operating room (OR) presents many opportunities for automation and optimization. Videos from various sources in the OR are becoming increasingly available. The medical community seeks to leverage this wealth of data to develop automated methods to advance interventional care, lower costs, and improve overall patient outcomes. Existing datasets from OR room cameras are thus far limited in size or modalities acquired, leaving it unclear which sensor modalities are best suited for tasks such as recognizing surgical action from videos. This study demonstrates that surgical action recognition performance can vary depending on the image modalities used. We perform a methodical analysis on several commonly available sensor modalities, presenting two fusion approaches that improve classification performance. The analyses are carried out on a set of multi-view RGB-D video recordings of 18 laparoscopic procedures.
summary: The surgical operating room (OR) presents many opportunities for automation and optimization. Videos from various sources in the OR are becoming increasingly available. The medical community seeks to leverage this wealth of data to develop automated methods to advance interventional care, lower costs, and improve overall patient outcomes. Existing datasets from OR room cameras are thus far limited in size or modalities acquired, leaving it unclear which sensor modalities are best suited for tasks such as recognizing surgical action from videos. This study demonstrates that surgical action recognition performance can vary depending on the image modalities used. We perform a methodical analysis on several commonly available sensor modalities, presenting two fusion approaches that improve classification performance. The analyses are carried out on a set of multi-view RGB-D video recordings of 18 laparoscopic procedures.
abstract_zh: 外科手术室 (OR) 提供了许多自动化和优化的机会。手术室中各种来源的视频变得越来越可用。医学界寻求利用这些丰富的数据来开发自动化方法，以推进介入治疗、降低成本并改善患者的整体治疗结果。迄今为止，手术室摄像机的现有数据集在大小或获取的模式方面受到限制，因此尚不清楚哪种传感器模式最适合从视频中识别手术动作等任务。这项研究表明，手术动作识别性能可能会根据所使用的图像模式而变化。我们对几种常用的传感器模式进行了系统分析，提出了两种提高分类性能的融合方法。分析是对 18 个腹腔镜手术的一组多视图 RGB-D 视频记录进行的。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究不同图像模态对手术动作识别性能的影响，并提出两种融合方法提升分类效果。
AI.motivation: 现有手术室摄像头数据集在规模或模态上存在局限，难以明确哪种传感器模态最适合手术动作识别任务。
AI.method: 对常用传感器模态进行系统分析，提出两种融合方法，并基于18个腹腔镜手术的多视角RGB-D视频数据进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明手术动作识别性能受图像模态影响显著，所提融合方法有效提升了分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 不同传感器模态对分类效果有显著影响，多模态融合方法能有效提升手术动作识别性能，为后续研究提供参考方向。

authors_text: Wenxuan Zou,Muyi Sun
title: Graph Flow: Cross-layer Graph Flow Distillation for Dual Efficient Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 图流：跨层图流蒸馏，实现双重高效医学图像分割
abstract: With the development of deep convolutional neural networks, medical image segmentation has achieved a series of breakthroughs in recent years. However, the high-performance convolutional neural networks always mean numerous parameters and high computation costs, which will hinder the applications in clinical scenarios. Meanwhile, the scarceness of large-scale annotated medical image datasets further impedes the application of high-performance networks. To tackle these problems, we propose Graph Flow, a comprehensive knowledge distillation framework, for both network-efficiency and annotation-efficiency medical image segmentation. Specifically, our core Graph Flow Distillation transfer the essence of cross-layer variations from a well-trained cumbersome teacher network to a non-trained compact student network. In addition, an unsupervised Paraphraser Module is integrated to purify the knowledge of the teacher network, which is also beneficial for the stabilization of training procedure. Furthermore, we build a unified distillation framework by integrating the adversarial distillation and the vanilla logits distillation, which can further refine the final predictions of the compact network. With different teacher networks (conventional convolutional architecture or prevalent transformer architecture) and student networks, we conduct extensive experiments on four medical image datasets with different modalities (Gastric Cancer, Synapse, BUSI, and CVC-ClinicDB).We demonstrate the prominent ability of our method which achieves competitive performance on these datasets. Moreover, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our Graph Flow through a novel semi-supervised paradigm for dual efficient medical image segmentation. Our code will be available at Graph Flow.
summary: With the development of deep convolutional neural networks, medical image segmentation has achieved a series of breakthroughs in recent years. However, the high-performance convolutional neural networks always mean numerous parameters and high computation costs, which will hinder the applications in clinical scenarios. Meanwhile, the scarceness of large-scale annotated medical image datasets further impedes the application of high-performance networks. To tackle these problems, we propose Graph Flow, a comprehensive knowledge distillation framework, for both network-efficiency and annotation-efficiency medical image segmentation. Specifically, our core Graph Flow Distillation transfer the essence of cross-layer variations from a well-trained cumbersome teacher network to a non-trained compact student network. In addition, an unsupervised Paraphraser Module is integrated to purify the knowledge of the teacher network, which is also beneficial for the stabilization of training procedure. Furthermore, we build a unified distillation framework by integrating the adversarial distillation and the vanilla logits distillation, which can further refine the final predictions of the compact network. With different teacher networks (conventional convolutional architecture or prevalent transformer architecture) and student networks, we conduct extensive experiments on four medical image datasets with different modalities (Gastric Cancer, Synapse, BUSI, and CVC-ClinicDB).We demonstrate the prominent ability of our method which achieves competitive performance on these datasets. Moreover, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our Graph Flow through a novel semi-supervised paradigm for dual efficient medical image segmentation. Our code will be available at Graph Flow.
abstract_zh: 随着深度卷积神经网络的发展，医学图像分割近年来取得了一系列突破。然而，高性能的卷积神经网络总是意味着大量的参数和高昂的计算成本，这将阻碍其在临床场景中的应用。同时，大规模带注释的医学图像数据集的稀缺进一步阻碍了高性能网络的应用。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 Graph Flow，一种全面的知识蒸馏框架，用于网络效率和注释效率的医学图像分割。具体来说，我们的核心图流蒸馏将跨层变化的本质从训练有素的繁琐教师网络转移到未经训练的紧凑学生网络。此外，还集成了无监督释义模块，以净化教师网络的知识，这也有利于训练过程的稳定性。此外，我们通过集成对抗性蒸馏和普通逻辑蒸馏来构建统一的蒸馏框架，这可以进一步细化紧凑网络的最终预测。通过不同的教师网络（传统的卷积架构或流行的 Transformer 架构）和学生网络，我们对具有不同模态的四个医学图像数据集（胃癌、突触、BUSI 和 CVC-ClinicDB）进行了广泛的实验。我们证明了我们的方法在这些数据集上实现竞争性能的突出能力。此外，我们通过一种新颖的半监督范例来证明我们的图流的有效性，以实现双重高效的医学图像分割。我们的代码将在 Graph Flow 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Graph Flow框架，通过跨层图流蒸馏实现高效且标注高效的医疗图像分割。
AI.motivation: 高性能卷积网络参数多、计算成本高，且医疗图像标注数据稀缺，限制了其在临床场景的应用。
AI.method: 设计跨层图流蒸馏技术，将教师网络的跨层变化本质传递至学生网络，并引入无监督Paraphraser模块净化知识，结合对抗蒸馏与普通logits蒸馏构建统一框架。
AI.result: 在四个多模态医疗数据集（胃癌、Synapse、BUSI、CVC-ClinicDB）上取得竞争力性能，并通过半监督范式验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: Graph Flow在减少参数量与标注依赖的同时保持分割性能，为临床医疗图像分割提供双高效解决方案。

search_text: Graph Flow: Cross-layer Graph Flow Distillation for Dual Efficient Medical Image Segmentation 图流：跨层图流蒸馏，实现双重高效医学图像分割 With the development of deep convolutional neural networks, medical image segmentation has achieved a series of breakthroughs in recent years. However, the high-performance convolutional neural networks always mean numerous parameters and high computation costs, which will hinder the applications in clinical scenarios. Meanwhile, the scarceness of large-scale annotated medical image datasets further impedes the application of high-performance networks. To tackle these problems, we propose Graph Flow, a comprehensive knowledge distillation framework, for both network-efficiency and annotation-efficiency medical image segmentation. Specifically, our core Graph Flow Distillation transfer the essence of cross-layer variations from a well-trained cumbersome teacher network to a non-trained compact student network. In addition, an unsupervised Paraphraser Module is integrated to purify the knowledge of the teacher network, which is also beneficial for the stabilization of training procedure. Furthermore, we build a unified distillation framework by integrating the adversarial distillation and the vanilla logits distillation, which can further refine the final predictions of the compact network. With different teacher networks (conventional convolutional architecture or prevalent transformer architecture) and student networks, we conduct extensive experiments on four medical image datasets with different modalities (Gastric Cancer, Synapse, BUSI, and CVC-ClinicDB).We demonstrate the prominent ability of our method which achieves competitive performance on these datasets. Moreover, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our Graph Flow through a novel semi-supervised paradigm for dual efficient medical image segmentation. Our code will be available at Graph Flow. 随着深度卷积神经网络的发展，医学图像分割近年来取得了一系列突破。然而，高性能的卷积神经网络总是意味着大量的参数和高昂的计算成本，这将阻碍其在临床场景中的应用。同时，大规模带注释的医学图像数据集的稀缺进一步阻碍了高性能网络的应用。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 Graph Flow，一种全面的知识蒸馏框架，用于网络效率和注释效率的医学图像分割。具体来说，我们的核心图流蒸馏将跨层变化的本质从训练有素的繁琐教师网络转移到未经训练的紧凑学生网络。此外，还集成了无监督释义模块，以净化教师网络的知识，这也有利于训练过程的稳定性。此外，我们通过集成对抗性蒸馏和普通逻辑蒸馏来构建统一的蒸馏框架，这可以进一步细化紧凑网络的最终预测。通过不同的教师网络（传统的卷积架构或流行的 Transformer 架构）和学生网络，我们对具有不同模态的四个医学图像数据集（胃癌、突触、BUSI 和 CVC-ClinicDB）进行了广泛的实验。我们证明了我们的方法在这些数据集上实现竞争性能的突出能力。此外，我们通过一种新颖的半监督范例来证明我们的图流的有效性，以实现双重高效的医学图像分割。我们的代码将在 Graph Flow 上提供。 本文提出Graph Flow框架，通过跨层图流蒸馏实现高效且标注高效的医疗图像分割。 Wenxuan Zou,Muyi Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Javier Grau,Markus Plack,Patrick Haehn,Michael Weinmann,Matthias Hullin
title: Occlusion Fields: An Implicit Representation for Non-Line-of-Sight Surface Reconstruction
title_zh: 遮挡场：非视线表面重建的隐式表示
abstract: Non-line-of-sight reconstruction (NLoS) is a novel indirect imaging modality that aims to recover objects or scene parts outside the field of view from measurements of light that is indirectly scattered off a directly visible, diffuse wall. Despite recent advances in acquisition and reconstruction techniques, the well-posedness of the problem at large, and the recoverability of objects and their shapes in particular, remains an open question. The commonly employed Fermat path criterion is rather conservative with this regard, as it classifies some surfaces as unrecoverable, although they contribute to the signal. In this paper, we use a simpler necessary criterion for an opaque surface patch to be recoverable. Such piece of surface must be directly visible from some point on the wall, and it must occlude the space behind itself. Inspired by recent advances in neural implicit representations, we devise a new representation and reconstruction technique for NLoS scenes that unifies the treatment of recoverability with the reconstruction itself. Our approach, which we validate on various synthetic and experimental datasets, exhibits interesting properties. Unlike memory-inefficient volumetric representations, ours allows to infer adaptively tessellated surfaces from time-of-flight measurements of moderate resolution. It can further recover features beyond the Fermat path criterion, and it is robust to significant amounts of self-occlusion. We believe that this is the first time that these properties have been achieved in one system that, as an additional benefit, is trainable and hence suited for data-driven approaches.
summary: Non-line-of-sight reconstruction (NLoS) is a novel indirect imaging modality that aims to recover objects or scene parts outside the field of view from measurements of light that is indirectly scattered off a directly visible, diffuse wall. Despite recent advances in acquisition and reconstruction techniques, the well-posedness of the problem at large, and the recoverability of objects and their shapes in particular, remains an open question. The commonly employed Fermat path criterion is rather conservative with this regard, as it classifies some surfaces as unrecoverable, although they contribute to the signal. In this paper, we use a simpler necessary criterion for an opaque surface patch to be recoverable. Such piece of surface must be directly visible from some point on the wall, and it must occlude the space behind itself. Inspired by recent advances in neural implicit representations, we devise a new representation and reconstruction technique for NLoS scenes that unifies the treatment of recoverability with the reconstruction itself. Our approach, which we validate on various synthetic and experimental datasets, exhibits interesting properties. Unlike memory-inefficient volumetric representations, ours allows to infer adaptively tessellated surfaces from time-of-flight measurements of moderate resolution. It can further recover features beyond the Fermat path criterion, and it is robust to significant amounts of self-occlusion. We believe that this is the first time that these properties have been achieved in one system that, as an additional benefit, is trainable and hence suited for data-driven approaches.
abstract_zh: 非视距重建 (NLoS) 是一种新颖的间接成像方式，旨在通过测量从直接可见的漫射墙壁间接散射的光来恢复视场之外的物体或场景部分。尽管采集和重建技术最近取得了进展，但整个问题的适定性，特别是物体及其形状的可恢复性，仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。常用的费马路径准则在这方面相当保守，因为它将某些表面分类为不可恢复，尽管它们对信号有贡献。在本文中，我们使用一个更简单的必要标准来使不透明表面补丁可恢复。这样的表面必须从墙上的某个点直接可见，并且它必须遮挡其后面的空间。受神经隐式表示最新进展的启发，我们为 NLoS 场景设计了一种新的表示和重建技术，它将可恢复性的处理与重建本身结合起来。我们的方法在各种合成和实验数据集上进行了验证，表现出有趣的特性。与内存效率低下的体积表示不同，我们的体积表示允许从中等分辨率的飞行时间测量中推断自适应镶嵌曲面。它可以进一步恢复超出费马路径标准的特征，并且对于大量的自遮挡具有鲁棒性。我们相信，这是第一次在一个系统中实现这些属性，作为额外的好处，它是可训练的，因此适合数据驱动的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于隐式表示的非视线（NLoS）表面重建方法，通过分析散射光信号来恢复视线外的物体形状。
AI.motivation: 现有NLoS重建方法（如费马路径准则）过于保守，无法有效恢复部分可重构表面，且难以处理复杂遮挡和高分辨率数据。
AI.method: 提出‘遮挡场’隐式表示方法，结合神经网络与时间飞行测量，通过自适应网格划分和遮挡条件判断实现高效重建，突破费马路径限制。
AI.result: 方法在合成与实验数据集上验证有效，能恢复超出费马路径的表面特征，对自遮挡鲁棒性强，且内存效率优于传统体素表示。
AI.conclusion: 首次将可重构性判断与重建过程统一，提出可训练的隐式表示框架，为数据驱动的NLoS重建提供了新方向。

authors_text: Fengxue Zhang,Brian Nord,Yuxin Chen
title: Learning Representation for Bayesian Optimization with Collision-free Regularization
title_zh: 具有无碰撞正则化的贝叶斯优化的学习表示
abstract: Bayesian optimization has been challenged by datasets with large-scale, high-dimensional, and non-stationary characteristics, which are common in real-world scenarios. Recent works attempt to handle such input by applying neural networks ahead of the classical Gaussian process to learn a latent representation. We show that even with proper network design, such learned representation often leads to collision in the latent space: two points with significantly different observations collide in the learned latent space, leading to degraded optimization performance. To address this issue, we propose LOCo, an efficient deep Bayesian optimization framework which employs a novel regularizer to reduce the collision in the learned latent space and encourage the mapping from the latent space to the objective value to be Lipschitz continuous. LOCo takes in pairs of data points and penalizes those too close in the latent space compared to their target space distance. We provide a rigorous theoretical justification for LOCo by inspecting the regret of this dynamic-embedding-based Bayesian optimization algorithm, where the neural network is iteratively retrained with the regularizer. Our empirical results demonstrate the effectiveness of LOCo on several synthetic and real-world benchmark Bayesian optimization tasks.
summary: Bayesian optimization has been challenged by datasets with large-scale, high-dimensional, and non-stationary characteristics, which are common in real-world scenarios. Recent works attempt to handle such input by applying neural networks ahead of the classical Gaussian process to learn a latent representation. We show that even with proper network design, such learned representation often leads to collision in the latent space: two points with significantly different observations collide in the learned latent space, leading to degraded optimization performance. To address this issue, we propose LOCo, an efficient deep Bayesian optimization framework which employs a novel regularizer to reduce the collision in the learned latent space and encourage the mapping from the latent space to the objective value to be Lipschitz continuous. LOCo takes in pairs of data points and penalizes those too close in the latent space compared to their target space distance. We provide a rigorous theoretical justification for LOCo by inspecting the regret of this dynamic-embedding-based Bayesian optimization algorithm, where the neural network is iteratively retrained with the regularizer. Our empirical results demonstrate the effectiveness of LOCo on several synthetic and real-world benchmark Bayesian optimization tasks.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化面临着现实场景中常见的大规模、高维和非平稳特征的数据集的挑战。最近的工作尝试通过在经典高斯过程之前应用神经网络来学习潜在表示来处理此类输入。我们表明，即使采用正确的网络设计，这种学习到的表示也常常会导致潜在空间中的冲突：观察结果显着不同的两个点在学习到的潜在空间中发生冲突，从而导致优化性能下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 LOCo，一种高效的深度贝叶斯优化框架，它采用一种新颖的正则化器来减少学习潜在空间中的碰撞，并鼓励从潜在空间到目标值的映射是 Lipschitz 连续的。 LOCo 接收成对的数据点，并惩罚那些与目标空间距离相比在潜在空间中距离太近的数据点。我们通过检查这种基于动态嵌入的贝叶斯优化算法的遗憾，为 LOCo 提供了严格的理论论证，其中神经网络使用正则化器迭代地重新训练。我们的实证结果证明了 LOCo 在几个综合和现实世界基准贝叶斯优化任务上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LOCo框架，通过碰撞规避正则化改进贝叶斯优化中的潜在空间表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理大规模高维数据时，神经网络学习的潜在表示易导致观测差异大的点在潜在空间中碰撞，损害优化性能。
AI.method: 设计LOCo框架，引入碰撞惩罚正则化项，通过动态嵌入机制确保潜在空间到目标值的映射满足Lipschitz连续性，并迭代重训练神经网络。
AI.result: 在多个合成及真实基准测试中验证了LOCo在减少潜在空间碰撞和提升优化效果方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LOCo通过理论支撑的正则化方法有效解决了潜在空间碰撞问题，为高维非平稳场景的贝叶斯优化提供了新框架。

search_text: Learning Representation for Bayesian Optimization with Collision-free Regularization 具有无碰撞正则化的贝叶斯优化的学习表示 Bayesian optimization has been challenged by datasets with large-scale, high-dimensional, and non-stationary characteristics, which are common in real-world scenarios. Recent works attempt to handle such input by applying neural networks ahead of the classical Gaussian process to learn a latent representation. We show that even with proper network design, such learned representation often leads to collision in the latent space: two points with significantly different observations collide in the learned latent space, leading to degraded optimization performance. To address this issue, we propose LOCo, an efficient deep Bayesian optimization framework which employs a novel regularizer to reduce the collision in the learned latent space and encourage the mapping from the latent space to the objective value to be Lipschitz continuous. LOCo takes in pairs of data points and penalizes those too close in the latent space compared to their target space distance. We provide a rigorous theoretical justification for LOCo by inspecting the regret of this dynamic-embedding-based Bayesian optimization algorithm, where the neural network is iteratively retrained with the regularizer. Our empirical results demonstrate the effectiveness of LOCo on several synthetic and real-world benchmark Bayesian optimization tasks. 贝叶斯优化面临着现实场景中常见的大规模、高维和非平稳特征的数据集的挑战。最近的工作尝试通过在经典高斯过程之前应用神经网络来学习潜在表示来处理此类输入。我们表明，即使采用正确的网络设计，这种学习到的表示也常常会导致潜在空间中的冲突：观察结果显着不同的两个点在学习到的潜在空间中发生冲突，从而导致优化性能下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 LOCo，一种高效的深度贝叶斯优化框架，它采用一种新颖的正则化器来减少学习潜在空间中的碰撞，并鼓励从潜在空间到目标值的映射是 Lipschitz 连续的。 LOCo 接收成对的数据点，并惩罚那些与目标空间距离相比在潜在空间中距离太近的数据点。我们通过检查这种基于动态嵌入的贝叶斯优化算法的遗憾，为 LOCo 提供了严格的理论论证，其中神经网络使用正则化器迭代地重新训练。我们的实证结果证明了 LOCo 在几个综合和现实世界基准贝叶斯优化任务上的有效性。 本文提出LOCo框架，通过碰撞规避正则化改进贝叶斯优化中的潜在空间表示学习。 Fengxue Zhang,Brian Nord,Yuxin Chen cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Nina L. Corvelo Benz,Manuel Gomez Rodriguez
title: Counterfactual Inference of Second Opinions
title_zh: 第二意见的反事实推理
abstract: Automated decision support systems that are able to infer second opinions from experts can potentially facilitate a more efficient allocation of resources; they can help decide when and from whom to seek a second opinion. In this paper, we look at the design of this type of support systems from the perspective of counterfactual inference. We focus on a multiclass classification setting and first show that, if experts make predictions on their own, the underlying causal mechanism generating their predictions needs to satisfy a desirable set invariant property. Further, we show that, for any causal mechanism satisfying this property, there exists an equivalent mechanism where the predictions by each expert are generated by independent sub-mechanisms governed by a common noise. This motivates the design of a set invariant Gumbel-Max structural causal model where the structure of the noise governing the sub-mechanisms underpinning the model depends on an intuitive notion of similarity between experts which can be estimated from data. Experiments on both synthetic and real data show that our model can be used to infer second opinions more accurately than its non-causal counterpart.
summary: Automated decision support systems that are able to infer second opinions from experts can potentially facilitate a more efficient allocation of resources; they can help decide when and from whom to seek a second opinion. In this paper, we look at the design of this type of support systems from the perspective of counterfactual inference. We focus on a multiclass classification setting and first show that, if experts make predictions on their own, the underlying causal mechanism generating their predictions needs to satisfy a desirable set invariant property. Further, we show that, for any causal mechanism satisfying this property, there exists an equivalent mechanism where the predictions by each expert are generated by independent sub-mechanisms governed by a common noise. This motivates the design of a set invariant Gumbel-Max structural causal model where the structure of the noise governing the sub-mechanisms underpinning the model depends on an intuitive notion of similarity between experts which can be estimated from data. Experiments on both synthetic and real data show that our model can be used to infer second opinions more accurately than its non-causal counterpart.
abstract_zh: 能够推断专家第二意见的自动化决策支持系统有可能促进更有效的资源分配；他们可以帮助决定何时向谁寻求第二意见。在本文中，我们从反事实推理的角度来研究此类支持系统的设计。我们关注多类分类设置，并首先表明，如果专家自己做出预测，则生成其预测的潜在因果机制需要满足理想的集合不变属性。此外，我们表明，对于满足此属性的任何因果机制，都存在一个等效机制，其中每个专家的预测都是由受共同噪声控制的独立子机制生成的。这激发了一组不变的 Gumbel-Max 结构因果模型的设计，其中控制支撑模型的子机制的噪声结构取决于可以从数据估计的专家之间相似性的直观概念。对合成数据和真实数据的实验表明，我们的模型可以比非因果模型更准确地推断第二意见。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于反事实推理的二阶意见推断方法，通过因果模型提高决策支持系统的准确性。
AI.motivation: 自动化决策支持系统需高效分配资源，确定何时及向谁寻求专家二阶意见，现有方法缺乏因果推理框架导致准确性不足。
AI.method: 构建满足集不变性约束的Gumbel-Max结构因果模型，通过专家间相似性估计噪声结构，实现独立子机制的因果推断。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上，该模型较非因果方法在二阶意见推断任务中提升准确率。
AI.conclusion: 基于因果机制的集不变性模型能有效捕捉专家预测的潜在生成机制，为二阶意见推断提供更可靠的决策支持。
