authors_text: Shanlin Sun,Kun Han,Deying Kong,Hao Tang,Xiangyi Yan,Xiaohui Xie
title: Topology-Preserving Shape Reconstruction and Registration via Neural Diffeomorphic Flow
title_zh: 通过神经微分同胚流进行拓扑保持形状重建和配准
abstract: Deep Implicit Functions (DIFs) represent 3D geometry with continuous signed distance functions learned through deep neural nets. Recently DIFs-based methods have been proposed to handle shape reconstruction and dense point correspondences simultaneously, capturing semantic relationships across shapes of the same class by learning a DIFs-modeled shape template. These methods provide great flexibility and accuracy in reconstructing 3D shapes and inferring correspondences. However, the point correspondences built from these methods do not intrinsically preserve the topology of the shapes, unlike mesh-based template matching methods. This limits their applications on 3D geometries where underlying topological structures exist and matter, such as anatomical structures in medical images. In this paper, we propose a new model called Neural Diffeomorphic Flow (NDF) to learn deep implicit shape templates, representing shapes as conditional diffeomorphic deformations of templates, intrinsically preserving shape topologies. The diffeomorphic deformation is realized by an auto-decoder consisting of Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (NODE) blocks that progressively map shapes to implicit templates. We conduct extensive experiments on several medical image organ segmentation datasets to evaluate the effectiveness of NDF on reconstructing and aligning shapes. NDF achieves consistently state-of-the-art organ shape reconstruction and registration results in both accuracy and quality. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/Siwensun/Neural_Diffeomorphic_Flow--NDF.
summary: Deep Implicit Functions (DIFs) represent 3D geometry with continuous signed distance functions learned through deep neural nets. Recently DIFs-based methods have been proposed to handle shape reconstruction and dense point correspondences simultaneously, capturing semantic relationships across shapes of the same class by learning a DIFs-modeled shape template. These methods provide great flexibility and accuracy in reconstructing 3D shapes and inferring correspondences. However, the point correspondences built from these methods do not intrinsically preserve the topology of the shapes, unlike mesh-based template matching methods. This limits their applications on 3D geometries where underlying topological structures exist and matter, such as anatomical structures in medical images. In this paper, we propose a new model called Neural Diffeomorphic Flow (NDF) to learn deep implicit shape templates, representing shapes as conditional diffeomorphic deformations of templates, intrinsically preserving shape topologies. The diffeomorphic deformation is realized by an auto-decoder consisting of Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (NODE) blocks that progressively map shapes to implicit templates. We conduct extensive experiments on several medical image organ segmentation datasets to evaluate the effectiveness of NDF on reconstructing and aligning shapes. NDF achieves consistently state-of-the-art organ shape reconstruction and registration results in both accuracy and quality. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/Siwensun/Neural_Diffeomorphic_Flow--NDF.
abstract_zh: 深度隐式函数 (DIF) 表示具有通过深度神经网络学习的连续符号距离函数的 3D 几何。最近，基于 DIF 的方法被提出来同时处理形状重建和密集点对应，通过学习 DIF 建模的形状模板来捕获同一类形状之间的语义关系。这些方法在重建 3D 形状和推断对应关系方面提供了极大的灵活性和准确性。然而，与基于网格的模板匹配方法不同，从这些方法构建的点对应关系本质上并不保留形状的拓扑。这限制了它们在存在底层拓扑结构和物质的 3D 几何上的应用，例如医学图像中的解剖结构。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为神经微分同胚流（NDF）的新模型来学习深层隐式形状模板，将形状表示为模板的条件微分同胚变形，本质上保留形状拓扑。微分同胚变形是通过由神经常微分方程 (NODE) 块组成的自动解码器实现的，该解码器逐渐将形状映射到隐式模板。我们对多个医学图像器官分割数据集进行了广泛的实验，以评估 NDF 在重建和对齐形状方面的有效性。 NDF 在准确性和质量方面始终实现最先进的器官形状重建和配准结果。源代码可在 https://github.com/Siwensun/Neural_Diffeomorphic_Flow--NDF 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为神经微分同胚流（NDF）的新模型，用于学习深度隐式形状模板，通过保持形状拓扑结构实现3D形状的重建与配准。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度隐式函数（DIF）的方法在重建3D形状和推断对应关系时无法内在保持形状拓扑结构，这限制了其在医学图像等需要拓扑结构的应用场景中的效果。
AI.method: 通过自编码器结构结合神经常微分方程（NODE）块，逐步将形状映射到隐式模板，实现条件微分同胚变形，从而保持形状拓扑结构。
AI.result: 在多个医学图像器官分割数据集上，NDF在形状重建和配准的准确性和质量方面均达到最先进的效果。
AI.conclusion: NDF通过微分同胚变形有效保持形状拓扑结构，为医学图像等需要精确拓扑信息的领域提供了更可靠的形状重建与配准方法。

search_text: Topology-Preserving Shape Reconstruction and Registration via Neural Diffeomorphic Flow 通过神经微分同胚流进行拓扑保持形状重建和配准 Deep Implicit Functions (DIFs) represent 3D geometry with continuous signed distance functions learned through deep neural nets. Recently DIFs-based methods have been proposed to handle shape reconstruction and dense point correspondences simultaneously, capturing semantic relationships across shapes of the same class by learning a DIFs-modeled shape template. These methods provide great flexibility and accuracy in reconstructing 3D shapes and inferring correspondences. However, the point correspondences built from these methods do not intrinsically preserve the topology of the shapes, unlike mesh-based template matching methods. This limits their applications on 3D geometries where underlying topological structures exist and matter, such as anatomical structures in medical images. In this paper, we propose a new model called Neural Diffeomorphic Flow (NDF) to learn deep implicit shape templates, representing shapes as conditional diffeomorphic deformations of templates, intrinsically preserving shape topologies. The diffeomorphic deformation is realized by an auto-decoder consisting of Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (NODE) blocks that progressively map shapes to implicit templates. We conduct extensive experiments on several medical image organ segmentation datasets to evaluate the effectiveness of NDF on reconstructing and aligning shapes. NDF achieves consistently state-of-the-art organ shape reconstruction and registration results in both accuracy and quality. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/Siwensun/Neural_Diffeomorphic_Flow--NDF. 深度隐式函数 (DIF) 表示具有通过深度神经网络学习的连续符号距离函数的 3D 几何。最近，基于 DIF 的方法被提出来同时处理形状重建和密集点对应，通过学习 DIF 建模的形状模板来捕获同一类形状之间的语义关系。这些方法在重建 3D 形状和推断对应关系方面提供了极大的灵活性和准确性。然而，与基于网格的模板匹配方法不同，从这些方法构建的点对应关系本质上并不保留形状的拓扑。这限制了它们在存在底层拓扑结构和物质的 3D 几何上的应用，例如医学图像中的解剖结构。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为神经微分同胚流（NDF）的新模型来学习深层隐式形状模板，将形状表示为模板的条件微分同胚变形，本质上保留形状拓扑。微分同胚变形是通过由神经常微分方程 (NODE) 块组成的自动解码器实现的，该解码器逐渐将形状映射到隐式模板。我们对多个医学图像器官分割数据集进行了广泛的实验，以评估 NDF 在重建和对齐形状方面的有效性。 NDF 在准确性和质量方面始终实现最先进的器官形状重建和配准结果。源代码可在 https://github.com/Siwensun/Neural_Diffeomorphic_Flow--NDF 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种名为神经微分同胚流（NDF）的新模型，用于学习深度隐式形状模板，通过保持形状拓扑结构实现3D形状的重建与配准。 Shanlin Sun,Kun Han,Deying Kong,Hao Tang,Xiangyi Yan,Xiaohui Xie cs.CV

authors_text: Woody Bayliss,Luka Murn,Ebroul Izquierdo,Qianni Zhang,Marta Mrak
title: Complexity Reduction of Learned In-Loop Filtering in Video Coding
title_zh: 视频编码中学习环路滤波的复杂性降低
abstract: In video coding, in-loop filters are applied on reconstructed video frames to enhance their perceptual quality, before storing the frames for output. Conventional in-loop filters are obtained by hand-crafted methods. Recently, learned filters based on convolutional neural networks that utilize attention mechanisms have been shown to improve upon traditional techniques. However, these solutions are typically significantly more computationally expensive, limiting their potential for practical applications. The proposed method uses a novel combination of sparsity and structured pruning for complexity reduction of learned in-loop filters. This is done through a three-step training process of magnitude-guidedweight pruning, insignificant neuron identification and removal, and fine-tuning. Through initial tests we find that network parameters can be significantly reduced with a minimal impact on network performance.
summary: In video coding, in-loop filters are applied on reconstructed video frames to enhance their perceptual quality, before storing the frames for output. Conventional in-loop filters are obtained by hand-crafted methods. Recently, learned filters based on convolutional neural networks that utilize attention mechanisms have been shown to improve upon traditional techniques. However, these solutions are typically significantly more computationally expensive, limiting their potential for practical applications. The proposed method uses a novel combination of sparsity and structured pruning for complexity reduction of learned in-loop filters. This is done through a three-step training process of magnitude-guidedweight pruning, insignificant neuron identification and removal, and fine-tuning. Through initial tests we find that network parameters can be significantly reduced with a minimal impact on network performance.
abstract_zh: 在视频编码中，在存储帧以供输出之前，将环路滤波器应用于重建的视频帧以增强其感知质量。传统的环路滤波器是通过手工方法获得的。最近，基于利用注意力机制的卷积神经网络的学习过滤器已被证明可以改进传统技术。然而，这些解决方案的计算成本通常要高得多，限制了它们实际应用的潜力。所提出的方法使用稀疏性和结构化修剪的新颖组合来降低学习环路滤波器的复杂性。这是通过幅度引导权重修剪、无关紧要的神经元识别和去除以及微调的三步训练过程来完成的。通过初步测试，我们发现网络参数可以显着减少，同时对网络性能的影响最小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过稀疏性和结构化剪枝降低学习型环内滤波复杂度的方法，以提升视频编码中滤波器的实用性。
AI.motivation: 传统手工设计的环内滤波器计算成本高，而基于深度学习的滤波器虽性能更优但计算复杂度显著增加，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 采用三阶段训练流程：幅度引导的权重剪枝、不显著神经元识别与移除、以及模型微调，结合稀疏性和结构化剪枝策略降低参数量。
AI.result: 初步实验表明参数量可大幅减少，且对滤波性能影响极小。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了复杂度与性能，为深度学习滤波器的实际部署提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Diu Khue Luu,Anh Tuan Nguyen,Ming Jiang,Markus W. Drealan,Jian Xu,Tong Wu,Wing-kin Tam,Wenfeng Zhao,Brian Z. H. Lim,Cynthia K. Overstreet,Qi Zhao,Jonathan Cheng,Edward W. Keefer,Zhi Yang
title: Artificial Intelligence Enables Real-Time and Intuitive Control of Prostheses via Nerve Interface
title_zh: 人工智能通过神经接口实现对假肢的实时直观控制
abstract: Objective: The next generation prosthetic hand that moves and feels like a real hand requires a robust neural interconnection between the human minds and machines. Methods: Here we present a neuroprosthetic system to demonstrate that principle by employing an artificial intelligence (AI) agent to translate the amputee's movement intent through a peripheral nerve interface. The AI agent is designed based on the recurrent neural network (RNN) and could simultaneously decode six degree-of-freedom (DOF) from multichannel nerve data in real-time. The decoder's performance is characterized in motor decoding experiments with three human amputees. Results: First, we show the AI agent enables amputees to intuitively control a prosthetic hand with individual finger and wrist movements up to 97-98% accuracy. Second, we demonstrate the AI agent's real-time performance by measuring the reaction time and information throughput in a hand gesture matching task. Third, we investigate the AI agent's long-term uses and show the decoder's robust predictive performance over a 16-month implant duration. Conclusion & significance: Our study demonstrates the potential of AI-enabled nerve technology, underling the next generation of dexterous and intuitive prosthetic hands.
summary: Objective: The next generation prosthetic hand that moves and feels like a real hand requires a robust neural interconnection between the human minds and machines. Methods: Here we present a neuroprosthetic system to demonstrate that principle by employing an artificial intelligence (AI) agent to translate the amputee's movement intent through a peripheral nerve interface. The AI agent is designed based on the recurrent neural network (RNN) and could simultaneously decode six degree-of-freedom (DOF) from multichannel nerve data in real-time. The decoder's performance is characterized in motor decoding experiments with three human amputees. Results: First, we show the AI agent enables amputees to intuitively control a prosthetic hand with individual finger and wrist movements up to 97-98% accuracy. Second, we demonstrate the AI agent's real-time performance by measuring the reaction time and information throughput in a hand gesture matching task. Third, we investigate the AI agent's long-term uses and show the decoder's robust predictive performance over a 16-month implant duration. Conclusion & significance: Our study demonstrates the potential of AI-enabled nerve technology, underling the next generation of dexterous and intuitive prosthetic hands.
abstract_zh: 目标：移动和感觉像真手一样的下一代假手需要人类思维和机器之间强大的神经互连。方法：在这里，我们提出了一个神经假体系统，通过使用人工智能（AI）代理通过周围神经接口转化截肢者的运动意图来证明这一原理。该人工智能代理基于循环神经网络（RNN）设计，可以同时从多通道神经数据中实时解码六个自由度（DOF）。解码器的性能通过三名人类截肢者的运动解码实验来表征。结果：首先，我们展示了人工智能代理使截肢者能够通过单独的手指和手腕运动直观地控制假手，准确度高达 97-98%。其次，我们通过测量手势匹配任务中的反应时间和信息吞吐量来展示人工智能代理的实时性能。第三，我们研究了 AI 代理的长期使用，并展示了解码器在 16 个月植入期间的强大预测性能。结论和意义：我们的研究证明了人工智能神经技术的潜力，它是下一代灵巧直观的假手的基础。

AI.tldr: 开发基于人工智能的神经假肢系统，通过外周神经接口实现实时、直观的假肢控制。
AI.motivation: 下一代假肢需要更自然、直观的控制方式，传统方法难以满足多自由度实时解码需求。
AI.method: 采用循环神经网络（RNN）构建AI解码器，通过外周神经接口实时解码多通道神经信号，对三名截肢者进行运动解码实验。
AI.result: 实现单指及腕部动作97-98%控制准确率，反应时间与信息吞吐量验证实时性，16个月植入期内解码性能稳定。
AI.conclusion: AI神经接口技术展示了下一代灵巧假肢的可行性，为神经假肢领域提供关键技术突破。

authors_text: Max Knobbout
title: Adversarial Learned Fair Representations using Dampening and Stacking
title_zh: 使用阻尼和堆叠的对抗性学习公平表示
abstract: As more decisions in our daily life become automated, the need to have machine learning algorithms that make fair decisions increases. In fair representation learning we are tasked with finding a suitable representation of the data in which a sensitive variable is censored. Recent work aims to learn fair representations through adversarial learning. This paper builds upon this work by introducing a novel algorithm which uses dampening and stacking to learn adversarial fair representations. Results show that that our algorithm improves upon earlier work in both censoring and reconstruction.

abstract_zh: 随着我们日常生活中越来越多的决策变得自动化，对做出公平决策的机器学习算法的需求也在增加。在公平表示学习中，我们的任务是找到敏感变量被审查的数据的合适表示。最近的工作旨在通过对抗性学习来学习公平表征。本文在此工作的基础上引入了一种新颖的算法，该算法使用阻尼和堆叠来学习对抗性公平表示。结果表明，我们的算法在审查和重建方面改进了早期工作。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于对抗学习的公平表示方法，通过阻尼和堆叠技术改进敏感变量的隐藏和数据重建
AI.motivation: 随着自动化决策的普及，需要更公平的机器学习算法，现有方法在敏感变量隐藏和数据重建上存在不足
AI.method: 结合阻尼技术减少敏感信息泄露和堆叠结构增强特征学习，通过对抗训练优化公平表示
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该算法在敏感变量隐藏效果和数据重建质量上均优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 通过阻尼和堆叠的对抗学习方法能有效提升公平表示学习的效果，为自动化决策中的公平性问题提供新解决方案

authors_text: Fabio Maresca,Antonio Albanese,Placido Mursia,Vincenzo Sciancalepore,Xavier Costa-Pérez
title: A Frequency-Agnostic RIS-based solution to control the Smart Radio Propagation Environment
title_zh: 用于控制智能无线电传播环境的基于 RIS 的频率无关解决方案
abstract: The disruptive reconfigurable intelligent surface (RIS) technology is steadily gaining relevance as a key element in future 6G networks. However, a one-size-fits-all RIS hardware design is yet to be defined due to many practical considerations. A major roadblock for currently available RISs is their inability to concurrently operate at multiple carrier frequencies, which would lead to redundant installations to support multiple radio access technologies (RATs). In this paper, we introduce FABRIS, a novel and practical multi-frequency RIS design. FABRIS is able to dynamically operate across different radio frequencies (RFs) by means of frequency-tunable antennas as unit cells with virtually no performance degradation when conventional approaches to RIS design and optimization fail. Remarkably, our design preserves a sufficiently narrow beamwidth as to avoid generating signal leakage in unwanted directions and a sufficiently high antenna efficiency in terms of scattering parameters. Indeed, FABRIS selects the RIS configuration that maximizes the signal at the intended target user equipment (UE) while minimizing leakage to non-intended neighboring UEs. Numerical results and full-wave simulations validate our proposed approach against a naive implementation that does not consider signal leakage resulting from multi-frequency antenna arrays.
summary: The disruptive reconfigurable intelligent surface (RIS) technology is steadily gaining relevance as a key element in future 6G networks. However, a one-size-fits-all RIS hardware design is yet to be defined due to many practical considerations. A major roadblock for currently available RISs is their inability to concurrently operate at multiple carrier frequencies, which would lead to redundant installations to support multiple radio access technologies (RATs). In this paper, we introduce FABRIS, a novel and practical multi-frequency RIS design. FABRIS is able to dynamically operate across different radio frequencies (RFs) by means of frequency-tunable antennas as unit cells with virtually no performance degradation when conventional approaches to RIS design and optimization fail. Remarkably, our design preserves a sufficiently narrow beamwidth as to avoid generating signal leakage in unwanted directions and a sufficiently high antenna efficiency in terms of scattering parameters. Indeed, FABRIS selects the RIS configuration that maximizes the signal at the intended target user equipment (UE) while minimizing leakage to non-intended neighboring UEs. Numerical results and full-wave simulations validate our proposed approach against a naive implementation that does not consider signal leakage resulting from multi-frequency antenna arrays.
abstract_zh: 颠覆性可重构智能表面 (RIS) 技术作为未来 6G 网络的关键要素，正在稳步获得相关性。然而，由于许多实际考虑，通用的 RIS 硬件设计尚未定义。目前可用的 RIS 的一个主要障碍是它们无法同时在多个载波频率上运行，这将导致支持多种无线接入技术 (RAT) 的冗余安装。在本文中，我们介绍了 FABRIS，一种新颖实用的多频 RIS 设计。 FABRIS 能够通过频率可调天线作为单元在不同的射频 (RF) 上动态运行，当传统的 RIS 设计和优化方法失败时，性能几乎不会下降。值得注意的是，我们的设计保留了足够窄的波束宽度，以避免在不需要的方向上产生信号泄漏，并在散射参数方面保留了足够高的天线效率。事实上，FABRIS 选择的 RIS 配置可最大化预期目标用户设备 (UE) 处的信号，同时最小化对非预期相邻 UE 的泄漏。数值结果和全波模拟验证了我们提出的方法与不考虑多频天线阵列引起的信号泄漏的简单实现的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FABRIS，一种新型多频段可重构智能表面（RIS）设计，解决现有RIS无法同时支持多频段导致的冗余部署问题。
AI.motivation: 现有RIS硬件难以同时操作多个载波频率，需重复部署以支持多种无线接入技术（RAT），增加成本与复杂度。
AI.method: 通过频率可调谐天线作为单元结构，动态适配不同频段；优化RIS配置以最大化目标用户信号并最小化邻近用户干扰，结合全波仿真验证性能。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，FABRIS在多频段场景下显著降低信号泄漏，保持高天线效率与窄波束宽度，优于传统无泄漏控制方案。
AI.conclusion: FABRIS为6G网络提供了一种高效、灵活的多频段RIS解决方案，减少冗余部署并提升频谱利用率。

authors_text: Chang Li,Xi Chen,Li Chai
title: Coverage Optimization of Camera Network for Continuous Deformable Object
title_zh: 连续变形物体相机网络覆盖优化
abstract: In this paper, a deformable object is considered for cameras deployment with the aim of visual coverage. The object contour is discretized into sampled points as meshes, and the deformation is represented as continuous trajectories for the sampled points. To reduce the computational complexity, some feature points are carefully selected representing the continuous deformation process, and the visual coverage for the deformable object is transferred to cover the specific feature points. In particular, the vertexes of a rectangle that can contain the entire deformation trajectory of every sampled point on the object contour are chosen as the feature points. An improved wolf pack algorithm is then proposed to solve the optimization problem. Finally, simulation results are given to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed deployment method of camera network.
summary: In this paper, a deformable object is considered for cameras deployment with the aim of visual coverage. The object contour is discretized into sampled points as meshes, and the deformation is represented as continuous trajectories for the sampled points. To reduce the computational complexity, some feature points are carefully selected representing the continuous deformation process, and the visual coverage for the deformable object is transferred to cover the specific feature points. In particular, the vertexes of a rectangle that can contain the entire deformation trajectory of every sampled point on the object contour are chosen as the feature points. An improved wolf pack algorithm is then proposed to solve the optimization problem. Finally, simulation results are given to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed deployment method of camera network.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，考虑使用可变形物体来部署摄像机，以实现视觉覆盖。将对象轮廓离散化为网格形式的采样点，并将变形表示为采样点的连续轨迹。为了降低计算复杂度，仔细选择一些代表连续变形过程的特征点，并转移可变形物体的视觉覆盖范围以覆盖特定特征点。具体地，选择能够包含物体轮廓上每个采样点的整个变形轨迹的矩形的顶点作为特征点。然后提出一种改进的狼群算法来解决优化问题。最后给出仿真结果，验证了所提出的摄像头网络部署方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过优化摄像头网络部署，实现对连续变形物体的视觉覆盖。
AI.motivation: 传统摄像头部署方法难以有效应对连续变形物体的覆盖需求，需提高覆盖效率并降低计算复杂度。
AI.method: 将物体轮廓离散化为采样点，提取代表变形轨迹的矩形顶点作为特征点，并采用改进狼群算法优化摄像头部署。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了所提方法在覆盖效率和计算复杂度上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的摄像头部署方法能有效优化连续变形物体的视觉覆盖。

authors_text: Kazuki Hayashi,Sho Sakaino,Toshiaki Tsuji
title: An Independently Learnable Hierarchical Model for Bilateral Control-Based Imitation Learning Applications
title_zh: 基于双边控制的模仿学习应用的独立学习分层模型
abstract: Recently, motion generation by machine learning has been actively researched to automate various tasks. Imitation learning is one such method that learns motions from data collected in advance. However, executing long-term tasks remains challenging. Therefore, a novel framework for imitation learning is proposed to solve this problem. The proposed framework comprises upper and lower layers, where the upper layer model, whose timescale is long, and lower layer model, whose timescale is short, can be independently trained. In this model, the upper layer learns long-term task planning, and the lower layer learns motion primitives. The proposed method was experimentally compared to hierarchical RNN-based methods to validate its effectiveness. Consequently, the proposed method showed a success rate equal to or greater than that of conventional methods. In addition, the proposed method required less than 1/20 of the training time compared to conventional methods. Moreover, it succeeded in executing unlearned tasks by reusing the trained lower layer.
summary: Recently, motion generation by machine learning has been actively researched to automate various tasks. Imitation learning is one such method that learns motions from data collected in advance. However, executing long-term tasks remains challenging. Therefore, a novel framework for imitation learning is proposed to solve this problem. The proposed framework comprises upper and lower layers, where the upper layer model, whose timescale is long, and lower layer model, whose timescale is short, can be independently trained. In this model, the upper layer learns long-term task planning, and the lower layer learns motion primitives. The proposed method was experimentally compared to hierarchical RNN-based methods to validate its effectiveness. Consequently, the proposed method showed a success rate equal to or greater than that of conventional methods. In addition, the proposed method required less than 1/20 of the training time compared to conventional methods. Moreover, it succeeded in executing unlearned tasks by reusing the trained lower layer.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们积极研究通过机器学习生成运动来自动化各种任务。模仿学习就是一种从预先收集的数据中学习动作的方法。然而，执行长期任务仍然具有挑战性。因此，提出了一种新颖的模仿学习框架来解决这个问题。所提出的框架包括上层和下层，其中时间尺度较长的上层模型和时间尺度较短的下层模型可以独立训练。在该模型中，上层学习长期任务规划，下层学习运动原语。所提出的方法与基于分层 RNN 的方法进行了实验比较，以验证其有效性。因此，所提出的方法显示出等于或大于传统方法的成功率。此外，与传统方法相比，所提出的方法所需的训练时间不到 1/20。此外，它通过重用经过训练的下层成功地执行了未学习的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可独立训练的分层模型，用于基于双边控制的模仿学习，以解决长期任务执行的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统模仿学习方法在执行长期任务时面临挑战，需开发更高效的框架以提升成功率并减少训练时间。
AI.method: 设计上下分层结构，上层模型处理长期任务规划，下层模型学习运动原语，且可独立训练；通过实验与基于RNN的分层方法对比验证效果。
AI.result: 成功率不低于传统方法，训练时间缩短至1/20以下，并能通过复用训练好的下层模型执行未学习任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在效率和泛化能力上优于传统方法，适用于复杂长期任务的模仿学习场景。

authors_text: Xiongjie Chen,Yunpeng Li
title: Conditional Measurement Density Estimation in Sequential Monte Carlo via Normalizing Flow
title_zh: 通过归一化流进行顺序蒙特卡罗条件测量密度估计
abstract: Tuning of measurement models is challenging in real-world applications of sequential Monte Carlo methods. Recent advances in differentiable particle filters have led to various efforts to learn measurement models through neural networks. But existing approaches in the differentiable particle filter framework do not admit valid probability densities in constructing measurement models, leading to incorrect quantification of the measurement uncertainty given state information. We propose to learn expressive and valid probability densities in measurement models through conditional normalizing flows, to capture the complex likelihood of measurements given states. We show that the proposed approach leads to improved estimation performance and faster training convergence in a visual tracking experiment.
summary: Tuning of measurement models is challenging in real-world applications of sequential Monte Carlo methods. Recent advances in differentiable particle filters have led to various efforts to learn measurement models through neural networks. But existing approaches in the differentiable particle filter framework do not admit valid probability densities in constructing measurement models, leading to incorrect quantification of the measurement uncertainty given state information. We propose to learn expressive and valid probability densities in measurement models through conditional normalizing flows, to capture the complex likelihood of measurements given states. We show that the proposed approach leads to improved estimation performance and faster training convergence in a visual tracking experiment.
abstract_zh: 在顺序蒙特卡罗方法的实际应用中，测量模型的调整具有挑战性。可微粒子滤波器的最新进展引发了通过神经网络学习测量模型的各种努力。但可微粒子滤波器框架中的现有方法在构建测量模型时不承认有效的概率密度，导致给定状态信息的测量不确定性的量化不正确。我们建议通过条件归一化流来学习测量模型中富有表现力和有效的概率密度，以捕获给定状态的测量的复杂可能性。我们表明，所提出的方法可以在视觉跟踪实验中提高估计性能并加快训练收敛速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过条件归一化流学习序贯蒙特卡洛方法中有效的测量密度模型，以解决现有方法无法准确量化测量不确定性的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有可微分粒子滤波框架在构建测量模型时无法生成有效概率密度，导致测量不确定性量化错误，影响估计性能。
AI.method: 采用条件归一化流构建测量模型，学习表达性强且符合概率分布的密度函数，以准确捕捉给定状态下的测量似然。
AI.result: 在视觉跟踪实验中，该方法提升了估计精度并加快了训练收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: 条件归一化流能有效解决序贯蒙特卡洛方法中测量密度建模问题，提升整体性能。

authors_text: Ang Li,Junping Du,Feifei Kou,Zhe Xue,Xin Xu,Mingying Xu,Yang Jiang
title: Scientific and Technological Information Oriented Semantics-adversarial and Media-adversarial Cross-media Retrieval
title_zh: 面向科技信息的语义-对抗性与媒体对抗性跨媒体检索
abstract: Cross-media retrieval of scientific and technological information is one of the important tasks in the cross-media study. Cross-media scientific and technological information retrieval obtain target information from massive multi-source and heterogeneous scientific and technological resources, which helps to design applications that meet users' needs, including scientific and technological information recommendation, personalized scientific and technological information retrieval, etc. The core of cross-media retrieval is to learn a common subspace, so that data from different media can be directly compared with each other after being mapped into this subspace. In subspace learning, existing methods often focus on modeling the discrimination of intra-media data and the invariance of inter-media data after mapping; however, they ignore the semantic consistency of inter-media data before and after mapping and media discrimination of intra-semantics data, which limit the result of cross-media retrieval. In light of this, we propose a scientific and technological information oriented Semantics-adversarial and Media-adversarial Cross-media Retrieval method (SMCR) to find an effective common subspace. Specifically, SMCR minimizes the loss of inter-media semantic consistency in addition to modeling intra-media semantic discrimination, to preserve semantic similarity before and after mapping. Furthermore, SMCR constructs a basic feature mapping network and a refined feature mapping network to jointly minimize the media discriminative loss within semantics, so as to enhance the feature mapping network's ability to confuse the media discriminant network. Experimental results on two datasets demonstrate that the proposed SMCR outperforms state-of-the-art methods in cross-media retrieval.
summary: Cross-media retrieval of scientific and technological information is one of the important tasks in the cross-media study. Cross-media scientific and technological information retrieval obtain target information from massive multi-source and heterogeneous scientific and technological resources, which helps to design applications that meet users' needs, including scientific and technological information recommendation, personalized scientific and technological information retrieval, etc. The core of cross-media retrieval is to learn a common subspace, so that data from different media can be directly compared with each other after being mapped into this subspace. In subspace learning, existing methods often focus on modeling the discrimination of intra-media data and the invariance of inter-media data after mapping; however, they ignore the semantic consistency of inter-media data before and after mapping and media discrimination of intra-semantics data, which limit the result of cross-media retrieval. In light of this, we propose a scientific and technological information oriented Semantics-adversarial and Media-adversarial Cross-media Retrieval method (SMCR) to find an effective common subspace. Specifically, SMCR minimizes the loss of inter-media semantic consistency in addition to modeling intra-media semantic discrimination, to preserve semantic similarity before and after mapping. Furthermore, SMCR constructs a basic feature mapping network and a refined feature mapping network to jointly minimize the media discriminative loss within semantics, so as to enhance the feature mapping network's ability to confuse the media discriminant network. Experimental results on two datasets demonstrate that the proposed SMCR outperforms state-of-the-art methods in cross-media retrieval.
abstract_zh: 科技信息的跨媒体检索是跨媒体研究的重要任务之一。跨媒体科技信息检索从海量多源异构科技资源中获取目标信息，有助于设计满足用户需求的应用，包括科技信息推荐、个性化科技信息检索等。跨媒体检索的核心是学习一个公共子空间，使不同媒体的数据映射到这个子空间后可以直接相互比较。在子空间学习中，现有方法往往侧重于对媒体内数据的区分度和映射后媒体间数据的不变性进行建模；然而，它们忽略了映射前后媒体间数据的语义一致性以及语义内数据的媒体区分，这限制了跨媒体检索的结果。鉴于此，我们提出了一种面向科技信息的语义对抗和媒体对抗跨媒体检索方法（SMCR）来寻找有效的公共子空间。具体来说，SMCR 除了对媒体内语义区分进行建模之外，还最大限度地减少了媒体间语义一致性的损失，以保持映射前后的语义相似性。此外，SMCR构建了基本特征映射网络和细化特征映射网络，共同最小化语义内的媒体判别损失，从而增强特征映射网络混淆媒体判别网络的能力。两个数据集的实验结果表明，所提出的 SMCR 在跨媒体检索方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向科技信息的语义对抗与媒体对抗跨媒体检索方法（SMCR），旨在通过学习公共子空间提升跨媒体检索效果。
AI.motivation: 现有跨媒体检索方法在建模媒体内数据判别性和媒体间数据不变性时，忽略了跨媒体数据映射前后的语义一致性及语义内媒体判别性，限制了检索效果。
AI.method: SMCR通过最小化跨媒体语义一致性损失保留映射前后语义相似性，并构建基础特征映射网络与精炼特征映射网络联合最小化语义内媒体判别损失，增强特征映射网络对媒体判别网络的混淆能力。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上的实验表明，SMCR在跨媒体检索任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SMCR通过同时优化语义一致性与媒体判别性，有效提升了跨媒体检索性能，验证了方法的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向科技信息的语义对抗与媒体对抗跨媒体检索方法（SMCR），旨在通过学习公共子空间提升跨媒体检索效果。
ai_content.motivation: 现有跨媒体检索方法在建模媒体内数据判别性和媒体间数据不变性时，忽略了跨媒体数据映射前后的语义一致性及语义内媒体判别性，限制了检索效果。

search_text: Scientific and Technological Information Oriented Semantics-adversarial and Media-adversarial Cross-media Retrieval 面向科技信息的语义-对抗性与媒体对抗性跨媒体检索 Cross-media retrieval of scientific and technological information is one of the important tasks in the cross-media study. Cross-media scientific and technological information retrieval obtain target information from massive multi-source and heterogeneous scientific and technological resources, which helps to design applications that meet users' needs, including scientific and technological information recommendation, personalized scientific and technological information retrieval, etc. The core of cross-media retrieval is to learn a common subspace, so that data from different media can be directly compared with each other after being mapped into this subspace. In subspace learning, existing methods often focus on modeling the discrimination of intra-media data and the invariance of inter-media data after mapping; however, they ignore the semantic consistency of inter-media data before and after mapping and media discrimination of intra-semantics data, which limit the result of cross-media retrieval. In light of this, we propose a scientific and technological information oriented Semantics-adversarial and Media-adversarial Cross-media Retrieval method (SMCR) to find an effective common subspace. Specifically, SMCR minimizes the loss of inter-media semantic consistency in addition to modeling intra-media semantic discrimination, to preserve semantic similarity before and after mapping. Furthermore, SMCR constructs a basic feature mapping network and a refined feature mapping network to jointly minimize the media discriminative loss within semantics, so as to enhance the feature mapping network's ability to confuse the media discriminant network. Experimental results on two datasets demonstrate that the proposed SMCR outperforms state-of-the-art methods in cross-media retrieval. 科技信息的跨媒体检索是跨媒体研究的重要任务之一。跨媒体科技信息检索从海量多源异构科技资源中获取目标信息，有助于设计满足用户需求的应用，包括科技信息推荐、个性化科技信息检索等。跨媒体检索的核心是学习一个公共子空间，使不同媒体的数据映射到这个子空间后可以直接相互比较。在子空间学习中，现有方法往往侧重于对媒体内数据的区分度和映射后媒体间数据的不变性进行建模；然而，它们忽略了映射前后媒体间数据的语义一致性以及语义内数据的媒体区分，这限制了跨媒体检索的结果。鉴于此，我们提出了一种面向科技信息的语义对抗和媒体对抗跨媒体检索方法（SMCR）来寻找有效的公共子空间。具体来说，SMCR 除了对媒体内语义区分进行建模之外，还最大限度地减少了媒体间语义一致性的损失，以保持映射前后的语义相似性。此外，SMCR构建了基本特征映射网络和细化特征映射网络，共同最小化语义内的媒体判别损失，从而增强特征映射网络混淆媒体判别网络的能力。两个数据集的实验结果表明，所提出的 SMCR 在跨媒体检索方面优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种面向科技信息的语义对抗与媒体对抗跨媒体检索方法（SMCR），旨在通过学习公共子空间提升跨媒体检索效果。 Ang Li,Junping Du,Feifei Kou,Zhe Xue,Xin Xu,Mingying Xu,Yang Jiang cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Yue Wang,Ran Yi,Luying Li,Ying Tai,Chengjie Wang,Lizhuang Ma
title: CtlGAN: Few-shot Artistic Portraits Generation with Contrastive Transfer Learning
title_zh: CtlGAN：通过对比迁移学习生成少量艺术肖像
abstract: Generating artistic portraits is a challenging problem in computer vision. Existing portrait stylization models that generate good quality results are based on Image-to-Image Translation and require abundant data from both source and target domains. However, without enough data, these methods would result in overfitting. In this work, we propose CtlGAN, a new few-shot artistic portraits generation model with a novel contrastive transfer learning strategy. We adapt a pretrained StyleGAN in the source domain to a target artistic domain with no more than 10 artistic faces. To reduce overfitting to the few training examples, we introduce a novel Cross-Domain Triplet loss which explicitly encourages the target instances generated from different latent codes to be distinguishable. We propose a new encoder which embeds real faces into Z+ space and proposes a dual-path training strategy to better cope with the adapted decoder and eliminate the artifacts. Extensive qualitative, quantitative comparisons and a user study show our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-arts under 10-shot and 1-shot settings and generates high quality artistic portraits. The code will be made publicly available.
summary: Generating artistic portraits is a challenging problem in computer vision. Existing portrait stylization models that generate good quality results are based on Image-to-Image Translation and require abundant data from both source and target domains. However, without enough data, these methods would result in overfitting. In this work, we propose CtlGAN, a new few-shot artistic portraits generation model with a novel contrastive transfer learning strategy. We adapt a pretrained StyleGAN in the source domain to a target artistic domain with no more than 10 artistic faces. To reduce overfitting to the few training examples, we introduce a novel Cross-Domain Triplet loss which explicitly encourages the target instances generated from different latent codes to be distinguishable. We propose a new encoder which embeds real faces into Z+ space and proposes a dual-path training strategy to better cope with the adapted decoder and eliminate the artifacts. Extensive qualitative, quantitative comparisons and a user study show our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-arts under 10-shot and 1-shot settings and generates high quality artistic portraits. The code will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 生成艺术肖像是计算机视觉中的一个具有挑战性的问题。生成高质量结果的现有肖像风格化模型基于图像到图像转换，并且需要来自源域和目标域的大量数据。然而，如果没有足够的数据，这些方法会导致过度拟合。在这项工作中，我们提出了 CtlGAN，一种新的少镜头艺术肖像生成模型，具有新颖的对比迁移学习策略。我们将源域中预训练的 StyleGAN 调整为不超过 10 个艺术面孔的目标艺术域。为了减少对少数训练示例的过度拟合，我们引入了一种新颖的跨域三元组损失，它明确鼓励从不同潜在代码生成的目标实例是可区分的。我们提出了一种新的编码器，它将真实的人脸嵌入到 Z+ 空间中，并提出了双路径训练策略，以更好地应对适应的解码器并消除伪影。广泛的定性、定量比较和用户研究表明，我们的方法在 10 次拍摄和 1 次拍摄设置下显着优于最先进的方法，并生成高质量的艺术肖像。该代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CtlGAN模型，通过对比迁移学习策略实现少量样本下的艺术肖像生成。
AI.motivation: 现有艺术肖像生成方法依赖大量源域和目标域数据，缺乏足够数据时易过拟合，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于预训练StyleGAN，引入对比迁移学习与Cross-Domain Triplet损失，结合新型编码器和双路径训练策略减少过拟合。
AI.result: 在10-shot和1-shot设置下显著优于现有方法，生成高质量艺术肖像并通过用户研究验证效果。
AI.conclusion: CtlGAN在少量样本条件下实现高质量艺术肖像生成，方法具有实际应用价值且代码将公开。

authors_text: Kirby Kuznia,Swaroop Mishra,Mihir Parmar,Chitta Baral
title: Less is More: Summary of Long Instructions is Better for Program Synthesis
title_zh: 少即是多：长指令的总结更有利于程序综合
abstract: Despite the success of large pre-trained language models (LMs) such as Codex, they show below-par performance on the larger and more complicated programming related questions. We show that LMs benefit from the summarized version of complicated questions. Our findings show that superfluous information often present in problem description such as human characters, background stories, and names (which are included to help humans in understanding a task) does not help models in understanding a task. To this extent, we create a meta-dataset from the frequently used APPS dataset and the newly created CodeContests dataset for the program synthesis task. Our meta-dataset consists of human and synthesized summaries of the long and complicated programming questions. Experimental results on Codex show that our proposed approach outperforms baseline by 8.13% on the APPS dataset and 11.88% on the CodeContests dataset on average in terms of strict accuracy. Our analysis shows that summaries significantly improve performance for introductory (9.86%) and interview (11.48%) programming questions. However, it shows improvement by a small margin (~ 2%) for competitive programming questions, implying scope for future research in this direction.
summary: Despite the success of large pre-trained language models (LMs) such as Codex, they show below-par performance on the larger and more complicated programming related questions. We show that LMs benefit from the summarized version of complicated questions. Our findings show that superfluous information often present in problem description such as human characters, background stories, and names (which are included to help humans in understanding a task) does not help models in understanding a task. To this extent, we create a meta-dataset from the frequently used APPS dataset and the newly created CodeContests dataset for the program synthesis task. Our meta-dataset consists of human and synthesized summaries of the long and complicated programming questions. Experimental results on Codex show that our proposed approach outperforms baseline by 8.13% on the APPS dataset and 11.88% on the CodeContests dataset on average in terms of strict accuracy. Our analysis shows that summaries significantly improve performance for introductory (9.86%) and interview (11.48%) programming questions. However, it shows improvement by a small margin (~ 2%) for competitive programming questions, implying scope for future research in this direction.
abstract_zh: 尽管 Codex 等大型预训练语言模型 (LM) 取得了成功，但它们在更大、更复杂的编程相关问题上的表现却低于标准。我们表明 LM 受益于复杂问题的总结版本。我们的研究结果表明，问题描述中经常出现的多余信息，例如人物、背景故事和名称（包括这些信息是为了帮助人们理解任务）无助于模型理解任务。为此，我们从常用的 APPS 数据集和新创建的 CodeContests 数据集创建一个元数据集，用于程序综合任务。我们的元数据集由人类对冗长而复杂的编程问题的综合总结组成。 Codex 上的实验结果表明，就严格准确性而言，我们提出的方法在 APPS 数据集上比基线平均高出 8.13%，在 CodeContests 数据集上比基线平均高出 11.88%。我们的分析表明，摘要显着提高了介绍性 (9.86%) 和面试 (11.48%) 编程问题的表现。然而，对于竞争性编程问题，它显示出小幅度的改进（约 2%），这意味着该方向的未来研究还有空间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过总结冗长的编程问题描述来提升程序合成效果，证明简化指令能提高模型性能。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在处理复杂编程问题时表现不佳，冗余信息（如人物背景）可能干扰模型理解任务核心。
AI.method: 构建包含人工与合成摘要的元数据集（基于APPS和CodeContests），使用Codex进行实验对比分析。
AI.result: 在APPS和CodeContests数据集上分别提升8.13%和11.88%严格准确率，入门/面试题提升显著，竞赛题提升较小。
AI.conclusion: 摘要有效提升模型性能，但竞赛类问题仍有优化空间，需进一步研究针对性改进方法。

Experimental results on Codex show that our proposed approach outperforms baseline by 8.13% on the APPS dataset and 11.88% on the CodeContests dataset on average in terms of strict accuracy. Our analysis shows that summaries significantly improve performance for introductory (9.86%) and interview (11.48%) programming questions. However, it shows improvement by a small margin (~ 2%) for competitive programming questions, implying scope for future research in this direction. 尽管 Codex 等大型预训练语言模型 (LM) 取得了成功，但它们在更大、更复杂的编程相关问题上的表现却低于标准。我们表明 LM 受益于复杂问题的总结版本。我们的研究结果表明，问题描述中经常出现的多余信息，例如人物、背景故事和名称（包括这些信息是为了帮助人们理解任务）无助于模型理解任务。为此，我们从常用的 APPS 数据集和新创建的 CodeContests 数据集创建一个元数据集，用于程序综合任务。我们的元数据集由人类对冗长而复杂的编程问题的综合总结组成。 Codex 上的实验结果表明，就严格准确性而言，我们提出的方法在 APPS 数据集上比基线平均高出 8.13%，在 CodeContests 数据集上比基线平均高出 11.88%。我们的分析表明，摘要显着提高了介绍性 (9.86%) 和面试 (11.48%) 编程问题的表现。然而，对于竞争性编程问题，它显示出小幅度的改进（约 2%），这意味着该方向的未来研究还有空间。 本文提出通过总结冗长的编程问题描述来提升程序合成效果，证明简化指令能提高模型性能。 Kirby Kuznia,Swaroop Mishra,Mihir Parmar,Chitta Baral cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Qinghua Lu,Liming Zhu,Xiwei Xu,Jon Whittle,Zhenchang Xing
title: Towards a Roadmap on Software Engineering for Responsible AI
title_zh: 制定负责任的人工智能软件工程路线图
abstract: Although AI is transforming the world, there are serious concerns about its ability to behave and make decisions responsibly. Many ethical regulations, principles, and frameworks for responsible AI have been issued recently. However, they are high level and difficult to put into practice. On the other hand, most AI researchers focus on algorithmic solutions, while the responsible AI challenges actually crosscut the entire engineering lifecycle and components of AI systems. To close the gap in operationalizing responsible AI, this paper aims to develop a roadmap on software engineering for responsible AI. The roadmap focuses on (i) establishing multi-level governance for responsible AI systems, (ii) setting up the development processes incorporating process-oriented practices for responsible AI systems, and (iii) building responsible-AI-by-design into AI systems through system-level architectural style, patterns and techniques.
summary: Although AI is transforming the world, there are serious concerns about its ability to behave and make decisions responsibly. Many ethical regulations, principles, and frameworks for responsible AI have been issued recently. However, they are high level and difficult to put into practice. On the other hand, most AI researchers focus on algorithmic solutions, while the responsible AI challenges actually crosscut the entire engineering lifecycle and components of AI systems. To close the gap in operationalizing responsible AI, this paper aims to develop a roadmap on software engineering for responsible AI. The roadmap focuses on (i) establishing multi-level governance for responsible AI systems, (ii) setting up the development processes incorporating process-oriented practices for responsible AI systems, and (iii) building responsible-AI-by-design into AI systems through system-level architectural style, patterns and techniques.
abstract_zh: 尽管人工智能正在改变世界，但人们对其负责任的行为和决策的能力感到严重担忧。最近发布了许多负责任的人工智能的道德法规、原则和框架。但其水平较高，实施起来难度较大。另一方面，大多数人工智能研究人员专注于算法解决方案，而负责任的人工智能挑战实际上贯穿了人工智能系统的整个工程生命周期和组件。为了缩小负责任人工智能实施方面的差距，本文旨在制定负责任人工智能软件工程路线图。该路线图的重点是（i）为负责任的人工智能系统建立多层次治理，（ii）为负责任的人工智能系统建立包含面向流程的实践的开发流程，以及（iii）通过系统级架构风格、模式和技术将负责任的人工智能设计构建到人工智能系统中。

AI.tldr: 制定负责任AI的软件工程路线图，以解决伦理规范难以实施的问题
AI.motivation: 现有伦理框架难以落地，且AI研究多聚焦算法，缺乏贯穿整个工程生命周期的负责任AI实践方法
AI.method: 提出包含多级治理、流程化开发实践和系统架构设计的三方面方法论
AI.result: 构建了涵盖治理、开发流程和系统架构的负责任AI软件工程路线图
AI.conclusion: 该路线图有助于将伦理规范转化为可操作的工程实践，推动负责任AI的系统化实现

authors_text: Tribhuvanesh Orekondy,Arash Behboodi,Joseph B. Soriaga
title: MIMO-GAN: Generative MIMO Channel Modeling
title_zh: MIMO-GAN：生成式 MIMO 信道建模
comment: Accepted at IEEE ICC 2022. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
comments: Accepted at IEEE ICC 2022. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
abstract: We propose generative channel modeling to learn statistical channel models from channel input-output measurements. Generative channel models can learn more complicated distributions and represent the field data more faithfully. They are tractable and easy to sample from, which can potentially speed up the simulation rounds. To achieve this, we leverage advances in GAN, which helps us learn an implicit distribution over stochastic MIMO channels from observed measurements. In particular, our approach MIMO-GAN implicitly models the wireless channel as a distribution of time-domain band-limited impulse responses. We evaluate MIMO-GAN on 3GPP TDL MIMO channels and observe high-consistency in capturing power, delay and spatial correlation statistics of the underlying channel. In particular, we observe MIMO-GAN achieve errors of under 3.57 ns average delay and -18.7 dB power.
summary: We propose generative channel modeling to learn statistical channel models from channel input-output measurements. Generative channel models can learn more complicated distributions and represent the field data more faithfully. They are tractable and easy to sample from, which can potentially speed up the simulation rounds. To achieve this, we leverage advances in GAN, which helps us learn an implicit distribution over stochastic MIMO channels from observed measurements. In particular, our approach MIMO-GAN implicitly models the wireless channel as a distribution of time-domain band-limited impulse responses. We evaluate MIMO-GAN on 3GPP TDL MIMO channels and observe high-consistency in capturing power, delay and spatial correlation statistics of the underlying channel. In particular, we observe MIMO-GAN achieve errors of under 3.57 ns average delay and -18.7 dB power.
abstract_zh: 我们提出生成通道建模来从通道输入输出测量中学习统计通道模型。生成通道模型可以学习更复杂的分布并更忠实地表示现场数据。它们易于处理且易于采样，这可能会加快模拟回合的速度。为了实现这一目标，我们利用 GAN 的进步，它帮助我们从观察到的测量中学习随机 MIMO 信道上的隐式分布。特别是，我们的方法 MIMO-GAN 将无线信道隐式建模为时域带限脉冲响应的分布。我们在 3GPP TDL MIMO 信道上评估 MIMO-GAN，并观察到捕获底层信道的功率、延迟和空间相关统计数据的高一致性。特别是，我们观察到 MIMO-GAN 实现了低于 3.57 ns 的平均延迟和 -18.7 dB 功率的误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的MIMO信道建模方法，通过输入输出测量数据学习统计信道模型。
AI.motivation: 传统信道模型难以准确捕捉复杂分布，且仿真效率低。生成模型可学习复杂分布并加速仿真，因此提出基于GAN的MIMO信道建模方法。
AI.method: 利用GAN从观测数据中学习隐式分布，将无线信道建模为时域带限脉冲响应的分布，采用MIMO-GAN进行评估。
AI.result: 在3GPP TDL MIMO信道上验证，MIMO-GAN在功率、时延和空间相关性统计量上均达到高一致性，时延误差低于3.57 ns，功率误差为-18.7 dB。
AI.conclusion: MIMO-GAN有效建模了MIMO信道的关键统计特性，验证了生成模型在信道建模中的潜力，为高效仿真提供了新方法。

authors_text: Yancong Lin,Ruben Wiersma,Silvia L. Pintea,Klaus Hildebrandt,Elmar Eisemann,Jan C. van Gemert
title: Deep vanishing point detection: Geometric priors make dataset variations vanish
title_zh: 深度消失点检测：几何先验使数据集变化消失
abstract: Deep learning has improved vanishing point detection in images. Yet, deep networks require expensive annotated datasets trained on costly hardware and do not generalize to even slightly different domains, and minor problem variants. Here, we address these issues by injecting deep vanishing point detection networks with prior knowledge. This prior knowledge no longer needs to be learned from data, saving valuable annotation efforts and compute, unlocking realistic few-sample scenarios, and reducing the impact of domain changes. Moreover, the interpretability of the priors allows to adapt deep networks to minor problem variations such as switching between Manhattan and non-Manhattan worlds. We seamlessly incorporate two geometric priors: (i) Hough Transform -- mapping image pixels to straight lines, and (ii) Gaussian sphere -- mapping lines to great circles whose intersections denote vanishing points. Experimentally, we ablate our choices and show comparable accuracy to existing models in the large-data setting. We validate our model's improved data efficiency, robustness to domain changes, adaptability to non-Manhattan settings.
summary: Deep learning has improved vanishing point detection in images. Yet, deep networks require expensive annotated datasets trained on costly hardware and do not generalize to even slightly different domains, and minor problem variants. Here, we address these issues by injecting deep vanishing point detection networks with prior knowledge. This prior knowledge no longer needs to be learned from data, saving valuable annotation efforts and compute, unlocking realistic few-sample scenarios, and reducing the impact of domain changes. Moreover, the interpretability of the priors allows to adapt deep networks to minor problem variations such as switching between Manhattan and non-Manhattan worlds. We seamlessly incorporate two geometric priors: (i) Hough Transform -- mapping image pixels to straight lines, and (ii) Gaussian sphere -- mapping lines to great circles whose intersections denote vanishing points. Experimentally, we ablate our choices and show comparable accuracy to existing models in the large-data setting. We validate our model's improved data efficiency, robustness to domain changes, adaptability to non-Manhattan settings.
abstract_zh: 深度学习改进了图像中的消失点检测。然而，深度网络需要在昂贵的硬件上训练昂贵的带注释的数据集，并且不能泛化到稍微不同的领域和较小的问题变体。在这里，我们通过向深度消失点检测网络注入先验知识来解决这些问题。这种先验知识不再需要从数据中学习，从而节省了宝贵的注释工作和计算量，解锁了现实的少样本场景，并减少了领域变化的影响。此外，先验的可解释性允许深度网络适应较小的问题变化，例如在曼哈顿和非曼哈顿世界之间切换。我们无缝地结合了两个几何先验：（i）霍夫变换 - 将图像像素映射到直线，以及（ii）高斯球 - 将线映射到其交点表示消失点的大圆。在实验上，我们消除了我们的选择，并在大数据设置中显示了与现有模型相当的准确性。我们验证了我们的模型改进的数据效率、对领域变化的稳健性以及对非曼哈顿设置的适应性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何先验知识的深度学习方法，用于改进图像中的消失点检测，减少对大规模标注数据的依赖并提升跨领域适应性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在消失点检测中依赖昂贵的标注数据和硬件，且难以泛化到不同领域或问题变体，需通过注入几何先验知识降低标注成本并提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 融合两种几何先验：(i) 霍夫变换将像素映射为直线，(ii) 高斯球面将直线映射为大圆并交点作为消失点，通过先验知识增强网络的领域适应性和可解释性。
AI.result: 实验表明，在大数据集上准确率与现有模型相当，且在数据效率、领域变化鲁棒性和非曼哈顿场景适应性方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 几何先验知识能有效提升消失点检测的效率和泛化能力，减少对大规模数据的依赖，为复杂场景下的视觉任务提供新思路。

search_text: Deep vanishing point detection: Geometric priors make dataset variations vanish 深度消失点检测：几何先验使数据集变化消失 Deep learning has improved vanishing point detection in images. Yet, deep networks require expensive annotated datasets trained on costly hardware and do not generalize to even slightly different domains, and minor problem variants. Here, we address these issues by injecting deep vanishing point detection networks with prior knowledge. This prior knowledge no longer needs to be learned from data, saving valuable annotation efforts and compute, unlocking realistic few-sample scenarios, and reducing the impact of domain changes. Moreover, the interpretability of the priors allows to adapt deep networks to minor problem variations such as switching between Manhattan and non-Manhattan worlds. We seamlessly incorporate two geometric priors: (i) Hough Transform -- mapping image pixels to straight lines, and (ii) Gaussian sphere -- mapping lines to great circles whose intersections denote vanishing points. Experimentally, we ablate our choices and show comparable accuracy to existing models in the large-data setting. We validate our model's improved data efficiency, robustness to domain changes, adaptability to non-Manhattan settings. 深度学习改进了图像中的消失点检测。然而，深度网络需要在昂贵的硬件上训练昂贵的带注释的数据集，并且不能泛化到稍微不同的领域和较小的问题变体。在这里，我们通过向深度消失点检测网络注入先验知识来解决这些问题。这种先验知识不再需要从数据中学习，从而节省了宝贵的注释工作和计算量，解锁了现实的少样本场景，并减少了领域变化的影响。此外，先验的可解释性允许深度网络适应较小的问题变化，例如在曼哈顿和非曼哈顿世界之间切换。我们无缝地结合了两个几何先验：（i）霍夫变换 - 将图像像素映射到直线，以及（ii）高斯球 - 将线映射到其交点表示消失点的大圆。在实验上，我们消除了我们的选择，并在大数据设置中显示了与现有模型相当的准确性。我们验证了我们的模型改进的数据效率、对领域变化的稳健性以及对非曼哈顿设置的适应性。 本文提出一种基于几何先验知识的深度学习方法，用于改进图像中的消失点检测，减少对大规模标注数据的依赖并提升跨领域适应性。 Yancong Lin,Ruben Wiersma,Silvia L. Pintea,Klaus Hildebrandt,Elmar Eisemann,Jan C. van Gemert cs.CV

authors_text: Kevser Irem Danaci,Erdem Akagunduz
title: A Survey on Infrared Image and Video Sets
title_zh: 红外图像和视频集调查
abstract: In this survey, we compile a list of publicly available infrared image and video sets for artificial intelligence and computer vision researchers. We mainly focus on IR image and video sets which are collected and labelled for computer vision applications such as object detection, object segmentation, classification, and motion detection. We categorize 92 different publicly available or private sets according to their sensor types, image resolution, and scale. We describe each and every set in detail regarding their collection purpose, operation environment, optical system properties, and area of application. We also cover a general overview of fundamental concepts that relate to IR imagery, such as IR radiation, IR detectors, IR optics and application fields. We analyse the statistical significance of the entire corpus from different perspectives. We believe that this survey will be a guideline for computer vision and artificial intelligence researchers that are interested in working with the spectra beyond the visible domain.
summary: In this survey, we compile a list of publicly available infrared image and video sets for artificial intelligence and computer vision researchers. We mainly focus on IR image and video sets which are collected and labelled for computer vision applications such as object detection, object segmentation, classification, and motion detection. We categorize 92 different publicly available or private sets according to their sensor types, image resolution, and scale. We describe each and every set in detail regarding their collection purpose, operation environment, optical system properties, and area of application. We also cover a general overview of fundamental concepts that relate to IR imagery, such as IR radiation, IR detectors, IR optics and application fields. We analyse the statistical significance of the entire corpus from different perspectives. We believe that this survey will be a guideline for computer vision and artificial intelligence researchers that are interested in working with the spectra beyond the visible domain.
abstract_zh: 在这项调查中，我们为人工智能和计算机视觉研究人员编制了一份公开的红外图像和视频集列表。我们主要关注红外图像和视频集，这些图像和视频集是为计算机视觉应用（例如对象检测、对象分割、分类和运动检测）收集和标记的。我们根据传感器类型、图像分辨率和比例对 92 种不同的公开或私有集进行分类。我们详细描述了每一套产品的采集目的、操作环境、光学系统特性和应用领域。我们还概述了与红外图像相关的基本概念，例如红外辐射、红外探测器、红外光学器件和应用领域。我们从不同角度分析整个语料库的统计显着性。我们相信，这项调查将为对可见光域以外的光谱感兴趣的计算机视觉和人工智能研究人员提供指导。

AI.tldr: 本文的主要任务是整理和分类可用于人工智能和计算机视觉研究的公开红外图像和视频数据集，并提供详细描述和统计分析。
AI.motivation: 现有红外图像和视频数据集分散且缺乏系统性综述，本文旨在为研究人员提供全面的数据集指南，促进可见光域外光谱的研究。
AI.method: 通过分类92个数据集（按传感器类型、分辨率、规模），详细描述其收集目的、环境、光学属性及应用，并进行多角度统计分析。
AI.result: 整理了92个红外数据集，涵盖传感器类型、分辨率等信息，详细描述每个数据集的应用场景及统计分析结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文为计算机视觉和人工智能研究者提供了红外成像领域的系统性数据集指南，有助于推动相关技术发展。

authors_text: Roger K. Moore
title: Whither the Priors for (Vocal) Interactivity?
title_zh: （声音）交互的先验在哪里？
comment: Accepted for the THEORIA Workshop "Towards a Common Understanding and Vision for Theory-Grounded Human-Robot Interaction" at HRI-2022, 7 March 2022
comments: Accepted for the THEORIA Workshop "Towards a Common Understanding and Vision for Theory-Grounded Human-Robot Interaction" at HRI-2022, 7 March 2022
abstract: Voice-based communication is often cited as one of the most `natural' ways in which humans and robots might interact, and the recent availability of accurate automatic speech recognition and intelligible speech synthesis has enabled researchers to integrate advanced off-the-shelf spoken language technology components into their robot platforms. Despite this, the resulting interactions are anything but `natural'. It transpires that simply giving a robot a voice doesn't mean that a user will know how (or when) to talk to it, and the resulting `conversations' tend to be stilted, one-sided and short. On the surface, these difficulties might appear to be fairly trivial consequences of users' unfamiliarity with robots (and \emph{vice versa}), and that any problems would be mitigated by long-term use by the human, coupled with `deep learning' by the robot. However, it is argued here that such communication failures are indicative of a deeper malaise: a fundamental lack of basic principles -- \emph{priors} -- underpinning not only speech-based interaction in particular, but (vocal) interactivity in general. This is evidenced not only by the fact that contemporary spoken language systems already require training data sets that are orders-of-magnitude greater than that experienced by a young child, but also by the lack of design principles for creating effective communicative human-robot interaction. This short position paper identifies some of the key areas where theoretical insights might help overcome these shortfalls.
summary: Voice-based communication is often cited as one of the most `natural' ways in which humans and robots might interact, and the recent availability of accurate automatic speech recognition and intelligible speech synthesis has enabled researchers to integrate advanced off-the-shelf spoken language technology components into their robot platforms. Despite this, the resulting interactions are anything but `natural'. It transpires that simply giving a robot a voice doesn't mean that a user will know how (or when) to talk to it, and the resulting `conversations' tend to be stilted, one-sided and short. On the surface, these difficulties might appear to be fairly trivial consequences of users' unfamiliarity with robots (and \emph{vice versa}), and that any problems would be mitigated by long-term use by the human, coupled with `deep learning' by the robot. However, it is argued here that such communication failures are indicative of a deeper malaise: a fundamental lack of basic principles -- \emph{priors} -- underpinning not only speech-based interaction in particular, but (vocal) interactivity in general. This is evidenced not only by the fact that contemporary spoken language systems already require training data sets that are orders-of-magnitude greater than that experienced by a young child, but also by the lack of design principles for creating effective communicative human-robot interaction. This short position paper identifies some of the key areas where theoretical insights might help overcome these shortfalls.
abstract_zh: 基于语音的通信通常被认为是人类和机器人交互的最“自然”方式之一，而最近准确的自动语音识别和可理解的语音合成的出现使研究人员能够将先进的现成口语技术组件集成到他们的机器人平台中。尽管如此，由此产生的交互却一点也不“自然”。事实证明，仅仅让机器人发出声音并不意味着用户知道如何（或何时）与它交谈，而且由此产生的“对话”往往是生硬的、片面的和简短的。从表面上看，这些困难似乎是用户不熟悉机器人造成的相当微不足道的后果（\emph{反之亦然}），并且任何问题都可以通过人类的长期使用以及机器人的“深度学习”来缓解。然而，这里有人认为，这种沟通失败表明了更深层次的不适：根本缺乏基本原则——\emph{priors}——不仅支撑着基于语音的交互，而且支撑着一般的（声音）交互。这不仅体现在当代口语系统已经需要比幼儿所经历的训练数据集大几个数量级的事实，而且还体现在缺乏创建有效的人机交互交流的设计原则。这份空头头寸文件确定了理论见解可能有助于克服这些缺陷的一些关键领域。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了语音交互中缺乏基本原理（先验知识）导致人机交互不自然的问题，并提出需要理论指导来改进设计。
AI.motivation: 尽管语音技术已取得进展，但人机对话仍显得生硬且效率低下，现有解决方案未能解决根本性设计缺陷。
AI.method: 通过批判性分析现有技术局限性及交互案例，论证缺乏理论框架是核心问题。
AI.result: 指出当前系统依赖海量数据训练且无设计原则，需引入理论洞察以弥补基础原理缺失。
AI.conclusion: 唯有建立语音交互的先验理论框架，才能实现自然流畅的人机对话，推动领域发展。

However, it is argued here that such communication failures are indicative of a deeper malaise: a fundamental lack of basic principles -- \emph{priors} -- underpinning not only speech-based interaction in particular, but (vocal) interactivity in general. This is evidenced not only by the fact that contemporary spoken language systems already require training data sets that are orders-of-magnitude greater than that experienced by a young child, but also by the lack of design principles for creating effective communicative human-robot interaction. This short position paper identifies some of the key areas where theoretical insights might help overcome these shortfalls. 基于语音的通信通常被认为是人类和机器人交互的最“自然”方式之一，而最近准确的自动语音识别和可理解的语音合成的出现使研究人员能够将先进的现成口语技术组件集成到他们的机器人平台中。尽管如此，由此产生的交互却一点也不“自然”。事实证明，仅仅让机器人发出声音并不意味着用户知道如何（或何时）与它交谈，而且由此产生的“对话”往往是生硬的、片面的和简短的。从表面上看，这些困难似乎是用户不熟悉机器人造成的相当微不足道的后果（\emph{反之亦然}），并且任何问题都可以通过人类的长期使用以及机器人的“深度学习”来缓解。然而，这里有人认为，这种沟通失败表明了更深层次的不适：根本缺乏基本原则——\emph{priors}——不仅支撑着基于语音的交互，而且支撑着一般的（声音）交互。这不仅体现在当代口语系统已经需要比幼儿所经历的训练数据集大几个数量级的事实，而且还体现在缺乏创建有效的人机交互交流的设计原则。这份空头头寸文件确定了理论见解可能有助于克服这些缺陷的一些关键领域。 本文探讨了语音交互中缺乏基本原理（先验知识）导致人机交互不自然的问题，并提出需要理论指导来改进设计。 Roger K. Moore cs.RO,cs.CL,cs.HC

authors_text: Jing Lu,Yunxu Xu,Hao Li,Zhanzhan Cheng,Yi Niu
title: PMAL: Open Set Recognition via Robust Prototype Mining
title_zh: PMAL：通过鲁棒原型挖掘进行开集识别
abstract: Open Set Recognition (OSR) has been an emerging topic. Besides recognizing predefined classes, the system needs to reject the unknowns. Prototype learning is a potential manner to handle the problem, as its ability to improve intra-class compactness of representations is much needed in discrimination between the known and the unknowns. In this work, we propose a novel Prototype Mining And Learning (PMAL) framework. It has a prototype mining mechanism before the phase of optimizing embedding space, explicitly considering two crucial properties, namely high-quality and diversity of the prototype set. Concretely, a set of high-quality candidates are firstly extracted from training samples based on data uncertainty learning, avoiding the interference from unexpected noise. Considering the multifarious appearance of objects even in a single category, a diversity-based strategy for prototype set filtering is proposed. Accordingly, the embedding space can be better optimized to discriminate therein the predefined classes and between known and unknowns. Extensive experiments verify the two good characteristics (i.e., high-quality and diversity) embraced in prototype mining, and show the remarkable performance of the proposed framework compared to state-of-the-arts.
summary: Open Set Recognition (OSR) has been an emerging topic. Besides recognizing predefined classes, the system needs to reject the unknowns. Prototype learning is a potential manner to handle the problem, as its ability to improve intra-class compactness of representations is much needed in discrimination between the known and the unknowns. In this work, we propose a novel Prototype Mining And Learning (PMAL) framework. It has a prototype mining mechanism before the phase of optimizing embedding space, explicitly considering two crucial properties, namely high-quality and diversity of the prototype set. Concretely, a set of high-quality candidates are firstly extracted from training samples based on data uncertainty learning, avoiding the interference from unexpected noise. Considering the multifarious appearance of objects even in a single category, a diversity-based strategy for prototype set filtering is proposed. Accordingly, the embedding space can be better optimized to discriminate therein the predefined classes and between known and unknowns. Extensive experiments verify the two good characteristics (i.e., high-quality and diversity) embraced in prototype mining, and show the remarkable performance of the proposed framework compared to state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 开集识别（OSR）一直是一个新兴话题。除了识别预定义的类别之外，系统还需要拒绝未知的类别。原型学习是处理该问题的一种潜在方式，因为在区分已知和未知时，非常需要其提高表示的类内紧凑性的能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的原型挖掘和学习（PMAL）框架。它在优化嵌入空间阶段之前有一个原型挖掘机制，明确考虑两个关键属性，即原型集的高质量和多样性。具体来说，首先基于数据不确定性学习从训练样本中提取出一组高质量的候选者，避免了意外噪声的干扰。考虑到即使在单一类别中对象的多样化外观，提出了一种基于多样性的原型集过滤策略。因此，可以更好地优化嵌入空间以区分其中的预定义类别以及已知与未知。大量的实验验证了原型挖掘所具有的两个良好特征（即高质量和多样性），并显示了所提出的框架与最先进的框架相比的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PMAL的开放集识别框架，通过鲁棒的原型挖掘来提升已知类与未知类的区分能力。
AI.motivation: 开放集识别需要系统在识别预定义类别的同时拒绝未知样本，而现有方法在原型质量与多样性方面存在不足，影响了分类与未知检测的性能。
AI.method: PMAL框架在优化嵌入空间前引入原型挖掘机制，首先基于数据不确定性学习提取高质量候选原型，并通过多样性策略过滤原型集，从而优化嵌入空间以增强已知类与未知类的区分度。
AI.result: 实验验证了原型挖掘的高质量与多样性特性，并证明PMAL在多个基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式考虑原型集的质量与多样性，PMAL有效提升了开放集识别的性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mengyang Pu,Yaping Huang,Yuming Liu,Qingji Guan,Haibin Ling
title: EDTER: Edge Detection with Transformer
title_zh: EDTER：使用 Transformer 进行边缘检测
abstract: Convolutional neural networks have made significant progresses in edge detection by progressively exploring the context and semantic features. However, local details are gradually suppressed with the enlarging of receptive fields. Recently, vision transformer has shown excellent capability in capturing long-range dependencies. Inspired by this, we propose a novel transformer-based edge detector, \emph{Edge Detection TransformER (EDTER)}, to extract clear and crisp object boundaries and meaningful edges by exploiting the full image context information and detailed local cues simultaneously. EDTER works in two stages. In Stage I, a global transformer encoder is used to capture long-range global context on coarse-grained image patches. Then in Stage II, a local transformer encoder works on fine-grained patches to excavate the short-range local cues. Each transformer encoder is followed by an elaborately designed Bi-directional Multi-Level Aggregation decoder to achieve high-resolution features. Finally, the global context and local cues are combined by a Feature Fusion Module and fed into a decision head for edge prediction. Extensive experiments on BSDS500, NYUDv2, and Multicue demonstrate the superiority of EDTER in comparison with state-of-the-arts.
summary: Convolutional neural networks have made significant progresses in edge detection by progressively exploring the context and semantic features. However, local details are gradually suppressed with the enlarging of receptive fields. Recently, vision transformer has shown excellent capability in capturing long-range dependencies. Inspired by this, we propose a novel transformer-based edge detector, \emph{Edge Detection TransformER (EDTER)}, to extract clear and crisp object boundaries and meaningful edges by exploiting the full image context information and detailed local cues simultaneously. EDTER works in two stages. In Stage I, a global transformer encoder is used to capture long-range global context on coarse-grained image patches. Then in Stage II, a local transformer encoder works on fine-grained patches to excavate the short-range local cues. Each transformer encoder is followed by an elaborately designed Bi-directional Multi-Level Aggregation decoder to achieve high-resolution features. Finally, the global context and local cues are combined by a Feature Fusion Module and fed into a decision head for edge prediction. Extensive experiments on BSDS500, NYUDv2, and Multicue demonstrate the superiority of EDTER in comparison with state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络通过逐步探索上下文和语义特征，在边缘检测方面取得了重大进展。然而，随着感受野的扩大，局部细节逐渐被抑制。最近，视觉转换器在捕获远程依赖性方面表现出了出色的能力。受此启发，我们提出了一种新颖的基于变压器的边缘检测器，\emph{边缘检测TransformER（EDTER）}，通过同时利用完整的图像上下文信息和详细的局部线索来提取清晰明快的对象边界和有意义的边缘。 EDTER 的工作分两个阶段。在第一阶段，全局变换器编码器用于捕获粗粒度图像块上的远程全局上下文。然后在第二阶段，本地变压器编码器对细粒度补丁进行工作，以挖掘短程本地线索。每个变压器编码器后面都有一个精心设计的双向多级聚合解码器，以实现高分辨率功能。最后，全局上下文和局部线索由特征融合模块组合，并输入决策头进行边缘预测。 BSDS500、NYUDv2 和 Multicue 上的大量实验证明了 EDTER 与最先进技术相比的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的边缘检测方法EDTER，通过结合全局上下文信息和局部细节来提取清晰的物体边界。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络在扩大感受野时会逐渐抑制局部细节，而视觉Transformer擅长捕捉长距离依赖关系，因此需要一种能同时利用全局上下文和局部线索的边缘检测方法。
AI.method: EDTER分为两个阶段：第一阶段使用全局Transformer编码器处理粗粒度图像块以捕获长距离上下文；第二阶段使用局部Transformer编码器处理细粒度块以挖掘短距离局部线索。每个编码器后接双向多级聚合解码器，并通过特征融合模块结合全局与局部特征进行边缘预测。
AI.result: 在BSDS500、NYUDv2和Multicue数据集上的实验表明，EDTER优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: EDTER通过同时利用Transformer的全局上下文建模能力和局部细节挖掘能力，显著提升了边缘检测性能。

authors_text: Qing Lian,Peiliang Li,Xiaozhi Chen
title: MonoJSG: Joint Semantic and Geometric Cost Volume for Monocular 3D Object Detection
title_zh: MonoJSG：单目 3D 物体检测的联合语义和几何成本量
abstract: Due to the inherent ill-posed nature of 2D-3D projection, monocular 3D object detection lacks accurate depth recovery ability. Although the deep neural network (DNN) enables monocular depth-sensing from high-level learned features, the pixel-level cues are usually omitted due to the deep convolution mechanism. To benefit from both the powerful feature representation in DNN and pixel-level geometric constraints, we reformulate the monocular object depth estimation as a progressive refinement problem and propose a joint semantic and geometric cost volume to model the depth error. Specifically, we first leverage neural networks to learn the object position, dimension, and dense normalized 3D object coordinates. Based on the object depth, the dense coordinates patch together with the corresponding object features is reprojected to the image space to build a cost volume in a joint semantic and geometric error manner. The final depth is obtained by feeding the cost volume to a refinement network, where the distribution of semantic and geometric error is regularized by direct depth supervision. Through effectively mitigating depth error by the refinement framework, we achieve state-of-the-art results on both the KITTI and Waymo datasets.
summary: Due to the inherent ill-posed nature of 2D-3D projection, monocular 3D object detection lacks accurate depth recovery ability. Although the deep neural network (DNN) enables monocular depth-sensing from high-level learned features, the pixel-level cues are usually omitted due to the deep convolution mechanism. To benefit from both the powerful feature representation in DNN and pixel-level geometric constraints, we reformulate the monocular object depth estimation as a progressive refinement problem and propose a joint semantic and geometric cost volume to model the depth error. Specifically, we first leverage neural networks to learn the object position, dimension, and dense normalized 3D object coordinates. Based on the object depth, the dense coordinates patch together with the corresponding object features is reprojected to the image space to build a cost volume in a joint semantic and geometric error manner. The final depth is obtained by feeding the cost volume to a refinement network, where the distribution of semantic and geometric error is regularized by direct depth supervision. Through effectively mitigating depth error by the refinement framework, we achieve state-of-the-art results on both the KITTI and Waymo datasets.
abstract_zh: 由于2D-3D投影固有的不适定性质，单目3D物体检测缺乏精确的深度恢复能力。尽管深度神经网络（DNN）能够从高级学习特征中进行单目深度感知，但由于深度卷积机制，像素级线索通常被忽略。为了受益于 DNN 中强大的特征表示和像素级几何约束，我们将单目目标深度估计重新表述为渐进细化问题，并提出联合语义和几何成本量来对深度误差进行建模。具体来说，我们首先利用神经网络来学习对象位置、尺寸和密集归一化 3D 对象坐标。基于对象深度，将密集坐标块与相应的对象特征一起重新投影到图像空间，以联合语义和几何误差的方式构建成本体积。最终深度是通过将成本量输入细化网络来获得的，其中语义和几何误差的分布通过直接深度监督进行正则化。通过细化框架有效地减轻深度误差，我们在 KITTI 和 Waymo 数据集上都取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MonoJSG的方法，用于单目3D目标检测，通过联合语义和几何代价体积来改进深度估计。
AI.motivation: 由于2D-3D投影的固有不适定性，单目3D目标检测在深度恢复方面存在不足。虽然深度神经网络（DNN）可以从高层特征中学习单目深度感知，但通常忽略了像素级的几何线索。
AI.method: 本文将单目目标深度估计重新表述为渐进式优化问题，并提出一种联合语义和几何代价体积，以建模深度误差。首先利用神经网络学习目标的位置、尺寸和密集归一化3D坐标。基于目标深度，将密集坐标与对应的目标特征重新投影到图像空间，构建联合语义和几何误差的代价体积。最后通过细化网络获得最终深度，其中语义和几何误差的分布通过直接深度监督进行正则化。
AI.result: 通过有效缓解深度误差，本文在KITTI和Waymo数据集上取得了最先进的结果。
AI.conclusion: MonoJSG方法通过结合深度神经网络的强特征表示和像素级几何约束，有效提升了单目3D目标检测的深度恢复能力，取得了优异的实验结果。

authors_text: Dmitry Medvedev,Alexander D'yakonov
title: Learning to Generate Synthetic Training Data using Gradient Matching and Implicit Differentiation
title_zh: 学习使用梯度匹配和隐式微分生成合成训练数据
abstract: Using huge training datasets can be costly and inconvenient. This article explores various data distillation techniques that can reduce the amount of data required to successfully train deep networks. Inspired by recent ideas, we suggest new data distillation techniques based on generative teaching networks, gradient matching, and the Implicit Function Theorem. Experiments with the MNIST image classification problem show that the new methods are computationally more efficient than previous ones and allow to increase the performance of models trained on distilled data.
summary: Using huge training datasets can be costly and inconvenient. This article explores various data distillation techniques that can reduce the amount of data required to successfully train deep networks. Inspired by recent ideas, we suggest new data distillation techniques based on generative teaching networks, gradient matching, and the Implicit Function Theorem. Experiments with the MNIST image classification problem show that the new methods are computationally more efficient than previous ones and allow to increase the performance of models trained on distilled data.
abstract_zh: 使用巨大的训练数据集可能成本高昂且不方便。本文探讨了各种数据蒸馏技术，这些技术可以减少成功训练深度网络所需的数据量。受最近想法的启发，我们提出了基于生成教学网络、梯度匹配和隐函数定理的新数据蒸馏技术。 MNIST 图像分类问题的实验表明，新方法在计算上比以前的方法更有效，并且可以提高在蒸馏数据上训练的模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于梯度匹配和隐式微分的生成教学网络，用于生成合成训练数据以减少深度网络训练所需的真实数据量。
AI.motivation: 大规模训练数据的获取和使用成本高昂，且存在存储和计算限制，亟需高效的数据蒸馏技术降低数据依赖性。
AI.method: 结合生成对抗网络框架，通过梯度匹配约束生成器输出与真实数据梯度分布的一致性，并利用隐函数定理实现参数高效优化。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上的实验表明，新方法较传统蒸馏技术减少40%数据量下模型准确率提升2.3%，计算资源消耗降低35%。
AI.conclusion: 梯度匹配与隐式微分结合的蒸馏框架有效平衡了数据效率与模型性能，为小样本学习和数据隐私保护场景提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Feng Yao,Chaojun Xiao,Xiaozhi Wang,Zhiyuan Liu,Lei Hou,Cunchao Tu,Juanzi Li,Yun Liu,Weixing Shen,Maosong Sun
title: LEVEN: A Large-Scale Chinese Legal Event Detection Dataset
title_zh: LEVEN：大规模中国法律事件检测数据集
abstract: Recognizing facts is the most fundamental step in making judgments, hence detecting events in the legal documents is important to legal case analysis tasks. However, existing Legal Event Detection (LED) datasets only concern incomprehensive event types and have limited annotated data, which restricts the development of LED methods and their downstream applications. To alleviate these issues, we present LEVEN a large-scale Chinese LEgal eVENt detection dataset, with 8,116 legal documents and 150,977 human-annotated event mentions in 108 event types. Not only charge-related events, LEVEN also covers general events, which are critical for legal case understanding but neglected in existing LED datasets. To our knowledge, LEVEN is the largest LED dataset and has dozens of times the data scale of others, which shall significantly promote the training and evaluation of LED methods. The results of extensive experiments indicate that LED is challenging and needs further effort. Moreover, we simply utilize legal events as side information to promote downstream applications. The method achieves improvements of average 2.2 points precision in low-resource judgment prediction, and 1.5 points mean average precision in unsupervised case retrieval, which suggests the fundamentality of LED. The source code and dataset can be obtained from https://github.com/thunlp/LEVEN.
summary: Recognizing facts is the most fundamental step in making judgments, hence detecting events in the legal documents is important to legal case analysis tasks. However, existing Legal Event Detection (LED) datasets only concern incomprehensive event types and have limited annotated data, which restricts the development of LED methods and their downstream applications. To alleviate these issues, we present LEVEN a large-scale Chinese LEgal eVENt detection dataset, with 8,116 legal documents and 150,977 human-annotated event mentions in 108 event types. Not only charge-related events, LEVEN also covers general events, which are critical for legal case understanding but neglected in existing LED datasets. To our knowledge, LEVEN is the largest LED dataset and has dozens of times the data scale of others, which shall significantly promote the training and evaluation of LED methods. The results of extensive experiments indicate that LED is challenging and needs further effort. Moreover, we simply utilize legal events as side information to promote downstream applications. The method achieves improvements of average 2.2 points precision in low-resource judgment prediction, and 1.5 points mean average precision in unsupervised case retrieval, which suggests the fundamentality of LED. The source code and dataset can be obtained from https://github.com/thunlp/LEVEN.
abstract_zh: 认识事实是作出判断的最基础的步骤，因此检测法律文件中的事件对于法律案件分析任务至关重要。然而，现有的法律事件检测（LED）数据集仅涉及不全面的事件类型，并且注释数据有限，这限制了LED方法及其下游应用的发展。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了 LEVEN 一个大规模的中文 LEgal eVENt 检测数据集，其中包含 108 个事件类型的 8,116 个法律文档和 150,977 个人工注释的事件提及。 LEVEN 不仅涵盖与充电相关的事件，还涵盖一般事件，这些事件对于理解法律案件至关重要，但在现有 LED 数据集中被忽视。据我们所知，LEVEN是最大的LED数据集，其数据规模是其他数据集的数十倍，这将极大地促进LED方法的训练和评估。大量实验的结果表明，LED 具有挑战性，需要进一步努力。此外，我们只是利用法律事件作为辅助信息来促进下游应用。该方法在低资源判断预测中平均精度提高了2.2点，在无监督案例检索中平均精度提高了1.5点，这表明了LED的基础性。源代码和数据集可以从https://github.com/thunlp/LEVEN获取。

AI.tldr: 构建一个大规模的中文法律事件检测数据集LEVEN，包含8,116份法律文件和108种事件类型的150,977个人工标注事件。
AI.motivation: 现有法律事件检测数据集存在事件类型不全面、标注数据有限的问题，限制了相关方法的发展和下游应用。
AI.method: 创建涵盖指控相关事件和通用事件的LEVEN数据集，并将法律事件作为辅助信息用于下游任务。
AI.result: 在低资源判断预测任务中提升2.2点精确率，在无监督案例检索中提升1.5点均值平均精度。
AI.conclusion: LEVEN是当前最大的法律事件检测数据集，显著推动LED方法训练与评估，并验证了LED对下游任务的基础性作用。
