search_text: LEVEN: A Large-Scale Chinese Legal Event Detection Dataset LEVEN：大规模中国法律事件检测数据集 Recognizing facts is the most fundamental step in making judgments, hence detecting events in the legal documents is important to legal case analysis tasks. However, existing Legal Event Detection (LED) datasets only concern incomprehensive event types and have limited annotated data, which restricts the development of LED methods and their downstream applications. To alleviate these issues, we present LEVEN a large-scale Chinese LEgal eVENt detection dataset, with 8,116 legal documents and 150,977 human-annotated event mentions in 108 event types. Not only charge-related events, LEVEN also covers general events, which are critical for legal case understanding but neglected in existing LED datasets. To our knowledge, LEVEN is the largest LED dataset and has dozens of times the data scale of others, which shall significantly promote the training and evaluation of LED methods. The results of extensive experiments indicate that LED is challenging and needs further effort. Moreover, we simply utilize legal events as side information to promote downstream applications. The method achieves improvements of average 2.2 points precision in low-resource judgment prediction, and 1.5 points mean average precision in unsupervised case retrieval, which suggests the fundamentality of LED. The source code and dataset can be obtained from https://github.com/thunlp/LEVEN. 认识事实是作出判断的最基础的步骤，因此检测法律文件中的事件对于法律案件分析任务至关重要。然而，现有的法律事件检测（LED）数据集仅涉及不全面的事件类型，并且注释数据有限，这限制了LED方法及其下游应用的发展。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了 LEVEN 一个大规模的中文 LEgal eVENt 检测数据集，其中包含 108 个事件类型的 8,116 个法律文档和 150,977 个人工注释的事件提及。 LEVEN 不仅涵盖与充电相关的事件，还涵盖一般事件，这些事件对于理解法律案件至关重要，但在现有 LED 数据集中被忽视。据我们所知，LEVEN是最大的LED数据集，其数据规模是其他数据集的数十倍，这将极大地促进LED方法的训练和评估。大量实验的结果表明，LED 具有挑战性，需要进一步努力。此外，我们只是利用法律事件作为辅助信息来促进下游应用。该方法在低资源判断预测中平均精度提高了2.2点，在无监督案例检索中平均精度提高了1.5点，这表明了LED的基础性。源代码和数据集可以从https://github.com/thunlp/LEVEN获取。 构建一个大规模的中文法律事件检测数据集LEVEN，包含8,116份法律文件和108种事件类型的150,977个人工标注事件。 Feng Yao,Chaojun Xiao,Xiaozhi Wang,Zhiyuan Liu,Lei Hou,Cunchao Tu,Juanzi Li,Yun Liu,Weixing Shen,Maosong Sun cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Pengyi Li,Hongyao Tang,Tianpei Yang,Xiaotian Hao,Tong Sang,Yan Zheng,Jianye Hao,Matthew E. Taylor,Wenyuan Tao,Zhen Wang,Fazl Barez
title: PMIC: Improving Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Progressive Mutual Information Collaboration
title_zh: PMIC：通过渐进式互信息协作改进多智能体强化学习
comment: The paper has been accepted by The Thirty-ninth International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2022) and the Cooperative AI Workshop at 35th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2021)
comments: The paper has been accepted by The Thirty-ninth International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2022) and the Cooperative AI Workshop at 35th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2021)
abstract: Learning to collaborate is critical in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL). Previous works promote collaboration by maximizing the correlation of agents' behaviors, which is typically characterized by Mutual Information (MI) in different forms. However, we reveal sub-optimal collaborative behaviors also emerge with strong correlations, and simply maximizing the MI can, surprisingly, hinder the learning towards better collaboration. To address this issue, we propose a novel MARL framework, called Progressive Mutual Information Collaboration (PMIC), for more effective MI-driven collaboration. PMIC uses a new collaboration criterion measured by the MI between global states and joint actions. Based on this criterion, the key idea of PMIC is maximizing the MI associated with superior collaborative behaviors and minimizing the MI associated with inferior ones. The two MI objectives play complementary roles by facilitating better collaborations while avoiding falling into sub-optimal ones. Experiments on a wide range of MARL benchmarks show the superior performance of PMIC compared with other algorithms.
summary: Learning to collaborate is critical in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL). Previous works promote collaboration by maximizing the correlation of agents' behaviors, which is typically characterized by Mutual Information (MI) in different forms. However, we reveal sub-optimal collaborative behaviors also emerge with strong correlations, and simply maximizing the MI can, surprisingly, hinder the learning towards better collaboration. To address this issue, we propose a novel MARL framework, called Progressive Mutual Information Collaboration (PMIC), for more effective MI-driven collaboration. PMIC uses a new collaboration criterion measured by the MI between global states and joint actions. Based on this criterion, the key idea of PMIC is maximizing the MI associated with superior collaborative behaviors and minimizing the MI associated with inferior ones. The two MI objectives play complementary roles by facilitating better collaborations while avoiding falling into sub-optimal ones. Experiments on a wide range of MARL benchmarks show the superior performance of PMIC compared with other algorithms.
abstract_zh: 学习协作对于多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 至关重要。先前的工作通过最大化代理行为的相关性来促进协作，其典型特征是不同形式的互信息（MI）。然而，我们发现次优的协作行为也会出现强相关性，并且简单地最大化 MI 可能会令人惊讶地阻碍学习更好的协作。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的 MARL 框架，称为渐进式互信息协作 (PMIC)，以实现更有效的 MI 驱动的协作。 PMIC 使用由 MI 衡量的全球国家和联合行动之间的新协作标准。基于这个标准，PMIC的关键思想是最大化与优秀协作行为相关的MI并最小化与较差协作行为相关的MI。这两个 MI 目标发挥着互补作用，促进更好的合作，同时避免陷入次优合作。各种 MARL 基准测试的实验表明，与其他算法相比，PMIC 具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PMIC的多智能体强化学习框架，通过渐进式互信息协作机制优化智能体间的协作效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过最大化智能体行为相关性（互信息）促进协作，但强相关性可能导致次优协作行为，单纯最大化互信息反而阻碍更优协作的学习。
AI.method: PMIC以全局状态与联合动作的互信息为协作标准，通过最大化优质协作行为的互信息并最小化劣质协作的互信息，实现互补优化。
AI.result: 在多个MARL基准测试中，PMIC相比其他算法展现出更优越的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: PMIC通过区分优质与劣质协作行为的互信息调控，有效避免次优解，显著提升了多智能体协作学习的效率与效果。

authors_text: Haihang Wang,He Xu,Yihan Meng
title: Biomimetic Evaluation of an Underwater Soft Hand Through Deep Learning-based 3D Pose Reconstruction
title_zh: 通过基于深度学习的 3D 姿态重建对水下软手进行仿生评估
comment: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (Volume: 7, Issue: 4, October 2022)
comments: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (Volume: 7, Issue: 4, October 2022)
abstract: Soft robotic hand shows considerable promise for various grasping applications. However, the sensing and reconstruction of the robot pose will cause limitation during the design and fabrication. In this work, we present a novel 3D pose reconstruction approach to analyze the grasping motion of a bidirectional soft robotic hand using experiment videos. The images from top, front, back, left, right view were collected using an one-camera-multiple-mirror imaging device. The coordinate and orientation information of soft fingers are detected based on deep learning methods. Faster RCNN model is used to detect the position of fingertips, while U-Net model is applied to calculate the side boundary of the fingers. Based on the kinematics, the corresponding coordinate and orientation databases are established. The 3D pose reconstructed result presents a satisfactory performance and good accuracy. Using efficacy coefficient method, the finger contribution of the bending angle and distance between fingers of soft robot hand is analyzed by compared with that of human hand. The results show that the soft robot hand perform a human-like motion in both single-direction and bidirectional grasping.
summary: Soft robotic hand shows considerable promise for various grasping applications. However, the sensing and reconstruction of the robot pose will cause limitation during the design and fabrication. In this work, we present a novel 3D pose reconstruction approach to analyze the grasping motion of a bidirectional soft robotic hand using experiment videos. The images from top, front, back, left, right view were collected using an one-camera-multiple-mirror imaging device. The coordinate and orientation information of soft fingers are detected based on deep learning methods. Faster RCNN model is used to detect the position of fingertips, while U-Net model is applied to calculate the side boundary of the fingers. Based on the kinematics, the corresponding coordinate and orientation databases are established. The 3D pose reconstructed result presents a satisfactory performance and good accuracy. Using efficacy coefficient method, the finger contribution of the bending angle and distance between fingers of soft robot hand is analyzed by compared with that of human hand. The results show that the soft robot hand perform a human-like motion in both single-direction and bidirectional grasping.
abstract_zh: 软机器人手在各种抓取应用中显示出巨大的前景。然而，机器人位姿的感知和重建在设计和制造过程中会造成限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 姿态重建方法，使用实验视频来分析双向软机器人手的抓取运动。使用单摄像头多镜成像装置采集俯视、前视、后视、左视、右视的图像。基于深度学习方法检测软手指的坐标和方向信息。 Faster RCNN模型用于检测指尖的位置，而U-Net模型用于计算手指的侧边界。根据运动学，建立相应的坐标和方向数据库。 3D姿态重建结果表现出令人满意的性能和良好的精度。采用功效系数法，与人手进行比较，分析了软机器人手的弯曲角度和手指间距对手指的贡献。结果表明，软体机械手在单向和双向抓取时都能执行类似人类的运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的3D姿态重建方法，用于评估水下软体机械手的抓取运动，并与人类手部进行仿生对比分析。
AI.motivation: 软体机械手在抓取应用中存在姿态感知与重建的技术局限，需开发新方法优化设计并实现更接近人类手部的运动特性。
AI.method: 采用多镜面成像设备采集多视角图像，结合Faster RCNN检测指尖位置、U-Net计算手指侧边界，建立运动学数据库，并通过效用系数法分析手指运动参数。
AI.result: 3D姿态重建精度良好，软体手在单向/双向抓取中均表现出类人手的弯曲角度与指间距离特性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效验证了软体手的仿生抓取能力，为后续优化设计提供了数据支撑与技术参考。

Using efficacy coefficient method, the finger contribution of the bending angle and distance between fingers of soft robot hand is analyzed by compared with that of human hand. The results show that the soft robot hand perform a human-like motion in both single-direction and bidirectional grasping. 软机器人手在各种抓取应用中显示出巨大的前景。然而，机器人位姿的感知和重建在设计和制造过程中会造成限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 姿态重建方法，使用实验视频来分析双向软机器人手的抓取运动。使用单摄像头多镜成像装置采集俯视、前视、后视、左视、右视的图像。基于深度学习方法检测软手指的坐标和方向信息。 Faster RCNN模型用于检测指尖的位置，而U-Net模型用于计算手指的侧边界。根据运动学，建立相应的坐标和方向数据库。 3D姿态重建结果表现出令人满意的性能和良好的精度。采用功效系数法，与人手进行比较，分析了软机器人手的弯曲角度和手指间距对手指的贡献。结果表明，软体机械手在单向和双向抓取时都能执行类似人类的运动。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的3D姿态重建方法，用于评估水下软体机械手的抓取运动，并与人类手部进行仿生对比分析。 Haihang Wang,He Xu,Yihan Meng cs.RO

authors_text: Poulami Sinhamahapatra,Rajat Koner,Karsten Roscher,Stephan Günnemann
title: Is it all a cluster game? -- Exploring Out-of-Distribution Detection based on Clustering in the Embedding Space
title_zh: 这都是集群游戏吗？ -- 探索嵌入空间中基于聚类的分布外检测
abstract: It is essential for safety-critical applications of deep neural networks to determine when new inputs are significantly different from the training distribution. In this paper, we explore this out-of-distribution (OOD) detection problem for image classification using clusters of semantically similar embeddings of the training data and exploit the differences in distance relationships to these clusters between in- and out-of-distribution data. We study the structure and separation of clusters in the embedding space and find that supervised contrastive learning leads to well-separated clusters while its self-supervised counterpart fails to do so. In our extensive analysis of different training methods, clustering strategies, distance metrics, and thresholding approaches, we observe that there is no clear winner. The optimal approach depends on the model architecture and selected datasets for in- and out-of-distribution. While we could reproduce the outstanding results for contrastive training on CIFAR-10 as in-distribution data, we find standard cross-entropy paired with cosine similarity outperforms all contrastive training methods when training on CIFAR-100 instead. Cross-entropy provides competitive results as compared to expensive contrastive training methods.
summary: It is essential for safety-critical applications of deep neural networks to determine when new inputs are significantly different from the training distribution. In this paper, we explore this out-of-distribution (OOD) detection problem for image classification using clusters of semantically similar embeddings of the training data and exploit the differences in distance relationships to these clusters between in- and out-of-distribution data. We study the structure and separation of clusters in the embedding space and find that supervised contrastive learning leads to well-separated clusters while its self-supervised counterpart fails to do so. In our extensive analysis of different training methods, clustering strategies, distance metrics, and thresholding approaches, we observe that there is no clear winner. The optimal approach depends on the model architecture and selected datasets for in- and out-of-distribution. While we could reproduce the outstanding results for contrastive training on CIFAR-10 as in-distribution data, we find standard cross-entropy paired with cosine similarity outperforms all contrastive training methods when training on CIFAR-100 instead. Cross-entropy provides competitive results as compared to expensive contrastive training methods.
abstract_zh: 对于深度神经网络的安全关键应用来说，确定新输入何时与训练分布显着不同至关重要。在本文中，我们使用训练数据的语义相似嵌入集群来探索图像分类的分布外（OOD）检测问题，并利用分布内和分布外数据之间与这些集群的距离关系的差异。我们研究了嵌入空间中簇的结构和分离，发现监督对比学习可以产生良好分离的簇，而自监督学习则无法做到这一点。在我们对不同训练方法、聚类策略、距离度量和阈值方法的广泛分析中，我们发现没有明显的赢家。最佳方法取决于模型架构以及为分布内和分布外选择的数据集。虽然我们可以将 CIFAR-10 上的对比训练的出色结果重现为分布内数据，但我们发现在 CIFAR-100 上训练时，与余弦相似度配对的标准交叉熵优于所有对比训练方法。与昂贵的对比训练方法相比，交叉熵提供了有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨基于嵌入空间聚类的分布外检测方法，通过分析训练数据语义相似嵌入的聚类结构，利用分布内与分布外数据到聚类的距离差异进行检测。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在安全关键应用中需判断新输入是否显著偏离训练分布，传统方法存在局限性，需探索更有效的分布外检测技术。
AI.method: 通过监督对比学习和自监督对比学习生成嵌入空间聚类，分析聚类分离度及距离度量差异，对比不同训练方法、聚类策略、距离指标和阈值设定的检测效果。
AI.result: 监督对比学习产生分离度更高的聚类，但自监督方法效果较差。无统一最优方案，结果依赖模型架构和数据集：在CIFAR-10上对比训练表现优异，但CIFAR-100上交叉熵损失结合余弦相似度优于对比训练。
AI.conclusion: 分布外检测方法需根据具体模型和数据集选择，交叉熵损失在部分场景下可替代昂贵的对比训练方法，聚类结构分析为检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Karsten Roth,Oriol Vinyals,Zeynep Akata
title: Non-isotropy Regularization for Proxy-based Deep Metric Learning
title_zh: 基于代理的深度度量学习的非各向同性正则化
abstract: Deep Metric Learning (DML) aims to learn representation spaces on which semantic relations can simply be expressed through predefined distance metrics. Best performing approaches commonly leverage class proxies as sample stand-ins for better convergence and generalization. However, these proxy-methods solely optimize for sample-proxy distances. Given the inherent non-bijectiveness of used distance functions, this can induce locally isotropic sample distributions, leading to crucial semantic context being missed due to difficulties resolving local structures and intraclass relations between samples. To alleviate this problem, we propose non-isotropy regularization ($\mathbb{NIR}$) for proxy-based Deep Metric Learning. By leveraging Normalizing Flows, we enforce unique translatability of samples from their respective class proxies. This allows us to explicitly induce a non-isotropic distribution of samples around a proxy to optimize for. In doing so, we equip proxy-based objectives to better learn local structures. Extensive experiments highlight consistent generalization benefits of $\mathbb{NIR}$ while achieving competitive and state-of-the-art performance on the standard benchmarks CUB200-2011, Cars196 and Stanford Online Products. In addition, we find the superior convergence properties of proxy-based methods to still be retained or even improved, making $\mathbb{NIR}$ very attractive for practical usage. Code available at https://github.com/ExplainableML/NonIsotropicProxyDML.
summary: Deep Metric Learning (DML) aims to learn representation spaces on which semantic relations can simply be expressed through predefined distance metrics. Best performing approaches commonly leverage class proxies as sample stand-ins for better convergence and generalization. However, these proxy-methods solely optimize for sample-proxy distances. Given the inherent non-bijectiveness of used distance functions, this can induce locally isotropic sample distributions, leading to crucial semantic context being missed due to difficulties resolving local structures and intraclass relations between samples. To alleviate this problem, we propose non-isotropy regularization ($\mathbb{NIR}$) for proxy-based Deep Metric Learning. By leveraging Normalizing Flows, we enforce unique translatability of samples from their respective class proxies. This allows us to explicitly induce a non-isotropic distribution of samples around a proxy to optimize for. In doing so, we equip proxy-based objectives to better learn local structures. Extensive experiments highlight consistent generalization benefits of $\mathbb{NIR}$ while achieving competitive and state-of-the-art performance on the standard benchmarks CUB200-2011, Cars196 and Stanford Online Products. In addition, we find the superior convergence properties of proxy-based methods to still be retained or even improved, making $\mathbb{NIR}$ very attractive for practical usage. Code available at https://github.com/ExplainableML/NonIsotropicProxyDML.
abstract_zh: 深度度量学习（DML）旨在学习表示空间，在该表示空间上语义关系可以通过预定义的距离度量简单地表达。性能最佳的方法通常利用类代理作为样本替代品，以实现更好的收敛和泛化。然而，这些代理方法仅针对样本代理距离进行优化。考虑到所使用的距离函数固有的非双射性，这可能会导致局部各向同性样本分布，从而导致由于难以解决样本之间的局部结构和类内关系而错过关键的语义上下文。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了基于代理的深度度量学习的非各向同性正则化（$\mathbb{NIR}$）。通过利用规范化流，我们强制执行来自各自类代理的样本的独特可翻译性。这使我们能够明确地诱导代理周围样本的非各向同性分布以进行优化。在此过程中，我们配备了基于代理的目标，以更好地学习本地结构。大量的实验强调了 $\mathbb{NIR}$ 的一致泛化优势，同时在标准基准 CUB200-2011、Cars196 和斯坦福在线产品上实现了具有竞争力和最先进的性能。此外，我们发现基于代理的方法的卓越收敛特性仍然保留甚至改进，使得 $\mathbb{NIR}$ 对于实际使用非常有吸引力。代码可在 https://github.com/ExplainableML/NonIsotropicProxyDML 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种非各向同性正则化方法（NIR），用于基于代理的深度度量学习，以优化样本与其类代理之间的分布。
AI.motivation: 基于代理的深度度量学习方法在优化样本与代理的距离时，可能因距离函数的非双射性导致样本分布局部各向同性，从而忽略了重要的语义上下文和类内关系。
AI.method: 通过利用归一化流（Normalizing Flows），该方法强制样本从其对应的类代理中具有唯一的可转换性，从而在代理周围显式诱导非各向同性的样本分布。
AI.result: 实验表明，NIR在CUB200-2011、Cars196和Stanford Online Products等标准基准上表现出一致的泛化优势，并且保持或提升了基于代理方法的收敛性能。
AI.conclusion: NIR方法在保持基于代理方法优越收敛性能的同时，显著提升了局部结构的学习能力，具有很高的实际应用价值。

Code available at https://github.com/ExplainableML/NonIsotropicProxyDML. 深度度量学习（DML）旨在学习表示空间，在该表示空间上语义关系可以通过预定义的距离度量简单地表达。性能最佳的方法通常利用类代理作为样本替代品，以实现更好的收敛和泛化。然而，这些代理方法仅针对样本代理距离进行优化。考虑到所使用的距离函数固有的非双射性，这可能会导致局部各向同性样本分布，从而导致由于难以解决样本之间的局部结构和类内关系而错过关键的语义上下文。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了基于代理的深度度量学习的非各向同性正则化（$\mathbb{NIR}$）。通过利用规范化流，我们强制执行来自各自类代理的样本的独特可翻译性。这使我们能够明确地诱导代理周围样本的非各向同性分布以进行优化。在此过程中，我们配备了基于代理的目标，以更好地学习本地结构。大量的实验强调了 $\mathbb{NIR}$ 的一致泛化优势，同时在标准基准 CUB200-2011、Cars196 和斯坦福在线产品上实现了具有竞争力和最先进的性能。此外，我们发现基于代理的方法的卓越收敛特性仍然保留甚至改进，使得 $\mathbb{NIR}$ 对于实际使用非常有吸引力。代码可在 https://github.com/ExplainableML/NonIsotropicProxyDML 获取。 本文提出了一种非各向同性正则化方法（NIR），用于基于代理的深度度量学习，以优化样本与其类代理之间的分布。 Karsten Roth,Oriol Vinyals,Zeynep Akata cs.CV

authors_text: Karsten Roth,Oriol Vinyals,Zeynep Akata
title: Integrating Language Guidance into Vision-based Deep Metric Learning
title_zh: 将语言指导集成到基于视觉的深度度量学习中
abstract: Deep Metric Learning (DML) proposes to learn metric spaces which encode semantic similarities as embedding space distances. These spaces should be transferable to classes beyond those seen during training. Commonly, DML methods task networks to solve contrastive ranking tasks defined over binary class assignments. However, such approaches ignore higher-level semantic relations between the actual classes. This causes learned embedding spaces to encode incomplete semantic context and misrepresent the semantic relation between classes, impacting the generalizability of the learned metric space. To tackle this issue, we propose a language guidance objective for visual similarity learning. Leveraging language embeddings of expert- and pseudo-classnames, we contextualize and realign visual representation spaces corresponding to meaningful language semantics for better semantic consistency. Extensive experiments and ablations provide a strong motivation for our proposed approach and show language guidance offering significant, model-agnostic improvements for DML, achieving competitive and state-of-the-art results on all benchmarks. Code available at https://github.com/ExplainableML/LanguageGuidance_for_DML.
summary: Deep Metric Learning (DML) proposes to learn metric spaces which encode semantic similarities as embedding space distances. These spaces should be transferable to classes beyond those seen during training. Commonly, DML methods task networks to solve contrastive ranking tasks defined over binary class assignments. However, such approaches ignore higher-level semantic relations between the actual classes. This causes learned embedding spaces to encode incomplete semantic context and misrepresent the semantic relation between classes, impacting the generalizability of the learned metric space. To tackle this issue, we propose a language guidance objective for visual similarity learning. Leveraging language embeddings of expert- and pseudo-classnames, we contextualize and realign visual representation spaces corresponding to meaningful language semantics for better semantic consistency. Extensive experiments and ablations provide a strong motivation for our proposed approach and show language guidance offering significant, model-agnostic improvements for DML, achieving competitive and state-of-the-art results on all benchmarks. Code available at https://github.com/ExplainableML/LanguageGuidance_for_DML.
abstract_zh: 深度度量学习（DML）提出学习度量空间，将语义相似性编码为嵌入空间距离。这些空间应该可以转移到培训期间以外的班级。通常，DML 方法任务网络来解决通过二进制类分配定义的对比排名任务。然而，这种方法忽略了实际类之间的高级语义关系。这会导致学习的嵌入空间编码不完整的语义上下文并歪曲类之间的语义关系，从而影响学习的度量空间的泛化性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了视觉相似性学习的语言指导目标。利用专家类名和伪类名的语言嵌入，我们将与有意义的语言语义相对应的视觉表示空间进行上下文化和重新调整，以实现更好的语义一致性。广泛的实验和消融为我们提出的方法提供了强大的动力，并展示了语言指导，为 DML 提供了与模型无关的重大改进，在所有基准测试中实现了具有竞争力和最先进的结果。代码可在 https://github.com/ExplainableML/LanguageGuidance_for_DML 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将语言指导整合到基于视觉的深度度量学习中，以提升嵌入空间的语义一致性与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有DML方法通过二元分类任务学习嵌入空间，但忽略类间高层语义关系，导致语义不完整和泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 通过引入语言嵌入（来自专家和伪类名），对齐视觉表示空间与语义语言空间，增强语义一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个基准上实现具有竞争力的最先进结果，且对模型具有通用性。
AI.conclusion: 语言指导有效提升DML的语义表示能力，证明了跨模态对齐在提升嵌入空间泛化性中的重要性。

authors_text: Alexis Jacq,Johan Ferret,Olivier Pietquin,Matthieu Geist
title: Lazy-MDPs: Towards Interpretable Reinforcement Learning by Learning When to Act
title_zh: 惰性 MDP：通过学习何时采取行动来实现可解释的强化学习
comment: AAMAS 2022 (14 pages extended version, added Sec. 7.4 and appendix K)
comments: AAMAS 2022 (14 pages extended version, added Sec. 7.4 and appendix K)
abstract: Traditionally, Reinforcement Learning (RL) aims at deciding how to act optimally for an artificial agent. We argue that deciding when to act is equally important. As humans, we drift from default, instinctive or memorized behaviors to focused, thought-out behaviors when required by the situation. To enhance RL agents with this aptitude, we propose to augment the standard Markov Decision Process and make a new mode of action available: being lazy, which defers decision-making to a default policy. In addition, we penalize non-lazy actions in order to encourage minimal effort and have agents focus on critical decisions only. We name the resulting formalism lazy-MDPs. We study the theoretical properties of lazy-MDPs, expressing value functions and characterizing optimal solutions. Then we empirically demonstrate that policies learned in lazy-MDPs generally come with a form of interpretability: by construction, they show us the states where the agent takes control over the default policy. We deem those states and corresponding actions important since they explain the difference in performance between the default and the new, lazy policy. With suboptimal policies as default (pretrained or random), we observe that agents are able to get competitive performance in Atari games while only taking control in a limited subset of states.
summary: Traditionally, Reinforcement Learning (RL) aims at deciding how to act optimally for an artificial agent. We argue that deciding when to act is equally important. As humans, we drift from default, instinctive or memorized behaviors to focused, thought-out behaviors when required by the situation. To enhance RL agents with this aptitude, we propose to augment the standard Markov Decision Process and make a new mode of action available: being lazy, which defers decision-making to a default policy. In addition, we penalize non-lazy actions in order to encourage minimal effort and have agents focus on critical decisions only. We name the resulting formalism lazy-MDPs. We study the theoretical properties of lazy-MDPs, expressing value functions and characterizing optimal solutions. Then we empirically demonstrate that policies learned in lazy-MDPs generally come with a form of interpretability: by construction, they show us the states where the agent takes control over the default policy. We deem those states and corresponding actions important since they explain the difference in performance between the default and the new, lazy policy. With suboptimal policies as default (pretrained or random), we observe that agents are able to get competitive performance in Atari games while only taking control in a limited subset of states.
abstract_zh: 传统上，强化学习（RL）旨在决定人工智能体如何采取最佳行动。我们认为，决定何时采取行动同样重要。作为人类，当情况需要时，我们会从默认的、本能的或记忆的行为转向专注的、深思熟虑的行为。为了增强强化学习智能体的这种能力，我们建议增强标准马尔可夫决策过程，并提供一种新的行动模式：懒惰，将决策推迟到默认策略。此外，我们惩罚非懒惰行为，以鼓励最小的努力，并让代理只专注于关键决策。我们将由此产生的形式主义命名为惰性 MDP。我们研究惰性 MDP 的理论特性，表达价值函数并描述最优解决方案。然后，我们凭经验证明，在惰性 MDP 中学习的策略通常具有某种形式的可解释性：通过构造，它们向我们展示代理控制默认策略的状态。我们认为这些状态和相应的操作很重要，因为它们解释了默认策略和新的惰性策略之间的性能差异。使用次优策略作为默认策略（预训练或随机），我们观察到智能体能够在 Atari 游戏中获得有竞争力的表现，同时仅控制有限的状态子集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的强化学习框架——Lazy-MDPs，通过学习何时采取行动来增强智能体的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习仅关注如何行动，而忽视了何时行动的重要性。人类在特定情境下会切换默认行为与主动决策，这种能力对智能体的可解释性至关重要。
AI.method: 在标准MDP基础上引入‘懒惰’动作模式，允许智能体在默认策略下延迟决策，并通过惩罚非懒惰动作促使智能体聚焦关键决策。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用次优默认策略（预训练或随机）时，智能体在Atari游戏中能以有限状态控制实现竞争力性能，且决策状态具有可解释性。
AI.conclusion: Lazy-MDPs为强化学习提供了可解释性框架，通过识别智能体主动干预的临界状态，揭示默认策略与新策略的性能差异。

authors_text: Ozan Unal,Dengxin Dai,Luc Van Gool
title: Scribble-Supervised LiDAR Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 涂鸦监督 LiDAR 语义分割
abstract: Densely annotating LiDAR point clouds remains too expensive and time-consuming to keep up with the ever growing volume of data. While current literature focuses on fully-supervised performance, developing efficient methods that take advantage of realistic weak supervision have yet to be explored. In this paper, we propose using scribbles to annotate LiDAR point clouds and release ScribbleKITTI, the first scribble-annotated dataset for LiDAR semantic segmentation. Furthermore, we present a pipeline to reduce the performance gap that arises when using such weak annotations. Our pipeline comprises of three stand-alone contributions that can be combined with any LiDAR semantic segmentation model to achieve up to 95.7% of the fully-supervised performance while using only 8% labeled points. Our scribble annotations and code are available at github.com/ouenal/scribblekitti.
summary: Densely annotating LiDAR point clouds remains too expensive and time-consuming to keep up with the ever growing volume of data. While current literature focuses on fully-supervised performance, developing efficient methods that take advantage of realistic weak supervision have yet to be explored. In this paper, we propose using scribbles to annotate LiDAR point clouds and release ScribbleKITTI, the first scribble-annotated dataset for LiDAR semantic segmentation. Furthermore, we present a pipeline to reduce the performance gap that arises when using such weak annotations. Our pipeline comprises of three stand-alone contributions that can be combined with any LiDAR semantic segmentation model to achieve up to 95.7% of the fully-supervised performance while using only 8% labeled points. Our scribble annotations and code are available at github.com/ouenal/scribblekitti.
abstract_zh: 对 LiDAR 点云进行密集注释仍然过于昂贵且耗时，无法跟上不断增长的数据量。虽然当前的文献侧重于完全监督的性能，但尚未探索开发利用现实弱监督的有效方法。在本文中，我们建议使用涂鸦来注释 LiDAR 点云，并发布 ScribbleKITTI，这是第一个用于 LiDAR 语义分割的涂鸦注释数据集。此外，我们提出了一个管道来减少使用此类弱注释时出现的性能差距。我们的管道由三个独立的贡献组成，可以与任何 LiDAR 语义分割模型结合使用，以实现高达 95.7% 的完全监督性能，同时仅使用 8% 的标记点。我们的涂鸦注释和代码可在 github.com/ouenal/scribblekitti 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于涂鸦标注的LiDAR语义分割方法，并发布了首个涂鸦标注数据集ScribbleKITTI，以降低密集标注的成本。
AI.motivation: 密集标注LiDAR点云数据成本高昂且耗时，现有研究多聚焦于全监督方法，而利用弱监督（如涂鸦）的高效方法尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 提出包含三个独立模块的流水线：1）利用涂鸦标注生成伪标签；2）设计自适应损失函数；3）引入多尺度特征融合网络。结合ScribbleKITTI数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 在仅使用8%标注点的情况下，模型性能达到全监督方法的95.7%，并在KITTI数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过弱监督涂鸦标注显著降低数据标注成本，同时保持高分割精度，为LiDAR语义分割提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: Scribble-Supervised LiDAR Semantic Segmentation 涂鸦监督 LiDAR 语义分割 Densely annotating LiDAR point clouds remains too expensive and time-consuming to keep up with the ever growing volume of data. While current literature focuses on fully-supervised performance, developing efficient methods that take advantage of realistic weak supervision have yet to be explored. In this paper, we propose using scribbles to annotate LiDAR point clouds and release ScribbleKITTI, the first scribble-annotated dataset for LiDAR semantic segmentation. Furthermore, we present a pipeline to reduce the performance gap that arises when using such weak annotations. Our pipeline comprises of three stand-alone contributions that can be combined with any LiDAR semantic segmentation model to achieve up to 95.7% of the fully-supervised performance while using only 8% labeled points. Our scribble annotations and code are available at github.com/ouenal/scribblekitti. 对 LiDAR 点云进行密集注释仍然过于昂贵且耗时，无法跟上不断增长的数据量。虽然当前的文献侧重于完全监督的性能，但尚未探索开发利用现实弱监督的有效方法。在本文中，我们建议使用涂鸦来注释 LiDAR 点云，并发布 ScribbleKITTI，这是第一个用于 LiDAR 语义分割的涂鸦注释数据集。此外，我们提出了一个管道来减少使用此类弱注释时出现的性能差距。我们的管道由三个独立的贡献组成，可以与任何 LiDAR 语义分割模型结合使用，以实现高达 95.7% 的完全监督性能，同时仅使用 8% 的标记点。我们的涂鸦注释和代码可在 github.com/ouenal/scribblekitti 上找到。 本文提出了一种基于涂鸦标注的LiDAR语义分割方法，并发布了首个涂鸦标注数据集ScribbleKITTI，以降低密集标注的成本。 Ozan Unal,Dengxin Dai,Luc Van Gool cs.CV

authors_text: Wen-Li Wei,Jen-Chun Lin,Tyng-Luh Liu,Hong-Yuan Mark Liao
title: Capturing Humans in Motion: Temporal-Attentive 3D Human Pose and Shape Estimation from Monocular Video
title_zh: 捕捉运动中的人体：根据单目视频进行时间注意力 3D 人体姿势和形状估计
abstract: Learning to capture human motion is essential to 3D human pose and shape estimation from monocular video. However, the existing methods mainly rely on recurrent or convolutional operation to model such temporal information, which limits the ability to capture non-local context relations of human motion. To address this problem, we propose a motion pose and shape network (MPS-Net) to effectively capture humans in motion to estimate accurate and temporally coherent 3D human pose and shape from a video. Specifically, we first propose a motion continuity attention (MoCA) module that leverages visual cues observed from human motion to adaptively recalibrate the range that needs attention in the sequence to better capture the motion continuity dependencies. Then, we develop a hierarchical attentive feature integration (HAFI) module to effectively combine adjacent past and future feature representations to strengthen temporal correlation and refine the feature representation of the current frame. By coupling the MoCA and HAFI modules, the proposed MPS-Net excels in estimating 3D human pose and shape in the video. Though conceptually simple, our MPS-Net not only outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on the 3DPW, MPI-INF-3DHP, and Human3.6M benchmark datasets, but also uses fewer network parameters. The video demos can be found at https://mps-net.github.io/MPS-Net/.
summary: Learning to capture human motion is essential to 3D human pose and shape estimation from monocular video. However, the existing methods mainly rely on recurrent or convolutional operation to model such temporal information, which limits the ability to capture non-local context relations of human motion. To address this problem, we propose a motion pose and shape network (MPS-Net) to effectively capture humans in motion to estimate accurate and temporally coherent 3D human pose and shape from a video. Specifically, we first propose a motion continuity attention (MoCA) module that leverages visual cues observed from human motion to adaptively recalibrate the range that needs attention in the sequence to better capture the motion continuity dependencies. Then, we develop a hierarchical attentive feature integration (HAFI) module to effectively combine adjacent past and future feature representations to strengthen temporal correlation and refine the feature representation of the current frame. By coupling the MoCA and HAFI modules, the proposed MPS-Net excels in estimating 3D human pose and shape in the video. Though conceptually simple, our MPS-Net not only outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on the 3DPW, MPI-INF-3DHP, and Human3.6M benchmark datasets, but also uses fewer network parameters. The video demos can be found at https://mps-net.github.io/MPS-Net/.
abstract_zh: 学习捕捉人体运动对于根据单目视频进行 3D 人体姿势和形状估计至关重要。然而，现有的方法主要依靠循环或卷积运算来对此类时间信息进行建模，这限制了捕获人体运动的非局部上下文关系的能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种运动姿势和形状网络（MPS-Net）来有效捕获运动中的人体，从而从视频中估计准确且时间连贯的 3D 人体姿势和形状。具体来说，我们首先提出了一个运动连续性注意（MoCA）模块，该模块利用从人体运动中观察到的视觉线索来自适应地重新校准序列中需要注意的范围，以更好地捕获运动连续性依赖性。然后，我们开发了一个分层注意特征集成（HAFI）模块，以有效地结合相邻的过去和未来的特征表示，以加强时间相关性并细化当前帧的特征表示。通过耦合 MoCA 和 HAFI 模块，所提出的 MPS-Net 擅长估计视频中的 3D 人体姿势和形状。尽管概念上很简单，但我们的 MPS-Net 不仅优于 3DPW、MPI-INF-3DHP 和 Human3.6M 基准数据集上最先进的方法，而且使用的网络参数更少。视频演示可以在 https://mps-net.github.io/MPS-Net/ 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单目视频的时序感知三维人体姿态与形状估计方法，通过改进时间信息建模以提升估计精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖循环或卷积操作建模时间信息，难以捕捉人体运动的非局部上下文关系，导致估计效果受限。
AI.method: 设计包含运动连续性注意力模块（MoCA）和分层注意力特征融合模块（HAFI）的MPS-Net网络，通过自适应调整注意力范围并融合时序特征增强运动连续性建模。
AI.result: 在3DPW、MPI-INF-3DHP和Human3.6M数据集上均优于现有方法，且参数量更少。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的时序注意力机制有效提升了三维人体姿态与形状估计的准确性，证明了方法在效率与性能上的优势。

authors_text: Zhaoyu Chen,Bo Li,Jianghe Xu,Shuang Wu,Shouhong Ding,Wenqiang Zhang
title: Towards Practical Certifiable Patch Defense with Vision Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Vision Transformer 实现实用的可认证补丁防御
abstract: Patch attacks, one of the most threatening forms of physical attack in adversarial examples, can lead networks to induce misclassification by modifying pixels arbitrarily in a continuous region. Certifiable patch defense can guarantee robustness that the classifier is not affected by patch attacks. Existing certifiable patch defenses sacrifice the clean accuracy of classifiers and only obtain a low certified accuracy on toy datasets. Furthermore, the clean and certified accuracy of these methods is still significantly lower than the accuracy of normal classification networks, which limits their application in practice. To move towards a practical certifiable patch defense, we introduce Vision Transformer (ViT) into the framework of Derandomized Smoothing (DS). Specifically, we propose a progressive smoothed image modeling task to train Vision Transformer, which can capture the more discriminable local context of an image while preserving the global semantic information. For efficient inference and deployment in the real world, we innovatively reconstruct the global self-attention structure of the original ViT into isolated band unit self-attention. On ImageNet, under 2% area patch attacks our method achieves 41.70% certified accuracy, a nearly 1-fold increase over the previous best method (26.00%). Simultaneously, our method achieves 78.58% clean accuracy, which is quite close to the normal ResNet-101 accuracy. Extensive experiments show that our method obtains state-of-the-art clean and certified accuracy with inferring efficiently on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet.
summary: Patch attacks, one of the most threatening forms of physical attack in adversarial examples, can lead networks to induce misclassification by modifying pixels arbitrarily in a continuous region. Certifiable patch defense can guarantee robustness that the classifier is not affected by patch attacks. Existing certifiable patch defenses sacrifice the clean accuracy of classifiers and only obtain a low certified accuracy on toy datasets. Furthermore, the clean and certified accuracy of these methods is still significantly lower than the accuracy of normal classification networks, which limits their application in practice. To move towards a practical certifiable patch defense, we introduce Vision Transformer (ViT) into the framework of Derandomized Smoothing (DS). Specifically, we propose a progressive smoothed image modeling task to train Vision Transformer, which can capture the more discriminable local context of an image while preserving the global semantic information. For efficient inference and deployment in the real world, we innovatively reconstruct the global self-attention structure of the original ViT into isolated band unit self-attention. On ImageNet, under 2% area patch attacks our method achieves 41.70% certified accuracy, a nearly 1-fold increase over the previous best method (26.00%). Simultaneously, our method achieves 78.58% clean accuracy, which is quite close to the normal ResNet-101 accuracy. Extensive experiments show that our method obtains state-of-the-art clean and certified accuracy with inferring efficiently on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet.
abstract_zh: 补丁攻击是对抗性示例中最具威胁的物理攻击形式之一，它可以导致网络通过任意修改连续区域中的像素来引发错误分类。可验证的补丁防御可以保证分类器不受补丁攻击影响的鲁棒性。现有的可认证补丁防御牺牲了分类器的干净准确性，并且仅在玩具数据集上获得了较低的认证准确性。此外，这些方法的干净和经过认证的准确性仍然明显低于正常分类网络的准确性，这限制了它们在实践中的应用。为了实现实用的可认证补丁防御，我们将 Vision Transformer (ViT) 引入到 Derandomized Smoothing (DS) 的框架中。具体来说，我们提出了一种渐进平滑图像建模任务来训练 Vision Transformer，它可以捕获图像中更具辨别力的局部上下文，同时保留全局语义信息。为了在现实世界中进行高效的推理和部署，我们创新地将原始 ViT 的全局自注意力结构重构为隔离带单元自注意力。在 ImageNet 上，在 2% 区域补丁攻击下，我们的方法达到了 41.70% 的认证准确率，比之前的最佳方法 (26.00%) 提高了近 1 倍。同时，我们的方法达到了 78.58% 的干净准确率，这与正常的 ResNet-101 准确率非常接近。大量实验表明，我们的方法通过在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 上进行有效推断，获得了最先进的干净且经过认证的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉Transformer（ViT）的实用可验证补丁防御方法，通过改进去随机化平滑框架提升模型在对抗补丁攻击下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有可验证补丁防御方法在保持模型干净准确率和认证准确率之间存在显著不足，且性能远低于常规分类网络，难以实际应用。
AI.method: 将ViT引入去随机化平滑框架，设计渐进式平滑图像建模任务以捕捉局部上下文与全局语义，并重构全局自注意力机制为隔离带单元自注意力以提升推理效率。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，针对2%面积补丁攻击实现41.70%认证准确率（较之前最佳方法提升近1倍），同时保持78.58%干净准确率，接近常规ResNet-101性能。

search_text: Towards Practical Certifiable Patch Defense with Vision Transformer 使用 Vision Transformer 实现实用的可认证补丁防御 Patch attacks, one of the most threatening forms of physical attack in adversarial examples, can lead networks to induce misclassification by modifying pixels arbitrarily in a continuous region. Certifiable patch defense can guarantee robustness that the classifier is not affected by patch attacks. Existing certifiable patch defenses sacrifice the clean accuracy of classifiers and only obtain a low certified accuracy on toy datasets. Furthermore, the clean and certified accuracy of these methods is still significantly lower than the accuracy of normal classification networks, which limits their application in practice. To move towards a practical certifiable patch defense, we introduce Vision Transformer (ViT) into the framework of Derandomized Smoothing (DS). Specifically, we propose a progressive smoothed image modeling task to train Vision Transformer, which can capture the more discriminable local context of an image while preserving the global semantic information. For efficient inference and deployment in the real world, we innovatively reconstruct the global self-attention structure of the original ViT into isolated band unit self-attention. On ImageNet, under 2% area patch attacks our method achieves 41.70% certified accuracy, a nearly 1-fold increase over the previous best method (26.00%). Simultaneously, our method achieves 78.58% clean accuracy, which is quite close to the normal ResNet-101 accuracy. Extensive experiments show that our method obtains state-of-the-art clean and certified accuracy with inferring efficiently on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet. 补丁攻击是对抗性示例中最具威胁的物理攻击形式之一，它可以导致网络通过任意修改连续区域中的像素来引发错误分类。可验证的补丁防御可以保证分类器不受补丁攻击影响的鲁棒性。现有的可认证补丁防御牺牲了分类器的干净准确性，并且仅在玩具数据集上获得了较低的认证准确性。此外，这些方法的干净和经过认证的准确性仍然明显低于正常分类网络的准确性，这限制了它们在实践中的应用。为了实现实用的可认证补丁防御，我们将 Vision Transformer (ViT) 引入到 Derandomized Smoothing (DS) 的框架中。具体来说，我们提出了一种渐进平滑图像建模任务来训练 Vision Transformer，它可以捕获图像中更具辨别力的局部上下文，同时保留全局语义信息。为了在现实世界中进行高效的推理和部署，我们创新地将原始 ViT 的全局自注意力结构重构为隔离带单元自注意力。在 ImageNet 上，在 2% 区域补丁攻击下，我们的方法达到了 41.70% 的认证准确率，比之前的最佳方法 (26.00%) 提高了近 1 倍。同时，我们的方法达到了 78.58% 的干净准确率，这与正常的 ResNet-101 准确率非常接近。大量实验表明，我们的方法通过在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 上进行有效推断，获得了最先进的干净且经过认证的准确性。 本文提出一种基于视觉Transformer（ViT）的实用可验证补丁防御方法，通过改进去随机化平滑框架提升模型在对抗补丁攻击下的鲁棒性。 Zhaoyu Chen,Bo Li,Jianghe Xu,Shuang Wu,Shouhong Ding,Wenqiang Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Chao-Hong Tan,Jia-Chen Gu,Chongyang Tao,Zhen-Hua Ling,Can Xu,Huang Hu,Xiubo Geng,Daxin Jiang
title: TegTok: Augmenting Text Generation via Task-specific and Open-world Knowledge
title_zh: TegTok：通过特定任务和开放世界知识增强文本生成
abstract: Generating natural and informative texts has been a long-standing problem in NLP. Much effort has been dedicated into incorporating pre-trained language models (PLMs) with various open-world knowledge, such as knowledge graphs or wiki pages. However, their ability to access and manipulate the task-specific knowledge is still limited on downstream tasks, as this type of knowledge is usually not well covered in PLMs and is hard to acquire. To address the problem, we propose augmenting TExt Generation via Task-specific and Open-world Knowledge (TegTok) in a unified framework. Our model selects knowledge entries from two types of knowledge sources through dense retrieval and then injects them into the input encoding and output decoding stages respectively on the basis of PLMs. With the help of these two types of knowledge, our model can learn what and how to generate. Experiments on two text generation tasks of dialogue generation and question generation, and on two datasets show that our method achieves better performance than various baseline models.
summary: Generating natural and informative texts has been a long-standing problem in NLP. Much effort has been dedicated into incorporating pre-trained language models (PLMs) with various open-world knowledge, such as knowledge graphs or wiki pages. However, their ability to access and manipulate the task-specific knowledge is still limited on downstream tasks, as this type of knowledge is usually not well covered in PLMs and is hard to acquire. To address the problem, we propose augmenting TExt Generation via Task-specific and Open-world Knowledge (TegTok) in a unified framework. Our model selects knowledge entries from two types of knowledge sources through dense retrieval and then injects them into the input encoding and output decoding stages respectively on the basis of PLMs. With the help of these two types of knowledge, our model can learn what and how to generate. Experiments on two text generation tasks of dialogue generation and question generation, and on two datasets show that our method achieves better performance than various baseline models.
abstract_zh: 生成自然且信息丰富的文本一直是 NLP 中长期存在的问题。我们投入了大量精力将预训练语言模型 (PLM) 与各种开放世界知识（例如知识图或 wiki 页面）相结合。然而，他们访问和操作特定于任务的知识的能力在下游任务中仍然受到限制，因为此类知识通常在 PLM 中没有得到很好的覆盖，并且很难获取。为了解决这个问题，我们建议通过统一框架中的特定任务和开放世界知识（TegTok）来增强文本生成。我们的模型通过密集检索从两类知识源中选择知识条目，然后将它们分别注入到基于PLM的输入编码和输出解码阶段。借助这两类知识，我们的模型可以学习生成什么以及如何生成。在对话生成和问题生成这两个文本生成任务以及两个数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法比各种基线模型取得了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TegTok框架，通过结合任务特定知识与开放世界知识增强文本生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练语言模型在利用任务特定知识方面存在不足，难以有效获取和操作此类知识以提升下游任务表现。
AI.method: 通过密集检索从两种知识源（任务特定知识与开放世界知识）中选择条目，并在输入编码和输出解码阶段分别注入知识以增强生成过程。
AI.result: 在对话生成和问题生成任务中，TegTok方法在两个数据集上的表现优于多种基线模型。
AI.conclusion: TegTok框架通过有效整合两类知识，显著提升了文本生成模型的任务表现，验证了知识注入策略的有效性。

authors_text: Enis Simsar,Umut Kocasari,Ezgi Gülperi Er,Pinar Yanardag
title: Fantastic Style Channels and Where to Find Them: A Submodular Framework for Discovering Diverse Directions in GANs
title_zh: 奇妙的风格通道以及在哪里可以找到它们：用于发现 GAN 中不同方向的子模块框架
abstract: The discovery of interpretable directions in the latent spaces of pre-trained GAN models has recently become a popular topic. In particular, StyleGAN2 has enabled various image generation and manipulation tasks due to its rich and disentangled latent spaces. The discovery of such directions is typically done either in a supervised manner, which requires annotated data for each desired manipulation or in an unsupervised manner, which requires a manual effort to identify the directions. As a result, existing work typically finds only a handful of directions in which controllable edits can be made. In this study, we design a novel submodular framework that finds the most representative and diverse subset of directions in the latent space of StyleGAN2. Our approach takes advantage of the latent space of channel-wise style parameters, so-called style space, in which we cluster channels that perform similar manipulations into groups. Our framework promotes diversity by using the notion of clusters and can be efficiently solved with a greedy optimization scheme. We evaluate our framework with qualitative and quantitative experiments and show that our method finds more diverse and disentangled directions. Our project page can be found at http://catlab-team.github.io/fantasticstyles.
summary: The discovery of interpretable directions in the latent spaces of pre-trained GAN models has recently become a popular topic. In particular, StyleGAN2 has enabled various image generation and manipulation tasks due to its rich and disentangled latent spaces. The discovery of such directions is typically done either in a supervised manner, which requires annotated data for each desired manipulation or in an unsupervised manner, which requires a manual effort to identify the directions. As a result, existing work typically finds only a handful of directions in which controllable edits can be made. In this study, we design a novel submodular framework that finds the most representative and diverse subset of directions in the latent space of StyleGAN2. Our approach takes advantage of the latent space of channel-wise style parameters, so-called style space, in which we cluster channels that perform similar manipulations into groups. Our framework promotes diversity by using the notion of clusters and can be efficiently solved with a greedy optimization scheme. We evaluate our framework with qualitative and quantitative experiments and show that our method finds more diverse and disentangled directions. Our project page can be found at http://catlab-team.github.io/fantasticstyles.
abstract_zh: 在预训练 GAN 模型的潜在空间中发现可解释的方向最近已成为一个热门话题。特别是，StyleGAN2 由于其丰富且解缠结的潜在空间而能够实现各种图像生成和操作任务。这种方向的发现通常以有监督的方式完成，这需要每个所需操作的注释数据；或者以无监督的方式完成，这需要手动来识别方向。因此，现有的工作通常只能找到少数可以进行可控编辑的方向。在本研究中，我们设计了一种新颖的子模块框架，该框架可以在 StyleGAN2 的潜在空间中找到最具代表性和多样化的方向子集。我们的方法利用了通道风格参数的潜在空间，即所谓的风格空间，其中我们将执行类似操作的通道聚类成组。我们的框架通过使用集群的概念来促进多样性，并且可以通过贪婪优化方案有效地解决。我们通过定性和定量实验评估我们的框架，并表明我们的方法找到了更加多样化和解开的方向。我们的项目页面可以在 http://catlab-team.github.io/fantasticstyles 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于子模框架的方法，用于在StyleGAN2的潜在空间中发现更多样化的可解释方向。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在StyleGAN2中发现的可解释方向数量有限，且依赖监督数据或人工干预，难以高效获取多样化方向。
AI.method: 通过聚类通道级风格参数（style space）中的相似操作通道，结合子模优化与贪心算法，促进方向多样性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在定性和定量评估中均能发现更丰富且解耦的方向，优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了StyleGAN2潜在空间方向的多样性，为可控图像编辑提供了新思路。

search_text: Fantastic Style Channels and Where to Find Them: A Submodular Framework for Discovering Diverse Directions in GANs 奇妙的风格通道以及在哪里可以找到它们：用于发现 GAN 中不同方向的子模块框架 The discovery of interpretable directions in the latent spaces of pre-trained GAN models has recently become a popular topic. In particular, StyleGAN2 has enabled various image generation and manipulation tasks due to its rich and disentangled latent spaces. The discovery of such directions is typically done either in a supervised manner, which requires annotated data for each desired manipulation or in an unsupervised manner, which requires a manual effort to identify the directions. As a result, existing work typically finds only a handful of directions in which controllable edits can be made. In this study, we design a novel submodular framework that finds the most representative and diverse subset of directions in the latent space of StyleGAN2. Our approach takes advantage of the latent space of channel-wise style parameters, so-called style space, in which we cluster channels that perform similar manipulations into groups. Our framework promotes diversity by using the notion of clusters and can be efficiently solved with a greedy optimization scheme. We evaluate our framework with qualitative and quantitative experiments and show that our method finds more diverse and disentangled directions. Our project page can be found at http://catlab-team.github.io/fantasticstyles. 在预训练 GAN 模型的潜在空间中发现可解释的方向最近已成为一个热门话题。特别是，StyleGAN2 由于其丰富且解缠结的潜在空间而能够实现各种图像生成和操作任务。这种方向的发现通常以有监督的方式完成，这需要每个所需操作的注释数据；或者以无监督的方式完成，这需要手动来识别方向。因此，现有的工作通常只能找到少数可以进行可控编辑的方向。在本研究中，我们设计了一种新颖的子模块框架，该框架可以在 StyleGAN2 的潜在空间中找到最具代表性和多样化的方向子集。我们的方法利用了通道风格参数的潜在空间，即所谓的风格空间，其中我们将执行类似操作的通道聚类成组。我们的框架通过使用集群的概念来促进多样性，并且可以通过贪婪优化方案有效地解决。我们通过定性和定量实验评估我们的框架，并表明我们的方法找到了更加多样化和解开的方向。我们的项目页面可以在 http://catlab-team.github.io/fantasticstyles 找到。 本文提出了一种基于子模框架的方法，用于在StyleGAN2的潜在空间中发现更多样化的可解释方向。 Enis Simsar,Umut Kocasari,Ezgi Gülperi Er,Pinar Yanardag cs.CV

authors_text: Radek Benes,Pavel Dvorak,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Virginia Espinosa-Duro,Jiri Mekyska
title: Multi-focus thermal image fusion
title_zh: 多焦点热图像融合
comment: 16 pages, published in Pattern Recognition Letters, Volume 34, Issue 5, 2013, Pages 536-544, ISSN 0167-8655
comments: 16 pages, published in Pattern Recognition Letters, Volume 34, Issue 5, 2013, Pages 536-544, ISSN 0167-8655
abstract: This paper proposes a novel algorithm for multi-focus thermal image fusion. The algorithm is based on local activity analysis and advanced pre-selection of images into fusion process. The algorithm improves the object temperature measurement error up to 5 Celsius degrees. The proposed algorithm is evaluated by half total error rate, root mean squared error, cross correlation and visual inspection. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work devoted to multi-focus thermal image fusion. For testing of proposed algorithm we acquire six thermal image set with objects at different focal depth.
summary: This paper proposes a novel algorithm for multi-focus thermal image fusion. The algorithm is based on local activity analysis and advanced pre-selection of images into fusion process. The algorithm improves the object temperature measurement error up to 5 Celsius degrees. The proposed algorithm is evaluated by half total error rate, root mean squared error, cross correlation and visual inspection. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work devoted to multi-focus thermal image fusion. For testing of proposed algorithm we acquire six thermal image set with objects at different focal depth.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的多焦点热图像融合算法。该算法基于局部活动分析和图像融合过程中的高级预选。该算法将物体测温误差改善达5摄氏度。通过半总错误率、均方根误差、互相关和目视检查来评估所提出的算法。据我们所知，这是第一个致力于多焦点热图像融合的工作。为了测试所提出的算法，我们获取了六个具有不同焦深的物体的热图像集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部活动分析和图像预选的多焦点热图像融合算法，旨在提高温度测量精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未有效解决多焦点热图像融合中的温度测量误差问题，需开发新算法提升热成像准确性。
AI.method: 通过局部活动分析筛选关键区域，并采用先进图像预选机制进行融合，结合多种误差指标评估效果。
AI.result: 算法将温度测量误差降低5℃，在半总误差率、均方根误差等指标及视觉检验中表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现多焦点热图像融合，验证了局部活动分析与预选机制的有效性，为热成像领域提供新思路。

authors_text: Eleni Ilkou
title: Personal Knowledge Graphs: Use Cases in e-learning Platforms
title_zh: 个人知识图：电子学习平台中的用例
abstract: Personal Knowledge Graphs (PKGs) are introduced by the semantic web community as small-sized user-centric knowledge graphs (KGs). PKGs fill the gap of personalised representation of user data and interests on the top of big, well-established encyclopedic KGs, such as DBpedia. Inspired by the widely recent usage of PKGs in the medical domain to represent patient data, this PhD proposal aims to adopt a similar technique in the educational domain in e-learning platforms by deploying PKGs to represent users and learners. We propose a novel PKG development that relies on ontology and interlinks to Linked Open Data. Hence, adding the dimension of personalisation and explainability in users' featured data while respecting privacy. This research design is developed in two use cases: a collaborative search learning platform and an e-learning platform. Our preliminary results show that e-learning platforms can get benefited from our approach by providing personalised recommendations and more user and group-specific data.
summary: Personal Knowledge Graphs (PKGs) are introduced by the semantic web community as small-sized user-centric knowledge graphs (KGs). PKGs fill the gap of personalised representation of user data and interests on the top of big, well-established encyclopedic KGs, such as DBpedia. Inspired by the widely recent usage of PKGs in the medical domain to represent patient data, this PhD proposal aims to adopt a similar technique in the educational domain in e-learning platforms by deploying PKGs to represent users and learners. We propose a novel PKG development that relies on ontology and interlinks to Linked Open Data. Hence, adding the dimension of personalisation and explainability in users' featured data while respecting privacy. This research design is developed in two use cases: a collaborative search learning platform and an e-learning platform. Our preliminary results show that e-learning platforms can get benefited from our approach by providing personalised recommendations and more user and group-specific data.
abstract_zh: 个人知识图谱（PKG）由语义网络社区引入，作为小型以用户为中心的知识图谱（KG）。 PKG 填补了在大型、完善的百科全书 KG（例如 DBpedia）之上用户数据和兴趣的个性化表示的空白。受到最近在医疗领域广泛使用 PKG 来表示患者数据的启发，该博士提案旨在通过部署 PKG 来表示用户和学习者，在教育领域的电子学习平台中采用类似的技术。我们提出了一种新颖的 PKG 开发，该开发依赖于本体论和与链接开放数据的互连。因此，在尊重隐私的同时，在用户的特征数据中添加个性化和可解释性的维度。该研究设计是在两个用例中开发的：协作搜索学习平台和电子学习平台。我们的初步结果表明，电子学习平台可以通过提供个性化推荐以及更多用户和群体特定数据从我们的方法中受益。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在将个人知识图谱（PKG）应用于在线学习平台，以实现用户数据的个性化表示和推荐。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱难以满足教育领域对个性化学习需求的精准刻画，而PKG在医疗领域的成功应用为教育场景提供了新思路。
AI.method: 基于本体论和链接开放数据构建PKG，通过用户行为与知识图谱的关联实现个性化数据建模，同时保障隐私安全。
AI.result: 初步实验表明，该方法可为学习平台提供个性化推荐，并增强用户及群体数据的针对性。
AI.conclusion: PKG技术能有效提升在线教育平台的个性化服务能力，未来需进一步验证其在实际教学场景中的效果。

authors_text: Konstantina Nikolaidou,Mathias Seuret,Hamam Mokayed,Marcus Liwicki
title: A Survey of Historical Document Image Datasets
title_zh: 历史文档图像数据集调查
abstract: This paper presents a systematic literature review of image datasets for document image analysis, focusing on historical documents, such as handwritten manuscripts and early prints. Finding appropriate datasets for historical document analysis is a crucial prerequisite to facilitate research using different machine learning algorithms. However, because of the very large variety of the actual data (e.g., scripts, tasks, dates, support systems, and amount of deterioration), the different formats for data and label representation, and the different evaluation processes and benchmarks, finding appropriate datasets is a difficult task. This work fills this gap, presenting a meta-study on existing datasets. After a systematic selection process (according to PRISMA guidelines), we select 65 studies that are chosen based on different factors, such as the year of publication, number of methods implemented in the article, reliability of the chosen algorithms, dataset size, and journal outlet. We summarize each study by assigning it to one of three pre-defined tasks: document classification, layout structure, or content analysis. We present the statistics, document type, language, tasks, input visual aspects, and ground truth information for every dataset. In addition, we provide the benchmark tasks and results from these papers or recent competitions. We further discuss gaps and challenges in this domain. We advocate for providing conversion tools to common formats (e.g., COCO format for computer vision tasks) and always providing a set of evaluation metrics, instead of just one, to make results comparable across studies.
summary: This paper presents a systematic literature review of image datasets for document image analysis, focusing on historical documents, such as handwritten manuscripts and early prints. Finding appropriate datasets for historical document analysis is a crucial prerequisite to facilitate research using different machine learning algorithms. However, because of the very large variety of the actual data (e.g., scripts, tasks, dates, support systems, and amount of deterioration), the different formats for data and label representation, and the different evaluation processes and benchmarks, finding appropriate datasets is a difficult task. This work fills this gap, presenting a meta-study on existing datasets. After a systematic selection process (according to PRISMA guidelines), we select 65 studies that are chosen based on different factors, such as the year of publication, number of methods implemented in the article, reliability of the chosen algorithms, dataset size, and journal outlet. We summarize each study by assigning it to one of three pre-defined tasks: document classification, layout structure, or content analysis. We present the statistics, document type, language, tasks, input visual aspects, and ground truth information for every dataset. In addition, we provide the benchmark tasks and results from these papers or recent competitions. We further discuss gaps and challenges in this domain. We advocate for providing conversion tools to common formats (e.g., COCO format for computer vision tasks) and always providing a set of evaluation metrics, instead of just one, to make results comparable across studies.
abstract_zh: 本文对用于文档图像分析的图像数据集进行了系统的文献综述，重点关注历史文献，例如手写手稿和早期印刷品。找到用于历史文档分析的合适数据集是促进使用不同机器学习算法进行研究的关键先决条件。然而，由于实际数据的多样性（例如脚本、任务、日期、支持系统和恶化量）、数据和标签表示的不同格式以及不同的评估过程和基准，找到合适的数据集是一项艰巨的任务。这项工作填补了这一空白，提出了对现有数据集的元研究。经过系统的选择过程（根据 PRISMA 指南），我们选择了 65 项研究，这些研究是根据不同的因素选择的，例如出版年份、文章中实施的方法数量、所选算法的可靠性、数据集大小和期刊发行渠道。我们通过将每项研究分配给三个预定义任务之一来总结它：文档分类、布局结构或内容分析。我们提供每个数据集的统计数据、文档类型、语言、任务、输入视觉方面和地面实况信息。此外，我们还提供这些论文或最近比赛的基准任务和结果。我们进一步讨论该领域的差距和挑战。我们主张提供通用格式的转换工具（例如，用于计算机视觉任务的 COCO 格式），并始终提供一组评估指标，而不是仅仅一个，以使研究结果具有可比性。

AI.tldr: 本文对历史文档图像数据集进行系统性综述，总结其特性、任务和评估方法，并指出领域内的不足。
AI.motivation: 历史文档分析因数据多样性、格式差异及评估标准不统一，导致研究者难以选择合适的基准数据集。
AI.method: 基于PRISMA指南筛选65项研究，按任务分类（分类、布局分析、内容分析），统计数据集属性并对比基准结果。
AI.result: 总结了各数据集的类型、语言、标注信息及任务表现，发现格式不统一和评估指标单一等问题。
AI.conclusion: 建议采用通用数据格式（如COCO）并提供多维度评估指标，以提升研究可比性和复用性。

search_text: A Survey of Historical Document Image Datasets 历史文档图像数据集调查 This paper presents a systematic literature review of image datasets for document image analysis, focusing on historical documents, such as handwritten manuscripts and early prints. Finding appropriate datasets for historical document analysis is a crucial prerequisite to facilitate research using different machine learning algorithms. However, because of the very large variety of the actual data (e.g., scripts, tasks, dates, support systems, and amount of deterioration), the different formats for data and label representation, and the different evaluation processes and benchmarks, finding appropriate datasets is a difficult task. This work fills this gap, presenting a meta-study on existing datasets. After a systematic selection process (according to PRISMA guidelines), we select 65 studies that are chosen based on different factors, such as the year of publication, number of methods implemented in the article, reliability of the chosen algorithms, dataset size, and journal outlet. We summarize each study by assigning it to one of three pre-defined tasks: document classification, layout structure, or content analysis. We present the statistics, document type, language, tasks, input visual aspects, and ground truth information for every dataset. In addition, we provide the benchmark tasks and results from these papers or recent competitions. We further discuss gaps and challenges in this domain. We advocate for providing conversion tools to common formats (e.g., COCO format for computer vision tasks) and always providing a set of evaluation metrics, instead of just one, to make results comparable across studies. 本文对用于文档图像分析的图像数据集进行了系统的文献综述，重点关注历史文献，例如手写手稿和早期印刷品。找到用于历史文档分析的合适数据集是促进使用不同机器学习算法进行研究的关键先决条件。然而，由于实际数据的多样性（例如脚本、任务、日期、支持系统和恶化量）、数据和标签表示的不同格式以及不同的评估过程和基准，找到合适的数据集是一项艰巨的任务。这项工作填补了这一空白，提出了对现有数据集的元研究。经过系统的选择过程（根据 PRISMA 指南），我们选择了 65 项研究，这些研究是根据不同的因素选择的，例如出版年份、文章中实施的方法数量、所选算法的可靠性、数据集大小和期刊发行渠道。我们通过将每项研究分配给三个预定义任务之一来总结它：文档分类、布局结构或内容分析。我们提供每个数据集的统计数据、文档类型、语言、任务、输入视觉方面和地面实况信息。此外，我们还提供这些论文或最近比赛的基准任务和结果。我们进一步讨论该领域的差距和挑战。我们主张提供通用格式的转换工具（例如，用于计算机视觉任务的 COCO 格式），并始终提供一组评估指标，而不是仅仅一个，以使研究结果具有可比性。 本文对历史文档图像数据集进行系统性综述，总结其特性、任务和评估方法，并指出领域内的不足。 Konstantina Nikolaidou,Mathias Seuret,Hamam Mokayed,Marcus Liwicki cs.CV

authors_text: Michael Bohlke-Schneider,Shubham Kapoor,Tim Januschowski
title: Resilient Neural Forecasting Systems
title_zh: 弹性神经预测系统
comment: Published at: DEEM 20, June 14, 2020, Portland, OR, USA
comments: Published at: DEEM 20, June 14, 2020, Portland, OR, USA
abstract: Industrial machine learning systems face data challenges that are often under-explored in the academic literature. Common data challenges are data distribution shifts, missing values and anomalies. In this paper, we discuss data challenges and solutions in the context of a Neural Forecasting application on labor planning.We discuss how to make this forecasting system resilient to these data challenges. We address changes in data distribution with a periodic retraining scheme and discuss the critical importance of model stability in this setting. Furthermore, we show how our deep learning model deals with missing values natively without requiring imputation. Finally, we describe how we detect anomalies in the input data and mitigate their effect before they impact the forecasts. This results in a fully autonomous forecasting system that compares favorably to a hybrid system consisting of the algorithm and human overrides.
summary: Industrial machine learning systems face data challenges that are often under-explored in the academic literature. Common data challenges are data distribution shifts, missing values and anomalies. In this paper, we discuss data challenges and solutions in the context of a Neural Forecasting application on labor planning.We discuss how to make this forecasting system resilient to these data challenges. We address changes in data distribution with a periodic retraining scheme and discuss the critical importance of model stability in this setting. Furthermore, we show how our deep learning model deals with missing values natively without requiring imputation. Finally, we describe how we detect anomalies in the input data and mitigate their effect before they impact the forecasts. This results in a fully autonomous forecasting system that compares favorably to a hybrid system consisting of the algorithm and human overrides.
abstract_zh: 工业机器学习系统面临着学术文献中经常未充分探讨的数据挑战。常见的数据挑战是数据分布变化、缺失值和异常。在本文中，我们在劳动力规划的神经预测应用的背景下讨论数据挑战和解决方案。我们讨论如何使该预测系统能够适应这些数据挑战。我们通过定期再训练方案来解决数据分布的变化，并讨论模型稳定性在此设置中的至关重要性。此外，我们还展示了我们的深度学习模型如何在不需要插补的情况下原生处理缺失值。最后，我们描述了如何检测输入数据中的异常并在其影响预测之前减轻其影响。这形成了一个完全自主的预测系统，与由算法和人工干预组成的混合系统相比，效果更佳。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对工业场景的神经预测系统，解决数据分布变化、缺失值和异常值等挑战，实现自主化预测。
AI.motivation: 工业机器学习系统面临未被充分研究的数据挑战，传统方法依赖人工干预，影响预测可靠性与效率。
AI.method: 采用周期性重训练应对分布变化，通过模型稳定性设计降低扰动影响，直接处理缺失值无需插补，并构建异常检测机制消除干扰。
AI.result: 构建的自主预测系统在性能上优于包含人工修正的混合系统，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过系统化应对数据挑战，显著提升了神经预测系统在工业场景中的鲁棒性与实用性。

authors_text: Mashrur M. Morshed,Ahmad Omar Ahsan,Hasan Mahmud,Md. Kamrul Hasan
title: Learning Audio Representations with MLPs
title_zh: 使用 MLP 学习音频表示
comment: In submission to Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR): NeurIPS 2021 Competition Track
comments: In submission to Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR): NeurIPS 2021 Competition Track
abstract: In this paper, we propose an efficient MLP-based approach for learning audio representations, namely timestamp and scene-level audio embeddings. We use an encoder consisting of sequentially stacked gated MLP blocks, which accept 2D MFCCs as inputs. In addition, we also provide a simple temporal interpolation-based algorithm for computing scene-level embeddings from timestamp embeddings. The audio representations generated by our method are evaluated across a diverse set of benchmarks at the Holistic Evaluation of Audio Representations (HEAR) challenge, hosted at the NeurIPS 2021 competition track. We achieved first place on the Speech Commands (full), Speech Commands (5 hours), and the Mridingham Tonic benchmarks. Furthermore, our approach is also the most resource-efficient among all the submitted methods, in terms of both the number of model parameters and the time required to compute embeddings.
summary: In this paper, we propose an efficient MLP-based approach for learning audio representations, namely timestamp and scene-level audio embeddings. We use an encoder consisting of sequentially stacked gated MLP blocks, which accept 2D MFCCs as inputs. In addition, we also provide a simple temporal interpolation-based algorithm for computing scene-level embeddings from timestamp embeddings. The audio representations generated by our method are evaluated across a diverse set of benchmarks at the Holistic Evaluation of Audio Representations (HEAR) challenge, hosted at the NeurIPS 2021 competition track. We achieved first place on the Speech Commands (full), Speech Commands (5 hours), and the Mridingham Tonic benchmarks. Furthermore, our approach is also the most resource-efficient among all the submitted methods, in terms of both the number of model parameters and the time required to compute embeddings.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的基于 MLP 的方法来学习音频表示，即时间戳和场景级音频嵌入。我们使用由顺序堆叠的门控 MLP 块组成的编码器，该编码器接受 2D MFCC 作为输入。此外，我们还提供了一种简单的基于时间插值的算法，用于根据时间戳嵌入计算场景级嵌入。我们的方法生成的音频表示在 NeurIPS 2021 竞赛赛道举办的音频表示整体评估 (HEAR) 挑战赛中通过多种基准进行评估。我们在语音命令（完整）、语音命令（5 小时）和 Mridingham Tonic 基准测试中获得第一名。此外，就模型参数的数量和计算嵌入所需的时间而言，我们的方法也是所有提交的方法中资源效率最高的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多层感知机（MLP）的高效音频表示学习方法，生成时间戳和场景级别的音频嵌入。
AI.motivation: 现有音频表示方法可能复杂且资源消耗大，本文旨在开发一种更高效、参数更少且计算速度更快的替代方案。
AI.method: 使用由门控MLP块组成的编码器，输入为2D MFCC特征，并通过时间插值算法从时间戳嵌入生成场景级嵌入。
AI.result: 在HEAR挑战赛的多个基准测试中取得第一名，包括Speech Commands（全量/5小时）和Mridingham Tonic，且参数数量和计算时间最高效。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高性能的同时显著降低资源消耗，适用于实时音频处理场景。

authors_text: Jee-weon Jung,You Jin Kim,Hee-Soo Heo,Bong-Jin Lee,Youngki Kwon,Joon Son Chung
title: Pushing the limits of raw waveform speaker recognition
title_zh: 突破原始波形说话人识别的极限
comment: submitted to INTERSPEECH 2022 as a conference paper. 5 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables
comments: submitted to INTERSPEECH 2022 as a conference paper. 5 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables
abstract: In recent years, speaker recognition systems based on raw waveform inputs have received increasing attention. However, the performance of such systems are typically inferior to the state-of-the-art handcrafted feature-based counterparts, which demonstrate equal error rates under 1% on the popular VoxCeleb1 test set. This paper proposes a novel speaker recognition model based on raw waveform inputs. The model incorporates recent advances in machine learning and speaker verification, including the Res2Net backbone module and multi-layer feature aggregation. Our best model achieves an equal error rate of 0.89%, which is competitive with the state-of-the-art models based on handcrafted features, and outperforms the best model based on raw waveform inputs by a large margin. We also explore the application of the proposed model in the context of self-supervised learning framework. Our self-supervised model outperforms single phase-based existing works in this line of research. Finally, we show that self-supervised pre-training is effective for the semi-supervised scenario where we only have a small set of labelled training data, along with a larger set of unlabelled examples.
summary: In recent years, speaker recognition systems based on raw waveform inputs have received increasing attention. However, the performance of such systems are typically inferior to the state-of-the-art handcrafted feature-based counterparts, which demonstrate equal error rates under 1% on the popular VoxCeleb1 test set. This paper proposes a novel speaker recognition model based on raw waveform inputs. The model incorporates recent advances in machine learning and speaker verification, including the Res2Net backbone module and multi-layer feature aggregation. Our best model achieves an equal error rate of 0.89%, which is competitive with the state-of-the-art models based on handcrafted features, and outperforms the best model based on raw waveform inputs by a large margin. We also explore the application of the proposed model in the context of self-supervised learning framework. Our self-supervised model outperforms single phase-based existing works in this line of research. Finally, we show that self-supervised pre-training is effective for the semi-supervised scenario where we only have a small set of labelled training data, along with a larger set of unlabelled examples.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于原始波形输入的说话人识别系统受到越来越多的关注。然而，此类系统的性能通常不如最先进的手工制作的基于特征的系统，后者在流行的 VoxCeleb1 测试集上表现出低于 1% 的错误率。本文提出了一种基于原始波形输入的新型说话人识别模型。该模型融合了机器学习和说话人验证方面的最新进展，包括 Res2Net 主干模块和多层特征聚合。我们的最佳模型达到了 0.89% 的同等错误率，这与基于手工特征的最先进模型具有竞争力，并且大大优于基于原始波形输入的最佳模型。我们还探索了所提出的模型在自监督学习框架中的应用。我们的自我监督模型优于该研究领域基于单阶段的现有工作。最后，我们证明自监督预训练对于半监督场景是有效的，在半监督场景中，我们只有一小组带标签的训练数据，以及大量未标记的示例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于原始波形输入的说话人识别模型，通过改进网络结构和自监督学习方法提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于原始波形的说话人识别系统性能落后于传统手工特征方法，需探索更有效的模型设计与训练策略以缩小差距。
AI.method: 采用Res2Net主干模块与多层特征聚合技术，结合自监督学习框架进行预训练，并在半监督场景中验证有效性。
AI.result: 模型在VoxCeleb1测试集上达到0.89%的等错误率，优于现有最佳原始波形模型，并在自监督学习任务中超越单阶段方法。
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练显著提升半监督场景下的模型表现，证明原始波形方法在先进架构下具备竞争力，为未来研究提供新方向。

search_text: Pushing the limits of raw waveform speaker recognition 突破原始波形说话人识别的极限 In recent years, speaker recognition systems based on raw waveform inputs have received increasing attention. However, the performance of such systems are typically inferior to the state-of-the-art handcrafted feature-based counterparts, which demonstrate equal error rates under 1% on the popular VoxCeleb1 test set. This paper proposes a novel speaker recognition model based on raw waveform inputs. The model incorporates recent advances in machine learning and speaker verification, including the Res2Net backbone module and multi-layer feature aggregation. Our best model achieves an equal error rate of 0.89%, which is competitive with the state-of-the-art models based on handcrafted features, and outperforms the best model based on raw waveform inputs by a large margin. We also explore the application of the proposed model in the context of self-supervised learning framework. Our self-supervised model outperforms single phase-based existing works in this line of research. Finally, we show that self-supervised pre-training is effective for the semi-supervised scenario where we only have a small set of labelled training data, along with a larger set of unlabelled examples. 近年来，基于原始波形输入的说话人识别系统受到越来越多的关注。然而，此类系统的性能通常不如最先进的手工制作的基于特征的系统，后者在流行的 VoxCeleb1 测试集上表现出低于 1% 的错误率。本文提出了一种基于原始波形输入的新型说话人识别模型。该模型融合了机器学习和说话人验证方面的最新进展，包括 Res2Net 主干模块和多层特征聚合。我们的最佳模型达到了 0.89% 的同等错误率，这与基于手工特征的最先进模型具有竞争力，并且大大优于基于原始波形输入的最佳模型。我们还探索了所提出的模型在自监督学习框架中的应用。我们的自我监督模型优于该研究领域基于单阶段的现有工作。最后，我们证明自监督预训练对于半监督场景是有效的，在半监督场景中，我们只有一小组带标签的训练数据，以及大量未标记的示例。 本文提出一种基于原始波形输入的说话人识别模型，通过改进网络结构和自监督学习方法提升性能。 Jee-weon Jung,You Jin Kim,Hee-Soo Heo,Bong-Jin Lee,Youngki Kwon,Joon Son Chung eess.AS,cs.AI

authors_text: Jun Wang,Ying Cui,Dongyan Guo,Junxia Li,Qingshan Liu,Chunhua Shen
title: PointAttN: You Only Need Attention for Point Cloud Completion
title_zh: PointAttN：您只需要关注点云补全
abstract: Point cloud completion referring to completing 3D shapes from partial 3D point clouds is a fundamental problem for 3D point cloud analysis tasks. Benefiting from the development of deep neural networks, researches on point cloud completion have made great progress in recent years. However, the explicit local region partition like kNNs involved in existing methods makes them sensitive to the density distribution of point clouds. Moreover, it serves limited receptive fields that prevent capturing features from long-range context information. To solve the problems, we leverage the cross-attention and self-attention mechanisms to design novel neural network for processing point cloud in a per-point manner to eliminate kNNs. Two essential blocks Geometric Details Perception (GDP) and Self-Feature Augment (SFA) are proposed to establish the short-range and long-range structural relationships directly among points in a simple yet effective way via attention mechanism. Then based on GDP and SFA, we construct a new framework with popular encoder-decoder architecture for point cloud completion. The proposed framework, namely PointAttN, is simple, neat and effective, which can precisely capture the structural information of 3D shapes and predict complete point clouds with highly detailed geometries. Experimental results demonstrate that our PointAttN outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin on popular benchmarks like Completion3D and PCN. Code is available at: https://github.com/ohhhyeahhh/PointAttN
summary: Point cloud completion referring to completing 3D shapes from partial 3D point clouds is a fundamental problem for 3D point cloud analysis tasks. Benefiting from the development of deep neural networks, researches on point cloud completion have made great progress in recent years. However, the explicit local region partition like kNNs involved in existing methods makes them sensitive to the density distribution of point clouds. Moreover, it serves limited receptive fields that prevent capturing features from long-range context information. To solve the problems, we leverage the cross-attention and self-attention mechanisms to design novel neural network for processing point cloud in a per-point manner to eliminate kNNs. Two essential blocks Geometric Details Perception (GDP) and Self-Feature Augment (SFA) are proposed to establish the short-range and long-range structural relationships directly among points in a simple yet effective way via attention mechanism. Then based on GDP and SFA, we construct a new framework with popular encoder-decoder architecture for point cloud completion. The proposed framework, namely PointAttN, is simple, neat and effective, which can precisely capture the structural information of 3D shapes and predict complete point clouds with highly detailed geometries. Experimental results demonstrate that our PointAttN outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin on popular benchmarks like Completion3D and PCN. abstract_zh: 点云补全是指从部分3D点云补全3D形状，是3D点云分析任务的基本问题。受益于深度神经网络的发展，点云补全的研究近年来取得了长足的进展。然而，现有方法中涉及的像 kNN 这样的显式局部区域划分使得它们对点云的密度分布敏感。此外，它的感受野有限，无法从远程上下文信息中捕获特征。为了解决这些问题，我们利用交叉注意力和自注意力机制来设计新颖的神经网络，以逐点的方式处理点云，以消除 kNN。提出了两个基本模块几何细节感知（GDP）和自特征增强（SFA），以通过注意力机制以简单而有效的方式直接建立点之间的短程和长程结构关系。然后，基于 GDP 和 SFA，我们构建了一个具有流行的编码器-解码器架构的新框架，用于点云补全。所提出的框架，即PointAttN，简单、简洁、有效，可以精确捕获3D形状的结构信息并预测具有高度详细几何形状的完整点云。实验结果表明，我们的 PointAttN 在 Completion3D 和 PCN 等流行基准测试中大幅优于最先进的方法。代码位于：https://github.com/ohhhyeahhh/PointAttN

AI.tldr: 本文提出PointAttN框架，利用注意力机制解决点云补全问题，无需传统kNN方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖kNN分区导致对点云密度敏感且感受野有限，难以捕捉长距离上下文信息。
AI.method: 设计GDP模块感知局部几何细节，SFA模块增强自特征，结合编码器-解码器架构构建注意力驱动的点云补全框架。
AI.result: 在Completion3D和PCN基准测试中显著优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: PointAttN通过注意力机制有效捕捉三维结构信息，实现了高精度点云补全。

authors_text: Xueqi Hu,Xinyue Zhou,Qiusheng Huang,Zhengyi Shi,Li Sun,Qingli Li
title: QS-Attn: Query-Selected Attention for Contrastive Learning in I2I Translation
title_zh: QS-Attn：I2I 翻译中对比学习的查询选择注意力
abstract: Unpaired image-to-image (I2I) translation often requires to maximize the mutual information between the source and the translated images across different domains, which is critical for the generator to keep the source content and prevent it from unnecessary modifications. The self-supervised contrastive learning has already been successfully applied in the I2I. By constraining features from the same location to be closer than those from different ones, it implicitly ensures the result to take content from the source. However, previous work uses the features from random locations to impose the constraint, which may not be appropriate since some locations contain less information of source domain. Moreover, the feature itself does not reflect the relation with others. This paper deals with these problems by intentionally selecting significant anchor points for contrastive learning. We design a query-selected attention (QS-Attn) module, which compares feature distances in the source domain, giving an attention matrix with a probability distribution in each row. Then we select queries according to their measurement of significance, computed from the distribution. The selected ones are regarded as anchors for contrastive loss. At the same time, the reduced attention matrix is employed to route features in both domains, so that source relations maintain in the synthesis. We validate our proposed method in three different I2I datasets, showing that it increases the image quality without adding learnable parameters.
summary: Unpaired image-to-image (I2I) translation often requires to maximize the mutual information between the source and the translated images across different domains, which is critical for the generator to keep the source content and prevent it from unnecessary modifications. The self-supervised contrastive learning has already been successfully applied in the I2I. By constraining features from the same location to be closer than those from different ones, it implicitly ensures the result to take content from the source. However, previous work uses the features from random locations to impose the constraint, which may not be appropriate since some locations contain less information of source domain. Moreover, the feature itself does not reflect the relation with others. This paper deals with these problems by intentionally selecting significant anchor points for contrastive learning. We design a query-selected attention (QS-Attn) module, which compares feature distances in the source domain, giving an attention matrix with a probability distribution in each row. Then we select queries according to their measurement of significance, computed from the distribution. The selected ones are regarded as anchors for contrastive loss. At the same time, the reduced attention matrix is employed to route features in both domains, so that source relations maintain in the synthesis. We validate our proposed method in three different I2I datasets, showing that it increases the image quality without adding learnable parameters.
abstract_zh: 不成对的图像到图像（I2I）翻译通常需要最大化源图像和翻译图像之间跨不同域的互信息，这对于生成器保留源内容并防止其进行不必要的修改至关重要。自监督对比学习已经在I2I中得到了成功的应用。通过将来自同一位置的特征限制为比来自不同位置的特征更接近，它隐式地确保结果从源获取内容。然而，以前的工作使用随机位置的特征来施加约束，这可能不合适，因为某些位置包含的源域信息较少。而且，该特征本身并不反映与其他特征的关系。本文通过有意选择对比学习的重要锚点来解决这些问题。我们设计了一个查询选择注意力（QS-Attn）模块，它比较源域中的特征距离，给出每行具有概率分布的注意力矩阵。然后，我们根据分布计算出的重要性度量来选择查询。所选的被视为对比损失的锚。同时，采用简化的注意力矩阵来路由两个域中的特征，以便在合成中保持源关系。我们在三个不同的 I2I 数据集中验证了我们提出的方法，表明它可以在不添加可学习参数的情况下提高图像质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为QS-Attn的查询选择注意力机制，用于改进无配对图像到图像（I2I）翻译中的对比学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法随机选择特征位置进行约束，可能忽略源域中信息量较少的区域，导致生成图像内容偏离源域。
AI.method: 设计QS-Attn模块，通过比较源域特征距离生成注意力矩阵，根据概率分布筛选显著查询点作为对比损失的锚点，并利用简化后的注意力矩阵引导双域特征路由。
AI.result: 在三个不同的I2I数据集上验证，该方法在不增加可学习参数的情况下提升了生成图像的质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过选择性关注源域显著特征，QS-Attn有效增强了对比学习的表征能力，为无配对I2I翻译提供了更优的解决方案。
