search_text: QS-Attn: Query-Selected Attention for Contrastive Learning in I2I Translation QS-Attn：I2I 翻译中对比学习的查询选择注意力 Unpaired image-to-image (I2I) translation often requires to maximize the mutual information between the source and the translated images across different domains, which is critical for the generator to keep the source content and prevent it from unnecessary modifications. The self-supervised contrastive learning has already been successfully applied in the I2I. By constraining features from the same location to be closer than those from different ones, it implicitly ensures the result to take content from the source. However, previous work uses the features from random locations to impose the constraint, which may not be appropriate since some locations contain less information of source domain. Moreover, the feature itself does not reflect the relation with others. This paper deals with these problems by intentionally selecting significant anchor points for contrastive learning. We design a query-selected attention (QS-Attn) module, which compares feature distances in the source domain, giving an attention matrix with a probability distribution in each row. Then we select queries according to their measurement of significance, computed from the distribution. The selected ones are regarded as anchors for contrastive loss. At the same time, the reduced attention matrix is employed to route features in both domains, so that source relations maintain in the synthesis. We validate our proposed method in three different I2I datasets, showing that it increases the image quality without adding learnable parameters. 不成对的图像到图像（I2I）翻译通常需要最大化源图像和翻译图像之间跨不同域的互信息，这对于生成器保留源内容并防止其进行不必要的修改至关重要。自监督对比学习已经在I2I中得到了成功的应用。通过将来自同一位置的特征限制为比来自不同位置的特征更接近，它隐式地确保结果从源获取内容。然而，以前的工作使用随机位置的特征来施加约束，这可能不合适，因为某些位置包含的源域信息较少。而且，该特征本身并不反映与其他特征的关系。本文通过有意选择对比学习的重要锚点来解决这些问题。我们设计了一个查询选择注意力（QS-Attn）模块，它比较源域中的特征距离，给出每行具有概率分布的注意力矩阵。然后，我们根据分布计算出的重要性度量来选择查询。所选的被视为对比损失的锚。同时，采用简化的注意力矩阵来路由两个域中的特征，以便在合成中保持源关系。我们在三个不同的 I2I 数据集中验证了我们提出的方法，表明它可以在不添加可学习参数的情况下提高图像质量。 本文提出了一种名为QS-Attn的查询选择注意力机制，用于改进无配对图像到图像（I2I）翻译中的对比学习方法。 Xueqi Hu,Xinyue Zhou,Qiusheng Huang,Zhengyi Shi,Li Sun,Qingli Li cs.CV

authors_text: Haojun Jiang,Yuanze Lin,Dongchen Han,Shiji Song,Gao Huang
title: Pseudo-Q: Generating Pseudo Language Queries for Visual Grounding
title_zh: Pseudo-Q：生成视觉基础的伪语言查询
abstract: Visual grounding, i.e., localizing objects in images according to natural language queries, is an important topic in visual language understanding. The most effective approaches for this task are based on deep learning, which generally require expensive manually labeled image-query or patch-query pairs. To eliminate the heavy dependence on human annotations, we present a novel method, named Pseudo-Q, to automatically generate pseudo language queries for supervised training. Our method leverages an off-the-shelf object detector to identify visual objects from unlabeled images, and then language queries for these objects are obtained in an unsupervised fashion with a pseudo-query generation module. Then, we design a task-related query prompt module to specifically tailor generated pseudo language queries for visual grounding tasks. Further, in order to fully capture the contextual relationships between images and language queries, we develop a visual-language model equipped with multi-level cross-modality attention mechanism. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method has two notable benefits: (1) it can reduce human annotation costs significantly, e.g., 31% on RefCOCO without degrading original model's performance under the fully supervised setting, and (2) without bells and whistles, it achieves superior or comparable performance compared to state-of-the-art weakly-supervised visual grounding methods on all the five datasets we have experimented. Code is available at https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/Pseudo-Q.
summary: Visual grounding, i.e., localizing objects in images according to natural language queries, is an important topic in visual language understanding. The most effective approaches for this task are based on deep learning, which generally require expensive manually labeled image-query or patch-query pairs. To eliminate the heavy dependence on human annotations, we present a novel method, named Pseudo-Q, to automatically generate pseudo language queries for supervised training. Our method leverages an off-the-shelf object detector to identify visual objects from unlabeled images, and then language queries for these objects are obtained in an unsupervised fashion with a pseudo-query generation module. Then, we design a task-related query prompt module to specifically tailor generated pseudo language queries for visual grounding tasks. Further, in order to fully capture the contextual relationships between images and language queries, we develop a visual-language model equipped with multi-level cross-modality attention mechanism. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method has two notable benefits: (1) it can reduce human annotation costs significantly, e.g., 31% on RefCOCO without degrading original model's performance under the fully supervised setting, and (2) without bells and whistles, it achieves superior or comparable performance compared to state-of-the-art weakly-supervised visual grounding methods on all the five datasets we have experimented. Code is available at https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/Pseudo-Q.
abstract_zh: 视觉基础，即根据自然语言查询定位图像中的对象，是视觉语言理解中的一个重要主题。此任务最有效的方法是基于深度学习，这通常需要昂贵的手动标记图像查询或补丁查询对。为了消除对人类注释的严重依赖，我们提出了一种名为 Pseudo-Q 的新方法，可以自动生成用于监督训练的伪语言查询。我们的方法利用现成的对象检测器从未标记的图像中识别视觉对象，然后使用伪查询生成模块以无监督的方式获得这些对象的语言查询。然后，我们设计了一个与任务相关的查询提示模块，专门为视觉基础任务定制生成的伪语言查询。此外，为了充分捕获图像和语言查询之间的上下文关系，我们开发了一种配备多级跨模态注意机制的视觉语言模型。大量的实验结果表明，我们的方法有两个显着的好处：（1）它可以显着降低人工注释成本，例如在完全监督的设置下，在 RefCOCO 上可以降低 31％，而不会降低原始模型的性能；（2）没有花里胡哨的东西，与我们实验过的所有五个数据集上最先进的弱监督视觉基础方法相比，它实现了优越或可比的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/Pseudo-Q 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成伪语言查询的方法Pseudo-Q，用于减少视觉定位任务中对人工标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 视觉定位任务通常需要大量人工标注的图像-查询对，标注成本高昂，因此需要自动化生成伪查询以降低依赖。
AI.method: 利用现成的目标检测器从无标注图像中识别物体，通过伪查询生成模块和任务相关提示模块生成伪语言查询，并设计多级跨模态注意力机制的视觉-语言模型进行训练。
AI.result: 在RefCOCO数据集上减少31%的人工标注成本且性能无损失，在五个数据集上优于或媲美现有弱监督方法。
AI.conclusion: Pseudo-Q有效降低了人工标注成本，同时保持了模型性能，为视觉定位任务提供了可行的自动化解决方案。

authors_text: Jiangjie Chen,Rui Xu,Ziquan Fu,Wei Shi,Zhongqiao Li,Xinbo Zhang,Changzhi Sun,Lei Li,Yanghua Xiao,Hao Zhou
title: E-KAR: A Benchmark for Rationalizing Natural Language Analogical Reasoning
title_zh: E-KAR：合理化自然语言类比推理的基准
abstract: The ability to recognize analogies is fundamental to human cognition. Existing benchmarks to test word analogy do not reveal the underneath process of analogical reasoning of neural models. Holding the belief that models capable of reasoning should be right for the right reasons, we propose a first-of-its-kind Explainable Knowledge-intensive Analogical Reasoning benchmark (E-KAR). Our benchmark consists of 1,655 (in Chinese) and 1,251 (in English) problems sourced from the Civil Service Exams, which require intensive background knowledge to solve. More importantly, we design a free-text explanation scheme to explain whether an analogy should be drawn, and manually annotate them for each and every question and candidate answer. Empirical results suggest that this benchmark is very challenging for some state-of-the-art models for both explanation generation and analogical question answering tasks, which invites further research in this area.
summary: The ability to recognize analogies is fundamental to human cognition. Existing benchmarks to test word analogy do not reveal the underneath process of analogical reasoning of neural models. Holding the belief that models capable of reasoning should be right for the right reasons, we propose a first-of-its-kind Explainable Knowledge-intensive Analogical Reasoning benchmark (E-KAR). Our benchmark consists of 1,655 (in Chinese) and 1,251 (in English) problems sourced from the Civil Service Exams, which require intensive background knowledge to solve. More importantly, we design a free-text explanation scheme to explain whether an analogy should be drawn, and manually annotate them for each and every question and candidate answer. Empirical results suggest that this benchmark is very challenging for some state-of-the-art models for both explanation generation and analogical question answering tasks, which invites further research in this area.
abstract_zh: 识别类比的能力是人类认知的基础。现有的测试单词类比的基准没有揭示神经模型类比推理的底层过程。我们坚信，能够推理的模型应该因正确的原因而正确，因此提出了首个可解释的知识密集型类比推理基准（E-KAR）。我们的基准测试由来自公务员考试的 1,655 个（中文）和 1,251 个（英文）问题组成，这些问题需要大量的背景知识来解决。更重要的是，我们设计了一个自由文本解释方案来解释是否应该进行类比，并为每个问题和候选答案手动注释它们。实证结果表明，这个基准对于解释生成和类比问答任务的一些最先进的模型来说非常具有挑战性，这需要在这一领域进行进一步的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出E-KAR基准测试，用于评估神经网络模型在类比推理任务中的可解释性与知识密集型推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有类比推理基准无法揭示模型的推理过程，而具备推理能力的模型应能以合理理由得出正确结论，因此需要设计可解释的类比推理基准。
AI.method: 从公务员考试题中收集中英文类比问题（共2906道），要求模型结合背景知识解答，并采用自由文本解释方案对每道题及候选答案进行人工注释。
AI.result: 实验表明，当前先进模型在类比问答和解释生成任务上均面临显著挑战，凸显了该基准的难度和现有模型的不足。
AI.conclusion: E-KAR为研究可解释的类比推理提供了新方向，揭示了模型在知识密集型任务中需进一步改进的领域。

Our benchmark consists of 1,655 (in Chinese) and 1,251 (in English) problems sourced from the Civil Service Exams, which require intensive background knowledge to solve. Empirical results suggest that this benchmark is very challenging for some state-of-the-art models for both explanation generation and analogical question answering tasks, which invites further research in this area. 识别类比的能力是人类认知的基础。现有的测试单词类比的基准没有揭示神经模型类比推理的底层过程。我们坚信，能够推理的模型应该因正确的原因而正确，因此提出了首个可解释的知识密集型类比推理基准（E-KAR）。我们的基准测试由来自公务员考试的 1,655 个（中文）和 1,251 个（英文）问题组成，这些问题需要大量的背景知识来解决。更重要的是，我们设计了一个自由文本解释方案来解释是否应该进行类比，并为每个问题和候选答案手动注释它们。实证结果表明，这个基准对于解释生成和类比问答任务的一些最先进的模型来说非常具有挑战性，这需要在这一领域进行进一步的研究。 本文提出E-KAR基准测试，用于评估神经网络模型在类比推理任务中的可解释性与知识密集型推理能力。 Jiangjie Chen,Rui Xu,Ziquan Fu,Wei Shi,Zhongqiao Li,Xinbo Zhang,Changzhi Sun,Lei Li,Yanghua Xiao,Hao Zhou cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Ping-Chung Yu,Cheng Sun,Min Sun
title: Data Efficient 3D Learner via Knowledge Transferred from 2D Model
title_zh: 通过从 2D 模型转移的知识实现数据高效的 3D 学习者
abstract: Collecting and labeling the registered 3D point cloud is costly. As a result, 3D resources for training are typically limited in quantity compared to the 2D images counterpart. In this work, we deal with the data scarcity challenge of 3D tasks by transferring knowledge from strong 2D models via RGB-D images. Specifically, we utilize a strong and well-trained semantic segmentation model for 2D images to augment RGB-D images with pseudo-label. The augmented dataset can then be used to pre-train 3D models. Finally, by simply fine-tuning on a few labeled 3D instances, our method already outperforms existing state-of-the-art that is tailored for 3D label efficiency. We also show that the results of mean-teacher and entropy minimization can be improved by our pre-training, suggesting that the transferred knowledge is helpful in semi-supervised setting. We verify the effectiveness of our approach on two popular 3D models and three different tasks. On ScanNet official evaluation, we establish new state-of-the-art semantic segmentation results on the data-efficient track.
summary: Collecting and labeling the registered 3D point cloud is costly. As a result, 3D resources for training are typically limited in quantity compared to the 2D images counterpart. In this work, we deal with the data scarcity challenge of 3D tasks by transferring knowledge from strong 2D models via RGB-D images. Specifically, we utilize a strong and well-trained semantic segmentation model for 2D images to augment RGB-D images with pseudo-label. The augmented dataset can then be used to pre-train 3D models. Finally, by simply fine-tuning on a few labeled 3D instances, our method already outperforms existing state-of-the-art that is tailored for 3D label efficiency. We also show that the results of mean-teacher and entropy minimization can be improved by our pre-training, suggesting that the transferred knowledge is helpful in semi-supervised setting. We verify the effectiveness of our approach on two popular 3D models and three different tasks. On ScanNet official evaluation, we establish new state-of-the-art semantic segmentation results on the data-efficient track.
abstract_zh: 收集和标记已注册的 3D 点云的成本很高。因此，与 2D 图像相比，用于训练的 3D 资源在数量上通常受到限制。在这项工作中，我们通过 RGB-D 图像从强大的 2D 模型转移知识，从而应对 3D 任务的数据稀缺挑战。具体来说，我们利用强大且训练有素的 2D 图像语义分割模型来使用伪标签增强 RGB-D 图像。然后，增强的数据集可用于预训练 3D 模型。最后，通过简单地对一些标记的 3D 实例进行微调，我们的方法已经超越了针对 3D 标记效率量身定制的现有最先进方法。我们还表明，平均教师和熵最小化的结果可以通过我们的预训练得到改善，这表明迁移的知识在半监督环境中是有帮助的。我们在两个流行的 3D 模型和三个不同的任务上验证了我们的方法的有效性。在ScanNet官方评估中，我们在数据高效的轨道上建立了新的最先进的语义分割结果。

AI.tldr: 通过从2D模型迁移知识解决3D任务中的数据稀缺问题，提升3D模型性能
AI.motivation: 3D点云数据收集和标注成本高导致训练数据有限，需利用2D模型知识提升3D任务性能
AI.method: 利用预训练2D语义分割模型生成伪标签增强RGB-D数据集，预训练3D模型后微调少量标注数据
AI.result: 在ScanNet官方评估中，数据高效赛道取得新SOTA语义分割结果，并提升半监督方法效果
AI.conclusion: 知识迁移有效提升3D模型在数据稀缺场景下的性能，验证了跨模态知识迁移的可行性

authors_text: Chen Zhao,Yinlin Hu,Mathieu Salzmann
title: Fusing Local Similarities for Retrieval-based 3D Orientation Estimation of Unseen Objects
title_zh: 融合局部相似性以基于检索的未见过物体的 3D 方向估计
abstract: In this paper, we tackle the task of estimating the 3D orientation of previously-unseen objects from monocular images. This task contrasts with the one considered by most existing deep learning methods which typically assume that the testing objects have been observed during training. To handle the unseen objects, we follow a retrieval-based strategy and prevent the network from learning object-specific features by computing multi-scale local similarities between the query image and synthetically-generated reference images. We then introduce an adaptive fusion module that robustly aggregates the local similarities into a global similarity score of pairwise images. Furthermore, we speed up the retrieval process by developing a fast retrieval strategy. Our experiments on the LineMOD, LineMOD-Occluded, and T-LESS datasets show that our method yields a significantly better generalization to unseen objects than previous works. Our code and pre-trained models are available at https://sailor-z.github.io/projects/Unseen_Object_Pose.html.
summary: In this paper, we tackle the task of estimating the 3D orientation of previously-unseen objects from monocular images. This task contrasts with the one considered by most existing deep learning methods which typically assume that the testing objects have been observed during training. To handle the unseen objects, we follow a retrieval-based strategy and prevent the network from learning object-specific features by computing multi-scale local similarities between the query image and synthetically-generated reference images. We then introduce an adaptive fusion module that robustly aggregates the local similarities into a global similarity score of pairwise images. Furthermore, we speed up the retrieval process by developing a fast retrieval strategy. Our experiments on the LineMOD, LineMOD-Occluded, and T-LESS datasets show that our method yields a significantly better generalization to unseen objects than previous works. Our code and pre-trained models are available at https://sailor-z.github.io/projects/Unseen_Object_Pose.html.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了从单目图像中估计以前未见过的物体的 3D 方向的任务。这项任务与大多数现有深度学习方法所考虑的任务形成鲜明对比，后者通常假设在训练期间已观察到测试对象。为了处理看不见的对象，我们遵循基于检索的策略，并通过计算查询图像和综合生成的参考图像之间的多尺度局部相似性来防止网络学习特定于对象的特征。然后，我们引入一个自适应融合模块，该模块可以将局部相似性稳健地聚合成成对图像的全局相似性得分。此外，我们通过开发快速检索策略来加快检索过程。我们在 LineMOD、LineMOD-Occlusiond 和 T-LESS 数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法对不可见物体的泛化能力明显优于以前的工作。我们的代码和预训练模型可在 https://sailor-z.github.io/projects/Unseen_Object_Pose.html 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于检索的3D方向估计方法，用于从未见过的物体单目图像中估计其3D方向。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法通常假设测试物体在训练时已出现，难以处理未见过的物体。本文旨在解决此问题，提升模型对新物体的泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用检索策略，通过计算查询图像与合成参考图像的多尺度局部相似性，结合自适应融合模块生成全局相似性分数，并优化检索速度。
AI.result: 在LineMOD、LineMOD-Occluded和T-LESS数据集上，方法在未见过物体的3D方向估计任务中显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合局部相似性的检索策略有效提升了模型对新物体的3D方向估计能力，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Jens Heidrich,Andreas Jedlitschka,Adam Trendowicz,Anna Maria Vollmer
title: Building AI Innovation Labs together with Companies
title_zh: 与企业共建人工智能创新实验室
abstract: In the future, most companies will be confronted with the topic of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and will have to decide on their strategy in this regards. Currently, a lot of companies are thinking about whether and how AI and the usage of data will impact their business model and what potential use cases could look like. One of the biggest challenges lies in coming up with innovative solution ideas with a clear business value. This requires business competencies on the one hand and technical competencies in AI and data analytics on the other hand. In this article, we present the concept of AI innovation labs and demonstrate a comprehensive framework, from coming up with the right ideas to incrementally implementing and evaluating them regarding their business value and their feasibility based on a company's capabilities. The concept is the result of nine years of working on data-driven innovations with companies from various domains. Furthermore, we share some lessons learned from its practical applications. Even though a lot of technical publications can be found in the literature regarding the development of AI models and many consultancy companies provide corresponding services for building AI innovations, we found very few publications sharing details about what an end-to-end framework could look like.
summary: In the future, most companies will be confronted with the topic of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and will have to decide on their strategy in this regards. Currently, a lot of companies are thinking about whether and how AI and the usage of data will impact their business model and what potential use cases could look like. One of the biggest challenges lies in coming up with innovative solution ideas with a clear business value. This requires business competencies on the one hand and technical competencies in AI and data analytics on the other hand. In this article, we present the concept of AI innovation labs and demonstrate a comprehensive framework, from coming up with the right ideas to incrementally implementing and evaluating them regarding their business value and their feasibility based on a company's capabilities. The concept is the result of nine years of working on data-driven innovations with companies from various domains. Furthermore, we share some lessons learned from its practical applications. Even though a lot of technical publications can be found in the literature regarding the development of AI models and many consultancy companies provide corresponding services for building AI innovations, we found very few publications sharing details about what an end-to-end framework could look like.
abstract_zh: 未来，大多数企业都会面临人工智能（AI）的话题，并需要决定这方面的策略。目前，许多公司正在考虑人工智能和数据的使用是否以及如何影响他们的商业模式，以及潜在的用例是什么样的。最大的挑战之一在于提出具有明确商业价值的创新解决方案理念。这一方面需要业务能力，另一方面需要人工智能和数据分析的技术能力。在本文中，我们提出了人工智能创新实验室的概念，并展示了一个全面的框架，从提出正确的想法到逐步实施和评估它们的商业价值以及基于公司能力的可行性。这一概念是与不同领域的公司九年来致力于数据驱动创新的结果。此外，我们分享了从其实际应用中吸取的一些经验教训。尽管可以在有关人工智能模型开发的文献中找到很多技术出版物，并且许多咨询公司为构建人工智能创新提供相应的服务，但我们发现很少有出版物分享有关端到端框架的详细信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种构建AI创新实验室的框架，帮助企业结合业务价值和技术能力，逐步开发和评估AI解决方案。
AI.motivation: 企业面临AI技术应用的挑战，需平衡业务需求与技术可行性，但现有文献缺乏完整的端到端框架指导。
AI.method: 基于九年的行业经验，设计涵盖创意生成、分阶段实施及评估的框架，并结合实际案例总结实践经验。
AI.result: 形成了一套整合业务与技术能力的AI创新实验室框架，并通过实践验证其有效性，总结出关键实施教训。
AI.conclusion: 现有技术文献和咨询服务未充分覆盖端到端框架，本文提出的框架填补了这一空白，为企业提供系统化AI创新路径。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种构建AI创新实验室的框架，帮助企业结合业务价值和技术能力，逐步开发和评估AI解决方案。

search_text: Building AI Innovation Labs together with Companies 与企业共建人工智能创新实验室 In the future, most companies will be confronted with the topic of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and will have to decide on their strategy in this regards. Currently, a lot of companies are thinking about whether and how AI and the usage of data will impact their business model and what potential use cases could look like. One of the biggest challenges lies in coming up with innovative solution ideas with a clear business value. This requires business competencies on the one hand and technical competencies in AI and data analytics on the other hand. In this article, we present the concept of AI innovation labs and demonstrate a comprehensive framework, from coming up with the right ideas to incrementally implementing and evaluating them regarding their business value and their feasibility based on a company's capabilities. The concept is the result of nine years of working on data-driven innovations with companies from various domains. Furthermore, we share some lessons learned from its practical applications. Even though a lot of technical publications can be found in the literature regarding the development of AI models and many consultancy companies provide corresponding services for building AI innovations, we found very few publications sharing details about what an end-to-end framework could look like. 未来，大多数企业都会面临人工智能（AI）的话题，并需要决定这方面的策略。目前，许多公司正在考虑人工智能和数据的使用是否以及如何影响他们的商业模式，以及潜在的用例是什么样的。最大的挑战之一在于提出具有明确商业价值的创新解决方案理念。这一方面需要业务能力，另一方面需要人工智能和数据分析的技术能力。在本文中，我们提出了人工智能创新实验室的概念，并展示了一个全面的框架，从提出正确的想法到逐步实施和评估它们的商业价值以及基于公司能力的可行性。这一概念是与不同领域的公司九年来致力于数据驱动创新的结果。此外，我们分享了从其实际应用中吸取的一些经验教训。尽管可以在有关人工智能模型开发的文献中找到很多技术出版物，并且许多咨询公司为构建人工智能创新提供相应的服务，但我们发现很少有出版物分享有关端到端框架的详细信息。 本文提出了一种构建AI创新实验室的框架，帮助企业结合业务价值和技术能力，逐步开发和评估AI解决方案。 Jens Heidrich,Andreas Jedlitschka,Adam Trendowicz,Anna Maria Vollmer cs.OH,cs.AI

authors_text: Duc Minh Vo,Akihiro Sugimoto,Hideki Nakayama
title: PPCD-GAN: Progressive Pruning and Class-Aware Distillation for Large-Scale Conditional GANs Compression
title_zh: PPCD-GAN：用于大规模条件 GAN 压缩的渐进式剪枝和类别感知蒸馏
abstract: We push forward neural network compression research by exploiting a novel challenging task of large-scale conditional generative adversarial networks (GANs) compression. To this end, we propose a gradually shrinking GAN (PPCD-GAN) by introducing progressive pruning residual block (PP-Res) and class-aware distillation. The PP-Res is an extension of the conventional residual block where each convolutional layer is followed by a learnable mask layer to progressively prune network parameters as training proceeds. The class-aware distillation, on the other hand, enhances the stability of training by transferring immense knowledge from a well-trained teacher model through instructive attention maps. We train the pruning and distillation processes simultaneously on a well-known GAN architecture in an end-to-end manner. After training, all redundant parameters as well as the mask layers are discarded, yielding a lighter network while retaining the performance. We comprehensively illustrate, on ImageNet 128x128 dataset, PPCD-GAN reduces up to 5.2x (81%) parameters against state-of-the-arts while keeping better performance.
summary: We push forward neural network compression research by exploiting a novel challenging task of large-scale conditional generative adversarial networks (GANs) compression. To this end, we propose a gradually shrinking GAN (PPCD-GAN) by introducing progressive pruning residual block (PP-Res) and class-aware distillation. The PP-Res is an extension of the conventional residual block where each convolutional layer is followed by a learnable mask layer to progressively prune network parameters as training proceeds. The class-aware distillation, on the other hand, enhances the stability of training by transferring immense knowledge from a well-trained teacher model through instructive attention maps. We train the pruning and distillation processes simultaneously on a well-known GAN architecture in an end-to-end manner. After training, all redundant parameters as well as the mask layers are discarded, yielding a lighter network while retaining the performance. We comprehensively illustrate, on ImageNet 128x128 dataset, PPCD-GAN reduces up to 5.2x (81%) parameters against state-of-the-arts while keeping better performance.
abstract_zh: 我们通过利用大规模条件生成对抗网络（GAN）压缩这一新颖的挑战性任务来推动神经网络压缩研究。为此，我们通过引入渐进式剪枝残差块（PP-Res）和类别感知蒸馏，提出了逐渐收缩的 GAN（PPCD-GAN）。 PP-Res 是传统残差块的扩展，其中每个卷积层后面跟着一个可学习的掩模层，以随着训练的进行逐步修剪网络参数。另一方面，班级意识蒸馏通过指导性注意力图从训练有素的教师模型中转移大量知识，从而增强了训练的稳定性。我们在著名的 GAN 架构上以端到端的方式同时训练剪枝和蒸馏过程。训练后，所有冗余参数以及掩模层都被丢弃，在保持性能的同时产生更轻的网络。我们在 ImageNet 128x128 数据集上全面说明，PPCD-GAN 相对于最先进的技术减少了高达 5.2 倍（81%）的参数，同时保持了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PPCD-GAN方法，通过渐进式剪枝和类别感知知识蒸馏技术，实现大规模条件生成对抗网络（GAN）的高效压缩。
AI.motivation: 大规模条件GAN模型参数量庞大，难以部署于实际应用，亟需高效压缩方法以在保持生成质量的同时减少计算资源消耗。
AI.method: 设计渐进式剪枝残差块（PP-Res）动态裁剪冗余参数，并结合类别感知知识蒸馏技术，通过注意力图引导学生模型学习教师模型的特征分布，实现端到端联合训练。
AI.result: 在ImageNet 128x128数据集上，PPCD-GAN相较现有方法最多减少81%参数量（5.2倍压缩），且生成图像质量保持更优。
AI.conclusion: PPCD-GAN通过参数剪枝与知识蒸馏的协同优化，在保证生成效果的前提下显著压缩了条件GAN模型规模，为实际部署提供了有效解决方案。

To this end, we propose a gradually shrinking GAN (PPCD-GAN) by introducing progressive pruning residual block (PP-Res) and class-aware distillation. The PP-Res is an extension of the conventional residual block where each convolutional layer is followed by a learnable mask layer to progressively prune network parameters as training proceeds. After training, all redundant parameters as well as the mask layers are discarded, yielding a lighter network while retaining the performance. authors_text: Qianyu He,Sijie Cheng,Zhixu Li,Rui Xie,Yanghua Xiao
title: Can Pre-trained Language Models Interpret Similes as Smart as Human?
title_zh: 预先训练的语言模型可以像人类一样聪明地解释明喻吗？
abstract: Simile interpretation is a crucial task in natural language processing. Nowadays, pre-trained language models (PLMs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance on many tasks. However, it remains under-explored whether PLMs can interpret similes or not. In this paper, we investigate the ability of PLMs in simile interpretation by designing a novel task named Simile Property Probing, i.e., to let the PLMs infer the shared properties of similes. We construct our simile property probing datasets from both general textual corpora and human-designed questions, containing 1,633 examples covering seven main categories. Our empirical study based on the constructed datasets shows that PLMs can infer similes' shared properties while still underperforming humans. To bridge the gap with human performance, we additionally design a knowledge-enhanced training objective by incorporating the simile knowledge into PLMs via knowledge embedding methods. Our method results in a gain of 8.58% in the probing task and 1.37% in the downstream task of sentiment classification. The datasets and code are publicly available at https://github.com/Abbey4799/PLMs-Interpret-Simile.
summary: Simile interpretation is a crucial task in natural language processing. Nowadays, pre-trained language models (PLMs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance on many tasks. However, it remains under-explored whether PLMs can interpret similes or not. In this paper, we investigate the ability of PLMs in simile interpretation by designing a novel task named Simile Property Probing, i.e., to let the PLMs infer the shared properties of similes. We construct our simile property probing datasets from both general textual corpora and human-designed questions, containing 1,633 examples covering seven main categories. Our empirical study based on the constructed datasets shows that PLMs can infer similes' shared properties while still underperforming humans. To bridge the gap with human performance, we additionally design a knowledge-enhanced training objective by incorporating the simile knowledge into PLMs via knowledge embedding methods. Our method results in a gain of 8.58% in the probing task and 1.37% in the downstream task of sentiment classification. The datasets and code are publicly available at https://github.com/Abbey4799/PLMs-Interpret-Simile.
abstract_zh: 明喻解释是自然语言处理中的一项关键任务。如今，预训练语言模型 (PLM) 在许多任务上都取得了最先进的性能。然而，PLM 是否可以解释明喻仍有待探索。在本文中，我们通过设计一个名为“明喻属性探测”的新任务来研究 PLM 在明喻解释中的能力，即让 PLM 推断明喻的共享属性。我们根据一般文本语料库和人工设计的问题构建了我们的明喻属性探测数据集，其中包含涵盖七个主要类别的 1,633 个示例。我们基于构建的数据集的实证研究表明，PLM 可以推断明喻的共同属性，但仍然表现不佳。为了弥补与人类表现的差距，我们还通过知识嵌入方法将相似知识纳入 PLM 中，设计了知识增强培训目标。我们的方法在探测任务中获得了 8.58% 的增益，在情感分类的下游任务中获得了 1.37% 的增益。数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/Abbey4799/PLMs-Interpret-Simile 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究预训练语言模型（PLMs）在明喻解释任务中的能力，通过构建新型探测任务和知识增强方法提升模型表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管PLMs在多项任务中表现优异，但其对明喻的理解能力尚未被充分探索，需评估其性能并寻找改进方法。
AI.method: 设计Simile Property Probing任务，构建包含1,633个样本的数据集，并引入知识嵌入方法增强模型的明喻理解能力。
AI.result: 知识增强方法使探测任务准确率提升8.58%，情感分类任务提升1.37%，数据集和代码已公开。
AI.conclusion: PLMs具备一定明喻解释能力但弱于人类，知识增强有效提升性能，未来需进一步优化模型理解能力。

To bridge the gap with human performance, we additionally design a knowledge-enhanced training objective by incorporating the simile knowledge into PLMs via knowledge embedding methods. Our method results in a gain of 8.58% in the probing task and 1.37% in the downstream task of sentiment classification. The datasets and code are publicly available at https://github.com/Abbey4799/PLMs-Interpret-Simile. 明喻解释是自然语言处理中的一项关键任务。如今，预训练语言模型 (PLM) 在许多任务上都取得了最先进的性能。然而，PLM 是否可以解释明喻仍有待探索。在本文中，我们通过设计一个名为“明喻属性探测”的新任务来研究 PLM 在明喻解释中的能力，即让 PLM 推断明喻的共享属性。我们根据一般文本语料库和人工设计的问题构建了我们的明喻属性探测数据集，其中包含涵盖七个主要类别的 1,633 个示例。我们基于构建的数据集的实证研究表明，PLM 可以推断明喻的共同属性，但仍然表现不佳。为了弥补与人类表现的差距，我们还通过知识嵌入方法将相似知识纳入 PLM 中，设计了知识增强培训目标。我们的方法在探测任务中获得了 8.58% 的增益，在情感分类的下游任务中获得了 1.37% 的增益。数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/Abbey4799/PLMs-Interpret-Simile 上公开获取。 本论文研究预训练语言模型（PLMs）在明喻解释任务中的能力，通过构建新型探测任务和知识增强方法提升模型表现。 Qianyu He,Sijie Cheng,Zhixu Li,Rui Xie,Yanghua Xiao cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Renjie Zou,Chunfeng Song,Zhaoxiang Zhang
title: The Devil Is in the Details: Window-based Attention for Image Compression
title_zh: 细节决定成败：基于窗口的图像压缩注意力机制
abstract: Learned image compression methods have exhibited superior rate-distortion performance than classical image compression standards. Most existing learned image compression models are based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). Despite great contributions, a main drawback of CNN based model is that its structure is not designed for capturing local redundancy, especially the non-repetitive textures, which severely affects the reconstruction quality. Therefore, how to make full use of both global structure and local texture becomes the core problem for learning-based image compression. Inspired by recent progresses of Vision Transformer (ViT) and Swin Transformer, we found that combining the local-aware attention mechanism with the global-related feature learning could meet the expectation in image compression. In this paper, we first extensively study the effects of multiple kinds of attention mechanisms for local features learning, then introduce a more straightforward yet effective window-based local attention block. The proposed window-based attention is very flexible which could work as a plug-and-play component to enhance CNN and Transformer models. Moreover, we propose a novel Symmetrical TransFormer (STF) framework with absolute transformer blocks in the down-sampling encoder and up-sampling decoder. Extensive experimental evaluations have shown that the proposed method is effective and outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/Googolxx/STF.
summary: Learned image compression methods have exhibited superior rate-distortion performance than classical image compression standards. Most existing learned image compression models are based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). Despite great contributions, a main drawback of CNN based model is that its structure is not designed for capturing local redundancy, especially the non-repetitive textures, which severely affects the reconstruction quality. Therefore, how to make full use of both global structure and local texture becomes the core problem for learning-based image compression. Inspired by recent progresses of Vision Transformer (ViT) and Swin Transformer, we found that combining the local-aware attention mechanism with the global-related feature learning could meet the expectation in image compression. In this paper, we first extensively study the effects of multiple kinds of attention mechanisms for local features learning, then introduce a more straightforward yet effective window-based local attention block. The proposed window-based attention is very flexible which could work as a plug-and-play component to enhance CNN and Transformer models. Moreover, we propose a novel Symmetrical TransFormer (STF) framework with absolute transformer blocks in the down-sampling encoder and up-sampling decoder. Extensive experimental evaluations have shown that the proposed method is effective and outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/Googolxx/STF.
abstract_zh: 学习的图像压缩方法表现出比经典图像压缩标准更优越的率失真性能。大多数现有的学习图像压缩模型都基于卷积神经网络（CNN）。尽管做出了巨大的贡献，但基于 CNN 的模型的一个主要缺点是其结构不是为捕获局部冗余而设计的，尤其是非重复纹理，这严重影响了重建质量。因此，如何充分利用全局结构和局部纹理成为基于学习的图像压缩的核心问题。受 Vision Transformer (ViT) 和 Swin Transformer 最新进展的启发，我们发现将局部感知注意力机制与全局相关特征学习相结合可以满足图像压缩的期望。在本文中，我们首先广泛研究了多种注意机制对局部特征学习的影响，然后介绍了一种更直接而有效的基于窗口的局部注意块。所提出的基于窗口的注意力非常灵活，可以作为即插即用组件来增强 CNN 和 Transformer 模型。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的对称变换器（STF）框架，在下采样编码器和上采样解码器中具有绝对变换器块。广泛的实验评估表明，所提出的方法是有效的并且优于最先进的方法。该代码可在 https://github.com/Googolxx/STF 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于窗口注意力机制的图像压缩方法，结合局部纹理与全局结构特征以提升压缩性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在图像压缩中难以有效捕捉非重复纹理的局部冗余，导致重建质量下降，需探索结合局部与全局特征的新方法。
AI.method: 设计窗口注意力块作为即插即用组件增强模型，并提出对称Transformer框架（STF），在编码器和解码器中使用绝对Transformer块。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在主流数据集上优于现有最先进的图像压缩技术，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 局部注意力与全局特征学习的结合能显著提升图像压缩效果，验证了窗口注意力机制的有效性。

authors_text: Yinhuai Wang,Yujie Hu,Jian Zhang
title: Panini-Net: GAN Prior Based Degradation-Aware Feature Interpolation for Face Restoration
title_zh: Panini-Net：基于 GAN 先验的退化感知特征插值用于人脸恢复
abstract: Emerging high-quality face restoration (FR) methods often utilize pre-trained GAN models (\textit{i.e.}, StyleGAN2) as GAN Prior. However, these methods usually struggle to balance realness and fidelity when facing various degradation levels. Besides, there is still a noticeable visual quality gap compared with pre-trained GAN models. In this paper, we propose a novel GAN Prior based degradation-aware feature interpolation network, dubbed Panini-Net, for FR tasks by explicitly learning the abstract representations to distinguish various degradations. Specifically, an unsupervised degradation representation learning (UDRL) strategy is first developed to extract degradation representations (DR) of the input degraded images. Then, a degradation-aware feature interpolation (DAFI) module is proposed to dynamically fuse the two types of informative features (\textit{i.e.}, features from input images and features from GAN Prior) with flexible adaption to various degradations based on DR. Ablation studies reveal the working mechanism of DAFI and its potential for editable FR. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our Panini-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance for multi-degradation face restoration and face super-resolution. The source code is available at https://github.com/jianzhangcs/panini.
summary: Emerging high-quality face restoration (FR) methods often utilize pre-trained GAN models (\textit{i.e.}, StyleGAN2) as GAN Prior. However, these methods usually struggle to balance realness and fidelity when facing various degradation levels. Besides, there is still a noticeable visual quality gap compared with pre-trained GAN models. In this paper, we propose a novel GAN Prior based degradation-aware feature interpolation network, dubbed Panini-Net, for FR tasks by explicitly learning the abstract representations to distinguish various degradations. Specifically, an unsupervised degradation representation learning (UDRL) strategy is first developed to extract degradation representations (DR) of the input degraded images. Then, a degradation-aware feature interpolation (DAFI) module is proposed to dynamically fuse the two types of informative features (\textit{i.e.}, features from input images and features from GAN Prior) with flexible adaption to various degradations based on DR. Ablation studies reveal the working mechanism of DAFI and its potential for editable FR. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our Panini-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance for multi-degradation face restoration and face super-resolution. The source code is available at https://github.com/jianzhangcs/panini.
abstract_zh: 新兴的高质量人脸恢复（FR）方法通常利用预先训练的 GAN 模型（\textit{即 StyleGAN2）作为 GAN Prior。然而，当面对不同的退化水平时，这些方法通常难以平衡真实性和保真度。此外，与预训练的 GAN 模型相比，仍然存在明显的视觉质量差距。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 GAN 先验的退化感知特征插值网络，称为 Panini-Net，通过显式学习抽象表示来区分各种退化，用于 FR 任务。具体来说，首先开发无监督退化表示学习（UDRL）策略来提取输入退化图像的退化表示（DR）。然后，提出了一种退化感知特征插值（DAFI）模块，动态融合两种类型的信息特征（\textit{i.e.，来自输入图像的特征和来自 GAN Prior 的特征），并基于 DR 灵活适应各种退化。消融研究揭示了 DAFI 的工作机制及其可编辑 FR 的潜力。大量实验表明，我们的 Panini-Net 在多退化人脸恢复和人脸超分辨率方面实现了最先进的性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/jianzhangcs/panini 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于GAN先验的退化感知特征插值网络Panini-Net，用于人脸修复任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的高质量人脸修复方法在面对不同退化程度时，难以平衡真实性和保真度，并且与预训练的GAN模型相比仍存在明显的视觉质量差距。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的基于GAN先验的退化感知特征插值网络Panini-Net，通过显式学习抽象表示来区分各种退化。首先开发了一种无监督退化表示学习（UDRL）策略，用于提取输入退化图像的退化表示（DR）。然后提出了一种退化感知特征插值（DAFI）模块，根据DR动态融合输入图像和GAN先验的两种信息特征。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，Panini-Net在多退化人脸修复和人脸超分辨率任务中取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: Panini-Net通过引入退化感知特征插值模块，有效提升了人脸修复的质量，展示了其在可编辑修复任务中的潜力。

authors_text: Wenxuan Wang,Wenxiang Jiao,Yongchang Hao,Xing Wang,Shuming Shi,Zhaopeng Tu,Michael Lyu
title: Understanding and Improving Sequence-to-Sequence Pretraining for Neural Machine Translation
title_zh: 理解和改进神经机器翻译的序列到序列预训练
abstract: In this paper, we present a substantial step in better understanding the SOTA sequence-to-sequence (Seq2Seq) pretraining for neural machine translation~(NMT). We focus on studying the impact of the jointly pretrained decoder, which is the main difference between Seq2Seq pretraining and previous encoder-based pretraining approaches for NMT. By carefully designing experiments on three language pairs, we find that Seq2Seq pretraining is a double-edged sword: On one hand, it helps NMT models to produce more diverse translations and reduce adequacy-related translation errors. On the other hand, the discrepancies between Seq2Seq pretraining and NMT finetuning limit the translation quality (i.e., domain discrepancy) and induce the over-estimation issue (i.e., objective discrepancy). Based on these observations, we further propose simple and effective strategies, named in-domain pretraining and input adaptation to remedy the domain and objective discrepancies, respectively. Experimental results on several language pairs show that our approach can consistently improve both translation performance and model robustness upon Seq2Seq pretraining.
summary: In this paper, we present a substantial step in better understanding the SOTA sequence-to-sequence (Seq2Seq) pretraining for neural machine translation~(NMT). We focus on studying the impact of the jointly pretrained decoder, which is the main difference between Seq2Seq pretraining and previous encoder-based pretraining approaches for NMT. By carefully designing experiments on three language pairs, we find that Seq2Seq pretraining is a double-edged sword: On one hand, it helps NMT models to produce more diverse translations and reduce adequacy-related translation errors. On the other hand, the discrepancies between Seq2Seq pretraining and NMT finetuning limit the translation quality (i.e., domain discrepancy) and induce the over-estimation issue (i.e., objective discrepancy). Based on these observations, we further propose simple and effective strategies, named in-domain pretraining and input adaptation to remedy the domain and objective discrepancies, respectively. Experimental results on several language pairs show that our approach can consistently improve both translation performance and model robustness upon Seq2Seq pretraining.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们在更好地理解神经机器翻译（NMT）的 SOTA 序列到序列（Seq2Seq）预训练方面迈出了实质性的一步。我们重点研究联合预训练解码器的影响，这是 Seq2Seq 预训练与之前基于编码器的 NMT 预训练方法之间的主要区别。通过在三种语言对上精心设计实验，我们发现 Seq2Seq 预训练是一把双刃剑：一方面，它有助于 NMT 模型产生更多样化的翻译并减少与充分性相关的翻译错误。另一方面，Seq2Seq 预训练和 NMT 微调之间的差异限制了翻译质量（即领域差异）并引发高估问题（即客观差异）。基于这些观察，我们进一步提出了简单而有效的策略，称为域内预训练和输入适应，分别弥补域和目标的差异。多个语言对的实验结果表明，我们的方法可以持续提高 Seq2Seq 预训练的翻译性能和模型鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在深入理解并改进序列到序列（Seq2Seq）预训练在神经机器翻译（NMT）中的应用，解决其带来的领域差异和目标差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对Seq2Seq预训练在NMT中的影响缺乏深入理解，尤其其双刃剑效应（如翻译多样性提升与领域/目标差异问题）亟待解决。
AI.method: 通过设计多语言对实验，分析Seq2Seq预训练的双刃剑效应，并提出两种策略：in-domain预训练以减少领域差异，输入适应以缓解目标差异。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在多个语言对上显著提升了翻译质量与模型鲁棒性，有效缓解了预训练与微调间的差异问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了Seq2Seq预训练的双刃剑特性，并提出简单有效的改进策略，为NMT模型优化提供了新思路。

search_text: Understanding and Improving Sequence-to-Sequence Pretraining for Neural Machine Translation 理解和改进神经机器翻译的序列到序列预训练 In this paper, we present a substantial step in better understanding the SOTA sequence-to-sequence (Seq2Seq) pretraining for neural machine translation~(NMT). We focus on studying the impact of the jointly pretrained decoder, which is the main difference between Seq2Seq pretraining and previous encoder-based pretraining approaches for NMT. By carefully designing experiments on three language pairs, we find that Seq2Seq pretraining is a double-edged sword: On one hand, it helps NMT models to produce more diverse translations and reduce adequacy-related translation errors. On the other hand, the discrepancies between Seq2Seq pretraining and NMT finetuning limit the translation quality (i.e., domain discrepancy) and induce the over-estimation issue (i.e., objective discrepancy). Based on these observations, we further propose simple and effective strategies, named in-domain pretraining and input adaptation to remedy the domain and objective discrepancies, respectively. Experimental results on several language pairs show that our approach can consistently improve both translation performance and model robustness upon Seq2Seq pretraining. 在本文中，我们在更好地理解神经机器翻译（NMT）的 SOTA 序列到序列（Seq2Seq）预训练方面迈出了实质性的一步。我们重点研究联合预训练解码器的影响，这是 Seq2Seq 预训练与之前基于编码器的 NMT 预训练方法之间的主要区别。通过在三种语言对上精心设计实验，我们发现 Seq2Seq 预训练是一把双刃剑：一方面，它有助于 NMT 模型产生更多样化的翻译并减少与充分性相关的翻译错误。另一方面，Seq2Seq 预训练和 NMT 微调之间的差异限制了翻译质量（即领域差异）并引发高估问题（即客观差异）。基于这些观察，我们进一步提出了简单而有效的策略，称为域内预训练和输入适应，分别弥补域和目标的差异。多个语言对的实验结果表明，我们的方法可以持续提高 Seq2Seq 预训练的翻译性能和模型鲁棒性。 本文旨在深入理解并改进序列到序列（Seq2Seq）预训练在神经机器翻译（NMT）中的应用，解决其带来的领域差异和目标差异问题。 Wenxuan Wang,Wenxiang Jiao,Yongchang Hao,Xing Wang,Shuming Shi,Zhaopeng Tu,Michael Lyu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Feiyang Cai,Zhenkai Zhang,Jie Liu,Xenofon Koutsoukos
title: Open Set Recognition using Vision Transformer with an Additional Detection Head
title_zh: 使用 Vision Transformer 和附加检测头进行开集识别
abstract: Deep neural networks have demonstrated prominent capacities for image classification tasks in a closed set setting, where the test data come from the same distribution as the training data. However, in a more realistic open set scenario, traditional classifiers with incomplete knowledge cannot tackle test data that are not from the training classes. Open set recognition (OSR) aims to address this problem by both identifying unknown classes and distinguishing known classes simultaneously. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to OSR that is based on the vision transformer (ViT) technique. Specifically, our approach employs two separate training stages. First, a ViT model is trained to perform closed set classification. Then, an additional detection head is attached to the embedded features extracted by the ViT, trained to force the representations of known data to class-specific clusters compactly. Test examples are identified as known or unknown based on their distance to the cluster centers. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time to leverage ViT for the purpose of OSR, and our extensive evaluation against several OSR benchmark datasets reveals that our approach significantly outperforms other baseline methods and obtains new state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Deep neural networks have demonstrated prominent capacities for image classification tasks in a closed set setting, where the test data come from the same distribution as the training data. However, in a more realistic open set scenario, traditional classifiers with incomplete knowledge cannot tackle test data that are not from the training classes. Open set recognition (OSR) aims to address this problem by both identifying unknown classes and distinguishing known classes simultaneously. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to OSR that is based on the vision transformer (ViT) technique. Specifically, our approach employs two separate training stages. First, a ViT model is trained to perform closed set classification. Then, an additional detection head is attached to the embedded features extracted by the ViT, trained to force the representations of known data to class-specific clusters compactly. Test examples are identified as known or unknown based on their distance to the cluster centers. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time to leverage ViT for the purpose of OSR, and our extensive evaluation against several OSR benchmark datasets reveals that our approach significantly outperforms other baseline methods and obtains new state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在封闭集设置中表现出了出色的图像分类任务能力，其中测试数据与训练数据具有相同的分布。然而，在更现实的开放集场景中，具有不完整知识的传统分类器无法处理非来自训练类的测试数据。开放集识别（OSR）旨在通过同时识别未知类和区分已知类来解决这个问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于视觉变换器（ViT）技术的 OSR 新颖方法。具体来说，我们的方法采用两个独立的训练阶段。首先，训练 ViT 模型来执行闭集分类。然后，将一个额外的检测头附加到 ViT 提取的嵌入特征上，经过训练，将已知数据的表示强制紧凑地转换为特定于类的集群。根据测试示例到聚类中心的距离，将测试示例识别为已知或未知。据我们所知，这是第一次利用 ViT 来实现 OSR，我们对多个 OSR 基准数据集的广泛评估表明，我们的方法明显优于其他基线方法，并获得了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉Transformer（ViT）的开放集识别方法，通过添加检测头实现对已知和未知类别的联合识别。
AI.motivation: 传统分类器在开放集场景下无法处理训练类别之外的测试数据，而现有方法在开放集识别任务中存在性能不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用两阶段训练：首先训练ViT进行封闭集分类，随后添加检测头对ViT提取的嵌入特征进行训练，使已知类别特征聚类紧凑，通过距离聚类中心判断测试样本归属。
AI.result: 在多个开放集基准数据集上显著优于现有基线方法，取得新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 首次将ViT应用于开放集识别，通过特征聚类与检测头联合优化有效提升了开放集场景下的分类能力。

authors_text: Won-Gook Choi,Joon-Hyuk Chang,Jae-Mo Yang,Han-Gil Moon
title: Instance-level loss based multiple-instance learning framework for acoustic scene classification
title_zh: 用于声学场景分类的基于实例级损失的多实例学习框架
abstract: In the acoustic scene classification (ASC) task, an acoustic scene consists of diverse sounds and is inferred by identifying combinations of distinct attributes among them. This study aims to extract and cluster these attributes effectively using an improved multiple-instance learning (MIL) framework for ASC. MIL, known as a weakly supervised learning method, is a strategy for extracting an instance from a bundle of frames composing an input audio clip and inferring a scene corresponding to the input data using these unlabeled instances. However, many studies pointed out an underestimation problem of MIL. In this study, we develop a MIL framework more suitable for ASC systems by defining instance-level labels and loss to extract and cluster instances effectively. Furthermore, we design a fully separated convolutional module, which is a lightweight neural network comprising pointwise, frequency-sided depthwise, and temporal-sided depthwise convolutional filters. As a result, compared to vanilla MIL, the confidence and proportion of positive instances increase significantly, overcoming the underestimation problem and improving the classification accuracy up to 11%. The proposed system achieved a performance of 81.1% and 72.3% on the TAU urban acoustic scenes 2019 and 2020 mobile datasets with 139 K parameters, respectively. Especially, it achieves the highest performance among the systems having under the 1 M parameters on the TAU urban acoustic scenes 2019 dataset.
summary: In the acoustic scene classification (ASC) task, an acoustic scene consists of diverse sounds and is inferred by identifying combinations of distinct attributes among them. This study aims to extract and cluster these attributes effectively using an improved multiple-instance learning (MIL) framework for ASC. MIL, known as a weakly supervised learning method, is a strategy for extracting an instance from a bundle of frames composing an input audio clip and inferring a scene corresponding to the input data using these unlabeled instances. However, many studies pointed out an underestimation problem of MIL. In this study, we develop a MIL framework more suitable for ASC systems by defining instance-level labels and loss to extract and cluster instances effectively. Furthermore, we design a fully separated convolutional module, which is a lightweight neural network comprising pointwise, frequency-sided depthwise, and temporal-sided depthwise convolutional filters. As a result, compared to vanilla MIL, the confidence and proportion of positive instances increase significantly, overcoming the underestimation problem and improving the classification accuracy up to 11%. The proposed system achieved a performance of 81.1% and 72.3% on the TAU urban acoustic scenes 2019 and 2020 mobile datasets with 139 K parameters, respectively. Especially, it achieves the highest performance among the systems having under the 1 M parameters on the TAU urban acoustic scenes 2019 dataset.
abstract_zh: 在声学场景分类（ASC）任务中，声学场景由不同的声音组成，并通过识别其中不同属性的组合来推断。本研究旨在使用改进的 ASC 多实例学习 (MIL) 框架有效地提取和聚类这些属性。 MIL，被称为弱监督学习方法，是一种从组成输入音频剪辑的帧束中提取实例并使用这些未标记的实例推断与输入数据相对应的场景的策略。然而，许多研究指出了MIL的低估问题。在本研究中，我们通过定义实例级标签和损失来有效地提取和聚类实例，开发了一个更适合 ASC 系统的 MIL 框架。此外，我们设计了一个完全分离的卷积模块，它是一个轻量级神经网络，包含点、频率侧深度和时间侧深度卷积滤波器。结果，与 vanilla MIL 相比，正实例的置信度和比例显着增加，克服了低估问题，并将分类准确率提高了 11%。所提出的系统在具有 139 K 参数的 TAU 城市声学场景 2019 和 2020 移动数据集上分别实现了 81.1% 和 72.3% 的性能。特别是，它在 2019 年 TAU 城市声学场景数据集上实现了 1 M 参数以下系统中的最高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于实例级损失的改进型多实例学习框架，用于提升声学场景分类的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统多实例学习（MIL）在声学场景分类中存在对正样本的低估问题，导致分类精度不足，需通过引入实例级标签和损失函数优化解决此问题。
AI.method: 设计包含实例级标签和损失函数的改进MIL框架，并开发轻量级全分离卷积模块（含点卷积、频域深度卷积和时域深度卷积）以有效提取和聚类声学特征。
AI.result: 在TAU城市声学场景2019和2020数据集上分别达到81.1%和72.3%的分类准确率，参数量仅139K，且在1M参数以下模型中性能最优。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过实例级优化和轻量卷积模块有效解决了MIL的低估问题，在保持参数效率的同时显著提升了声学场景分类精度。

search_text: Instance-level loss based multiple-instance learning framework for acoustic scene classification 用于声学场景分类的基于实例级损失的多实例学习框架 In the acoustic scene classification (ASC) task, an acoustic scene consists of diverse sounds and is inferred by identifying combinations of distinct attributes among them. This study aims to extract and cluster these attributes effectively using an improved multiple-instance learning (MIL) framework for ASC. MIL, known as a weakly supervised learning method, is a strategy for extracting an instance from a bundle of frames composing an input audio clip and inferring a scene corresponding to the input data using these unlabeled instances. However, many studies pointed out an underestimation problem of MIL. In this study, we develop a MIL framework more suitable for ASC systems by defining instance-level labels and loss to extract and cluster instances effectively. Furthermore, we design a fully separated convolutional module, which is a lightweight neural network comprising pointwise, frequency-sided depthwise, and temporal-sided depthwise convolutional filters. As a result, compared to vanilla MIL, the confidence and proportion of positive instances increase significantly, overcoming the underestimation problem and improving the classification accuracy up to 11%. The proposed system achieved a performance of 81.1% and 72.3% on the TAU urban acoustic scenes 2019 and 2020 mobile datasets with 139 K parameters, respectively. Especially, it achieves the highest performance among the systems having under the 1 M parameters on the TAU urban acoustic scenes 2019 dataset. 在声学场景分类（ASC）任务中，声学场景由不同的声音组成，并通过识别其中不同属性的组合来推断。本研究旨在使用改进的 ASC 多实例学习 (MIL) 框架有效地提取和聚类这些属性。 MIL，被称为弱监督学习方法，是一种从组成输入音频剪辑的帧束中提取实例并使用这些未标记的实例推断与输入数据相对应的场景的策略。然而，许多研究指出了MIL的低估问题。在本研究中，我们通过定义实例级标签和损失来有效地提取和聚类实例，开发了一个更适合 ASC 系统的 MIL 框架。此外，我们设计了一个完全分离的卷积模块，它是一个轻量级神经网络，包含点、频率侧深度和时间侧深度卷积滤波器。结果，与 vanilla MIL 相比，正实例的置信度和比例显着增加，克服了低估问题，并将分类准确率提高了 11%。所提出的系统在具有 139 K 参数的 TAU 城市声学场景 2019 和 2020 移动数据集上分别实现了 81.1% 和 72.3% 的性能。特别是，它在 2019 年 TAU 城市声学场景数据集上实现了 1 M 参数以下系统中的最高性能。 本文提出了一种基于实例级损失的改进型多实例学习框架，用于提升声学场景分类的性能。 Won-Gook Choi,Joon-Hyuk Chang,Jae-Mo Yang,Han-Gil Moon cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Kaizhang Kang,Chong Zeng,Hongzhi Wu,Kun Zhou
title: DiFT: Differentiable Differential Feature Transform for Multi-View Stereo
title_zh: DiFT：多视图立体的可微差分特征变换
abstract: We present a novel framework to automatically learn to transform the differential cues from a stack of images densely captured with a rotational motion into spatially discriminative and view-invariant per-pixel features at each view. These low-level features can be directly fed to any existing multi-view stereo technique for enhanced 3D reconstruction. The lighting condition during acquisition can also be jointly optimized in a differentiable fashion. We sample from a dozen of pre-scanned objects with a wide variety of geometry and reflectance to synthesize a large amount of high-quality training data. The effectiveness of our features is demonstrated on a number of challenging objects acquired with a lightstage, comparing favorably with state-of-the-art techniques. Finally, we explore additional applications of geometric detail visualization and computational stylization of complex appearance.
summary: We present a novel framework to automatically learn to transform the differential cues from a stack of images densely captured with a rotational motion into spatially discriminative and view-invariant per-pixel features at each view. These low-level features can be directly fed to any existing multi-view stereo technique for enhanced 3D reconstruction. The lighting condition during acquisition can also be jointly optimized in a differentiable fashion. We sample from a dozen of pre-scanned objects with a wide variety of geometry and reflectance to synthesize a large amount of high-quality training data. The effectiveness of our features is demonstrated on a number of challenging objects acquired with a lightstage, comparing favorably with state-of-the-art techniques. Finally, we explore additional applications of geometric detail visualization and computational stylization of complex appearance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的框架，可以自动学习将通过旋转运动密集捕获的一堆图像中的差异线索转换为每个视图的空间辨别性和视图不变的每像素特征。这些低级特征可以直接输入到任何现有的多视图立体技术中，以实现增强的 3D 重建。采集期间的照明条件也可以以可微分的方式联合优化。我们从十几个具有各种几何形状和反射率的预扫描物体中进行采样，以合成大量高质量的训练数据。我们的功能的有效性在通过光台获取的许多具有挑战性的物体上得到了证明，与最先进的技术相比毫不逊色。最后，我们探索几何细节可视化和复杂外观计算风格化的其他应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可微分的微分特征转换框架DiFT，用于多视图立体视觉，通过学习视角不变的像素级特征提升三维重建效果。
AI.motivation: 传统多视图立体技术难以处理复杂光照和视角变化，导致重建质量受限，需自动学习鲁棒的特征表示以提升性能。
AI.method: 通过旋转运动捕获的图像栈，利用可微分网络学习转换微分线索为视角不变特征，联合优化光照条件，并基于合成数据训练模型。
AI.result: 在多个复杂物体的lightstage数据集上，DiFT生成的特征优于现有方法，且支持几何细节可视化与外观风格化应用。
AI.conclusion: DiFT有效提升了多视图立体重建质量，其可微分特性与特征泛化能力为后续几何处理提供了新方向。

authors_text: Kerry He,Pradeepsundar Simini,Wesley Chan,Dana Kulić,Elizabeth Croft,Akansel Cosgun
title: On-The-Go Robot-to-Human Handovers with a Mobile Manipulator
title_zh: 使用移动机械手进行移动机器人与人类的交接
comment: 6 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables, submitted to RO-MAN 2022
comments: 6 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables, submitted to RO-MAN 2022
abstract: Existing approaches to direct robot-to-human handovers are typically implemented on fixed-base robot arms, or on mobile manipulators that come to a full stop before performing the handover. We propose "on-the-go" handovers which permit a moving mobile manipulator to hand over an object to a human without stopping. The on-the-go handover motion is generated with a reactive controller that allows simultaneous control of the base and the arm. In a user study, human receivers subjectively assessed on-the-go handovers to be more efficient, predictable, natural, better timed and safer than handovers that implemented a "stop-and-deliver" behavior.
summary: Existing approaches to direct robot-to-human handovers are typically implemented on fixed-base robot arms, or on mobile manipulators that come to a full stop before performing the handover. We propose "on-the-go" handovers which permit a moving mobile manipulator to hand over an object to a human without stopping. The on-the-go handover motion is generated with a reactive controller that allows simultaneous control of the base and the arm. In a user study, human receivers subjectively assessed on-the-go handovers to be more efficient, predictable, natural, better timed and safer than handovers that implemented a "stop-and-deliver" behavior.
abstract_zh: 现有的直接机器人与人类交接的方法通常是在固定底座机器人手臂上实现的，或者在执行交接之前完全停止的移动机械臂上实现的。我们提出“移动”切换，允许移动的移动机械手不间断地将物体移交给人类。移动中的切换动作由反应控制器生成，该控制器允许同时控制底座和手臂。在一项用户研究中，接收者主观评估了移动切换比实现“停止并传送”行为的切换更高效、可预测、自然、更及时且更安全。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种移动机械臂在行进过程中无需停止即可完成机器人到人类交接的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人交接方案需依赖固定底座或移动机械臂完全停止，导致效率低且不够自然。
AI.method: 设计反应式控制器实现移动底座与机械臂的协同控制，生成行进中交接轨迹。
AI.result: 用户研究显示该方法在效率、可预测性、自然度、时机把握和安全性方面优于传统停止-交付方式。
AI.conclusion: 行进中交接方法能提升人机协作流畅性，为移动机器人实际应用提供更优解决方案。

authors_text: Guanqi Ding,Xinzhe Han,Shuhui Wang,Shuzhe Wu,Xin Jin,Dandan Tu,Qingming Huang
title: Attribute Group Editing for Reliable Few-shot Image Generation
title_zh: 用于可靠的少样本图像生成的属性组编辑
abstract: Few-shot image generation is a challenging task even using the state-of-the-art Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). Due to the unstable GAN training process and the limited training data, the generated images are often of low quality and low diversity. In this work, we propose a new editing-based method, i.e., Attribute Group Editing (AGE), for few-shot image generation. The basic assumption is that any image is a collection of attributes and the editing direction for a specific attribute is shared across all categories. AGE examines the internal representation learned in GANs and identifies semantically meaningful directions. Specifically, the class embedding, i.e., the mean vector of the latent codes from a specific category, is used to represent the category-relevant attributes, and the category-irrelevant attributes are learned globally by Sparse Dictionary Learning on the difference between the sample embedding and the class embedding. Given a GAN well trained on seen categories, diverse images of unseen categories can be synthesized through editing category-irrelevant attributes while keeping category-relevant attributes unchanged. Without re-training the GAN, AGE is capable of not only producing more realistic and diverse images for downstream visual applications with limited data but achieving controllable image editing with interpretable category-irrelevant directions.
summary: Few-shot image generation is a challenging task even using the state-of-the-art Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). Due to the unstable GAN training process and the limited training data, the generated images are often of low quality and low diversity. In this work, we propose a new editing-based method, i.e., Attribute Group Editing (AGE), for few-shot image generation. The basic assumption is that any image is a collection of attributes and the editing direction for a specific attribute is shared across all categories. AGE examines the internal representation learned in GANs and identifies semantically meaningful directions. Specifically, the class embedding, i.e., the mean vector of the latent codes from a specific category, is used to represent the category-relevant attributes, and the category-irrelevant attributes are learned globally by Sparse Dictionary Learning on the difference between the sample embedding and the class embedding. Given a GAN well trained on seen categories, diverse images of unseen categories can be synthesized through editing category-irrelevant attributes while keeping category-relevant attributes unchanged. Without re-training the GAN, AGE is capable of not only producing more realistic and diverse images for downstream visual applications with limited data but achieving controllable image editing with interpretable category-irrelevant directions.
abstract_zh: 即使使用最先进的生成对抗网络（GAN），少量图像的生成也是一项具有挑战性的任务。由于GAN训练过程不稳定且训练数据有限，生成的图像往往质量低、多样性低。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的基于编辑的方法，即属性组编辑（AGE），用于少样本图像生成。基本假设是任何图像都是属性的集合，并且特定属性的编辑方向在所有类别之间共享。 AGE 检查 GAN 中学习的内部表示并识别语义上有意义的方向。具体来说，类嵌入，即来自特定类别的潜在代码的均值向量，用于表示与类别相关的属性，并且通过稀疏字典学习根据样本嵌入和类嵌入之间的差异来全局学习与类别无关的属性。如果 GAN 在已见类别上经过良好训练，则可以通过编辑与类别无关的属性来合成未见类别的各种图像，同时保持类别相关属性不变。在不重新训练 GAN 的情况下，AGE 不仅能够利用有限的数据为下游视觉应用生成更真实和多样化的图像，而且能够通过可解释的与类别无关的方向实现可控的图像编辑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于属性组编辑（AGE）的方法，用于在少量样本情况下生成高质量且多样化的图像。
AI.motivation: 现有生成对抗网络（GAN）在少量样本图像生成任务中存在训练不稳定、生成图像质量低和多样性不足的问题。
AI.method: 通过分析GAN内部表示，AGE将图像属性分为类别相关和无关属性。利用类别嵌入表示相关属性，通过稀疏字典学习提取无关属性方向，并在保持相关属性不变的前提下编辑无关属性实现生成。
AI.result: 无需重新训练GAN即可生成更真实、多样化的未见过类别的图像，并实现可解释的可控图像编辑。
AI.conclusion: AGE通过解耦属性方向有效解决了少样本图像生成的挑战，为下游视觉应用提供了可靠且可解释的生成方案。

search_text: Attribute Group Editing for Reliable Few-shot Image Generation 用于可靠的少样本图像生成的属性组编辑 Few-shot image generation is a challenging task even using the state-of-the-art Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). Due to the unstable GAN training process and the limited training data, the generated images are often of low quality and low diversity. In this work, we propose a new editing-based method, i.e., Attribute Group Editing (AGE), for few-shot image generation. The basic assumption is that any image is a collection of attributes and the editing direction for a specific attribute is shared across all categories. AGE examines the internal representation learned in GANs and identifies semantically meaningful directions. Specifically, the class embedding, i.e., the mean vector of the latent codes from a specific category, is used to represent the category-relevant attributes, and the category-irrelevant attributes are learned globally by Sparse Dictionary Learning on the difference between the sample embedding and the class embedding. Given a GAN well trained on seen categories, diverse images of unseen categories can be synthesized through editing category-irrelevant attributes while keeping category-relevant attributes unchanged. Without re-training the GAN, AGE is capable of not only producing more realistic and diverse images for downstream visual applications with limited data but achieving controllable image editing with interpretable category-irrelevant directions. 即使使用最先进的生成对抗网络（GAN），少量图像的生成也是一项具有挑战性的任务。由于GAN训练过程不稳定且训练数据有限，生成的图像往往质量低、多样性低。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的基于编辑的方法，即属性组编辑（AGE），用于少样本图像生成。基本假设是任何图像都是属性的集合，并且特定属性的编辑方向在所有类别之间共享。 AGE 检查 GAN 中学习的内部表示并识别语义上有意义的方向。具体来说，类嵌入，即来自特定类别的潜在代码的均值向量，用于表示与类别相关的属性，并且通过稀疏字典学习根据样本嵌入和类嵌入之间的差异来全局学习与类别无关的属性。如果 GAN 在已见类别上经过良好训练，则可以通过编辑与类别无关的属性来合成未见类别的各种图像，同时保持类别相关属性不变。在不重新训练 GAN 的情况下，AGE 不仅能够利用有限的数据为下游视觉应用生成更真实和多样化的图像，而且能够通过可解释的与类别无关的方向实现可控的图像编辑。 本文提出了一种基于属性组编辑（AGE）的方法，用于在少量样本情况下生成高质量且多样化的图像。 Guanqi Ding,Xinzhe Han,Shuhui Wang,Shuzhe Wu,Xin Jin,Dandan Tu,Qingming Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Chunmeng Liu,Enze Xie,Wenjia Wang,Wenhai Wang,Guangyao Li,Ping Luo
title: WegFormer: Transformers for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: WegFormer：用于弱监督语义分割的 Transformer
abstract: Although convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved remarkable progress in weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS), the effective receptive field of CNN is insufficient to capture global context information, leading to sub-optimal results. Inspired by the great success of Transformers in fundamental vision areas, this work for the first time introduces Transformer to build a simple and effective WSSS framework, termed WegFormer. Unlike existing CNN-based methods, WegFormer uses Vision Transformer (ViT) as a classifier to produce high-quality pseudo segmentation masks. To this end, we introduce three tailored components in our Transformer-based framework, which are (1) a Deep Taylor Decomposition (DTD) to generate attention maps, (2) a soft erasing module to smooth the attention maps, and (3) an efficient potential object mining (EPOM) to filter noisy activation in the background. Without any bells and whistles, WegFormer achieves state-of-the-art 70.5% mIoU on the PASCAL VOC dataset, significantly outperforming the previous best method. We hope WegFormer provides a new perspective to tap the potential of Transformer in weakly supervised semantic segmentation. Code will be released.
summary: Although convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved remarkable progress in weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS), the effective receptive field of CNN is insufficient to capture global context information, leading to sub-optimal results. Inspired by the great success of Transformers in fundamental vision areas, this work for the first time introduces Transformer to build a simple and effective WSSS framework, termed WegFormer. Unlike existing CNN-based methods, WegFormer uses Vision Transformer (ViT) as a classifier to produce high-quality pseudo segmentation masks. To this end, we introduce three tailored components in our Transformer-based framework, which are (1) a Deep Taylor Decomposition (DTD) to generate attention maps, (2) a soft erasing module to smooth the attention maps, and (3) an efficient potential object mining (EPOM) to filter noisy activation in the background. Without any bells and whistles, WegFormer achieves state-of-the-art 70.5% mIoU on the PASCAL VOC dataset, significantly outperforming the previous best method. We hope WegFormer provides a new perspective to tap the potential of Transformer in weakly supervised semantic segmentation. Code will be released.
abstract_zh: 尽管卷积神经网络（CNN）在弱监督语义分割（WSSS）方面取得了显着的进展，但CNN的有效感受野不足以捕获全局上下文信息，导致结果次优。受到 Transformers 在基础视觉领域取得巨大成功的启发，本工作首次引入 Transformer 来构建一个简单有效的 WSSS 框架，称为 WegFormer。与现有的基于 CNN 的方法不同，WegFormer 使用 Vision Transformer (ViT) 作为分类器来生成高质量的伪分割掩模。为此，我们在基于 Transformer 的框架中引入了三个定制组件，它们是（1）用于生成注意力图的深度泰勒分解（DTD），（2）用于平滑注意力图的软擦除模块，以及（3）用于过滤背景中的噪声激活的高效潜在对象挖掘（EPOM）。在没有任何附加功能的情况下，WegFormer 在 PASCAL VOC 数据集上实现了最先进的 70.5% mIoU，显着优于之前的最佳方法。我们希望 WegFormer 提供一个新的视角来挖掘 Transformer 在弱监督语义分割方面的潜力。代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WegFormer框架，利用Transformer模型解决弱监督语义分割问题。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络（CNN）在弱监督语义分割中因感受野有限难以捕捉全局上下文信息，而Transformer在视觉任务中表现出色，因此引入Transformer改进分割效果。
AI.method: 基于Vision Transformer（ViT）构建框架，包含三个关键模块：深度泰勒分解生成注意力图、软擦除模块平滑注意力图、高效潜在目标挖掘模块过滤背景噪声。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC数据集上达到70.5%的mIoU，显著优于先前最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: WegFormer为Transformer在弱监督语义分割领域的应用提供了新视角，验证了其潜力。

authors_text: Vidya Setlur,Melanie Tory
title: How do you Converse with an Analytical Chatbot? Revisiting Gricean Maxims for Designing Analytical Conversational Behavior
title_zh: 如何与分析聊天机器人交谈？重新审视格莱斯格言来设计分析性对话行为
abstract: Chatbots have garnered interest as conversational interfaces for a variety of tasks. While general design guidelines exist for chatbot interfaces, little work explores analytical chatbots that support conversing with data. We explore Gricean Maxims to help inform the basic design of effective conversational interaction. We also draw inspiration from natural language interfaces for data exploration to support ambiguity and intent handling. We ran Wizard of Oz studies with 30 participants to evaluate user expectations for text and voice chatbot design variants. Results identified preferences for intent interpretation and revealed variations in user expectations based on the interface affordances. We subsequently conducted an exploratory analysis of three analytical chatbot systems (text + chart, voice + chart, voice-only) that implement these preferred design variants. Empirical evidence from a second 30-participant study informs implications specific to data-driven conversation such as interpreting intent, data orientation, and establishing trust through appropriate system responses.
summary: Chatbots have garnered interest as conversational interfaces for a variety of tasks. While general design guidelines exist for chatbot interfaces, little work explores analytical chatbots that support conversing with data. We explore Gricean Maxims to help inform the basic design of effective conversational interaction. We also draw inspiration from natural language interfaces for data exploration to support ambiguity and intent handling. We ran Wizard of Oz studies with 30 participants to evaluate user expectations for text and voice chatbot design variants. Results identified preferences for intent interpretation and revealed variations in user expectations based on the interface affordances. We subsequently conducted an exploratory analysis of three analytical chatbot systems (text + chart, voice + chart, voice-only) that implement these preferred design variants. Empirical evidence from a second 30-participant study informs implications specific to data-driven conversation such as interpreting intent, data orientation, and establishing trust through appropriate system responses.
abstract_zh: 聊天机器人作为各种任务的对话界面引起了人们的兴趣。虽然聊天机器人界面存在通用设计指南，但很少有工作探索支持数据对话的分析聊天机器人。我们探索格莱斯格言来帮助指导有效对话交互的基本设计。我们还从数据探索的自然语言界面中汲取灵感，以支持歧义和意图处理。我们对 30 名参与者进行了绿野仙踪研究，以评估用户对文本和语音聊天机器人设计变体的期望。结果确定了意图解释的偏好，并揭示了基于界面可供性的用户期望的变化。随后，我们对实现这些首选设计变体的三个分析聊天机器人系统（文本+图表、语音+图表、纯语音）进行了探索性分析。第二项 30 名参与者研究的经验证据揭示了数据驱动对话的具体含义，例如解释意图、数据导向以及通过适当的系统响应建立信任。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何基于Gricean准则设计分析型聊天机器人的对话行为，并通过实验验证不同界面设计对用户交互的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有聊天机器人设计指南缺乏对数据驱动对话场景的支持，需探索符合用户意图解析与数据交互需求的新型分析型聊天机器人设计框架。
AI.method: 采用Wizard of Oz实验法，招募30名用户评估文本/语音界面变体，再通过三类分析聊天机器人系统（文本+图表、语音+图表、纯语音）进行探索性研究，并收集30名用户的实证数据。
AI.result: 用户偏好明确意图解析，界面功能显著影响交互预期；数据驱动对话需注重意图识别、数据导向性及通过系统响应建立信任。
AI.conclusion: 基于Gricean准则与自然语言接口的设计方法能有效指导分析型聊天机器人开发，界面特性与数据交互机制的优化是提升用户体验的关键。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨如何基于Gricean准则设计分析型聊天机器人的对话行为，并通过实验验证不同界面设计对用户交互的影响。
ai_content.motivation: 现有聊天机器人设计指南缺乏对数据驱动对话场景的支持，需探索符合用户意图解析与数据交互需求的新型分析型聊天机器人设计框架。
ai_content.method: 采用Wizard of Oz实验法，招募30名用户评估文本/语音界面变体，再通过三类分析聊天机器人系统（文本+图表、语音+图表、纯语音）进行探索性研究，并收集30名用户的实证数据。
ai_content.result: 用户偏好明确意图解析，界面功能显著影响交互预期；数据驱动对话需注重意图识别、数据导向性及通过系统响应建立信任。
ai_content.conclusion: 基于Gricean准则与自然语言接口的设计方法能有效指导分析型聊天机器人开发，界面特性与数据交互机制的优化是提升用户体验的关键。

search_text: How do you Converse with an Analytical Chatbot? Revisiting Gricean Maxims for Designing Analytical Conversational Behavior 如何与分析聊天机器人交谈？重新审视格莱斯格言来设计分析性对话行为 Chatbots have garnered interest as conversational interfaces for a variety of tasks. While general design guidelines exist for chatbot interfaces, little work explores analytical chatbots that support conversing with data. We explore Gricean Maxims to help inform the basic design of effective conversational interaction. We also draw inspiration from natural language interfaces for data exploration to support ambiguity and intent handling. We ran Wizard of Oz studies with 30 participants to evaluate user expectations for text and voice chatbot design variants. Results identified preferences for intent interpretation and revealed variations in user expectations based on the interface affordances. We subsequently conducted an exploratory analysis of three analytical chatbot systems (text + chart, voice + chart, voice-only) that implement these preferred design variants. Empirical evidence from a second 30-participant study informs implications specific to data-driven conversation such as interpreting intent, data orientation, and establishing trust through appropriate system responses. 聊天机器人作为各种任务的对话界面引起了人们的兴趣。虽然聊天机器人界面存在通用设计指南，但很少有工作探索支持数据对话的分析聊天机器人。我们探索格莱斯格言来帮助指导有效对话交互的基本设计。我们还从数据探索的自然语言界面中汲取灵感，以支持歧义和意图处理。我们对 30 名参与者进行了绿野仙踪研究，以评估用户对文本和语音聊天机器人设计变体的期望。结果确定了意图解释的偏好，并揭示了基于界面可供性的用户期望的变化。随后，我们对实现这些首选设计变体的三个分析聊天机器人系统（文本+图表、语音+图表、纯语音）进行了探索性分析。第二项 30 名参与者研究的经验证据揭示了数据驱动对话的具体含义，例如解释意图、数据导向以及通过适当的系统响应建立信任。 本文探讨如何基于Gricean准则设计分析型聊天机器人的对话行为，并通过实验验证不同界面设计对用户交互的影响。 Vidya Setlur,Melanie Tory cs.HC

authors_text: Mark Hamilton,Zhoutong Zhang,Bharath Hariharan,Noah Snavely,William T. Freeman
title: Unsupervised Semantic Segmentation by Distilling Feature Correspondences
title_zh: 通过提取特征对应进行无监督语义分割
abstract: Unsupervised semantic segmentation aims to discover and localize semantically meaningful categories within image corpora without any form of annotation. To solve this task, algorithms must produce features for every pixel that are both semantically meaningful and compact enough to form distinct clusters. Unlike previous works which achieve this with a single end-to-end framework, we propose to separate feature learning from cluster compactification. Empirically, we show that current unsupervised feature learning frameworks already generate dense features whose correlations are semantically consistent. This observation motivates us to design STEGO ($\textbf{S}$elf-supervised $\textbf{T}$ransformer with $\textbf{E}$nergy-based $\textbf{G}$raph $\textbf{O}$ptimization), a novel framework that distills unsupervised features into high-quality discrete semantic labels. At the core of STEGO is a novel contrastive loss function that encourages features to form compact clusters while preserving their relationships across the corpora. STEGO yields a significant improvement over the prior state of the art, on both the CocoStuff ($\textbf{+14 mIoU}$) and Cityscapes ($\textbf{+9 mIoU}$) semantic segmentation challenges.
summary: Unsupervised semantic segmentation aims to discover and localize semantically meaningful categories within image corpora without any form of annotation. To solve this task, algorithms must produce features for every pixel that are both semantically meaningful and compact enough to form distinct clusters. Unlike previous works which achieve this with a single end-to-end framework, we propose to separate feature learning from cluster compactification. Empirically, we show that current unsupervised feature learning frameworks already generate dense features whose correlations are semantically consistent. This observation motivates us to design STEGO ($\textbf{S}$elf-supervised $\textbf{T}$ransformer with $\textbf{E}$nergy-based $\textbf{G}$raph $\textbf{O}$ptimization), a novel framework that distills unsupervised features into high-quality discrete semantic labels. At the core of STEGO is a novel contrastive loss function that encourages features to form compact clusters while preserving their relationships across the corpora. STEGO yields a significant improvement over the prior state of the art, on both the CocoStuff ($\textbf{+14 mIoU}$) and Cityscapes ($\textbf{+9 mIoU}$) semantic segmentation challenges.
abstract_zh: 无监督语义分割旨在发现和定位图像语料库中具有语义意义的类别，而无需任何形式的注释。为了解决这个任务，算法必须为每个像素生成既具有语义意义又足够紧凑的特征，以形成不同的簇。与之前通过单个端到端框架实现这一目标的工作不同，我们建议将特征学习与集群压缩分开。根据经验，我们表明当前的无监督特征学习框架已经生成了密集的特征，其相关性在语义上是一致的。这一观察激励我们设计 STEGO（$\textbf{S}$elf-supervised $\textbf{T}$ransformer with $\textbf{E}$nergy-based $\textbf{G}$raph $\textbf{O}$ptimization），这是一种新颖的框架，可将无监督特征提炼为高质量的离散语义标签。 STEGO 的核心是一种新颖的对比损失函数，它鼓励特征形成紧凑的集群，同时保留它们在整个语料库中的关系。在 CocoStuff ($\textbf{+14 mIoU}$) 和 Cityscapes ($\textbf{+9 mIoU}$) 语义分割挑战上，STEGO 比现有技术有了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督语义分割方法STEGO，通过蒸馏特征对应关系生成高质量离散语义标签。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督特征学习框架已能生成语义一致的密集特征，但未有效分离特征学习与聚类优化过程，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计STEGO框架，核心为对比损失函数，通过能量图优化在保持特征间关系的同时形成紧凑聚类。
AI.result: 在CocoStuff和Cityscapes数据集上分别提升14 mIoU和9 mIoU，显著优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 解耦特征学习与聚类优化能有效提升无监督语义分割性能，为后续研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Chen-Yu Lee,Chun-Liang Li,Timothy Dozat,Vincent Perot,Guolong Su,Nan Hua,Joshua Ainslie,Renshen Wang,Yasuhisa Fujii,Tomas Pfister
title: FormNet: Structural Encoding beyond Sequential Modeling in Form Document Information Extraction
title_zh: FormNet：表单文档信息提取中超越顺序建模的结构编码
abstract: Sequence modeling has demonstrated state-of-the-art performance on natural language and document understanding tasks. However, it is challenging to correctly serialize tokens in form-like documents in practice due to their variety of layout patterns. We propose FormNet, a structure-aware sequence model to mitigate the suboptimal serialization of forms. First, we design Rich Attention that leverages the spatial relationship between tokens in a form for more precise attention score calculation. Second, we construct Super-Tokens for each word by embedding representations from their neighboring tokens through graph convolutions. FormNet therefore explicitly recovers local syntactic information that may have been lost during serialization. In experiments, FormNet outperforms existing methods with a more compact model size and less pre-training data, establishing new state-of-the-art performance on CORD, FUNSD and Payment benchmarks.
summary: Sequence modeling has demonstrated state-of-the-art performance on natural language and document understanding tasks. However, it is challenging to correctly serialize tokens in form-like documents in practice due to their variety of layout patterns. We propose FormNet, a structure-aware sequence model to mitigate the suboptimal serialization of forms. First, we design Rich Attention that leverages the spatial relationship between tokens in a form for more precise attention score calculation. Second, we construct Super-Tokens for each word by embedding representations from their neighboring tokens through graph convolutions. FormNet therefore explicitly recovers local syntactic information that may have been lost during serialization. In experiments, FormNet outperforms existing methods with a more compact model size and less pre-training data, establishing new state-of-the-art performance on CORD, FUNSD and Payment benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 序列建模在自然语言和文档理解任务上展示了最先进的性能。然而，由于布局模式多种多样，在实践中正确序列化类似表单的文档中的令牌具有挑战性。我们提出了 FormNet，一种结构感知序列模型，用于缓解表单序列化的次优问题。首先，我们设计了丰富的注意力，利用某种形式的标记之间的空间关系来进行更精确的注意力分数计算。其次，我们通过图卷积嵌入相邻标记的表示来为每个单词构建超级标记。因此，FormNet 显式恢复序列化期间可能丢失的本地语法信息。在实验中，FormNet 凭借更紧凑的模型大小和更少的预训练数据优于现有方法，在 CORD、FUNSD 和支付基准上建立了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出FormNet模型解决表格文档信息提取中的结构编码问题
AI.motivation: 传统序列模型难以处理表格文档复杂的布局结构，导致序列化标记不准确
AI.method: 设计Rich Attention机制捕捉空间关系，通过图卷积构建Super-Tokens恢复局部句法信息
AI.result: 在CORD/FUNS/Payment基准上取得新SOTA，模型更紧凑且预训练数据需求更少
AI.conclusion: 结构感知建模有效解决了表格文档信息提取的布局挑战
